| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100814110/523989296/-1146661722?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmZmMmFmZjktMWNkOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D-lmJpZesMVbXOGgIgz29v6qSNXNI26HIinbkON5pkw=)

| Peter,

Today, we should be celebrating the 52nd anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_. Instead, we’re marking 3 years since Trump’s conservative Supreme Court overturned it.

Since then, we’ve seen a relentless campaign to strip millions of Americans of their bodily autonomy. At the local, state, and federal levels, extreme Republicans have waged a relentless campaign against reproductive freedom. And with Trump back in office, they’re setting the stage for a federal ban.

But today, I choose to find empowerment in our wins. _7 out of 10 states voted to enshrine reproductive rights into their state constitutions, and today, still, a vast majority of Americans support protecting reproductive rights._ Though these wins may seem small in contrast to the disappointing election results, **they will be monumental in our efforts to protect reproductive rights nationwide.**

I will not be giving up in the face of flagrant abuses of power by the Trump administration and will continue to fight for the right to abortion here in Maryland and across the country.

**As I prepare to defend reproductive rights and fight back against abuses of power by the Trump administration, I’m also keeping my attention to the 2026 midterms. But, with a difficult year ahead, I could really use your support.[_The less time I spend fundraising, the more time I can spend delivering for Marylanders in Congress. Can I count on your support with a $10 contribution to my campaign?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100814111/523989297/-1146661722?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-22_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmZmMmFmZjktMWNkOS1lZjExLTg4ZDAtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZDkyIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D-lmJpZesMVbXOGgIgz29v6qSNXNI26HIinbkON5pkw=)**

name: Fight Trump
subject: Are things as bad as we think they are?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, in just two
days, Trump has rolled out a flurry of executive actions that are shocking
and scary. And Democrats are struggling to confront the sheer volume of
executive orders, pardons, and upheaval.

Frankly, Our Revolution needs a moment with our movement. We know folks
are overwhelmed, exhausted and angry. We need to know your thoughts on
what Trump has done and will do as we prepare to fight tooth and nail
against his administration. Can you take a minute to fill out a survey to
help us strategize and take on Trump?

First question: [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21233?source=email-20250122&t=1011&akid=7568%2E5885482%2EaN_9O- ]Do you think we have entered an unprecedented political
moment with Trump 2.0?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21233?source=email-20250122&t=1012&akid=7568%2E5885482%2EaN_9O- ]YES, DEFINITELY
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21233?source=email-20250122&t=1013&akid=7568%2E5885482%2EaN_9O- ]I THINK SO
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21233?source=email-20250122&t=1014&akid=7568%2E5885482%2EaN_9O- ]NOT REALLY

From environmental destruction to pardoning violent January 6 traitors to
handing over $500 billion to Big Tech (and much more), Trump is setting up
his unholy alliance between his government and corporate power.

A lot is coming at us, but we are not powerless. We have a concrete plan
to fight back against Trump and the Oligarchs, Transform the Party, and
Elect Progressives who will take a stand.

When we organize, we win.

clean_body: [ stdin# ][IMG] Peter Willis, in just two days, Trump has rolled out a flurry of executive actions that are shocking and scary. And Democrats are struggling to confront the sheer volume of executive orders, pardons, and upheaval. Frankly, Our Revolution needs a moment with our movement. We know folks are overwhelmed, exhausted and angry. We need to know your thoughts on what Trump has done and will do as we prepare to fight tooth and nail against his administration. Can you take a minute to fill out a survey to help us strategize and take on Trump? First question: [ - ]Do you think we have entered an unprecedented political moment with Trump 2.0? [ - ]YES, DEFINITELY [ - ]I THINK SO [ - ]NOT REALLY From environmental destruction to pardoning violent January 6 traitors to handing over $500 billion to Big Tech (and much more), Trump is setting up his unholy alliance between his government and corporate power. A lot is coming at us, but we are not powerless. We have a concrete plan to fight back against Trump and the Oligarchs, Transform the Party, and Elect Progressives who will take a stand. When we organize, we win. name: YDA DNC Representatives
subject: Reminder: DNC Vice Chair At-Large Candidate Forum Night #2
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Young Democrats of America, _www
body:
| |
---
Dear Derek The **Young Democrats of America** , **Voters of Tomorrow** , and the **DNC Youth Council** invite you to join us for **Night Two** of an incredible opportunity to hear directly from candidates running for **DNC Vice Chair At-Large**!

Young voters are a driving force in shaping our democracy, but our voices remain underrepresented in the Democratic Party’s leadership. With no at-large DNC appointments currently held by individuals under 40, it’s clear that we have more work to do to elevate youth leadership.

That’s why this**Vice Chair At-Large Candidate Forum** is so important. It’s your chance to hear from candidates who’ve secured at least 40 signatures as they share their vision for the future of our party. This forum ensures young voters have a seat at the table, amplifying the voices that will shape our shared future.
---
|
---
**You can watch our multi-night forum at[yda.org/forum](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.Khhv6i-A6kGAx4x-ts_8muuNkLitJ6OdptZHejSkZzbOSph2Us8NLjWv3kxeRJI19os1NuM2kZSkZvDsGulXTsmBhQdyCPc9yYaFY-BMa-C6FkAwScLK68LTP4GWEqpbIYkXrjTOeOupz3odtmSHIfP4Klhi1TN8K8OlhnGjkTHk0hhl94p2DHr1ojj8YZuF208SvbHU3UooBh9Pv5QFPsGfcygbfnvC6nl3oAJmwnUxE6Mo1V3YavKYZMObEHRHEtFN0GYHi0fABWl9P07DXyIxFkW-K9V7kh0U-8y-wzKO3bdCqi2asftisLUA0utC/4de/ygDU_bZnQC2yk18NiM4jlQ/h0/h001.Q2-u5cnQxWV4GJRFgJIQ_damRf0E_0iYjJi6M3qRYqc)**

---
**Event Details**

---
**Night 2** **When:** Wednesday, January 22, at 8:30 PM ET/5:30 PM PST
**Moderator:** Joshua Rush, Senior Communications Advisor for the Young Democrats of America
**Who:** Candidates from the Midwest & Western Regions
---
_*While candidates will be split up by region, both forums are intended to serve a national audience._
---
This forum isn’t just about the candidates—it’s about you. Together, we’ll amplify young people’s priorities and elevate our leadership. We can’t wait to see you there!
In solidarity,

**Your YDA DNC Representatives
****
** Quentin Wathum-Ocama, YDA President & DNC Executive Committee Member
Stephanie Campanha Wheaton, YDA Democratic National Committee Representative

Katherine Jeanes, YDA Democratic National Committee Representative
---

* * *
| The Young Democrats of America is the largest partisan youth organization in the United States. We organize young people to elect Democrats from school board to the White House.

_Monthly donations truly help sustain our work. If you're ready to support Young Democrats, please:_ | | [DONATE $10 MONTHLY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvVvW8PUBuGewxMgQwQopobbk4Ok5g7i-_WQaIUs7DhD3Qsak1l0h4fn9AqpuMvcd45YLyQSLun0UTjsDzpENzUgJEfr-HtCb6tJ0VkJUgluzMnZtW7uJeq9ZiolNR1ApYvlBmcwQ5N5QOAOCPvuLTJwetC9qVP52twDeXcyzoZsOewYEGsgDJz_Tg9RMe3WAlMQLp9zQcoVhym-FmhiGVPo7be1wDzMyq0-wlOI31ypHvTYQa7Zzzg2sRgahHp4R9KuhwRmKWhZlukG6UJa_9LJOe2uFNXEx-kafci-Gv95uj8hnEJxdeTMAEevWlit6TKfth_E4udKiyi9bQaBU1nGDaODGwJHLO9SlChLiwZug/4de/ygDU_bZnQC2yk18NiM4jlQ/h1/h001.mv84PjawC8TfROHpmVjmNmoDKCJNuXM0xaQk6ir8ASk)

name: Jeff Younger
subject: Help Me Save My Son
body:
Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James.| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e146c8d59c4c44ee87adb0b0a6ef74b0&_e=Q3BqL9oet5qMFcmddy_r-KCETJYufZ5Ow6xYoFGsh4TE6dmns-oSAKceWfqJWVrbApbjg5GY4UCnKdrs2QrDBKv4oGewRz9dBbV2_h1rdYd7s452mrvb6nWyp_3t_ObB_176X_fHmeJwrdK3UUUOWRA9wnWmPy3J5KLOZEWCxD8v0hziLok20DMiE1OS7t0g5fW-5g-kr0QvFEgGo_nE2mNzLWQdfnxxaap77bRNuzHXmY4w7gYYeSrQm_iZKpTXNNYjqamqH-a8s7u80z0avYf_HzXB4CnL6g6fTH7hYvEbv0p5bRH0MGOoaxeMXNoaWUQjyBbbY8PZ9Th9OROIrWsfqfeY4j1NuHLSAJjfr3Y5PPLamN6uubtfXIIvPjRL)
---
My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. **[I need your help.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e146c8d59c4c44ee87adb0b0a6ef74b0&_e=Q3BqL9oet5qMFcmddy_r-KCETJYufZ5Ow6xYoFGsh4TE6dmns-oSAKceWfqJWVrbApbjg5GY4UCnKdrs2QrDBKv4oGewRz9dBbV2_h1rdYd7s452mrvb6nWyp_3t_ObB_176X_fHmeJwrdK3UUUOWRA9wnWmPy3J5KLOZEWCxD8v0hziLok20DMiE1OS7t0g5fW-5g-kr0QvFEgGo_nE2mNzLWQdfnxxaap77bRNuzFuxHLl9nlgVYoCx2p1Psf8TofK3Xr50l_giRW5VJQpMdFuV4T7bsIROOvJd-dFV8ni2udiS1lvAbNXlGBNqEL8-fvqM3oad8q1ey1H8dvdoAeh0pNs7Khpp4DxGjSrQtkGon0AwSz7ZoPiupcV9283)** I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to **Save James** , **[would you consider making a generous $25 contribution to my Legal Defense Fund today?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e146c8d59c4c44ee87adb0b0a6ef74b0&_e=Q3BqL9oet5qMFcmddy_r-KCETJYufZ5Ow6xYoFGsh4TE6dmns-oSAKceWfqJWVrbApbjg5GY4UCnKdrs2QrDBKv4oGewRz9dBbV2_h1rdYd7s452mrvb6nWyp_3t_ObB_176X_fHmeJwrdK3UUUOWRA9wnWmPy3J5KLOZEWCxD8v0hziLok20DMiE1OS7t0g5fW-5g-kr0QvFEgGo_nE2mNzLWQdfnxxaap77bRNuzGaV9HAaiw4-e9869aYjaKN1t-IWKPbCwAjhczLSgI8ctWhmuhnSl9ubNwMxFq2HLI59UL98bQZhjg8_s0a-RnybC4X9Isu3f46GMa6tdxvy6AmViljkL6kTbd2XtTVMrVtmSL8q4HEsIu9Q4eiFuJN)** But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because **he is a boy**. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.**Do you see what we’re up against?** I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And **James** needs to be **saved** from their butchery.**[THAT’S why I need your help.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e146c8d59c4c44ee87adb0b0a6ef74b0&_e=Q3BqL9oet5qMFcmddy_r-KCETJYufZ5Ow6xYoFGsh4TE6dmns-oSAKceWfqJWVrbApbjg5GY4UCnKdrs2QrDBKv4oGewRz9dBbV2_h1rdYd7s452mrvb6nWyp_3t_ObB_176X_fHmeJwrdK3UUUOWRA9wnWmPy3J5KLOZEWCxD8v0hziLok20DMiE1OS7t0g5fW-5g-kr0QvFEgGo_nE2mNzLWQdfnxxaap77bRNuzFKbJPN1jWkYqjFdw0ipCB21oPYlXoNK0CavMS4yN5_oKRJV2n7yLThRiHRfNUX_97TqyaTmMAs20MVqlv0iqRfHAKbrrlLTeV85em3iOolnCiVz_vnU-q0rxSAfWoBsldj8ntUCA4_ppJMRvpbKzMb)** I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on **James**.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:**If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere.** Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...**Do you see what we’re up against?** But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. **[Will you stand with us?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=e146c8d59c4c44ee87adb0b0a6ef74b0&_e=Q3BqL9oet5qMFcmddy_r-KCETJYufZ5Ow6xYoFGsh4TE6dmns-oSAKceWfqJWVrbApbjg5GY4UCnKdrs2QrDBKv4oGewRz9dBbV2_h1rdYd7s452mrvb6nWyp_3t_ObB_176X_fHmeJwrdK3UUUOWRA9wnWmPy3J5KLOZEWCxD8v0hziLok20DMiE1OS7t0g5fW-5g-kr0QvFEgGo_nE2mNzLWQdfnxxaap77bRNuzG1v3dnrB0whUMqPjVFJHbFk3kC6A1bvDsaJq_eGSLO2oMVodO-J1Civ9nvetqEBxCZDJkmLUshdoHzMySEwgHPJZiOGO5hoIOuK4Vj98zPJ_8_zow-ZYfYAXIRKEx1ePXfNGTcD0bPadvLPPjF7hyO)**

clean_body: Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James.| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to Save James , But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because he is a boy. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.Do you see what we’re up against? I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And James needs to be saved from their butchery. I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on James.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere. Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...Do you see what we’re up against? But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. | | | | | | | The fact is, if you care about keeping your children or grandchildren safe...If you want to save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again...And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come...Then you’ll need someone who knows how these kangaroo courts ACTUALLY operate, and someone who’s willing to do WHATEVER it takes to save his son and every other kid like him.I humbly submit to you that I am that man. Your Warrior on the Frontlines,Jeff Younger P.S. I need your help to save my son. I have fought for a decade to keep radical activists and judges from transitioning my son against my will and against all reason. I have lobbied politicians, wiped out my life’s savings, and spent thousands of hours in court trying to save my son. Would you please rush me your I need your help, and I need to know that I’m not alone in this fight. Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for re-election so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in the United States Senate. The Radical Left has him circled as a prime target to defeat in the 2026 Midterm Elections. Can he count on your support? _

clean_body: Melania Trump stands for GRACE , STRENGTH , and AMERICA FIRST. She has been by President Trump's side, standing strong for faith, family, and the values that make America great. Her priorities are clear: "My priority is to be a mom, to be First Lady, and to be a wife." But while Melania fights for the American people, the mainstream media viciously ATTACKS her. They mock her grace. They twist her words. They try to erase her legacy. Why? Because Melania Trump embodies the best of us: \- Faith that keeps us grounded. \- Family that keeps us united. \- America First values that inspire us to fight for our nation. Melania Trump represents the heart of America, and we will NOT let the media silence her impact. A First Lady who remains calm in the storm. A mother who inspires with her dedication. A patriot who fights for the values that built this country. TAKE OUR POLL IF YOU STAND WITH MELANIA! Paid for by Spadea for Governor P.O. Box 307, Bayville, NJ 08721 |

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: ICE raids expected this week. Know your rights!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
As a former immigration attorney, I have committed my professional life to protecting immigrant children and families. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWUbMvS5QtMg9cyWHzN_ib_9Y9pFwJOPTNLkG2KT53sP-pjHlQcn2i3fgHPgDvcYTWHHppo5jU8jvCb-dfhq7eTW2KeWpAQjzVYvPaiBoRPb4kzC_XgCUerDzsvBxryN353KU2qvRDfW1RIc3YHFxAmE6e8fNqf32-rkIof-GL-OzbNRpF95OW_GFOAi_5nDma/4de/ferpFRHFRhSBNnpdwZeaPQ/h0/h001.c91elkH2vlQw9TeqK3Y7fXuTEm2wqvK1KmaJi5di8Go)
---
Friend, During his first term in office, Donald Trump ripped immigrant families apart, separating children from parents―even locking thousands of children in cages. Some died while in U.S. custody, including seven-year-old Jakelin Caal: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbPNHDy9umvBfcfjcbpKp5FMG1wd3WFuxk8X6vo7gfrrpByX_myDD7TCh0qyJmb8P-jJjYTXTWU9VH7oj2F-0sA4rLS4BUsW3lxnq4bcICHHfKuu3aKT-IMp1hZULtL9_9ZSQt2Si5wEw11stm_bMkVcu1kHc0Yterb0q7Jbd_1KNqluvy904k_P6InI2Ww5RW9Rybbi09SKJ6S9lneH0ESC10_j9h7-Yzsu8QYfbMwbf0S-ccbB3gNYO0xeubssAI12MlpANkev-1vZh3VLqrwlBBMv4lq8AAsAFrcCPQ9DrIjcMTIZ1efL7HwFpI1Xrr6kPekQbKY6Wsx5TC5hVIhYIaa_DtMWYjc0EN3kph7gn7N62uB_KkIj2PKfsy0xzQ/4de/ferpFRHFRhSBNnpdwZeaPQ/h1/h001.89UYemw_MFT-LqJnozG-ISq57Yt6vU-QrUVbHcSp8N0) As a former immigration attorney, I have committed my professional life to protecting immigrant children and families. **But now, with the new Trump administration preparing ICE raids across the country, families are also in fear of separation through deportation:** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbPNHDy9umvBfcfjcbpKp5FMG1wd3WFuxk8X6vo7gfrrpByX_myDD7TCh0qyJmb8P-jJjYTXTWU9VH7oj2F-0sA4rLS4BUsW3lxnq4bcICHHfKuu3aKT-IMp1hZULtL9_54RBqffaPOqr-WU6SwgR4lwYsiAGf6A3dlZT5OygTT1yYavvhP6OqPqM0xqZK5nRDXeg7Nf1I05ZbyRGzOoDsdWw14taFD8eUzQ_xY4Wf3suyIgH-9xK1B6W1FSSPUAuFi683kaC7GUKpiInweN8WGrmCp8XSCxW6SyP9-mW7vgJ_n8uUuuDpF3I9IbE_996C8f27xC_cYdUjHD6ULHGR_FZbYQg_G_uQZfr2L_2jYZSngBoeTHYUMgSjCIm8lv3A/4de/ferpFRHFRhSBNnpdwZeaPQ/h2/h001._DNKcCRWmGiIrIBxMVROHdz3D3wOc4XoZjVCiAq1gFM) Our team is helping ensure that immigrant families know their rights. **Regardless of immigration status, you have rights.** All of us can prepare for ICE raids and look out for our loved ones and neighbors by reading up about immigrants’ rights. Please check out and share the below resources, which are in a number of languages. If you’re in Michigan: [**Click here to see ACLU Michigan’s “Know your Rights: Before, During and After Immigration Raids” materials, developed in partnership with the Michigan Immigrant Rights Center.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbPNHDy9umvBfcfjcbpKp5FMG1wd3WFuxk8X6vo7gfrrpByX_myDD7TCh0qyJmb8P-jJjYTXTWU9VH7oj2F-0sA4rLS4BUsW3lxnq4bcICHHfKuu3aKT-IMp1hZULtL9_7vHgEMK7LrclfUPiXirjkFK5ch02ARiDYp_tpbqXSy5MkESF4GHfBuHsW-RQOxMjNZEF52ilbw59eze3P4VboRqgwbPNBkDvCPVRDrAMb53LIUmfghwAVlWM2yBdRTH3wVWZ6RCdRNuAyw7P6kJdukdDL9NqMHkF2A6Waqr0xH32X4x06djhVjuAudnCKky7WFe3ib1T8xviFOBQzGfv93l_4BgWlWLxAmijarwxXGU9XnAXv3iTDj5m5vcS4a-EA/4de/ferpFRHFRhSBNnpdwZeaPQ/h3/h001.Zs7zWABjF7cUsaNwe7qRc6MmJzIFKv99wM1E9-O5q5g) | [KNOW YOUR RIGHTS](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbPNHDy9umvBfcfjcbpKp5FMG1wd3WFuxk8X6vo7gfrrpByX_myDD7TCh0qyJmb8P-jJjYTXTWU9VH7oj2F-0sA4rLS4BUsW3lxnq4bcICHHfKuu3aKT-IMp1hZULtL9_wbfYqTDt3e4M_zxzI9L14_pz1dZ2eEQ-0urQ4va3VpbM3poR3hje3vXz7XzezmYp-Pdi2mn7k3nYawkBdIenIOnLRWfy1oIWa5uJ9cFeeIWA7V4uoEHpFqGB55RvKeT2IsGmwpHiedQ3a3eLOOxT2r_tMxVRrmxMUSL4nsmxpdkSNCOJdi8USwoPLvluwEQwkN8kEvZHXHtKUfQPiU9YO-L7kCbn1itBriF3wsfPDxvw00aVu7aBhApHFgeYaj6oQ/4de/ferpFRHFRhSBNnpdwZeaPQ/h4/h001.qTLij0s3hvLPhkKpSWNndUJpZTHXboVGQyRrbGHqGVY)

[**Or, watch this short video from the Michigan Immigrant Rights Center.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMVZiCw9e1CjoAxuXDVyOgvC_Cxbj0c9PUEpmN6Gwmb6y4cw2T9fsL_rbXsvN6zNwrdNrQPiFY7llJbNLvfr112Xrt8V1dQX-Rqycu6cf9Q9mE1TOL6-ak3wkcBCo2zvKTyyxjs2fThksiUK1nm8SygrXYG90HSUCLXAcgX1jpvh3gNWHNeFjF_rXOHyzfD2VEj9eqjS_vQpM7Tma4VRbxpSZXMhADsRvvipGIau0Zum4fTmOlGY-spdYzXV_tzIvjfwaG6tPJx4HcMvTpaGBN18YcI2pnZmknxpRcaUQjhlBURW3BuyvrvgIPEcxS08GGQ/4de/ferpFRHFRhSBNnpdwZeaPQ/h5/h001.VPFJl2RQpAeowN1YmgvC82BpuUmMn_UqjmxAcGpUG_w)

And please share these materials with your family, friends, and neighbors.
I’m a daughter of recent immigrants, and I know that for hundreds of years, immigrants have helped build the United States. Immigrants own businesses, serve in the military, contribute to our communities, and live and love like everyone else. They deserve to live with dignity in the place they’ve made their home. Instead of ICE raids that threaten to tear families apart, we need policies that embrace diversity and create a more humane and accessible immigration system.
In love and solidarity,
Rashida
P.S. Please know that Trump cannot override our Constitution with executive orders; he does not have the authority to end birthright citizenship. As many of my colleagues in Congress are voting for anti-immigrant policies, I promise to keep fighting for our immigrant neighbors and reminding policymakers of our shared humanity.

clean_body: As a former immigration attorney, I have committed my professional life to protecting immigrant children and families. | | | Friend, During his first term in office, Donald Trump ripped immigrant families apart, separating children from parents―even locking thousands of children in cages. Some died while in U.S. custody, including seven-year-old Jakelin Caal: As a former immigration attorney, I have committed my professional life to protecting immigrant children and families. But now, with the new Trump administration preparing ICE raids across the country, families are also in fear of separation through deportation: Our team is helping ensure that immigrant families know their rights. Regardless of immigration status, you have rights. All of us can prepare for ICE raids and look out for our loved ones and neighbors by reading up about immigrants’ rights. Please check out and share the below resources, which are in a number of languages. If you’re in Michigan: | For people outside of Michigan, you can check out. This page also links to a list of other groups’ resources and to local ACLU affiliates, since laws vary by state. The Immigrant Defense Project also has a and . And please share these materials with your family, friends, and neighbors. I’m a daughter of recent immigrants, and I know that for hundreds of years, immigrants have helped build the United States. Immigrants own businesses, serve in the military, contribute to our communities, and live and love like everyone else. They deserve to live with dignity in the place they’ve made their home. Instead of ICE raids that threaten to tear families apart, we need policies that embrace diversity and create a more humane and accessible immigration system. In love and solidarity, Rashida P.S. Please know that Trump cannot override our Constitution with executive orders; he does not have the authority to end birthright citizenship. As many of my colleagues in Congress are voting for anti-immigrant policies, I promise to keep fighting for our immigrant neighbors and reminding policymakers of our shared humanity. Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: AOC
subject: Kicked to the curb
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Trump was inaugurated Monday, and we saw the scene, right? They sent a message pretty clearly and pretty directly.
The people that were in that central rotunda, who were placed front and center, were not people who were elected. They were not actual representatives of democracy.
**They were unelected billionaires**.
You had Donald Trump, Elon Musk, Mark Zuckerberg, Jeff Bezos. And then you had your elected officials kind of kicked to the curb into much of the rotunda.
That pretty much is the story of the Trump administration in a nutshell, right?
You're getting ripped off. All of us are going to be getting ripped off for the next 4 years, but **what do we do about it?**
A lot of people are looking at this with cynicism and saying there's nothing that we can do.
I want to really emphasize that **your day-to-day actions are tremendously important** in authoritarian regimes. The vast majority of authoritarians — the vast majority of anti-democratic rule — all of that authority is _freely given_.
It's kind of like consenting in advance. It's when people give up in advance, and so they just comply.
And **one of the most simple things that we can do is just not comply**.
The Trump trifecta has taken hold, and so too have their billionaire, right-wing donors.
Our movement for real progress will have to **push harder than ever** these next four years.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250122-2.qjvPvl&refcode=em20250122-7970-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7970%2E2526796%2Eq-0Ef1)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250122-2.qjvPvl&refcode=em20250122-7970-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=7970%2E2526796%2Eq-0Ef1)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250122-2?refcode=em20250122-7970-P_FND_RES_GND&t=21&refcode2=7970_2526796_q-0Ef1&akid=7970%2E2526796%2Eq-0Ef1)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250122-7970-P_FND_RES_GND&t=22&akid=7970%2E2526796%2Eq-0Ef1)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=23&akid=7970%2E2526796%2Eq-0Ef1) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=24&akid=7970%2E2526796%2Eq-0Ef1) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=25&akid=7970%2E2526796%2Eq-0Ef1)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=7970%2E2526796%2Eq-0Ef1)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=7970%2E2526796%2Eq-0Ef1)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

clean_body: It’s genuinely insane | = | Peter, Did you watch Trump’s inauguration on Monday? Something in particular caught my eye. Did you see all the billionaires in the room? Mark Zuckerberg, Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos... These guys literally had better seats than even Trump’s own cabinet officials. Think about that. Yes, it’s just seating, but it also shows who Trump is going to listen to and who he values. We’ve always known he was for sale to the highest bidder, and on Monday he wasn’t even hiding it! = = = These two pictures tell the entire story... Donald Trump is selling our democracy out and he’s smiling for the cameras while he does it. In a MAGA Administration, billionaires' priorities come before the needs of our families. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- \- Josh

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Russell Vought’s disturbing comments…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Folks, earlier today, President Trump’s nominee for Director of the Office of Management and Budget (OMB), Russell Vought, appeared before the Senate Budget Committee for his nomination hearing.
This was a critical hearing, and I was glad to have the opportunity to ask Vought questions — but I was not reassured by what I heard in response.
( You can watch the video of our back and forth here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-vought] )
Vought has made some deeply disturbing comments about the federal workforce. He got a lot of attention for a speech when he said, “ We want bureaucrats to be traumatically affected. When they wake up in the morning, we want them to not go to work because they are increasingly viewed as the villains.”
This directly refers to the hundreds of thousands of federal workers who call Virginia home, so I pressed Vought on it.
Look — I've heard about a million speeches in Congress about wanting to cut the budget, wanting to reduce federal spending, wanting to deal with the deficit. But I had never before heard anybody give a gleeful speech about traumatizing the federal workforce.
Think about Abraham Lincoln for just a minute. When he spoke to a divided nation, he said, “with malice towards none and charity towards all.” What he decidedly did NOT say was, “we want you to be traumatized.”
Public servants ought to be unifiers and bridge builders — not gleefully wishing trauma on people trying to serve their fellow Americans.
I didn’t get much out of him on that subject, so I tried asking Vought to explain why he supports cuts to Pell Grants, food stamps, Medicaid, Tenant-Based Rental Assistance, and the Low Income Housing Energy Assistance Program — part of his think tank’s proposed push to, as they say, “end woke and weaponized government.”
Is providing nutrition assistance to low-income kids woke and weaponized?
Is helping kids pay for college woke and weaponized?
Following a theme, Vought refused to answer or explain. He didn’t even attempt to defend his comments or proposals, and I can see why.
You want to first traumatize federal employees, then you want to take programs that help people who are struggling and cut them because they’re “woke and weaponized”... that’s some tough stuff to defend.
When I reflect on the comments of Vought (and those of many of his fellow Trump Administration nominees), I consider New Testament Luke 6:45: ‘ From the fullness of the heart the mouth speaks .’
Or in other words, when someone tells you who they are, believe them.
I said on Monday that doing my constitutionally-mandated duty as a Senator will require at times fighting against this Administration. These nomination hearings are a prime example of moments when we must push back and demand more.
Thanks for reading and staying in touch as we begin this new chapter. I’ll continue to update you on the latest from the U.S. Senate.
-Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
P.S. Last week, I also questioned Pete Hegseth — President Trump’s nominee for Secretary of Defense — during his nomination hearing in front of the Senate Armed Services Committee about his deeply concerning history of alleged sexual harassment and assault and on-the-job intoxication. You can see that video here. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-hegseth]
P.P.S. One last thing: While reading these updates and staying engaged in this work is certainly enough, if you’re looking for another way to support public servants who are unifiers and bridge builders, consider making a contribution to the Common Ground PAC [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025] — my organization that works to elect leaders who are committed to working together, not tearing us apart.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

name: Tobias Read
subject: RE: President Donald Trump
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-pp?refcode=250122em-trump [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-pp?refcode=250122em-trump]
Hi folks, it’s Oregon Secretary of State Tobias Read.
On Monday, Donald Trump was sworn in as our country’s 47th President.
While this was not the outcome many of us wanted, I respect the outcome of the election and am glad to see the peaceful transfer of power from one freely elected president to the next.
But even though Trump’s inauguration marks a drastic change in Washington, my commitment to Oregonians remains the same.
Regardless of what President Trump and his new administration do, I will defend our elections, strengthen our democracy, and ensure that government works for the people over the next four years.
I know we’ll face many challenges together over the next four years. I'd be grateful if you could contribute $10 or more at this pivotal moment for our state and our country. Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-pp?refcode=250122em-trump]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-pp?refcode=250122em-trump]
History tells us that Trump and his MAGA movement don’t respect our democracy as they should.
While I hope his second term will be different, I’m not waiting to find out. My team and I are working to strengthen Oregon’s elections and defend our democracy.
If you’d like to join us in the fight ahead, I’d be so grateful to have you. Please chip in whatever you can spare, and let’s get to work. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-pp?refcode=250122em-trump]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-pp?refcode=250122em-trump [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-pp?refcode=250122em-trump]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

body:

# Bishop Budde is WRONG

Mariann Edgar Budde's message at yesterday's National Cathedral was not rooted in the Bible, nor does it represent biblical preaching. #
---
| | I’m reaching out to you today with a personal and urgent message. I’m writing to you because I’m fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, corrupt untouchable judges, and an unconstitutional court order from “transitioning” my twelve year old son James against my will. **[And I need your help to save my son from a court-ordered chemical castration.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GO2yAQhp8G32zBYEA9-JDUcdR2u1ol1bbbizUFnFCZ2AvY1r79ypGVC4KPb_TPj37sXfdREbUnAFdnIgEgfEcA3t8WH6b__scxD4v4k7_LZy_WX_i6qTM85JtG-jecRXj79hxffvfX3eVpP7OHnj5G-5C30MJ6dP1KVZ2ZineGlpmtmOJKUqq4zK6VMEyCLUtTCqONLhGEsUKxf4J1VJYqcxVQEJQBpyCAygLRgtFMfsGOU1SUlPSeU6C3wWlkMS0YwjD4Qg8-66trSmO8L9YQaEZMwQ0p5r29YJ8b29lbtHk33UwR7DwXeiDQxBQkRZTIOafQcbMO82ZKvo3DFLQlvN7Xx_x0eCUgV-ytcZMnvD783EiyYX0vgW1Aox_RXW6E11sn1u7rY_vyVDft-fv9fjq8tudfu1O-HlmozLi4vndRKlLSy73n2mqu4DMAAP__br2QLg)**
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GO2yAQhp8G32zBYEA9-JDUcdR2u1ol1bbbizUFnFCZ2AvY1r79ypGVC4KPb_TPj37sXfdREbUnAFdnIgEgfEcA3t8WH6b__scxD4v4k7_LZy_WX_i6qTM85JtG-jecRXj79hxffvfX3eVpP7OHnj5G-5C30MJ6dP1KVZ2ZineGlpmtmOJKUqq4zK6VMEyCLUtTCqONLhGEsUKxf4J1VJYqcxVQEJQBpyCAygLRgtFMfsGOU1SUlPSeU6C3wWlkMS0YwjD4Qg8-66trSmO8L9YQaEZMwQ0p5r29YJ8b29lbtHk33UwR7DwXeiDQxBQkRZTIOafQcbMO82ZKvo3DFLQlvN7Xx_x0eCUgV-ytcZMnvD783EiyYX0vgW1Aox_RXW6E11sn1u7rY_vyVDft-fv9fjq8tudfu1O-HlmozLi4vndRKlLSy73n2mqu4DMAAP__br2QLg)
---
This is an old photo... I don’t even know what my son looks like now. I haven’t seen him in years. But I will never stop fighting. I need to save my son, _who was taken away from me by court order._ _Who was forced to change into girls’ clothing by the school counselors after I dropped him off._ _Without my knowledge._ My son is twelve years old. And despite residing in Texas, and Texas courts ruling that no gender reassignment may be permitted without consent, my son was whisked away to a California court infamous for transgender rulings against parents. And after a corrupt transgender judge ruled against me. My son is now just months away from being chemically castrated. **[Will you help me fight to save James?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GO2yAQhp8G32zBYEA9-JDUcdR2u1ol1bbbizUFnFCZ2AvY1r79ypGVC4KPb_TPj37sXfdREbUnAFdnIgEgfEcA3t8WH6b__scxD4v4k7_LZy_WX_i6qTM85JtG-jecRXj79hxffvfX3eVpP7OHnj5G-5C30MJ6dP1KVZ2ZineGlpmtmOJKUqq4zK6VMEyCLUtTCqONLhGEsUKxf4J1VJYqcxVQEJQBpyCAygLRgtFMfsGOU1SUlPSeU6C3wWlkMS0YwjD4Qg8-66trSmO8L9YQaEZMwQ0p5r29YJ8b29lbtHk33UwR7DwXeiDQxBQkRZTIOafQcbMO82ZKvo3DFLQlvN7Xx_x0eCUgV-ytcZMnvD783EiyYX0vgW1Aox_RXW6E11sn1u7rY_vyVDft-fv9fjq8tudfu1O-HlmozLi4vndRKlLSy73n2mqu4DMAAP__br2QLg)** I have partnered with the _Patriot’s Legal Defense Fund_ to fight against these family court sham rulings that are advancing a political agenda by hook or by crook. This _Patriot’s Legal Defense Fund_ will help me have the resources to fight this fight with the determination and vigor necessary to save my son – without having to worry about looming massive financial burdens. And it will help me pursue this battle to the end. Making sure these corrupt judges and politicians are held accountable – so that they cannot do this to hundreds of families across the country. These dark conspiracies to mutilate children are pure evil – and we have to stop this madness from ever happening to another child. Let alone my own son. **[That’s why I am humbly asking for you to make a generous contribution to this defense fund so that we can tirelessly fight this fight against evil.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GO2yAQhp8G32zBYEA9-JDUcdR2u1ol1bbbizUFnFCZ2AvY1r79ypGVC4KPb_TPj37sXfdREbUnAFdnIgEgfEcA3t8WH6b__scxD4v4k7_LZy_WX_i6qTM85JtG-jecRXj79hxffvfX3eVpP7OHnj5G-5C30MJ6dP1KVZ2ZineGlpmtmOJKUqq4zK6VMEyCLUtTCqONLhGEsUKxf4J1VJYqcxVQEJQBpyCAygLRgtFMfsGOU1SUlPSeU6C3wWlkMS0YwjD4Qg8-66trSmO8L9YQaEZMwQ0p5r29YJ8b29lbtHk33UwR7DwXeiDQxBQkRZTIOafQcbMO82ZKvo3DFLQlvN7Xx_x0eCUgV-ytcZMnvD783EiyYX0vgW1Aox_RXW6E11sn1u7rY_vyVDft-fv9fjq8tudfu1O-HlmozLi4vndRKlLSy73n2mqu4DMAAP__br2QLg)**

clean_body: | | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | I’m reaching out to you today with a personal and urgent message. I’m writing to you because I’m fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, corrupt untouchable judges, and an unconstitutional court order from “transitioning” my twelve year old son James against my will. This is an old photo... I don’t even know what my son looks like now. I haven’t seen him in years. But I will never stop fighting. I need to save my son, who was taken away from me by court order. Who was forced to change into girls’ clothing by the school counselors after I dropped him off. Without my knowledge. My son is twelve years old. And despite residing in Texas, and Texas courts ruling that no gender reassignment may be permitted without consent, my son was whisked away to a California court infamous for transgender rulings against parents. And after a corrupt transgender judge ruled against me. My son is now just months away from being chemically castrated. I have partnered with the Patriot’s Legal Defense Fund to fight against these family court sham rulings that are advancing a political agenda by hook or by crook. This Patriot’s Legal Defense Fund will help me have the resources to fight this fight with the determination and vigor necessary to save my son – without having to worry about looming massive financial burdens. And it will help me pursue this battle to the end. Making sure these corrupt judges and politicians are held accountable – so that they cannot do this to hundreds of families across the country. These dark conspiracies to mutilate children are pure evil – and we have to stop this madness from ever happening to another child. Let alone my own son. | | | | | | | I’ve been fighting this for years. This all started when my son was only 5 years old. And it’s been a truly exhausting battle but now that a California court has ruled that my son can be chemically castrated I need to kick my efforts into overdrive. And I’m going to need all the help I can get. The patriot’s legal team will help me file to have judges removed and to open case details to the public. And they will be with me every step of the way making sure I have the resources to fight against the massive Leftist pro-trans movement and the Billions of dollars they can spend destroying families and mutilating kids to advance their political movement. I know that Donald Trump won because Conservatives like you and I are waking up every day to the evil that’s seeped into our country over the last decade. Thank you for standing with me against this evil. If you are not able to make a contribution please forward my message to your friends and family to spread awareness for my campaign to save my son. Sincerely, Jeff Younger. Patriot's Legal Defense Fund 601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

clean_body: We have proven tactics: | = | Hi there. Donald Trump is once again President, and the chaos has already started. Here at the California Democratic Party, we are committed to fighting back against Donald Trump where possible, while building the infrastructure needed to take back the U.S. House. Control of the U.S. House will give Democrats a critical check on the President. Thanks to the gains that we made here in California in 2024, we are closer than ever , but we need to keep our work going. = = = = = = While the 2024 election had a devastating result at the presidential level, we accomplished an amazing feat here in California. Thanks to supporters like you, we flipped three seats from red to blue in California. Because of our work here, Democrats came closer than ever to taking back control of the U.S. House. Now, Speaker Mike Johnson has one of the smallest House Majorities in our nation’s history. If we can run a similar strategy in 2026, we WILL flip more seats and elect a Democratic U.S. House that will provide a check on President Trump. = = Let’s keep the faith, and spread it. \- The whole team at the California Democratic Party | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. If this email was forwarded to you, We rely on email to communicate with supporters like you and conduct the business of the California Democratic Party, but if you wish to receive only our most important emails, And if you no longer wish to receive emails from the California Democratic Party, click here to . | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. body:
| | | **Immediately after taking office, Donald Trump killed ReproductiveRights.gov.**
**[America’s pro-choice majority will not be silenced. Donate to help FIRE anti-choice Republicans in Congress and break Republican control of Washington today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuO3YbgPpASNBD5VcYYax6A02r1hbaPRA-JLEy9shQrRfVvv9q2d_I4pVJhBJiQwZEKAJRoeMKVZMpTgn_PLtzZdTo2VC5BC3Q5ZL2_R9zwJk0eoWY3hvdqASv5P-uDma31iPpbsLQAdoOzcVRlidk3_o7YRgujQwqHW-ySqJFPMPSkbeQ-b67Fet-2Rs_NKKh360Sg0a1au1JN9qgatS7s9ppMhGR1XGapIBkTZ1xq72LiGWojt7krj5_c-HyK31GuPLkQtYhrwmKMiiCk9HAIvYEQuAmZ5_wUwaxTNIFy-Um9KNLyY2jbEVBsjZ02_prb/4de/ZQiGeXxRSjG11P11kPUhog/h0/h001.danx8mNRpPvdjJgzZg4S65cJMQbIe8DHSSl6_sY-PeY)**
* * *
When it comes to abortion, contraception, and your rights, the Trump administration says ... _ignorance is strength!_
CBS News reports:
Government website reproductiverights.gov appeared to be offline on the evening of President Donald Trump's inauguration.
The site, launched in 2022 by the U.S. Department of Health and Human Services as part of a public awareness campaign, contained information on access to abortion and reproductive health care and a Know-Your-Rights patient fact sheet.
When Trump Republicans attack our reproductive freedom, we _fight back_ by working even harder to elect pro-choice Democrats.
**Cedar Key Progress buys grassroots-funded ads and billboards in targeted states to defeat anti-choice MAGA Republicans.**
******[We’ve fought for too many decades for reproductive freedom ... we can't give up now. Donate to Cedar Key Progress’s work taking back Congress and resisting Trump today.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuO3YbgPpASNBD5VcYYax6A0wVdySCXIJJyDs1Pu8BcsANGkesnGD-yq5feDkyu2dU-NFjSDBo8pgGmj4FPLvmu_cPnEJ-deBPcyJ7YGaJjyoR7OazZLdu84qALIkF1vbJ8xYPBkYwQRMf2k_ahHvnJX2JwrtRl1bL-hvRG_LzKoZ40jIIC7nzcumSkrvx-COu1Sv43Ip5nBuovZhkw1pyi-Bkz0z7tQMJk1wmT_jtNO8EOpg7LykFH47HERXO1dW2Y9lbBTIyNNEfz_Z_daFHE4RKoanRrcqfv7Yzvs-LDZMhc8P6CtDV74lChjoNiy9af/4de/ZQiGeXxRSjG11P11kPUhog/h1/h001.zSNwRrWKdufNgDms6LH6mMo-gqgyQA6iy5mdkjn7YrY)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z5uopl8855v4fcq1d4r7ni8mmqpdl89isd88ou0o_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdh64o72cdh2bs)
---
| |
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2za847a30qbm9essl3lsv2f1ctug5o1v0aplqag3g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdh64o72cdh2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z68o5rftggbbg4uk09m9mepmjrff2prrl352ofio_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdh64o72cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp44l7oala1e684un3daiee31722j3fbteqphut0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdh64o72cdh2bs)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zljs1b66ooln1kenupqfndndvdq57tobade1227g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdh6cpr2c1h2bs)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Patriot,
---
Please know this letter I’ve written you comes entirely from the heart...
---
I always knew the price I could one day pay for defending President Trump from one of the most vile witch hunts in American history. And like I’ve always said, it’s a fight I’d wage over and over again.
---
But even now, after President Trump resoundingly won back the White House and DEFEATED the Democrat Swap, __there are still Deep State holdouts hellbent on**JAILING** me for the rest of my life. __
---
**I face an outstanding _INDICTMENT_ in Arizona at the hands of the Left’s cronies and accomplices that is scheduled to go to trial. **
---
But I’ll tell you what: While this case means the Left is _still_ seeking to utterly ruin me, it also means I’m just _one final step_ away from VINDICATION!
---
**Just look at the second MUGSHOT they took of me when I was booked in Maricopa County, Arizona.__Do I look scared of the Deep State to you?__**
---

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcuOmzAYhZ_G7ED2b2OTBYumCFVVRr1ISTuryONL8BQMNTYRffoKlMn286dzrPPLYeqdXWskjgigc3pGAIh-QgAp0os8n1_Cmr8OIr9TMBtG8PlhLvB0vZLmX5ma1y_vc1h-zL9PflzI047rZJ7uo7Iwg3T9RkWT6ZqBJFZlpiaCCo7FASDraiuxlpxLe8CVrpSu4A24KK2ywEEBy1wNGEpMgGJWkvJQAGFCsopAxcAqqRHDe1FhgzGxc_6PCVq6fi3UOGR93cU4zfvHWgTtbFQKprg7H4zeDARtSHrNby71TnqXbzF6HHKbvM7FQVKprUTQEi5kaTjhVrxZIcotj7YpDlclh0m6m0e0AQwMEyAI-PYyGO3SgGjzmGKH0YQN2ag_tHlMQRlEm5-_rscHU6OPxkdEm2-nl-9XBPzqe6cRbS7vtvoKVbfwHe4npc2lP53Z3yPNQq2nu-t7N3OBGL7t22xTLDX8DwAA__9w46Ga)
__
---

My resolve to fight this injustice – not _just_ for my freedom, but for the freedom of ALL Americans – will **_NEVER_** waver.
---
And despite the Fake News calling me “a dead man walking,” I’m still standing strong without an ounce of fear – _thanks to unbelievably kind and generous souls like _YOU_ who have given me the resources and support I need to remain a FREE man._
---
_If you can afford to contribute, please know any contribution you can make to my Legal Defense Trust will be greatly appreciated to fight this sham INDICTMENT – the Deep State’s FINAL witch hunt against me._

subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Your America News is delivered on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaudi6s7jnlsgpcjo1sas4hthr7g8d7a2n64c4v0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdh66ob2cjh2bs)

| |
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7blmo33f05g1h36bgte8rg2hqoaf8jpl7abr9h0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdh66ob2cjh2bs) [NO](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt5a46dc1or9tbs7e0pfa9mf63uf1gojm5o549q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdh66ob2cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq648ko4sr2j7qsis7e3tu4kh1ofg1binch1l0q8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdh66ob2cjh2bs)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
We need your help to shrink the size of the government! Complete the DOGE Survey today >>

|
---
| | |
Friend,

Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy have been handpicked for a monumental task: **To shrink the size of the federal government and reduce wasteful spending and excess.**

But House Republicans are on board, but we can't do it without you. **[Will you answer a few quick questions and help us get ready for 2025 today, Friend?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6qds2u3ahdg28ar79qjq65jms23u1j27rq2st98_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdh66ob2c3h2bs "Will you answer a few quick questions and help us get ready for 2025 today, Friend?")**

---

| | **DEPARTMENT OF GOVERNMENT EFFICIENCY (DOGE) SURVEY**
**Issued By House GOP HQ**

**PATRIOT: Friend

STATUS: [INCOMPLETE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ztgjte2enuf7ek5t31ln47271l3j6lenu5hboqug_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdh66ob2c3h2bs "INCOMPLETE")**

DOGE has a LOT of work to do to drain the swamp and get the government working for the people of this great country, and that starts now.

**[Will you please complete House GOP's DOGE Survey today?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt03odfc123iqv1u3l57gvkaj58rbe40ktc41hsg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdh66ob2c3h2bs "Will you please complete House GOP’s DOGE Survey today?")**

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: Leading with our values, now and always / Liderando con nuestros valores, ahora y siempre
body:
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
Channeling MLK Jr's resolve as we meet this political moment
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/MLK%20Selma.jpeg]
Every day, TOP channels the spirit of freedom-fighters like Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. – an indomitable, justice-seeking giant we proudly stand on the shoulders of. "We must constantly build dikes of courage to hold back the flood of fear,” he stated – words that apply to the tenuous environment our movement finds itself in today, as millions in this country committed to a vision where all can thrive – no matter our age, race, faith, or gender – grapple with uncertainty and search for new ways to drive change for the common good.
As TOP’s organizing evolves and takes new shape, our values remain constant. Our North Star is collective liberation. This is how we will lead, continue to positively impact lives, and win.
No incoming administration of self-serving billionaires will control our well-being and dictate how we choose to lead our lives. To honor Dr. King’s legacy entails countering an agenda of division with an audacious and tangible manifesto of hop e.
It also means not cowering in the face of adversity, as we roll up our sleeves to fight the damaging policies and ideology of a cruel, right-wing extremist agenda.
Stay vigilant. Know your rights. Defend our communities.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Black%20fist%20air.jpeg]
Trump and MAGA thrive off of pitting people against each other, scapegoating marginalized communities, and instilling fear. We're not playing their game.
In solidarity there is strength, and by sharing vital information about our fundamental rights (no matter your documentation status), we can protect lives, keep families together, and mitigate harm from Trump's incoming mass deportation machine.
ICE is wasting no time launching raids in large cities across the country this week. San Antonio is one of the law enforcement agency's initial targets [https://www.sacurrent.com/news/ice-raids-planned-for-san-antonio-on-tuesday-36571981] , according to media reports.
ACCESS and SHARE these "know your rights" guides in English [https://organizetexas.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/English-KYR-ILRC.pdf] and Spanish [https://organizetexas.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Spanish-KYR-ILRC.pdf] from our allies at the Immigrant Legal Resource Center.
In conjunction with our immigration justice partners, we will continue to provide timely updates on MAGA's aggressive efforts to attack immigrant communities. WE protect us!
ADD YOUR NAME:
Speak up for tenants' rights in Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Dallas%20housing%20justice%202024.jpg]
The housing crisis in Dallas continues to worsen. Rent prices are rising faster than wages, evictions for some residents are happening without notice or cause, and housing instability is on the rise.
From collapsing ceilings due to water damage to routine water shutoffs, countless tenants are living with poor maintenance and broken promises from landlords — and many fear retaliation if they speak up. Despite this, current laws at the local and state levels offer little protection or support for renters. We're pushing for change!
TOP's housing justice organizing is rooted in our fundamental belief that housing is a human right, and that all in our communities deserve a safe, affordable, and stable place to call home — no matter our age, race, gender, faith, or income.
ADD YOUR NAME if you're a Dallas resident who agrees, and who wants to plug in to this vital campaign work! [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc7xt9JezgWm3pil3PMcC1HyJVOTPmsxZdMxZkerJcMqS02WQ/viewform]
For more information, email Iman at ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
TOP Tip: Looking to ditch Amazon?
Check out these more ethical alternatives
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Amazon%20alternatives.png]
Among the ultra-wealthy at Trump's oligarch-filled inauguration was none other than Jeff Bezos of Amazon. Now we all at some point have bought goods off Amazon. It's convenience at the click of a button! But while the prices and fast shipping are tempting, it's worth considering other websites for everyday products — especially if you're looking to support small businesses and be a more socially conscious shopper. Check out these alternatives. [https://blog.credo.com/2024/11/07/conscious-consuming-for-the-holidays-try-these-alternatives-to-amazon]
Español
Canalizando la determinación de MLK Jr. mientras enfrentamos este momento político
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/MLK%20Selma.jpeg]
Todos los días, TOP canaliza el espíritu de luchadores por la libertad como el de Dr. Martin Luther King Jr., un indomable y gigante buscador de justicia en cuyos hombros nos apoyamos con orgullo. "Debemos construir constantemente diques de coraje para contener la inundación del miedo", declaró él; palabras que se aplican al entorno precario en el que nuestro movimiento se encuentra hoy, mientras millones en este país, comprometidos con una visión donde todos puedan prosperar —sin importar nuestra edad, raza, fe o género— enfrentan la incertidumbre y buscan nuevas formas de impulsar el cambio para el bien común.
A medida que la organización de TOP evoluciona y toma una nueva forma, nuestros valores permanecen constantes. Nuestra guía es la liberación colectiva. Así es como lideraremos, continuaremos impactando vidas positivamente y triunfaremos.
Ninguna administración entrante de multimillonarios egoístas controlará nuestro bienestar y dictará cómo elegimos conducir nuestras vidas. Honrar el legado del Dr. King implica contrarrestar una agenda de división con un manifiesto audaz y tangible de esperanza.
También significa no acobardarnos ante la adversidad, mientras nos arremangamos para luchar contra las políticas y la ideología dañinas de una agenda cruel y extremista de derecha.
Mantente alerta. Conoce tus derechos. Defiende nuestras comunidades.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Black%20fist%20air.jpeg]
Trump y MAGA prosperan enfrentando a las personas entre ellas mismas, culpando a las comunidades marginadas y generando miedo. No vamos a jugar su juego.
En la solidaridad está la fuerza, y al compartir información vital sobre nuestros derechos fundamentales (sin importar el estado de su documentación), podemos proteger vidas, mantener unidas a las familias y mitigar el daño de la máquina de deportación masiva entrante de Trump.
ICE no pierde tiempo en lanzar redadas en grandes ciudades de todo el país esta semana. San Antonio es uno de los objetivos iniciales de la agencia de aplicación de la ley [https://www.sacurrent.com/news/ice-raids-planned-for-san-antonio-on-tuesday-36571981] , según informes de los medios.
ACCEDA y COMPARTA estas guías "conozca sus derechos" en inglés [https://organizetexas.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/English-KYR-ILRC.pdf] y español [https://organizetexas.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Spanish-KYR-ILRC.pdf] de nuestros aliados en el Centro de Recursos Legales para Inmigrantes.
Junto con nuestros socios de justicia migratoria, continuaremos brindando actualizaciones oportunas sobre los esfuerzos agresivos de MAGA para atacar a las comunidades inmigrantes. ¡NOSOTROS nos protegemos!
AGREGUE TU NOMBRE:
Defienda los derechos de los inquilinos en Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Dallas%20housing%20justice%202024.jpg]
La crisis de vivienda en Dallas sigue empeorando. Los precios de las rentas están subiendo más rápido que los salarios, los desalojos para algunos residentes se están llevando a cabo sin previo aviso ni causa, y la inestabilidad en la vivienda está en aumento.
Desde techos que se derrumban debido a daños por agua hasta cortes rutinarios del suministro de agua, innumerables inquilinos están viviendo con un mantenimiento deficiente y promesas rotas por parte de los propietarios, y muchos temen represalias si alzan la voz. A pesar de esto, las leyes actuales a nivel local y estatal ofrecen poca protección o apoyo para los inquilinos. ¡Estamos luchando por un cambio!
La organización de justicia de vivienda de TOP está arraigada en nuestra creencia fundamental de que la vivienda es un derecho humano y de que todas las personas en nuestras comunidades merecen un hogar seguro, accesible y estable, sin importar nuestra edad, raza, género, fe o ingresos.
¡AGREGA TU NOMBRE si eres un residente de Dallas que está de acuerdo y que quiere sumarse a este trabajo de campaña vital! [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc7xt9JezgWm3pil3PMcC1HyJVOTPmsxZdMxZkerJcMqS02WQ/viewform]
Para obtener más información, envía un correo electrónico a Iman a ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
Consejos de TOP: Echa un vistazo a estas alternativas más éticas que Amazon
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Amazon%20alternatives.png]
Entre los ultrarricos que asistieron a la toma de posesión de Trump, llena de oligarcas, se encontraba nada menos que Jeff Bezos, de Amazon. Ahora bien, todos hemos comprado en algún momento productos de Amazon. ¡Es una comodidad al alcance de un clic! Pero, si bien los precios y el envío rápido son tentadores, vale la pena considerar otros sitios web para productos cotidianos, especialmente si buscas apoyar a las pequeñas empresas y ser un comprador más consciente de las cuestiones sociales. Echa un vistazo a estas alternativas. [https://blog.credo.com/2024/11/07/conscious-consuming-for-the-holidays-try-these-alternatives-to-amazon/]

Texas Organizing Project
700 S. Zarzamora, Suite 212
San Antonio, TX 78207
United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/_pdeZq7FqkSM3uHo3kegbw2?unsubscribedata=qauUD0As3EkWk02XdQLh19SFd6xrsYblWovQTjmMQVe2rQDXHgQ3nOVeWN1EZiIh9Mia5I3rnkCmHujFZswlvmYlXh3ccd2IsYAv5raM1V%2BcNCHaeZvkTz2o4Yj%2FmmetQvZJWor4jO%2F8mMg%2Br3LJq2TrPMnBGTGdwHhVx7sXR%2B%2Fahz55XNvs8hNRoRJdMU6VLGmwFyAc54BaMfcNwpfmv0P1gaBgtFwVwWLWQF4QZjTOsuH4lUeFGExaRV0jz4FsFF0lBHSWalTBf6OLvQsCRirjcq7ukiRcmRwFRtknGYp6FAwjJtW1hU50hdtOimzEAJHNVwNOzOtA1XLuy90g6XkLcpWbkp0yUhJEH3MZGhth5Gt3PgWGkwFisBZlO7560DOg8uGy5aQpz7CViVxzLUTWilu0RZz%2BqzdytAwyg0A%3D .

body:
You need to see what they’re doing to Pete.

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z538m6191b309r50e6jpg77tbp3jaktv2799g33g_)

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsooeas4t107v9uruskqgu098m2mhi22ej24094g_)
_**LAST-MINUTE SMEAR CAMPAIGN.**_
This last-ditch attempt to _**SMEAR**_ Pete Hegseth’s name by the Radical Left is disgusting.

Out of nowhere, Democrats are now attempting to claim that Pete Hegseth’s ex-wife was _**THREATENED PHYSICALLY.**_

Even though she has come out and stated that this is __**FALSE.**__

But the Leftist Mainstream mission and Radical left will _**NEVER**_ stop.

This is their absolute _**LAST CHANCE**_ to _**SINK**_ Pete Hegseth’s nomination to Secretary of Defense.

Because once he’s confirmed, Pete has promised to _**PURGE**_ the _**WOKE-MIND VIRUS**_ from D.C. and get our country back on track.
They’ll use _**ANY TACTIC**_ , no matter _**HOW SHAMFUL**_ , in order to **_DESTROY_** him and _**CRIPPLE**_ Trump’s _**PRESIDENCY BEFORE IT HAS BEGUN.**_

We need an _**IMMEDIATE RESPONSE RIGHT NOW, FULL STOP.**_

**[If you stand with Pete Hegseth for SEC DEF, GO ON THE RECORD ASAP](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4oj3tsdtbd9lk0d378h46mpr33sf8frj4qj7800_)**

name: AUDIT ALERT [via House GOP]
subject: AUDIT THE FEDS: It’s time we saw the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It’s what the Federal Government owes EVERY American

|
---
| | | **UNITED STATES GOVERNMENT AUDIT:[ACTIVE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7h9vp98nht89t3peigommvlrln73na2tb9np1cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdj60o32cth2bs "ACTIVE")

Friend's Assessment: [INCOMPLETE](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2ze4s14qv251opfmh12ob9f6t5tlgcf11iri80ck8_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdj60o32cth2bs "INCOMPLETE")**
---

Friend,

**We have a 24-hour window to demand transparency from the federal government._The clock is ticking._**

As we stand at the crossroads of a new era of conservative leadership in Washington, one thing is clear: _**it's high time we shine a light on the federal government's reckless spending habits.**_

Think about it: _the same bureaucrats who were supposed to serve the American people have been squandering billions on wasteful programs and projects._ It's nothing short of a betrayal of the public trust.

That's why **we're launching a comprehensive audit of the federal government - to uncover the truth about where your tax dollars are really going.** But we need your input, and we need it NOW.

---
| | [TAKE THE GOVERNMENT AUDIT NOW](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdo27ov358ls46798ki5tkmjuujitgsf9ja9bl78_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdj60o32cth2bs "TAKE THE GOVERNMENT AUDIT NOW")
---

_**You have just 24 hours to take our Government Audit.**_ If we don't get enough support, the bureaucrats will continue to get away with their wasteful spending.

We want to know: which areas of government do you think need the most scrutiny? Where do you think we can cut wasteful spending and restore fiscal responsibility?

Please make this a priority, Friend. **It 's critical to ensure transparency at _every level of our government. _**

---
| | [TAKE THE GOVERNMENT AUDIT NOW](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zko5h3s498sleu1egbkooripb9csm0ofv8u1baf0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdj60o32cth2bs "TAKE THE GOVERNMENT AUDIT NOW")

name: AMAC Action
subject: Democrats have dropped a malicious hit piece
body:
The radical Democrats have dropped a malicious hit piece attacking Pete Hegseth – just before he’s slated to get a vote.

| |
---
| | Today I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zd8d430e8drfet4s0nr8bn2to2la3qmhps871ml0_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdj60o36cth2bs)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, The radical Democrats have dropped a malicious hit piece attacking Pete Hegseth – just before he’s slated to get a vote. We knew from the beginning when President Trump nominated Pete Hegseth that they would stop at nothing to try to tank his appointment – and that they would try to coerce and bully weak Republicans to vote against him. But we are NOT backing down. _**[_**That's why I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmrqpkrqs7umv6hfgaehslspp0lc52n42tmksjpg_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdj60o36cth2bs)**_ Pete Hegseth is a decorated veteran, a proven leader, and a loyal defender of the America First agenda. He has what it takes to stand up to the deep state, protect our troops, and restore the integrity of our military—something sorely lacking under the Biden administration. America and her military are still reeling from the failed leadership of **Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin** , the architect of the disastrous **_Afghanistan withdrawal._** Under Austin’s watch, America endured one of the most humiliating moments in modern history:
---
| |
* **13 brave service members killed in Kabul.**
* **Thousands of Americans and allies left behind in enemy territory.**
* **Billions of dollars’ worth of U.S. military equipment handed over to the Taliban.**

---
My friend, **our military deserves better.** President Trump understands that. That’s why he’s nominated Pete Hegseth—a battle-hardened warrior who knows what it means to serve his country and will never bow to woke ideologues or globalist interests.But now that the left has picked a new line of attack, they are going to double and triple-down to deny President Trump his nominee. If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak Republicans could help the Democrats win this fight. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let RINOs undermine President Trump again! _**[_**If you agree that Pete Hegseth MUST BE CONFIRMED as Secretary of Defense, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH Response Form right away!**_](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zavs4482ej9tv82jd21u5f8g07g2tcur84up4a58_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdj60o36cth2bs)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Pete Hegseth. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**. If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen!AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – **but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**
---
[ ** CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH** ](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm6d12ho994uc9kap23rk7u9rr85jl08tq9v2e6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj7cdj60o36cth2bs)

Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC.
