Dear Peter,

In 2025, a major goal of United Sovereign Americans is to identify opportunities to work with government officials willing to address critical issues within our election systems and seek the reforms necessary to secure them. A significant effort toward achieving this goal will take place Tuesday, February 25, 2025 with USA’s **State Advocacy Day. **USA volunteers from across the nation will present peer-reviewed audit results of November's general election, highlighting discrepancies in voter rolls, vote counts, and tallies, to their respective state representatives. Volunteers will explain the problems in our election system and outline United Sovereign American’s solutions that will ensure future elections are provably accurate and legally valid. Volunteer training for 2025 Advocacy Day is on Wednesday evenings. Scroll down to the _“Join Our Team” _section to learn how to participate.
---
| [ **USA on Twitter X** ](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VX0LW06z66hwW5tdV2H54TRsJW6fpr4J5r8dNbN26s5_R3m2ndW69sMD-6lZ3n-W2rX6C27f5rrwW2r-FNn4MKjNgVQSTqf80Bj8ZVJj3d_2x2vGGW2GN1RN3LpSQhVpxKBW4Sg0j4W3gMxC413XdnLW8WtDPl6yXyhdW7sn9zx6J_CflW5x-G454-B2QYW2tkJ-z60lrtqVfy2hk68Q0vgW664klc3Hh37zW7PV69g8z5Wx1W69t2Jf4Pg3GcVYxxJT2scnkNW6GB83Z1NJV2fW8C7HNT3TH65kVKT5FX33grg9VJD5Zy7BDlZwf61NWgH04)
---
|
---
Later this year, volunteers will preview groundbreaking federal legislation for our elections systems being drafted by USA that will be presented to the United States Congress. The purpose of this legislation will be to mandate total transparency, prove the results, and prevent false representation. It will include requirements for real time end-to-end audits and monitoring, as well as compliance. USA is actively seeking state and federal officials willing to investigate and address the chaos in our election systems. Marly Hornik, pictured below at an inaugural event in Washington DC, used that opportunity to speak with senators, members of Congress, and others willing to work toward securing our liberty through valid elections. Education, action, and accountability are essential.
---
---

clean_body: In 2025, a major goal of United Sovereign Americans is to identify opportunities to work with government officials willing to address critical issues within our election systems and seek the reforms necessary to secure them. | | | | | Dear Peter, In 2025, a major goal of United Sovereign Americans is to identify opportunities to work with government officials willing to address critical issues within our election systems and seek the reforms necessary to secure them. A significant effort toward achieving this goal will take place Tuesday, February 25, 2025 with USA’s State Advocacy Day. USA volunteers from across the nation will present peer-reviewed audit results of November's general election, highlighting discrepancies in voter rolls, vote counts, and tallies, to their respective state representatives. Volunteers will explain the problems in our election system and outline United Sovereign American’s solutions that will ensure future elections are provably accurate and legally valid. Volunteer training for 2025 Advocacy Day is on Wednesday evenings. Scroll down to the “Join Our Team” section to learn how to participate. | | Later this year, volunteers will preview groundbreaking federal legislation for our elections systems being drafted by USA that will be presented to the United States Congress. The purpose of this legislation will be to mandate total transparency, prove the results, and prevent false representation. It will include requirements for real time end-to-end audits and monitoring, as well as compliance. USA is actively seeking state and federal officials willing to investigate and address the chaos in our election systems. Marly Hornik, pictured below at an inaugural event in Washington DC, used that opportunity to speak with senators, members of Congress, and others willing to work toward securing our liberty through valid elections. Education, action, and accountability are essential. | | Check out these media highlights. The on January 20, 2025, was a moment of celebration, but our path ahead is clear. USA remains committed to securing the blessings of Liberty for all Americans. USA announced a volunteer training conference for April 4-7, 2025 in a . Save the date and join us to keep our momentum going, secure legitimate representation, and use the power of government for the good of the nation. More info coming soon. Our Thursday, January 16 discussed the unique balance between the state & federal powers designed to protect our individual liberty. . | | Join our team: Follow, Comment and Share our social media to expand our mission reach: , , , , & Share our Attend our Weekly Thursday , and please invite a friend so we can spread the word about the core principles of our mission. Get Involved. To volunteer with United Sovereign Americans, click and submit your interest. Strengthen your contribution to our mission by joining the Wednesday Stars and Stripes session for advanced volunteer training on Advocacy Day, Resolutions, and more. Just scroll to the bottom of this email, click 'Manage Preferences,' and select your preferred communication updates. Invest** in our efforts to educate, advocate, collaborate and litigate for the Constitutional rights of all Americans. Your partnership is crucial to our success. | | Join us THIS EVENING at 7:00 PM Eastern to learn how safeguarding elections protects your civil rights. We study the Constitution, other founding documents, unique case law, all in preparation to restore election validity. You can access previous study sessions I look forward to seeing you tonight! Marly Hornik CEO, | | United Sovereign Americans, Inc., a 501(c)(4) nonprofit organization, Suite 194, 167 LAMP & LANTERN VILLAGE, CHESTERFIELD, MO 63017

Then: He added long-time Trump supporter Dana White to Meta’s board of directors to strengthen the bond between his company and our new president. Now: Zuckerberg is GUTTING Meta’s fact-checking and content moderation programs – even though they protect vulnerable groups from hate speech. He’s also joining Trump in ATTACKING diversity programs. We need to know if you’re with us in the fight against hate speech, misinformation, and digital harassment, Peter. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Condemns Governor Healey's $62 Billion Budget Proposal: ‘A Recipe for Fiscal Instability and Higher Taxes on Families’
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KB8Rjhd7CUrQNuq3DawzPhlQZboOqu0-LhH-AeLsBrDOmkYFYTB7PBA6NxkN0nCoBYKwdLEk-FMBZ-NUv480GXNxQoJfMo4Wf8xiXS6xYlWMXcCCzMvU7FW0FYWX50-sQEoOEa2aMMxFkSqgLg4qQw==&c=2uFi_7jYkPU75J5xCJW4H9NQBaRV3qXdJT1VTA5pXLT12ekZkTm-WQ==&ch=imd2-Fc07BNTJ3nOjJ59PrLv3r6WOQBJoLzLxs8RIJ3QLxDXXT0ypA==)
---
|
### MassGOP Condemns Governor Healey's $62 Billion Budget Proposal: 'A Recipe for Fiscal Instability and Higher Taxes on Families'
---
---
| Boston, MA- The Massachusetts Republican Party is alarmed by Governor Maura Healey's proposed $62 billion budget, which increases spending by 2.6% while relying on nearly $1 billion in one-time revenues. This reckless fiscal approach risks plunging the state into financial instability, further burdening hardworking families and jeopardizing critical programs and services.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale criticized the budget as a misguided blueprint for Massachusetts' future: "This budget exemplifies the Healey-Driscoll Administration's disregard for fiscal responsibility. Relying on one-time revenues while increasing spending is an unsustainable path, particularly given the unchecked financial strain caused by the emergency assistance shelter program and ongoing uncertainty over monthly tax revenues. Instead of charting a path toward stability, this budget doubles down on reckless spending and higher taxes."
Carnevale highlighted several concerning elements of the budget:

* Backdoor Tax Increases Through the Municipal Empowerment Act: "Reintroducing the so-called Municipal Empowerment Act allows local governments to raise taxes, shifting the burden onto residents instead of providing sufficient state aid. This is a political maneuver that avoids accountability while forcing families to pay more."
* Harmful Tax Proposals: "The new tax on candy, capping charitable donation deductions, and other tax hikes further punish Massachusetts residents while enabling unchecked spending on Beacon Hill. These measures will harm families, stifle economic growth, and undermine the essential work of charities that rely on donations to support our communities."
* Fiscal Recklessness and Missed Opportunities: "The reliance on one-time revenues mirrors past mistakes when Governor Healey's administration was forced to make disruptive mid-year 9C cuts. Without sustainable funding, these spending commitments only postpone an inevitable financial crisis. Instead of pursuing new taxes and bloated budgets, the state should adopt the meaningful reforms proposed by House and Senate Republicans to restore fiscal accountability and stability, particularly to the emergency shelter program."

Carnevale also expressed frustration over the Administration's contradictory messaging: "It's outrageous that Governor Healey claims she's not raising taxes while presenting a budget that does exactly that. Her proposals are disconnected from the realities faced by Massachusetts families and businesses."
The MassGOP calls on the Healey-Driscoll Administration to prioritize sustainable, transparent, and responsible budgeting that respects taxpayers and supports long-term stability. "Massachusetts deserves leadership that focuses on reform, efficiency, and fiscal discipline--not one-time fixes and political posturing," Carnevale concluded.

###

clean_body: | | | | | | | == | MassGOP Condemns Governor Healey's $62 Billion Budget Proposal: 'A Recipe for Fiscal Instability and Higher Taxes on Families' | Boston, MA- The Massachusetts Republican Party is alarmed by Governor Maura Healey's proposed $62 billion budget, which increases spending by 2.6% while relying on nearly $1 billion in one-time revenues. This reckless fiscal approach risks plunging the state into financial instability, further burdening hardworking families and jeopardizing critical programs and services. MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale criticized the budget as a misguided blueprint for Massachusetts' future: "This budget exemplifies the Healey-Driscoll Administration's disregard for fiscal responsibility. Relying on one-time revenues while increasing spending is an unsustainable path, particularly given the unchecked financial strain caused by the emergency assistance shelter program and ongoing uncertainty over monthly tax revenues. Instead of charting a path toward stability, this budget doubles down on reckless spending and higher taxes." Carnevale highlighted several concerning elements of the budget: Backdoor Tax Increases Through the Municipal Empowerment Act: "Reintroducing the so-called Municipal Empowerment Act allows local governments to raise taxes, shifting the burden onto residents instead of providing sufficient state aid. This is a political maneuver that avoids accountability while forcing families to pay more." Harmful Tax Proposals: "The new tax on candy, capping charitable donation deductions, and other tax hikes further punish Massachusetts residents while enabling unchecked spending on Beacon Hill. These measures will harm families, stifle economic growth, and undermine the essential work of charities that rely on donations to support our communities." * Fiscal Recklessness and Missed Opportunities: "The reliance on one-time revenues mirrors past mistakes when Governor Healey's administration was forced to make disruptive mid-year 9C cuts. Without sustainable funding, these spending commitments only postpone an inevitable financial crisis. Instead of pursuing new taxes and bloated budgets, the state should adopt the meaningful reforms proposed by House and Senate Republicans to restore fiscal accountability and stability, particularly to the emergency shelter program." Carnevale also expressed frustration over the Administration's contradictory messaging: "It's outrageous that Governor Healey claims she's not raising taxes while presenting a budget that does exactly that. Her proposals are disconnected from the realities faced by Massachusetts families and businesses." The MassGOP calls on the Healey-Driscoll Administration to prioritize sustainable, transparent, and responsible budgeting that respects taxpayers and supports long-term stability. "Massachusetts deserves leadership that focuses on reform, efficiency, and fiscal discipline--not one-time fixes and political posturing," Carnevale concluded. | | == | MassGOP | == | == == | | | | Massachusetts Republican Party | 85 Merrimac Street, Suite 505 | Boston, MA 02114 US | | | | | | | | |

name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is delivered on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=72a8ac60417f40aa88577032512d2954&_e=ni0ZMs60YMcbo-sQox4kd8ucPG9MiRhbA0EO_4dEGqTBiZqgOslapkslR_1oSQx2xfIeyLNW5o3MMzqdNIVKikpOMDcGZmkQH_NB1OiyMJU7kiYY2c6FtAcFiOhXaExgpAWFCyW56NTIWVUDNHXLzS-E8dVuz1ynW2iVGAlfHQXnLrOd2CH00uvV4UnvHsi61zKSbjF-KUR1ZD8vAnp5t3lWzM2_K9VC2FQl3zvvilU-VmMVp195P36BzQgR53QIpCkE9fvFveE0NdTUPMmz0uottzHvNBnYj61brxxUDDcZKpqvx1_7XDZsRPpPXwFTZ78bwXCU3ve-Byxuab46pLb-9cu6SXrI9ZBq0XufkTnzo6AxdYe4Jvqo7fiW1cocS-XVrQ9hMkVX4Os2poCqUQK_i7Kpj0uXaeyWkrqLL8I%3D)
---
| |
## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=72a8ac60417f40aa88577032512d2954&_e=ni0ZMs60YMcbo-sQox4kd8ucPG9MiRhbA0EO_4dEGqTBiZqgOslapkslR_1oSQx2xfIeyLNW5o3MMzqdNIVKikpOMDcGZmkQH_NB1OiyMJU7kiYY2c6FtAcFiOhXaExgpAWFCyW56NTIWVUDNHXLzS-E8dVuz1ynW2iVGAlfHQXnLrOd2CH00uvV4UnvHsi61zKSbjF-KUR1ZD8vAnp5t3lWzM2_K9VC2FQl3zvvilU-VmMVp195P36BzQgR53QIpCkE9fvFveE0NdTUPMmz0lPYQDYAV4ZfTcA5NGEW8GEnP6tygDNxt77P0OvGORC_gILaqSEthlQoiqfL_HG-2sviU6xj_EymsJ2A5JVyHreIAZBkL_zsx2TqOZcxFfS8BL_QyQXKSn7wsd_7y27TD-kv2oocVb7-oLeMbkXposo%3D) [NO](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=72a8ac60417f40aa88577032512d2954&_e=ni0ZMs60YMcbo-sQox4kd8ucPG9MiRhbA0EO_4dEGqTBiZqgOslapkslR_1oSQx2xfIeyLNW5o3MMzqdNIVKikpOMDcGZmkQH_NB1OiyMJU7kiYY2c6FtAcFiOhXaExgpAWFCyW56NTIWVUDNHXLzS-E8dVuz1ynW2iVGAlfHQXnLrOd2CH00uvV4UnvHsi61zKSbjF-KUR1ZD8vAnp5t3lWzM2_K9VC2FQl3zvvilU-VmMVp195P36BzQgR53QIpCkE9fvFveE0NdTUPMmz0qb078aTwijH0OcD9tDqYDrSoyOOD3UR9rQER4oqmIeHlEPXQuIz8mPXDMvm6aNjDc8jYFngqZBWA71RH4tYqfAjL4hRiY9_YuF-E7GydmAAdLBpaw7hkXaRcocw5mHDnsxqolutun5vupI8qwYUvxM%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=72a8ac60417f40aa88577032512d2954&_e=ni0ZMs60YMcbo-sQox4kd8ucPG9MiRhbA0EO_4dEGqTBiZqgOslapkslR_1oSQx2xfIeyLNW5o3MMzqdNIVKikpOMDcGZmkQH_NB1OiyMJU7kiYY2c6FtAcFiOhXaExgpAWFCyW56NTIWVUDNHXLzS-E8dVuz1ynW2iVGAlfHQXnLrOd2CH00uvV4UnvHsi61zKSbjF-KUR1ZD8vAnp5t3lWzM2_K9VC2FQl3zvvilU-VmMVp195P36BzQgR53QIpCkE9fvFveE0NdTUPMmz0gr4U296srp70nr47g3npCzf6e3MQLCO6BxJ1UQ12LrVloOJFDfANafq8OEOHrPPxICsgTnArXzO5t6_kSSvbh3XRw51W6obFW2lB6ETy27ZTNEnmr9WzlHOg0DbMQ18L24ik3YUMz_lSKQi22Fg3Bg%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Reclaiming American Freedom

## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kVhzaJdfqoqyOsEdaB8pig~~/AARclAA~/RgRpdLeSP0TAaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvZWxlY3RvcmFsLWNvbGxlZ2Utc3VydmV5Lz9zYz0wMDU2NE4wMjQyTDBBRE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZWxlY3RvcmFsX2NvbGxlZ2Vfc3VydmV5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVlFU05PU0hPUlRfUEEtUk9OLTIwMjUwMTIzVwNzcGNCCmeORR-SZ-ubOolSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) [NO](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kVhzaJdfqoqyOsEdaB8pig~~/AARclAA~/RgRpdLeSP0TAaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvZWxlY3RvcmFsLWNvbGxlZ2Utc3VydmV5Lz9zYz0wMDU2NE4wMjQyTDBBRE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZWxlY3RvcmFsX2NvbGxlZ2Vfc3VydmV5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVlFU05PU0hPUlRfUEEtUk9OLTIwMjUwMTIzVwNzcGNCCmeORR-SZ-ubOolSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/kVhzaJdfqoqyOsEdaB8pig~~/AARclAA~/RgRpdLeSP0TAaHR0cHM6Ly9pbmZvLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvZWxlY3RvcmFsLWNvbGxlZ2Utc3VydmV5Lz9zYz0wMDU2NE4wMjQyTDBBRE9ERUVTJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249ZWxlY3RvcmFsX2NvbGxlZ2Vfc3VydmV5JnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVlFU05PU0hPUlRfUEEtUk9OLTIwMjUwMTIzVwNzcGNCCmeORR-SZ-ubOolSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Because of Trump's cabinet appointments from the House of Representatives, Republicans have the smallest majority they've had since 1932 and are at extreme risk of losing it.
My name is Josh Weil and I am the Dad, Teacher, and Democrat running in the special election for Florida's 6th Congressional District. If we win here we paralyze their movement and with it any hope to implement their legislative agenda without needing Democratic support.

It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19968/6374453/b7d971b289387e0241ae06a74e4722d71285b0b2/3c2423297b0bca2174eafedc48f4a2018fd6fc1e). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19968/6374453/b7d971b289387e0241ae06a74e4722d71285b0b2/3c2423297b0bca2174eafedc48f4a2018fd6fc1e).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/19968/6374453/b7d971b289387e0241ae06a74e4722d71285b0b2/3c2423297b0bca2174eafedc48f4a2018fd6fc1e)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is delivered on behalf of Hillsdale College

| | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec69f44c65b246b29c601cc034cf17c7&_e=0GAAzKLRR5phIBKhrXf17xuHv11LDFx_bxkHyMJGtxd2EHsIKP9DVqe-6qCIDueTqPIRRe1agAAWL1t-jjBs3xFLwTxBkgiIDykJekHGf8Mw7eoxjFDAbluMZ7LDAi11oRKSh3Tu6hDV27nK9JiQaQq-9X6D1Wv8_o1ZxiUkLJkRTLQC3AGti9aT_evHAfVFD6QaL6zi3WiuiKUtjx8sz3dy5Ds-Guy1Krrbfbel29K9HrjOjmmGTUHRDKuAIM3aGz0DNoNJbLzfyS33tAKWeXh19DZcRCfnUR6q1XZ7BHw6ahpZCGAHQLbkxX9qhsmkNqWyO4N5AapLMm0QOMFF4mGtnyA9orFMG16TDj9zoDN3bMIAdvzKAN26GEqpESFjuEIITC3i5HD1cnctWD4q3yOaWboaJ11H4BcvCNXNfVE%3D)

## Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec69f44c65b246b29c601cc034cf17c7&_e=0GAAzKLRR5phIBKhrXf17xuHv11LDFx_bxkHyMJGtxd2EHsIKP9DVqe-6qCIDueTqPIRRe1agAAWL1t-jjBs3xFLwTxBkgiIDykJekHGf8Mw7eoxjFDAbluMZ7LDAi11oRKSh3Tu6hDV27nK9JiQaQq-9X6D1Wv8_o1ZxiUkLJkRTLQC3AGti9aT_evHAfVFD6QaL6zi3WiuiKUtjx8sz3dy5Ds-Guy1Krrbfbel29K9HrjOjmmGTUHRDKuAIM3aGz0DNoNJbLzfyS33tAKWeY64EttDE8qJBjDoVFrnXrr3im3xKIx9UxvT11Jv367fNkSXWrAp8jLc2oiVcaMQy1-0bapmL528kcA2DLgH1mbNP31TUlQBI0MHkxkZ2Wvit1u4y8GTZupSBrLQN0hv5EGQSv2AUmvLJRrkRCaP6L0%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec69f44c65b246b29c601cc034cf17c7&_e=0GAAzKLRR5phIBKhrXf17xuHv11LDFx_bxkHyMJGtxd2EHsIKP9DVqe-6qCIDueTqPIRRe1agAAWL1t-jjBs3xFLwTxBkgiIDykJekHGf8Mw7eoxjFDAbluMZ7LDAi11oRKSh3Tu6hDV27nK9JiQaQq-9X6D1Wv8_o1ZxiUkLJkRTLQC3AGti9aT_evHAfVFD6QaL6zi3WiuiKUtjx8sz3dy5Ds-Guy1Krrbfbel29K9HrjOjmmGTUHRDKuAIM3aGz0DNoNJbLzfyS33tAKWeSIdezIvdD1JZ4ulkxri3HdQcjiQtlC9wUX5v6LHW5_r0XfI49zK7cPPGXqRgaB1x2Mxar0yopV_yqdTqucgXz62qKL3w9ih2UEsHf_vxPYek_Rr0zKu2FUboorA7nyfuOAmb3ozDYWT7ALbJ_Oa5Ho%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection **by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ec69f44c65b246b29c601cc034cf17c7&_e=0GAAzKLRR5phIBKhrXf17xuHv11LDFx_bxkHyMJGtxd2EHsIKP9DVqe-6qCIDueTqPIRRe1agAAWL1t-jjBs3xFLwTxBkgiIDykJekHGf8Mw7eoxjFDAbluMZ7LDAi11oRKSh3Tu6hDV27nK9JiQaQq-9X6D1Wv8_o1ZxiUkLJkRTLQC3AGti9aT_evHAfVFD6QaL6zi3WiuiKUtjx8sz3dy5Ds-Guy1Krrbfbel29K9HrjOjmmGTUHRDKuAIM3aGz0DNoNJbLzfyS33tAKWeauv0UePfS9wCGu0GOci2eQ0Ym2yD9Jsk7LFUfqKtYDEFBNKz3ManR4n1olSFj_xXYyFfScyVxPkedl-LxGWDkJsZRDYrkA7n4myHiqr4kCc4i2YqL7ukkUzJnBeoliklici6tpHVbrE0IeoHBpaHzY%3D)** Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: The Texas Flyover
subject: Fun in the Snow, a Masked Visitor, and Charades
body:
This week’s winter storm has been challenging for airline customers and employees, road crews, first responders, and school officials—but it also provided some rare sights and enjoyable experiences for many who aren’t accustomed to seeing snow.

## Pentagon Sending 1,500 Troops to Border
The Pentagon is implementing President Trump’s directive to use the military to secure the southern border by [deploying up to 1,500 active duty troops](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAQhp9GOwwDrqwFxTV2e-2VZhbGlQSFAOr69hcvd-VVM19m8uXP__UYH-i8W1-fuJAu7ymMgosb48CEHC06f45tbfWT2x5q0qCk6iTc-3s9azSdUUCkFIq-t60A1RkDHYKkToGsnb5kHIQEkLxtG2gNl1YgR3UXBFi1nKwrITVlpkJvzJM_w06pMWGpvZ5LibmSH5UYKjEcx9Hs6D2dhtaS0F9flRhWOvI1sLiwome_jJFt-Q8irQVfYWUlsEyrZVu8VrhxztAUtxOzWzlZSSHEfJ1m8pFlMluiy7PQ25nAniFZSixMkzMOfWYZz0oMddI2Hs57lztVtfy1oPuJV5d_W921-A4AAP__atR8-Q). They will join the estimated 2,500 National Guard and Reserve forces already stationed there and are expected to support Border Patrol Agents with logistics, transportation, and barrier construction. In response to another executive order, border agents have been directed to deport migrants who enter the country illegally [without allowing them to request asylum](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGPtCAQxvFPgx0GBlbdguJt7PZtrzSjsEoOxMC46re_eP11k_yTXybP12t4oQ9-nf9jdIbOdxpAwIMLyUENFn24Bl1ZMwr7lJUzslVto2T37KrFwNho-xCjfnZOKN10Vql31zxQW5gU6MqbGxMSlJRKaF1LPQllAQW2HTiJTAtnPaVc0-LInVje4Uofl-spxSqYhWgrTP1j0DPoj-Oovw8678igv20GvZD3DQz6vfAxZesyx9mtVDilYHnZY8Tsw8Wt21ImHv2c8c6HpyXtxLFcYY98cZj9Ohe-r7dBeY8bd9ZPxKCvsrHb4UPwpWmZFnNEH36_pD9n-xj4CQAA__9O-3Bz). The policy is similar to that implemented under Title 42, which barred entry for those traveling through countries with high rates of COVID-19 infection. Amid reports of pending [immigration enforcement operations](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOwyAQAL8Gd2vx8quguMZdrr3S2sASIxGwgMTJ359y_fWj0Wh-LtsFQwzp9o13Mu3l8ya5HIALkGpzGOJ7050zV-4W0ZERk5pGJeZl7nZDk_McF361Sg_otfTKeSU5oRqstWMXzEfGhVRCKK51L7TlyknkOM2SBDLNyYWWS992avTC6uM7P6n0Nt-7aPbWjsrUF5Mrk-t5nn1F-yiFUvsQTK6Jzsrk2h5UHb4rBEtQMLgKIUHFBJhaTiEDHgdhgZZhxyfBlSiBxRjJQfYe1DjMXCxTV4w7zhBjqOPENL_dMcS_mvbvnqeRvwEAAP__4Glo7Q) in San Antonio and elsewhere, the Justice Department has directed federal prosecutors to investigate local officials who attempt to impede deportations of illegal aliens. “ _It is the responsibility of the Justice Department to defend the Constitution, and accordingly, to lawfully execute the policies that the American people elected President Trump to implement_ ,” [said the three-page memo](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGuozAQheGnMZ2RPfheQuFiG7psuyUa7IHMrsHInoTk7VdJf-tf-nR0_lynK3Liff2NG3l5LnkCA1_aWA3dFJHTa3JN9LOJg23I277rvzt7GS7NzS8AwwALumGgMMf5C0yP1uFsMJo-QsP-jRkLnbWdca61LpguAhrsL0AWlTMUWXJp5UZCT6xLeuUHlTbkrUn-JnJU1f1SMCoYz_Ns_0nd3lHBuNNZFYx_71U4kI50YJGNdtGRCwWp-ii5UrhLLlVL1rw_qAqvKKRTDpg0LUsu8ol5rlLuQTRvG68FhfOuaV9yCfRGFYxN8fE4OSWu371yZt2Q02ep_Hjdw8P_AAAA__8Y7XY5).
## $500 Billion AI Initiative Launched in Texas
President Trump invited three tech executives to the White House on Tuesday to announce an [initiative dubbed Stargate](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kDGPozAQhX-N6SayDSRsQZGGbq-9MhrwGGbX2MgeIPn3p6S_8ulJ7-n7_n4_vpEDx_kPrtTL06eH1bYFbcDWD4ccXo-mcv2o3ZepqDe3-natTffVVUuv25H86Ftt_Ng5Zzt_RWq8aafR2Bax4v49po2tjal101xMM-naWdR46ywZVI0mx5LyRRYSemLx4ZUOypcprVXoF5GtqPqu7KDscJ7nZS3x3Sk7UIS9KDsITUtMIc0vZQfMwp4nxgAchULgmeJEyg5bpsKOooDkfd1g5oMKlH3bUhbwKUOkE5DhoCh7JiiCeUYhWOid4FxQQBL8xnQCjmkXkIVgy-mHJvl8w_1unsPvT1fl3m0nh8DlelONnlfk8GGS_0o-evsvAAD__-2ohFQ), a $500 billion joint venture in artificial intelligence infrastructure that includes 10 data centers under development in Texas. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son, and Oracle’s Larry Ellison were [on hand for the announcement](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQBb_GdEb22glO4eIaulx7JVrMklgyBtkLJH9_yvXXPelJo9H83Ic7xhTz4xsX8vya1wEUXKTSEswwYUzvwTaTH9V00w153ZnuarS7uebpuwuZWVs90-jQQECn3Tgao10X6Aamif4DUxqM1kZZ22oblJkAFXYOSKOwiqbIa2n5SUwvrHN6rweVNqxLk_yTeavCfAnoBfTnebZhrJnO-vkF9J8poOeyL5vEnNc9B6pyK_FAJlkp8FokRhnzXLBy2QPvhWTMB1VeKLOAvil-2s6YUqzXTlj1WDCmPwH-t8jh4TcAAP__dmxl5A). "_AI holds incredible promise for all of us, for every American_ ," Ellison said. Altman agreed, saying, “ _I think this will be the most important project of this era_." Trump asserted the initiative has the potential to create over 100,000 jobs “almost immediately,” [calling it](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7uOrDAQRL_GzkDutnkFDm5CNjfdEPXYzWDJPGTMwPz9isk3K6lKp3R-HsODQgzL6z_NbPM1rgMqrAoFBerBU4ifwUhvn8p3INlCo5taQ9u1crKqenbgasMOWFPXjuwUerrrSkPbyGBvmALUAFoZU4JxSnskRU2LDCSMYh_ymso8ceaL9jF-1jen0q2zjHbKeduF_iewF9if51mO62UWPvd7ILC_o8A-p2PeCgpFWMZEe06Hy0fi4ouUyfrtDDGGvW6EUa-ZQvwe5D-N3xZ_AwAA___Y-1lf) the "largest AI infrastructure project, by far, in history.”
## Fun in the Snow
This week’s winter storm has been challenging for airline customers and employees, road crews, first responders, and school officials—but it also provided some [rare sights and enjoyable experiences](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLuOwyAURL8Gd1i8_EhBsY27bLuldQOXgER8I0OC8_erRNtuOxrNHJ2f83qGlNN2_YYb2noEWpVQAxeSK716SPm1ms7bi_An2aGVk55GLefT3EWrLgGHIEDL2Q_ODUGOiOIyBDAgnBu7ZN9jQiotpRbG9NI4ob0CAdOsUAIzAn2qtPc1YsUDSsgveuLeO7p12cZa74XpL6YWppbWWh_oUGOkR6m0vUtMLRu2wtTyF_KGUCPuvGzU-D1SpcKfySMVDm6nUnihR40IpfLPZbdbf28p51TGiRlxvUHKH4D6r5GnVb8BAAD__0koZv4) for many who aren’t accustomed to seeing snow. They will join the estimated 2,500 National Guard and Reserve forces already stationed there and are expected to support Border Patrol Agents with logistics, transportation, and barrier construction. In response to another executive order, border agents have been directed to deport migrants who enter the country illegally . The policy is similar to that implemented under Title 42, which barred entry for those traveling through countries with high rates of COVID-19 infection. Amid reports of pending in San Antonio and elsewhere, the Justice Department has directed federal prosecutors to investigate local officials who attempt to impede deportations of illegal aliens. “ It is the responsibility of the Justice Department to defend the Constitution, and accordingly, to lawfully execute the policies that the American people elected President Trump to implement ,” . $500 Billion AI Initiative Launched in Texas President Trump invited three tech executives to the White House on Tuesday to announce an , a $500 billion joint venture in artificial intelligence infrastructure that includes 10 data centers under development in Texas. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, SoftBank CEO Masayoshi Son, and Oracle’s Larry Ellison were . "AI holds incredible promise for all of us, for every American ," Ellison said. Altman agreed, saying, “ I think this will be the most important project of this era." Trump asserted the initiative has the potential to create over 100,000 jobs “almost immediately,” the "largest AI infrastructure project, by far, in history.” Fun in the Snow This week’s winter storm has been challenging for airline customers and employees, road crews, first responders, and school officials—but it also provided some for many who aren’t accustomed to seeing snow. Houston residents visited local parks and slid down hills on skis, tubes, sleds, and cardboard boxes. A man in Galveston was filmed ! ## Pentagon Sends Troops to Southern Border
The Pentagon is deploying [1,500 additional active-duty troops](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFvwyAQRn-NvWHBgUMyMHTJlq4dLWwO-yrCWUDi5t9X6d7tkz7p6el93aabp0R5_fR3dC3yBBJGIZUAPQVP6TWZPriICKh7dMpqe9IAJ9NvTl5w0eN4Xs7-YqIaYZ7lqCQiROn92fbk3jSpQCulrYFBGz9HZRUGO3s5q85IDNS4DN9MuW0Y04ufWIaF731yW2t77fRHB9cOrsdxDJF_Mh71_Xdw3TlRo6W-J-bmV86iYg6UV-FDoEacfRJqlFK0wrxXUfnRNixZzFwCFvGogmOkhXzqiwv7QSlRPdnOyPXuKf2ZtP_KPB38BgAA__9vC2gs) to the southern border following President Donald Trump's executive order, supplementing the 2,500 troops already there. Meanwhile, ICE [arrested 308 illegal immigrants](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0j71y8yAQAJ9G6tBwB5LsguJr3PlrU2pO4rAvQT8DxIzePuP06Xd2Zz_u050kyvb4Tyu7EvYJNfZKg0IzeZJ4Trb1LjAjm5YdjGYcDOJg26e7zqiJhqv32l9mDXbx_QUp0ADQw9y34t42DWgAzGixM5bmACOwH2fSMzRWs5eyp-5zl608OcRzf3Hqln1to3uWcuTG_Gvw1uCt1tptXHNl_noDDd5K-l4PJQsrSolzySpIykV5OtWROIvnbTkVarhqO7TJ-aNKjJKHsbH6sZLE31T5a_3l8CcAAP__Hxtb2Q) across the U.S. in the first 24 hours of the Trump administration, according to Border Czar Tom Homan, who said the arrests targeted serious criminals.
## Trump Ends Federal DEI Programs
The Trump administration placed all federal diversity, equity, and inclusion [(DEI) employees on paid leave](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OpDAQhJ_GZI1wm5_Iwegkspn0dBFq6PaMT8ZGxjMsb79i881KKlXp0_f3Pt3JBx-fD1rFFpcmbLCDRgOaicmHc2ortk4ExVRi9WCG3iD2bfWy3UAkpteNY0Izd8uC3Ltl7np2Bo2pvL3eGo1GazO0WJuWZqcHLTzM1MxatY2wLynX_5OP5SUunOkjuV7SWgX7KmXblbkpHBWOx3HU6x6vTuEoEd67wnFLwRe_XPF5TeMqsSgcS36vGxCvPkLKLHkHJyyZArB42As5B7PAFmgRhhRhI88QhD4C8wmHcJSd6VQ4UobbTX_9-VceVba8HT4Ev_eDapvnSj784Jbf9H0sfgcAAP__wIZ0kw) on Wednesday, directing federal agencies to also remove all websites and social media accounts related to DEI. The executive order also calls for [an examination of DEI](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0jzFvhSAURn8NbBi4oPgGhi5ur2tHg3J97zYoBqjGf9_YvduXfMk5OV_P8ekp0vb69Cu6uqQRJLRCKgF6DJ7iNRoe3IIIqDk6ZbXtNEBn-Nth30rscZYtmNZPc9fb1vbwQPBBLebByd00qUArpa2BRhs_LcoqDHbyclLMSAxUU26-E231jUu80oG5mdPKo3vXuhemPxgMDIbzPJt5Khue5f4ZDPdkMNT8s-4i5YC5CNyCCHRgLlQvsef0yn4tIiAxGHh2YT8pRiqdZUa-Vk_xT1b_iz8c_AYAAP__xRtdAw) programs for alleged discriminatory practices and a focus on how to approach DEI initiatives in the private sector. Federal department heads now have until Jan. 31 to provide a list of any changes made to contract or personnel positions since Nov. 5, 2024, to hide their connection to DEI programs. [Read the executive order here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAURb8GOww8GHEKim3sZtstDcpD3wbBIDNm_n7j9Nuf3HNzfh7jw1GktHy7DW0NeQQBNy4kBzV6R_E96sbbgAioGrTSKNMpgE43qzVSYn_v-_utm3WQk1YBvOghKIcABhqy15qQoKRURkOrtJuCNBK9mZyYJNMCPdVc2t9Mqa4Y4ju_sLRz3ppo11r3g6kvBgOD4TzP9lyp4pqfB7ZLfjEY9oIHeUyVXORurpTTwWC4vAwGIRkMmDylhRfnab6g5PnpjorhGfly2dKGqXKPxPeSl-K24wPtBQMWTDOlhcHQFOv3k2KkozNMi2VzFD9H63_hXhb-AgAA___hbnG9).
## Map: Emergency Room Wait Times by State
Patients in Washington, D.C., face [the longest](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAQQL8GOwwMKLsFxTV2e-2VBnHcnQuIkTmNf3_Z669_eS95X4_xESjR-vwMGT0vZQQFnVRaghnnQOkabTP7BRHQNOi1M643AL1tXt6Zro93RNVhF7vbPS4GI97U3XTWOHtryL9tSoPR2jgLrbFhWrTTOLspqEkLq3AmLnv7XWjlFy7pKgfubSy5Sf7FvFVhPgQMAobzPNuD6k9IMWzEIVHlNyhgyGHbcJaYcX_iGi-5l5LlQZVYMmWscrpk5cAoYGh2P28npUS1d8KqZw6U_or834HDw28AAAD__9JHX0M) emergency room wait times, while those in North Dakota have the shortest, according to a new map ranking average wait times in America's emergency rooms. A new study [analyzed data](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuhDAQBNCvsTuQvWvsXOEiDd2lTYkWdrlzZM4ILCL-PiJKm_aNNKP5vA93Sjm9Hh-0SKxzGcBA1xjbAA5MKZ-D0xxnERDUEm3A4BHAO_2MHXTeuBtwNwNY7m48EfKb83byJmDQKV5txgJai8FBi47G2QYrHEYyo1XOCKdatvarpFd9ypzPcsjWTmXROT5rXXeF7wp6BT1TpXZa9vZRDgX9upUjsWzN5X_xLlVBT-s5NQfgTQFe2lQas-gt8vqdck67D8qZx0Ip_w7V_44fEX4CAAD__zckWTg) from the U.S. Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services to determine how hospital resources, patient volume, and staffing levels impact wait times. The median U.S. emergency room visit time in 2024 was 2 hours and 42 minutes, with 20 states exceeding the national average. [See your state’s waiting time here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOhCAQQL8GOwwMKLsFxTV2e-2VBnHcnQuIkTmNf3_Z669_eS95X4_xESjR-vwMGT0vZQQFnVRaghnnQOkabTP7BRHQNOi1M643AL1tXt6Zro93RNVhF7vbPS4GI97U3XTWOHtryL9tSoPR2jgLrbFhWrTTOLspqEkLq3AmLnv7XWjlFy7pKgfubSy5Sf7FvFVhPgQMAobzPNuD6k9IMWzEIVHlNyhgyGHbcJaYcX_iGi-5l5LlQZVYMmWscrpk5cAoYGh2P28npUS1d8KqZw6U_or834HDw28AAAD__9JHX0M).

clean_body: The Pentagon is deploying 1,500 additional active-duty troops to the southern border following President Donald Trump's executive order, supplementing the 2,200 troops already there. | | | | | | Thursday, January 23, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1957, the Wham-O toy company produced the first batch of their aerodynamic plastic discs now recognized by millions of fans worldwide as . In today’s Throwback Thursday section, we explore that would likely be frowned upon today. Reply to this email with your favorite childhood pastimes that might draw disapproval today. If you live in Arizona or just want to keep up with news of the Grand Canyon State, we've launched The Arizona Flyover, our latest daily state publication. Sign up automatically . We're flying today with , offering an investment in groundbreaking homebuilding technologies. | Pentagon Sends Troops to Southern Border The Pentagon is deploying to the southern border following President Donald Trump's executive order, supplementing the 2,500 troops already there. The new forces will provide logistical support, data entry, monitoring, and maintenance assistance but cannot perform law enforcement duties under current law unless Trump within 90 days. Meanwhile, ICE across the U.S. in the first 24 hours of the Trump administration, according to Border Czar Tom Homan, who said the arrests targeted serious criminals. Trump Ends Federal DEI Programs The Trump administration placed all federal diversity, equity, and inclusion on Wednesday, directing federal agencies to also remove all websites and social media accounts related to DEI. The executive order also calls for programs for alleged discriminatory practices and a focus on how to approach DEI initiatives in the private sector. Federal department heads now have until Jan. 31 to provide a list of any changes made to contract or personnel positions since Nov. 5, 2024, to hide their connection to DEI programs. . Map: Emergency Room Wait Times by State Patients in Washington, D.C., face emergency room wait times, while those in North Dakota have the shortest, according to a new map ranking average wait times in America's emergency rooms. A new study from the U.S. Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services to determine how hospital resources, patient volume, and staffing levels impact wait times. The median U.S. emergency room visit time in 2024 was 2 hours and 42 minutes, with 20 states exceeding the national average. . | ➤President Donald Trump on Wednesday threatened to impose "high levels" of taxes, tariffs, and sanctions on Russia unless President Vladimir Putin ends the war with Ukraine, stating it's time to "make a deal.” () ➤The House passed the Laken Riley Act 263-156 on Wednesday, sending the immigration-crime bill to President Trump, marking his first legislative victory since returning to the White House. name: AMAC Action
subject: Democrats have dropped a malicious hit piece
body:
The radical Democrats have dropped a malicious hit piece attacking Pete Hegseth – just before he’s slated to get a vote.

| |
---
| | Today I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkMGOmzAQhp_G3EDYAzYcfEhDspVW2VZRtT1agz1hrbUB2ZC-fpUqfYC9ftKMvu__fTEX9MHP0xtG0p82mZTN6AxGtKWjmMuIwVu_7NmIWrRlzUsBBgqnXW8lyoI0V6AkdDXUxYcWgpS6jRJGe-taVCO0zmFX8xZtrwQVXj_-1FwA500nRNVgL8lBC6pRt5Y61tQYKG3VJ9Fql3lKlHOidR-DtzhXdolF0B_btmYGBybOTJwfumg3v8xVovu9sgsT5xUV73vbOCR56ziD875Fk5c9WWIwfBteyuvpnQn5wJGc3yOD4XR5EotxRT_NDIansTCHy-GXOf54-356AXM9vZufh_L1eH1ebJbB8Hq8lv8Li6Td-seH4LNUrKmniD78C9i-svVdi78BAAD__xO-hIs)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, The radical Democrats have dropped a malicious hit piece attacking Pete Hegseth – just before he’s slated to get a vote. We knew from the beginning when President Trump nominated Pete Hegseth that they would stop at nothing to try to tank his appointment – and that they would try to coerce and bully weak Republicans to vote against him. But we are NOT backing down. _**[_**That's why I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!**_](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkMGOmzAQhp_G3EDYAzYcfEhDspVW2VZRtT1agz1hrbUB2ZC-fpUqfYC9ftKMvu__fTEX9MHP0xtG0p82mZTN6AxGtKWjmMuIwVu_7NmIWrRlzUsBBgqnXW8lyoI0V6AkdDXUxYcWgpS6jRJGe-taVCO0zmFX8xZtrwQVXj_-1FwA500nRNVgL8lBC6pRt5Y61tQYKG3VJ9Fql3lKlHOidR-DtzhXdolF0B_btmYGBybOTJwfumg3v8xVovu9sgsT5xUV73vbOCR56ziD875Fk5c9WWIwfBteyuvpnQn5wJGc3yOD4XR5EotxRT_NDIansTCHy-GXOf54-356AXM9vZufh_L1eH1ebJbB8Hq8lv8Li6Td-seH4LNUrKmniD78C9i-svVdi78BAAD__xO-hIs)**_ Pete Hegseth is a decorated veteran, a proven leader, and a loyal defender of the America First agenda. He has what it takes to stand up to the deep state, protect our troops, and restore the integrity of our military—something sorely lacking under the Biden administration. America and her military are still reeling from the failed leadership of **Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin** , the architect of the disastrous **_Afghanistan withdrawal._** Under Austin’s watch, America endured one of the most humiliating moments in modern history:
---
| |
* **13 brave service members killed in Kabul.**
* **Thousands of Americans and allies left behind in enemy territory.**
* **Billions of dollars’ worth of U.S. military equipment handed over to the Taliban.**

---
My friend, **our military deserves better.** President Trump understands that. That’s why he’s nominated Pete Hegseth—a battle-hardened warrior who knows what it means to serve his country and will never bow to woke ideologues or globalist interests.But now that the left has picked a new line of attack, they are going to double and triple-down to deny President Trump his nominee. If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak Republicans could help the Democrats win this fight. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let RINOs undermine President Trump again! _**[_**If you agree that Pete Hegseth MUST BE CONFIRMED as Secretary of Defense, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH Response Form right away!**_](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkMGOmzAQhp_G3EDYAzYcfEhDspVW2VZRtT1agz1hrbUB2ZC-fpUqfYC9ftKMvu__fTEX9MHP0xtG0p82mZTN6AxGtKWjmMuIwVu_7NmIWrRlzUsBBgqnXW8lyoI0V6AkdDXUxYcWgpS6jRJGe-taVCO0zmFX8xZtrwQVXj_-1FwA500nRNVgL8lBC6pRt5Y61tQYKG3VJ9Fql3lKlHOidR-DtzhXdolF0B_btmYGBybOTJwfumg3v8xVovu9sgsT5xUV73vbOCR56ziD875Fk5c9WWIwfBteyuvpnQn5wJGc3yOD4XR5EotxRT_NDIansTCHy-GXOf54-356AXM9vZufh_L1eH1ebJbB8Hq8lv8Li6Td-seH4LNUrKmniD78C9i-svVdi78BAAD__xO-hIs)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Pete Hegseth. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**. If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen!AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – **but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**
---
[ ** CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH** ](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkMGOmzAQhp_G3EDYAzYcfEhDspVW2VZRtT1agz1hrbUB2ZC-fpUqfYC9ftKMvu__fTEX9MHP0xtG0p82mZTN6AxGtKWjmMuIwVu_7NmIWrRlzUsBBgqnXW8lyoI0V6AkdDXUxYcWgpS6jRJGe-taVCO0zmFX8xZtrwQVXj_-1FwA500nRNVgL8lBC6pRt5Y61tQYKG3VJ9Fql3lKlHOidR-DtzhXdolF0B_btmYGBybOTJwfumg3v8xVovu9sgsT5xUV73vbOCR56ziD875Fk5c9WWIwfBteyuvpnQn5wJGc3yOD4XR5EotxRT_NDIansTCHy-GXOf54-356AXM9vZufh_L1eH1ebJbB8Hq8lv8Li6Td-seH4LNUrKmniD78C9i-svVdi78BAAD__xO-hIs)

Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only _razor-thin margins_ , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second. It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen. And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you.And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Pete Hegseth will take time, money, and resources. **[That’s why I’m asking you to join AMAC Action with your very best CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH emergency contribution today.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkMGOmzAQhp_G3EDYAzYcfEhDspVW2VZRtT1agz1hrbUB2ZC-fpUqfYC9ftKMvu__fTEX9MHP0xtG0p82mZTN6AxGtKWjmMuIwVu_7NmIWrRlzUsBBgqnXW8lyoI0V6AkdDXUxYcWgpS6jRJGe-taVCO0zmFX8xZtrwQVXj_-1FwA500nRNVgL8lBC6pRt5Y61tQYKG3VJ9Fql3lKlHOidR-DtzhXdolF0B_btmYGBybOTJwfumg3v8xVovu9sgsT5xUV73vbOCR56ziD875Fk5c9WWIwfBteyuvpnQn5wJGc3yOD4XR5EotxRT_NDIansTCHy-GXOf54-356AXM9vZufh_L1eH1ebJbB8Hq8lv8Li6Td-seH4LNUrKmniD78C9i-svVdi78BAAD__xO-hIs)** Let’s send a clear message:
---
* **The American people will not be denied.**
* **Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement.**
* **And Pete Hegseth will be confirmed as Secretary of Defense.**

---
No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.**_But we have got to move quickly. We have just days to save this critical nomination –[So please don’t delay!](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyUkMGOmzAQhp_G3EDYAzYcfEhDspVW2VZRtT1agz1hrbUB2ZC-fpUqfYC9ftKMvu__fTEX9MHP0xtG0p82mZTN6AxGtKWjmMuIwVu_7NmIWrRlzUsBBgqnXW8lyoI0V6AkdDXUxYcWgpS6jRJGe-taVCO0zmFX8xZtrwQVXj_-1FwA500nRNVgL8lBC6pRt5Y61tQYKG3VJ9Fql3lKlHOidR-DtzhXdolF0B_btmYGBybOTJwfumg3v8xVovu9sgsT5xUV73vbOCR56ziD875Fk5c9WWIwfBteyuvpnQn5wJGc3yOD4XR5EotxRT_NDIansTCHy-GXOf54-356AXM9vZufh_L1eH1ebJbB8Hq8lv8Li6Td-seH4LNUrKmniD78C9i-svVdi78BAAD__xO-hIs) _**Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning.
---
| | Thank you, friend!
---
For Freedom,

**Rebecca Weber****AMAC Action**

subject: Democrats have dropped a malicious hit piece
body:
The radical Democrats have dropped a malicious hit piece attacking Pete Hegseth – just before he’s slated to get a vote.

| |
---
| | Today I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8hpj5BoIkAtsY0iMAEwqug~~/AARclAA~/RgRpdMWYP0SNaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWFjYWN0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGE3MTk5YzRkYWU2ZjgxP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDEyMl9BTUFUX0NPTkhFRzNfUkVWX1BBLVJPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjUwMTIzVwNzcGNCCmeO_yySZ-v0GFtSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, The radical Democrats have dropped a malicious hit piece attacking Pete Hegseth – just before he’s slated to get a vote. We knew from the beginning when President Trump nominated Pete Hegseth that they would stop at nothing to try to tank his appointment – and that they would try to coerce and bully weak Republicans to vote against him. But we are NOT backing down. _**[_**That's why I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!**_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8hpj5BoIkAtsY0iMAEwqug~~/AARclAA~/RgRpdMWYP0SNaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWFjYWN0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGE3MTk5YzRkYWU2ZjgxP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDEyMl9BTUFUX0NPTkhFRzNfUkVWX1BBLVJPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjUwMTIzVwNzcGNCCmeO_yySZ-v0GFtSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**_ Pete Hegseth is a decorated veteran, a proven leader, and a loyal defender of the America First agenda. He has what it takes to stand up to the deep state, protect our troops, and restore the integrity of our military—something sorely lacking under the Biden administration. America and her military are still reeling from the failed leadership of **Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin** , the architect of the disastrous **_Afghanistan withdrawal._** Under Austin’s watch, America endured one of the most humiliating moments in modern history:
---
| |
* **13 brave service members killed in Kabul.**
* **Thousands of Americans and allies left behind in enemy territory.**
* **Billions of dollars’ worth of U.S. military equipment handed over to the Taliban.**

---
My friend, **our military deserves better.** President Trump understands that. That’s why he’s nominated Pete Hegseth—a battle-hardened warrior who knows what it means to serve his country and will never bow to woke ideologues or globalist interests.But now that the left has picked a new line of attack, they are going to double and triple-down to deny President Trump his nominee. If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak Republicans could help the Democrats win this fight. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let RINOs undermine President Trump again! _**[_**If you agree that Pete Hegseth MUST BE CONFIRMED as Secretary of Defense, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH Response Form right away!**_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8hpj5BoIkAtsY0iMAEwqug~~/AARclAA~/RgRpdMWYP0SNaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWFjYWN0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGE3MTk5YzRkYWU2ZjgxP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDEyMl9BTUFUX0NPTkhFRzNfUkVWX1BBLVJPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjUwMTIzVwNzcGNCCmeO_yySZ-v0GFtSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Pete Hegseth. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**. If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen!AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – **but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**
---
[ ** CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH** ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8hpj5BoIkAtsY0iMAEwqug~~/AARclAA~/RgRpdMWYP0SNaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWFjYWN0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGE3MTk5YzRkYWU2ZjgxP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDEyMl9BTUFUX0NPTkhFRzNfUkVWX1BBLVJPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjUwMTIzVwNzcGNCCmeO_yySZ-v0GFtSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)
---
Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. If you’ve ever heard of AMAC Action, you may know that unlike the left-leaning AARP, we’ve been fighting AGAINST “Obamacare”, AGAINST “Medicare for All,” and AGAINST all of these radical schemes to “transform” America and our elections. That’s why we have 75 chapters and 328 delegates fighting to preserve and protect our Constitution and our traditional values and heritage. AMAC Action and its volunteer advocates pound on the doors of every member of the U.S. House of Representatives and the U.S. Senate to fight for you. And with conservative control in Washington with only _razor-thin margins_ , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second. It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen. And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you.And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Pete Hegseth will take time, money, and resources. **[That’s why I’m asking you to join AMAC Action with your very best CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH emergency contribution today.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8hpj5BoIkAtsY0iMAEwqug~~/AARclAA~/RgRpdMWYP0SNaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWFjYWN0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGE3MTk5YzRkYWU2ZjgxP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDEyMl9BTUFUX0NPTkhFRzNfUkVWX1BBLVJPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjUwMTIzVwNzcGNCCmeO_yySZ-v0GFtSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)** Let’s send a clear message:
---
* **The American people will not be denied.**
* **Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement.**
* **And Pete Hegseth will be confirmed as Secretary of Defense.**

---
No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.**_But we have got to move quickly. We have just days to save this critical nomination –[So please don’t delay!](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/8hpj5BoIkAtsY0iMAEwqug~~/AARclAA~/RgRpdMWYP0SNaHR0cHM6Ly9hbWFjYWN0aW9uLnJldnYuY28vcGE3MTk5YzRkYWU2ZjgxP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9QkRHLVJFViZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPUVNJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI1MDEyMl9BTUFUX0NPTkhFRzNfUkVWX1BBLVJPTiZ1dG1fdGM9Uk9OLTIwMjUwMTIzVwNzcGNCCmeO_yySZ-v0GFtSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) _**Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning.
---
| | Thank you, friend!
---
For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber****AMAC Action**

And with conservative control in Washington with only razor-thin margins , our advocacy is more critical than ever before. We cannot take our foot off the gas for one second. It’s simple: when we speak, Washington listens. When you speak, We listen. And we’ve got a To-Do list a mile long to pave the way for the incoming administration. But my friend, all we do, we do with the support of patriots like you.And mounting a huge pressure campaign to confirm Pete Hegseth will take time, money, and resources. Let’s send a clear message: The American people will not be denied. Weak-kneed Republicans will not stand in the way of the America First movement. And Pete Hegseth will be confirmed as Secretary of Defense. No one is in a better position to advocate for change than AMAC Action – and with you by our side, we’re an unstoppable force.But we have got to move quickly. We have just days to save this critical nomination – Let’s make it clear that the American people will not be denied. Let’s show them that Election Day was just the beginning. | | Thank you, friend! For Freedom, Rebecca WeberAMAC Action | | | | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | 1904 Thomas Avenue, Suite 103,Leesburg, FL 34748 | Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_

## The Greatest Wealth Shift in History Has Begun
---
The storm is here. Trump's return has jolted the global financial system, igniting a chain reaction that could shake the very foundation of the economy. Russia, China, and the BRICS+ alliance are already moving to dethrone the U.S. dollar. As the world pivots away from the dollar, your hard-earned retirement savings could be at risk of vanishing overnight.

It's time for smart investors to start investigating how to diversify and prepare themselves for the coming storm. Those who stand still now may not be ready when it finally hits.

**The Warning Investors Shouldn 't Ignore**
President Trump has sounded the alarm: "Our currency is crashing." This isn't conspiracy talk--this is a billionaire who's seen behind the curtain. In recent months, global de-dollarization has accelerated, with BRICS nations unveiling plans to trade in alternative currencies. If the dollar crumbles, what happens for the average American saver? What can hard-working Americans preparing for retirement do to protect their nest eggs?

**Gold: A Shield for the Coming Storm**
Under Trump's first term, gold prices surged by over 35% (2016-2020), proving its value as a haven during economic uncertainty. Central banks worldwide have accelerated their gold reserves, reflecting global concern over the dollar's future. In 2023 alone, central bank gold purchases hit record highs--a clear signal of the shifting financial landscape. Now, Trump has raised a red flag amid the countless global challenges we all face. The BRICS+ alliance--led by Russia and China--has already initiated steps to weaken the dollar's dominance, sparking a rush amongst institutional investors toward tangible assets like gold. This is a tremendous chance to align with a strategy that the wealthiest institutions and investors are already acting on.

**The Clock Is Ticking**
There's a little-known IRS rule that lets retirement savers hold real, physical gold in their IRAs. Americans with over $50,000 saved for their retirement have a fantastic opportunity to explore the benefits of gold. The time to safeguard your savings is now, before the masses wake up and scramble for safety.

**Download Your FREE Gold IRA Info Kit NOW**
This isn't just a guide--it's a powerful educational tool. Turn fear into opportunity, and stand firm while others panic.

**TAKE ACTION AND ADD A LAYER OF PROTECTION TO SAVINGS**
If the dollar's downfall accelerates, don't be left in the cold.

The future is barreling toward us--and it's time to get prepared to face it head-on.?

**Request Your FREE Info Kit TODAY**

name: History Facts
subject: These are the oldest shoes in the world
body:
Human beings first arrived in the Americas more than 20,000 years ago, long after the earliest dated cave paintings, musical instruments, and sewing needles. [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68cgzydkxsrxgglovvwtrynpuuom19dji9nh0rjv48ch7bcwr6taiv4doai0t040uxz738he2hxipml0ukshfxgamok673xn6dfsy0xhkbvmhhi9de8l5yn5qtehbkqsy07fpw63p92wak999&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqjiql&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [The oldest shoes in the world were found in Oregon.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqjiql&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Science & Industry](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqjiql&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqjiql&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| H uman beings first arrived in the Americas more than 20,000 years ago, long after the earliest dated cave paintings, musical instruments, and sewing needles. North America is, however, home to the oldest known pair of shoes, unearthed in central Oregon in the 1930s and dating back [more than](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqjiql&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) 10,000 years. But don’t worry, this doesn’t mean the earliest Americans made the chilly journey across the Bering Strait barefoot — these sandals are just the earliest surviving shoes that we know about.
---
Researchers found the footwear in Fort Rock Cave, located in the northern Great Basin area, preserved in ash from the eruption of Mount Mazama roughly 7,700 years ago. Around 100 pairs were present, including some in kids’ sizes, and most were well worn; some were caked with mud, and one had even been singed by sparks from a fire.
Like other sandals found around the Great Basin area, the Fort Rock shoes were made from sagebrush and covered the toes. But they had a distinct weaving style, with just five thick warps along the sole that were split into smaller cords for a thinner toe flap. They were secured to the feet with cords that tied around the ankle. This style faded out around 9,300 years ago, when it was replaced by different weaving styles that were still being used thousands of years later by Kamath and Modoc tribes, who are Indigenous to the area.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqjiql&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqjiql&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## Crater Lake is in a collapsed volcano.
Preserving a large shoe collection was one of Mount Mazama’s lesser impacts. When the volcano erupted 7,700 years ago — one of the largest eruptions on Earth in the last 12,000 years — its magma chamber emptied and the volcano collapsed. It left a giant caldera, or volcanic crater, in its place — similar to how Yellowstone National Park was created. Smaller eruptions continued for the next 750 years, but over time, the caldera [filled with water](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqjiql&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) and became Crater Lake, now a national park in Oregon, which eventually became deep enough to hide any volcanic activity.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Pete Hegseth Needs Your Help *TODAY*
body:
Call your Senators as soon as possible to confirm President Trump’s nominee for Secretary of Defense.
| | | |
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9657aa7/1edb9794a964facc)
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** ******It's Zero Hour!** President Trump's ability to drain the swam at the Department of Defense and throughout our military hinges on the imminent Senate vote for Pete Hegseth's confirmation as Secretary of Defense. **_Time is of the essence_** as Chairman Roger Wicker (R-MS) of the Senate Armed Services Committee announces that there will be some GOP senators voting no on Hegseth's confirmation.
GOP Senator Lisa Murkowski has also just announced that she will be voting no. In order to keep other wobbly GOP senators from following her and voting no, we need every patriot to call their senators as soon as possible.
**Your voice matters now more than ever!** November 5th isn't the only day to make an impact. It is a daily battle for our republic.
**Take immediate action:** **Visit our **[**Pete Hegseth Confirmation page**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794a9657aa7/1edb9794a964face)** to email or call your Senator, regardless of party.****
**We cannot afford to be passive; if we want to reclaim our republic, we must act now, not just watch from the sidelines.
**And, just in case you are wondering if you should call Democrat senators, if you don 't have Republican senators, the answer is _YES._** The reason is because left-wing activist groups are working on a strategy to unite Democrats in opposition. The messages they're getting from left-wing constituents is to stay strong and united and stop Pete Hegseth (and other nominations they really oppose). Therefore, Democrat senators must also hear from America First constituents telling them to vote yes. Even though they likely won't vote yes, we don't want them thinking they will be rewarded by constantly opposing President Trump's nominees.

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 1/23/2025
body:
Launch of SAFE Colorado aimed at building safer, stronger Colorado
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
Here is a summary of today's newsletter:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** House Bill 25-1074, which aims to [repeal 2020 cage-free egg standards](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to combat rising prices and shortages, is under review. Meanwhile, Senator Sonya Jaquez Lewis faces an [ethics investigation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) over workplace misconduct and campaign finance violations, with calls for her resignation.
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** Former ICE official John Fabbricatore and Steven Monahan lead a new initiative to [improve public safety](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, Jeffco Schools are implementing new safety protocols following the [suicide of their former chief of schools](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), who was under investigation for child pornography.
Colorado is responding to Trump's crackdown on immigration. Trump’s executive order targeting sanctuary cities could result in Denver [losing hundreds of millions in federal funding](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while a senior Denver school official has reaffirmed the district's policy [barring ICE officials](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) from school campuses. On the flip side, Douglas County officials [stand strong](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in laying the groundwork for cooperation with Trump.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** President Trump has declared Mexican cartels and other violent organizations as [foreign terrorist entities](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), initiating a national emergency to curb their influence and protect national security. Republican lawmakers are working to [repeal the FACE Act](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), which they claim has been weaponized to target peaceful pro-life protesters.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, January 23, 2025.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Launch of SAFE Colorado aimed at building safer, stronger Colorado](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY BRIAN PORTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
John Fabbricatore and Steven Monahan were announced Wednesday as the leaders in the launch of Strong Advocates For Enforcement in Colorado (SAFE Colorado), aimed at enhancing public safety across the state by fostering collaboration among local, state and federal law enforcement agencies.
Fabbricatore previously served as an ICE field director in Colorado and Wyoming, and was the 2024 Republican nominee to the 6th Congressional District in the U.S. House. He is a visiting fellow of the Heritage Foundation.
Steven Monahan was the 2022 Republican nominee to the 6th Congressional District in the U.S. House.
The mission of SAFE Colorado is “to protect communities by prioritizing safety over political agendas and holding leaders accountable for ensuring the security and well-being of every U.S. citizen and lawful resident of Colorado,” a press statement reads.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[If you’re fed up with high egg prices, you’ll like HB25-1074 by Rep. Gonzalez and Sen. Kirkmeyer](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Rep. Ryan Gonzalez and Sen. Barb Kirkmeyer have introduced House Bill 25-1074 to repeal the 2020 law requiring cage-free eggs in Colorado. This bill aims to reduce the high cost of eggs, which have risen due to the 2020 regulations.
* The 2020 legislation, which required cage-free conditions for laying hens, led to a 16%-18% increase in production costs. These costs have been passed onto consumers, especially affecting low-income families.
* The bill seeks to make eggs more affordable by removing the cage-free mandate, which has caused shortages and sky-high prices in some areas, with prices approaching $10 per dozen.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[‘A Red county in a Blue state’: Douglas Co. officials lay groundwork for cooperation with Trump](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Douglas County officials, including commissioners and law enforcement leaders, traveled to Washington, D.C., to strengthen relationships with the Trump administration, focusing on immigration, public safety, wildfire mitigation, and Space Command initiatives.
* The local delegation included Commissioners Kevin Van Winkle, Abe Laydon and George Teal. Also Joining them was Douglas County Sheriff Darren Weekly and 23rd Judicial District Attorney George Brauchler.
* The delegation emphasized supporting legal immigration, addressing sanctuary law challenges, and securing federal funding to bolster staffing, technology, and public safety in Douglas County.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Trump’s immigration orders to stop public funding of sanctuary cities could cost Denver hundreds of millions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* President Trump’s executive order targeting sanctuary cities could result in Denver losing hundreds of millions in federal funding, affecting housing, infrastructure, and public health programs.
* Denver Mayor Mike Johnston has vowed to oppose the order, raising concerns about potential civil or criminal penalties for the city while emphasizing preparation for various outcomes.
* Federal funds that support low-income housing, education, and transportation projects, including major grants for public transit and healthcare, are at risk if the city doesn't fall in line.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Jeffco Schools admins respond to ‘crisis at hand’ of chief’s death during child porn investigation](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Jefferson County Public Schools are addressing the aftermath of their former chief of schools' death during a child pornography investigation, emphasizing their commitment to transparency and child safety.
* The district announced plans to implement new safety protocols, including a districtwide visitor management system, a Safety Advisory Council, and expanded sexual misconduct training for staff.
* Superintendent Tracy Dorland has encouraged public participation in the upcoming board meeting to discuss the district’s safety initiatives and progress in building a safer environment for students.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[Greeley-headquartered JBS to pay $4 million to settle child labor violations](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BRIAN PORTER | LOCAL | JANUARY 22** __
_JBS USA Food Company, a leading meat packing processor and slaughterhouse in America, will pay $4 million in settlement to individuals and communities related to its unlawful child labor practices, the U.S. Department of Labor recently announced._ __
**[Cody Davis, the new Mesa Co. Commission chair, prioritizes listening, engaging with community](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| LOCAL | JANUARY 21**
_As Cody Davis received the gavel as the new chair of the Mesa County board of commissioners, he reflected on its playful history. Like when Bobbie Daniel became chair, Davis helped bedazzle it to add a glittery flair in honor of her leadership._ __
**[Browning: Gov. Polis should focus on being governor for all, not just for Front Range special interests](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY LINDY BROWNING****| COMMENTARY | JANUARY 21** __
_Colorado Parks and Wildlife senior staff in Denver told the joint Senate and House Agriculture and Natural Resource Committee that their lack of transparency and secrecy is because of their local field staff having been threatened, followed and harassed as they perform the 2025 wolf reintroduction operations._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🇺🇸 DID YOU KNOW?** The concept of a **president's first 100 days** gained prominence in the U.S. after Franklin D. Roosevelt took office in 1933. During this period, he addressed the financial crisis with swift actions like the Emergency Banking Act and his famous "fireside chats," while launching key New Deal programs, including 15 major legislative measures. FDR's productivity set a benchmark for future presidents, shaping how their early days in office would be judged.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** “Celebrate endings — for they precede new beginnings.” — Jonathan Huie
|
---
