subject: Democrats have dropped a malicious hit piece
body:
The radical Democrats have dropped a malicious hit piece attacking Pete Hegseth – just before he’s slated to get a vote.

| |
---
| | Today I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkMGunCAUhp8Gdxo4INxZsJhWvd142xhzuyRHwBkSUKM4ff1mmukD3O2XnJPv-3_3pscQw3L7wOR13rPZDzM5gwlt6Xw6yoQx2LCehwEKdUlZCdzwwmmhwHFZeM0UV1IwCbS4a8YnOtXCX6iyjimB4OeJzxSkBMVqWwT9_EMZcAZCCVXVs1e1s4yKN3QgLREUo9_zUeW73_12TjFYXLLHVNk1FVHfc94Owq8EOgLdUxVtDutS7f7xqOxKoNtQscvFCodezm-M8O7MyRzruVtPePOteS-H9pOAfOLkXTgT4U3bv4jFtGG4LYQ3L1sw1_46mu8_P36079wM7af5dS3HYXxdZEt4Mw5j-b-u2LXb_oQYwyEVEfSWMMR_AfkrOz80_A0AAP__4_6ClA)
---
| | Fellow Patriot, The radical Democrats have dropped a malicious hit piece attacking Pete Hegseth – just before he’s slated to get a vote. We knew from the beginning when President Trump nominated Pete Hegseth that they would stop at nothing to try to tank his appointment – and that they would try to coerce and bully weak Republicans to vote against him. But we are NOT backing down. _**[_**That's why I need your help to DEMAND PETE HEGSETH CONFIRMATION!**_](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkMGunCAUhp8Gdxo4INxZsJhWvd142xhzuyRHwBkSUKM4ff1mmukD3O2XnJPv-3_3pscQw3L7wOR13rPZDzM5gwlt6Xw6yoQx2LCehwEKdUlZCdzwwmmhwHFZeM0UV1IwCbS4a8YnOtXCX6iyjimB4OeJzxSkBMVqWwT9_EMZcAZCCVXVs1e1s4yKN3QgLREUo9_zUeW73_12TjFYXLLHVNk1FVHfc94Owq8EOgLdUxVtDutS7f7xqOxKoNtQscvFCodezm-M8O7MyRzruVtPePOteS-H9pOAfOLkXTgT4U3bv4jFtGG4LYQ3L1sw1_46mu8_P36079wM7af5dS3HYXxdZEt4Mw5j-b-u2LXb_oQYwyEVEfSWMMR_AfkrOz80_A0AAP__4_6ClA)**_ Pete Hegseth is a decorated veteran, a proven leader, and a loyal defender of the America First agenda. He has what it takes to stand up to the deep state, protect our troops, and restore the integrity of our military—something sorely lacking under the Biden administration. America and her military are still reeling from the failed leadership of **Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin** , the architect of the disastrous **_Afghanistan withdrawal._** Under Austin’s watch, America endured one of the most humiliating moments in modern history:
---
| |
* **13 brave service members killed in Kabul.**
* **Thousands of Americans and allies left behind in enemy territory.**
* **Billions of dollars’ worth of U.S. military equipment handed over to the Taliban.**

---
My friend, **our military deserves better.** President Trump understands that. That’s why he’s nominated Pete Hegseth—a battle-hardened warrior who knows what it means to serve his country and will never bow to woke ideologues or globalist interests.But now that the left has picked a new line of attack, they are going to double and triple-down to deny President Trump his nominee. If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak Republicans could help the Democrats win this fight. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let RINOs undermine President Trump again! _**[_**If you agree that Pete Hegseth MUST BE CONFIRMED as Secretary of Defense, then please click here to fill out your CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH Response Form right away!**_](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkMGunCAUhp8Gdxo4INxZsJhWvd142xhzuyRHwBkSUKM4ff1mmukD3O2XnJPv-3_3pscQw3L7wOR13rPZDzM5gwlt6Xw6yoQx2LCehwEKdUlZCdzwwmmhwHFZeM0UV1IwCbS4a8YnOtXCX6iyjimB4OeJzxSkBMVqWwT9_EMZcAZCCVXVs1e1s4yKN3QgLREUo9_zUeW73_12TjFYXLLHVNk1FVHfc94Owq8EOgLdUxVtDutS7f7xqOxKoNtQscvFCodezm-M8O7MyRzruVtPePOteS-H9pOAfOLkXTgT4U3bv4jFtGG4LYQ3L1sw1_46mu8_P36079wM7af5dS3HYXxdZEt4Mw5j-b-u2LXb_oQYwyEVEfSWMMR_AfkrOz80_A0AAP__4_6ClA)**_ And my friend, this isn’t just about Pete Hegseth. This is about ensuring President Trump’s America First agenda is implemented without sabotage from the radical Left or weak Republicans.Donald Trump won in a landslide, mandate election. The American people have given HIM the power to choose his cabinet. To deny his picks is to deny the will of **_We the People_**. If we stand down now, we’ll send a message that RINOs and Democrats can undermine the will of the people and block President Trump’s vision for a stronger America. That can’t happen!AMAC Action is mounting a massive pressure campaign – **but we need every conservative voice backing us up.**
---
[ ** CONFIRM PETE HEGSETH** ](https://email.alerts.therepublicanteam.com/c/eJyUkMGunCAUhp8Gdxo4INxZsJhWvd142xhzuyRHwBkSUKM4ff1mmukD3O2XnJPv-3_3pscQw3L7wOR13rPZDzM5gwlt6Xw6yoQx2LCehwEKdUlZCdzwwmmhwHFZeM0UV1IwCbS4a8YnOtXCX6iyjimB4OeJzxSkBMVqWwT9_EMZcAZCCVXVs1e1s4yKN3QgLREUo9_zUeW73_12TjFYXLLHVNk1FVHfc94Owq8EOgLdUxVtDutS7f7xqOxKoNtQscvFCodezm-M8O7MyRzruVtPePOteS-H9pOAfOLkXTgT4U3bv4jFtGG4LYQ3L1sw1_46mu8_P36079wM7af5dS3HYXxdZEt4Mw5j-b-u2LXb_oQYwyEVEfSWMMR_AfkrOz80_A0AAP__4_6ClA)
---
Friend, my name is Rebecca Weber – CEO of AMAC. You may have heard of AMAC Action before – we’re the #1 most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative seniors like you. America and her military are still reeling from the failed leadership of Defense Secretary Lloyd Austin , the architect of the disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal. If we don’t stand up and demand his confirmation, then weak Republicans could help the Democrats win this fight. We can’t let that happen. We won’t let RINOs undermine President Trump again! Friend,

As you're reading this, Senate Democrats are lobbing endless attacks at President Trump's nominees in a desperate attempt to stall his America First agenda.

_These radicals hate Trump so much that they 'll gladly smear every single one of his nominees - especially America First Patriots like Pete Hegseth and Pam Bondi - if there's even a chance of slowing our momentum!_

But there's one thing that matters more than anything else when it comes to these confirmation decisions...

subject: Democrats can sense weakness.
body:
If not now, then never.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RZ2/?__vbtrk=MjcxMzQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMzQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Fellow patriot – Did you know that, historically, the President’s Party **almost always** loses House seats in the midterm elections?
It’s true.
The Democrats will mobilize every asset they have to diminish what the House GOP wants to get done under President Trump.
**__[That's why we need to start President Trump's second term stronger than ever to make sure they never get the chance](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RZ2/?__vbtrk=MjcxMzQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMzQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)__ _._**
[START STRONG: DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RZ2/?__vbtrk=MjcxMzQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMzQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
We are coming up on the first fundraising deadline of the Trump administration, and it means so much more than many people realize:
If the Democrats see us fall short here then they’ll know it's time begin to mobilize against House Republicans and start to obstruct President Trump’s Agenda 47.
**We can’t let them see that kind of weakness.**
_**[We need to be strong](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RZ2/?__vbtrk=MjcxMzQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMzQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct).**_

Every piece of progress in passing President Trump's agenda will have to go through the House of Representatives before it ever makes it to the Senate, the White House, or our nation’s courts.
**The DNC and Deep State Operatives are getting ready to attack House Republicans with false smears to derail President Trump if they see us fall short.**
**_**_[Can the House GOP Battleground Fund count on YOU to stop them in their tracks](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9RZ2/?__vbtrk=MjcxMzQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMzQ4OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)?_**_**
Yours Sincerely _,_
House GOP

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Tax and Spend Tony Evers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF WISCONSIN** NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cjkutkd-didthutlhu-r/) Friend,Tony Evers' State of the State address will not distract Wisconsinites from his failures as Governor.Just moments ago, during his State of the State address, **'Tax and Spend Tony'** demonstrated his disregard for hardworking Wisconsinites.Governor Tony Evers has previously promised tax cuts but his record says otherwise. He has vetoed three proposals that would have brought $3.5 billion in tax cuts to Wisconsinites. His approach to policy does not reflect the needs of our state, especially when it comes to managing our economy.This fall, Wisconsin voted to maintain a Republican majority in the legislature to keep a check on **Tax and Spend Tony Evers.** [STOP TAX AND SPEND TONY](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-cjkutkd-didthutlhu-y/) Together, we can hold Governor Evers accountable for his tax-and-spend policies. body:
It’s what the Federal Government owes EVERY American

|
---
| | | **UNITED STATES GOVERNMENT AUDIT:[ACTIVE](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JH-i7kTFiz3yxzlv9y2TjQ~~/AARclAA~ "ACTIVE")

Friend's Assessment: [INCOMPLETE](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/JH-i7kTFiz3yxzlv9y2TjQ~~/AARclAA~ "INCOMPLETE")**
---

Friend,

**We have a 24-hour window to demand transparency from the federal government._The clock is ticking._**

As we stand at the crossroads of a new era of conservative leadership in Washington, one thing is clear: _**it's high time we shine a light on the federal government's reckless spending habits.**_

Think about it: _the same bureaucrats who were supposed to serve the American people have been squandering billions on wasteful programs and projects._ It's nothing short of a betrayal of the public trust.

That's why **we're launching a comprehensive audit of the federal government - to uncover the truth about where your tax dollars are really going.** But we need your input, and we need it NOW.

---

---

_**You have just 24 hours to take our Government Audit.**_ If we don't get enough support, the bureaucrats will continue to get away with their wasteful spending.

We want to know: which areas of government do you think need the most scrutiny? Where do you think we can cut wasteful spending and restore fiscal responsibility?

Please make this a priority, Friend. **It 's critical to ensure transparency at _every level of our government. _**

name: Anna Sophia Rowe
subject: down by 73%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
As you know, this is a horrible time for these numbers to start sliding...| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100827048/524045393/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250123down_N_ASR_90DO_12_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhOWEzZjU4LTkyZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X-5exuqwdSDFHqd5cMOdYWxpt-hE0UhEGIA3ZgaTJLg=)
---
Hi Peter,

Many of our mothers and grandmothers remember living in a time when women couldn't open their own credit cards (1974) or apply for high-paying jobs. It’s only been about 100 years since (white) women were granted the right to vote.

We watched on Monday as a misogynist and sexual predator was sworn in as president with many other misogynists and sexual predators around him. We have every reason to believe that the next four years could be a backslide for women’s progress in America. We are writing today because we have a plan for ensuring pro-women legislation prevails.

**But here’s the thing: passing pro-women legislation is dependent on women being REPRESENTED in the rooms where decisions about us and our bodies are being made.**

[**You can help elect more pro-choice and pro-WOMEN women candidates by pitching in $20.25 or more today →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100827049/524045394/1701071684?refcode=EM_F_250123down_N_ASR_90DO_12_NG_N_L1&amount=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImZhOWEzZjU4LTkyZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=X-5exuqwdSDFHqd5cMOdYWxpt-hE0UhEGIA3ZgaTJLg=)

Women have steadily become much more represented at nearly every level of government, and our laws have reflected that increase in representation. For example, as more bold women entered Congress in the 1960’s and 70’s, we started to see more anti-discrimination and pro-equality laws which conspicuously include the phrasing “on the basis on sex.”

But in recent years, we have started to see a disturbing trend.

In 2024, the Center for American Women and Politics (CAWP) released a stunning report stating that the number of women who ran for Congress in 2024 was **_far less_** than in previous election cycles.

Let’s look at the numbers:**

Since 2022, the number of women candidates running for federal office is **down by 25%.** Executive offices at the state level: **down by 73%.** The number of women running for State legislature is **down by 55.4%** – and the numbers are even worse when you break it down by race...

**But, as you know, this is a horrible time for women to lose representation in government as dangerous laws about women’s bodies and well-being are being crafted by rooms full of men. We desperately need more women in those rooms.**

It’s critical that we reverse this trend in the years to come. That’s why Her Bold Move is providing pro-choice, pro-WOMEN women candidates with the wide range of support they **need** to run for office and WIN their elections.

[**We are working to ensure that women’s hard-fought progress doesn’t disappear. clean_body: As you know, this is a horrible time for these numbers to start sliding...| | | | | = Hi Peter, Many of our mothers and grandmothers remember living in a time when women couldn't open their own credit cards (1974) or apply for high-paying jobs. It’s only been about 100 years since (white) women were granted the right to vote. We watched on Monday as a misogynist and sexual predator was sworn in as president with many other misogynists and sexual predators around him. We have every reason to believe that the next four years could be a backslide for women’s progress in America. We are writing today because we have a plan for ensuring pro-women legislation prevails. But here’s the thing: passing pro-women legislation is dependent on women being REPRESENTED in the rooms where decisions about us and our bodies are being made. = Women have steadily become much more represented at nearly every level of government, and our laws have reflected that increase in representation. For example, as more bold women entered Congress in the 1960’s and 70’s, we started to see more anti-discrimination and pro-equality laws which conspicuously include the phrasing “on the basis on sex.” But in recent years, we have started to see a disturbing trend. In 2024, the Center for American Women and Politics (CAWP) released a stunning report stating that the number of women who ran for Congress in 2024 was far less than in previous election cycles. Let’s look at the numbers: Since 2022, the number of women candidates running for federal office is down by 25%. Executive offices at the state level: down by 73%. The number of women running for State legislature is down by 55.4% – and the numbers are even worse when you break it down by race... But, as you know, this is a horrible time for women to lose representation in government as dangerous laws about women’s bodies and well-being are being crafted by rooms full of men. We desperately need more women in those rooms. It’s critical that we reverse this trend in the years to come. _**A message from our sponsor...**_ | | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1c344b7f1d92496fb80019ca06ee5f65&_e=UOaswq03SCmBcrKzKxADXQic5L2avEeAWkuAKsk5cPBdsdiHhMzyuJq4-coVHtJcOhz_UsENsHRSYyTGE0dksEjCxwJbKBKDcfncTOG1B9m-yVK9Ic23XMfuCTFNAtAFeotOi8rv3ft9fxe_-JElzNVw3xB3_za9ll4-feHcOCInzbP7RVokK0M5-BS4ZVXPZ0ZLHG5iKQD5-Wo3xhxQ5AwYcR92SscKeC8eQLcOYAjfS040gr3md5EXlXhSoXvBlUtGENBCzEsR7-GtoA5XVlFN0Ols_0CGX69qLIVz4N_CUB-bBVPmCc32M1R-04MJOio25lwoAVspZkP55QRaZY3Me6rV0XWt7qNplH2k0eJxq4Xv68OsHlWfTnvLjX9Pvwp-9FuEVe_I9n9uS2F3yXr4JhYo2Jg5DpdYjTZdNTUhgHfauD_wnhyWN-yVOA--)

| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1c344b7f1d92496fb80019ca06ee5f65&_e=UOaswq03SCmBcrKzKxADXQic5L2avEeAWkuAKsk5cPBdsdiHhMzyuJq4-coVHtJcOhz_UsENsHRSYyTGE0dksEjCxwJbKBKDcfncTOG1B9m-yVK9Ic23XMfuCTFNAtAFeotOi8rv3ft9fxe_-JElzNVw3xB3_za9ll4-feHcOCInzbP7RVokK0M5-BS4ZVXPZ0ZLHG5iKQD5-Wo3xhxQ5AwYcR92SscKeC8eQLcOYAjfS040gr3md5EXlXhSoXvBlUtGENBCzEsR7-GtoA5XVpH5oyh5xRwTG-Myvu2YPqAvnkcXVpXGHKrpIxXBZ0r1NNIVBk-E8oBK_0uMQpbKNn4OcnfBZeQR2kLShxptw1LmD5K4TNOAx6VJ-7zRTsv4si6VOPEZ5VpcBR1zYLIEe1Bm09nXMH_FjPqfeBG-xRZnrCEMtze1GFkG3dDnxodJ)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1c344b7f1d92496fb80019ca06ee5f65&_e=UOaswq03SCmBcrKzKxADXQic5L2avEeAWkuAKsk5cPBdsdiHhMzyuJq4-coVHtJcOhz_UsENsHRSYyTGE0dksEjCxwJbKBKDcfncTOG1B9m-yVK9Ic23XMfuCTFNAtAFeotOi8rv3ft9fxe_-JElzNVw3xB3_za9ll4-feHcOCInzbP7RVokK0M5-BS4ZVXPZ0ZLHG5iKQD5-Wo3xhxQ5AwYcR92SscKeC8eQLcOYAjfS040gr3md5EXlXhSoXvBlUtGENBCzEsR7-GtoA5XVnc1J9_z9tSbre66idFFujG4VnrrvF-zGVkAWkaoZV4JLdmVWKDhPj0446-1oLdSbDmwy7-HnH9OtP3VVkenmu_E0To1k3mEWVfDrHBROtqRHDoIYAml8q63cTWU67Xs-mAw3qDeI-cezA_RMQhpEjiSRvwqM82jW0OdebNd-h3K)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=1c344b7f1d92496fb80019ca06ee5f65&_e=UOaswq03SCmBcrKzKxADXQic5L2avEeAWkuAKsk5cPBdsdiHhMzyuJq4-coVHtJcOhz_UsENsHRSYyTGE0dksEjCxwJbKBKDcfncTOG1B9m-yVK9Ic23XMfuCTFNAtAFeotOi8rv3ft9fxe_-JElzNVw3xB3_za9ll4-feHcOCInzbP7RVokK0M5-BS4ZVXPZ0ZLHG5iKQD5-Wo3xhxQ5AwYcR92SscKeC8eQLcOYAjfS040gr3md5EXlXhSoXvBlUtGENBCzEsR7-GtoA5XVjqJL3RO_4UhKH1bQgiTUPYAxvzS1liT6y_Tg5It6qBvwS8_c7uKyLjd8H3dZh6T8fivkVMqOTaJxrww-hAdg8fZF7T0UqoUfoMwjH-E3Z-zwVnFNtfOQS6seBfh3QpfRRAxLrja6V1L1jmyjrjuqvei2VIEtplxaYLSsPDwachP).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.g4yamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_s=1c344b7f1d92496fb80019ca06ee5f65&_t=a-4STV_WwRheTweUz8rFDR1DDgAK93HiQQ6k8pZ2Qw8LEnsqPpMO6M9KI--FxKTLg4C7R3rezNGkOf9uiH7wfluWFzbJ4FHLp4t-BYwodW7itStrqAaHPTplpTuYIA1A)

name: MassGOP
subject: NEXT MONTH Candidate Training Dates: Take the First Step Toward Shaping Massachusetts' Future
body:
| | | | |

| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x5vBooOuckTwCYnHAio1KJ3IGPRRikqUSAl9Jcza6DPIYNsO1Dkf3_trQQNNn6wXz_-mbNT8a-wJVRA1rgUYdeTZ4Qnm55GsYZFeyTaSM8ZWRJkA3pyZFEbcamXnJJnBpRnBB-kAUpf9bih-Y8yu_A==&c=IDXGQlV6T6Z4uOWjYNsbvBczR_qnNU-_c2HvAXsynJjNy0rSbo0Ysw==&ch=3r90DuFTq7PTlqa2fqQH1_uvdOU1vwNn5dvlxdnU36kBnhONLQRxWA==)

| Candidate Training Dates: Take the First Step Toward Shaping Massachusetts' Future
---
---
| Massachusetts is at a turning point. A significant political realignment is underway, and our state is moving decisively to the right. Now is the time to act. Starting in February, the Massachusetts Republican Party will hold twice-monthly training sessions for those ready to run for municipal office in 2025 and beyond.
Municipal elections are the foundation of a successful political career, providing a pathway to higher office. Whether you're considering a run for school board, select board, city council, mayor--or even dog catcher--we want to help you succeed.
Our comprehensive candidate training sessions will cover essential topics such as political strategy, data, finance, and communications. You'll gain the tools and insights needed to run and win as a Republican in Massachusetts. Thanks to our generous donors these training sessions will be FREE to partake in.
Here are the details for our first four sessions:
Fall River 🗓️ February 1, 2025 ⏰ 12:00 PM 📍 VFW 486 Bedford Street, Fall River, MA
Holyoke 🗓️ February 15, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Holyoke Public Library, 250 Chestnut Street, Holyoke, MA
Lawrence 🗓️ March 1, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Parkside Apartments Community Room 2 Bennington St, Lawrence, MA 01840
Worcester 🗓️ March 15, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 765 W Boylston Street, Floor 2, Worcester, MA
Don't miss this opportunity to shape the future of Massachusetts!
[Register Now](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x5vBooOuckTwCYnHAio1KJ3IGPRRikqUSAl9Jcza6DPIYNsO1Dkf30rzQMToGz0OTist8kG-lrVf_nJPZe9IPZwY-2n_oi2Kcr2nw6venW5nEXn2Wm4f_Tg4MM0tEsw-5oO8V4dW4J1VI82yg4G8fhwS5nZFk2Ba7iu2aa4jK-f5WIEtyNPHJbEDbEJXjjkvbghjBZXis78jvc9kwoVyRDNFpUYY1IKlBsyxkhXdjOjgXqrfFDhYgNcHCPSwSXnuxoNO3LRDLjuUmdtiFxtjH3z0_1teMcze&c=IDXGQlV6T6Z4uOWjYNsbvBczR_qnNU-_c2HvAXsynJjNy0rSbo0Ysw==&ch=3r90DuFTq7PTlqa2fqQH1_uvdOU1vwNn5dvlxdnU36kBnhONLQRxWA==)
Let's build a stronger Massachusetts, starting with you.

subject: Jamie Raskin’s STUNNING announcement

body:
Please stop what you’re doing and read this, Peter: Jamie Raskin just called on every single one of us to step up and mobilize for this next election cycle. He knows Trump and Republicans are going to pour millions of dollars into these upcoming special elections, and he knows it’s going to take all of us banding together to lead Democrats to victory. Before midnight: I need 192 gifts to mobilize our Democrats and make Jamie proud. Will you rush $14 to answer Jamie’s call? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Jamie fought tirelessly with me on the Oversight Committee to PROTECT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] our Democracy and hold Donald Trump accountable.

BUT THEN: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Mike Johnson spent $141 MILLION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] to buy back the House Majority and put Donald Trump back in the White House.

AND NOW: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Jamie just called on all of us to step up and fight back against Trump’s extreme agenda:

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

So I’m asking you personally, Peter: Will you rush in $14 before midnight to help defend Democrats like me and Jamie who held Trump accountable, defeat MAGA Republicans in these special elections, and hand Johnson and Trump a humiliating defeat? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

Chip in $14 immediately >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

RajaRaja represents Illinois in Congress.
The son of Indian immigrants, Raja grew up for a time on food stamps and in public housing. He knows the struggles countless Americans face every day.
Now, Raja is leading the fight in Congress on prescription drugs, climate change, election reform, and a more inclusive economy.
But Republican special interests are funnelling cash to defeat strong Democrats like Raja.

Can we count on you to chip in $10 so Raja can keep up the good fight in Congress?

| | **Meet the Silver Back OTF:
A Cut Above ****the Rest! ** At Gunner Gear, we pride ourselves on delivering innovative tactical equipment designed with purpose, power, and precision. Continuing that legacy, we're ecstatic to introduce our latest masterpiece - **The Silver Back OTF Knife**. **Strength Meets Elegance** : Crafted with precision engineering and high-quality materials, the Silver Back is not just another OTF knife. It's a testament to durability, functionality, and unmatched sharpness - all while exuding an elegance that's second to none. **Quick Deploy, Every Time** : The Silver Back boasts a rapid, one-handed deployment mechanism that ensures you're always ready, irrespective of what challenges lie ahead. **Aesthetics & Ergonomics Unified**: Its sleek design is not just about looks. The Silver Back's ergonomic grip offers unparalleled comfort, ensuring extended usage without fatigue. **Limited-Time Offer Just For You!** : To celebrate the launch of the Silver Back, we're granting our loyal customers an exclusive discount. **Order within the next 48 hours and enjoy a limited time discount!** **[Act fast – this is a limited-time offer, and we expect stocks to run out quickly!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19970/6374453/9975243e59b64a44fdd5e42043ac5d1cf4c27e2b/943cfcf79b91bc093e402de32ed1acedb4d7ff16)** The Silver Back OTF Knife is more than just a tool; it's an embodiment of craftsmanship, power, and elegance. When you carry the Silver Back, you carry a promise of reliability. Step up your tactical game with the Silver Back and experience the difference of true quality. **[Secure Your Silver Back OTF Knife& Save Now!](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/19970/6374453/9975243e59b64a44fdd5e42043ac5d1cf4c27e2b/943cfcf79b91bc093e402de32ed1acedb4d7ff16)** Warm Regards, The Gunner Gear Team _**Disclaimer:** Always handle knives with care and ensure that you follow safety guidelines. The Silver Back is intended for responsible adults only._

GOP Rep. Tim Burchett **[dismantled CNN clown Jim Acosta](https://substack.com/redirect/7baf27c2-fea2-4325-a591-b793c26dee18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for lying about the Trump-pardoned January 6 participants during a heated live interview.
**["You just can't stand the fact that Trump won Jim!!"](https://substack.com/redirect/7baf27c2-fea2-4325-a591-b793c26dee18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/7baf27c2-fea2-4325-a591-b793c26dee18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"What happened to back the blue?!" Acosta pressed Burchett. "It sounds like you let down the blue!"
Burchett fired back when Acosta wouldn't let him interject, "Why don't you just give an editorial Jim and don't have me on?"
Acosta told Burchett "This isn't Fox, you can't just spin a tale,... this is CNN, this is real news." Burchett quickly fired back that more people were watching the Cartoon Network right now.
Watch Burchett completely humiliate Acosta on his own show:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/7baf27c2-fea2-4325-a591-b793c26dee18?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Piers Morgan HUMILIATES woke brat Harry Sisson for idiotic comment on gender**
Piers Morgan DEMANDED that woke YouTuber Harry Sisson **[answer one simple question,](https://substack.com/redirect/7b815ea5-d2af-47f3-b5a8-b0ea4363e4db?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "How many genders are there?" during a live panel discussion.
Sisson's answer was absolutely ridiculous, and Morgan, along with guest Dave Rubin and others punished him for it big time.

# Trump's Cabinet picks stood like spartans against a bitter democrat onslaught
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ec18ffc-c8f7-4be2-b271-debe75b5a963?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
Support Mayor Giuliani and get access to his latest exclusive content by becoming a PolitiBrawl paid subscriber
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..SV8LWSo1C0dZfp79CNXCbE8XlSjKA3-C2i-URnDu5IE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155533632)
This week, we witnessed the kind of political theater that Washington loves; the democrats were utterly humiliated by Trump's new team of spartans. Trump has chosen some of the brightest stars for his Cabinet, and they've more than proven their mettle during the Senate confirmation hearings. I'm talking, of course, about Pete Hegseth, Pam Bondi, and Kristi Noem - three individuals who not only demonstrated their qualifications but also showed the Democrats a thing or two about toughness and resilience.
Let's start with Pete Hegseth, Trump's pick for Secretary of Defense. The Democrats tried to throw everything at him - from personal smears to questioning his credentials. But Hegseth, a decorated combat veteran and a voice of reason on Fox News, stood firm. He articulated a vision for a "warrior culture" at the Pentagon, promising to be a "change agent" in an institution that desperately needs one. His responses to Senators like Elizabeth Warren, who tried to pin him down with her usual sanctimonious blather, were nothing short of masterful. Hegseth didn't just defend himself; he turned the tables, leaving Warren looking like the petty politician she is. His commitment to the military and understanding of its needs were clear, and the Democrats' attempts to portray him as unfit only highlighted their own lack of understanding of what our military needs...

name: Josh Weil
subject: I’m the teacher who’ll bring the GOP to its knees
body:
We’ve got less than 70 days to flip this seat and stop MAGA extremism in its tracks.
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aHS_DYTsSm-0BokTk8kUl40iZ8juGOpASWfSxXiOW7wkes-0Zv9NLArpkYUHVBrIeH5awY2oT6kky6w4SCY36alfw05DsGwFeKl6IpEdeESAIWN-ThJihDBhItX9c_LyVuoYOe5DbtcFWAbxp3cYimxwtLP-R2iB8N7n7PWZhtXym5fRXN0TzmdxuMQ7OkMxGhLddP2MLXL0PyJOI0F31EPR32wkETXfa8uJm7tRGdg=&c=02oZoIPIWlnlIP5u53Pfv4aOhHZneMqpsjttyxOXycRFHAgtwRS5qQ==&ch=Qpd1vYBe3ClbLdngNaDsFmgx5PvldsYg-2sKWUlFX-EHIDilPohtyg==)
---
| | | | Team,
If you and I haven't met yet, my name is Josh Weil. I'm a single father, Democrat, and public school teacher running in the Special Election for Florida's 6th Congressional District - the bellwether first election of 2025.
As we begin to hit our stride after a whirlwind first few weeks of this campaign, I haven't yet had the chance to sit down and write out the story of who I am & why I'm running so let me tell you about why you should put your belief into this scrappy campaign that stands to topple the GOPs razor thin 1-vote majority.
My career has been defined by work with at-risk or post risk populations in public schools.
I worked for three years in juvenile detention under the FL Department of Juvenile Justice, then for two years at University Behavioral Center, a residential mental health hospital for teens.
In these programs, kids were typically 5 years behind grade level and the programs were extremely underfunded and under-resourced. As a result I had to wear a bunch of different hats - teacher, therapist, parent, and more. It's a helluva a job, and it's not for everybody, but I am proud to have made a tangible impact with these students and this experience was foundational in making me the teacher that I am today.
---
| | | | | [](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aHS_DYTsSm-0BokTk8kUl40iZ8juGOpASWfSxXiOW7wkes-0Zv9NLAt-JTiAHfLAO9rMV9g5-JR0XuWBSuX97Tk2u2WVOxgSJ98uYZasf11QA4skXjAkbJZ3-F4sCMjE3K-dmR8qLfhl3_-e6gCeHmQ1quzTj36coxO1synhkwla5sQuGrXl5E4ma3l9tlmOzR_P_LEazaeD3mBAdBOf8W_nlsMVFt2wqe2rqaPcRA8=&c=02oZoIPIWlnlIP5u53Pfv4aOhHZneMqpsjttyxOXycRFHAgtwRS5qQ==&ch=Qpd1vYBe3ClbLdngNaDsFmgx5PvldsYg-2sKWUlFX-EHIDilPohtyg==)
---
A project I put together at the Department of Juvenile Justice School where the kids built a working wind turbine (Left). Me and my two incredible sons (Right) .
---
| I now work in Florida's Osceola County public schools where I am on the leadership team of Kissimmee Middle School - a title one school (schools which have a high population of low income families and in turn receive lots of extra supplemental funding, all students receive supplemental funding).
In my first year where I oversaw Math, scores went down in every category at my school except math which went up one point. In my 2nd year, I oversaw all of STEM where we made major gains in both categories and became the highest gaining school in the whole county/district for that category.
I have devoted my life's work to solving challenges that seem insurmountable, and to uplifting students and classrooms that society and our GOP state legislature have written off. So when I learned that a special election would be held in my community for a vacant House seat following a Trump cabinet appointment, I saw an opportunity to tackle a challenge that I am uniquely qualified to take on and conquer. Before our launch, we were warned by Very Smart People that the Democratic base was burnt out, defeated, and apathetic in the aftermath of Kamala Harris's defeat. We were told that we would be hard-pressed to find people who would donate and or volunteer on this race. They told us to give up.
My belief then, and ever more so now, is that when the chips are down and we're backed into a corner is when we fight the hardest--and now I am vindicated every day as Democrats from across the US pour in to fight with us.
---
| | | | [Together, we can rob the GOP of their 1-vote majority and restore hope to a movement reeling from our 2024 defeat - can you make a donation today to help us rapidly scale this campaign in time for our April 1st election?](https://wb7c9thbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001aHS_DYTsSm-0BokTk8kUl40iZ8juGOpASWfSxXiOW7wkes-0Zv9NLAt-JTiAHfLA4TmG23Pgk3cu3pfcBkEuqb-B2WBLVYn-LVk2OV_1yZYh6-rNvq8LdGrMCEb3f6LqYsCvUPOzIbeeFqI1WOlqd-7L5np9sFkKbz59febNC9yg7paVfFfvS296Nd_uHVb6nna0rprIsYAVbNOhhcgkZ5UoXvgIuS7eKTvn5E8rldJLrQoO55k1hQ==&c=02oZoIPIWlnlIP5u53Pfv4aOhHZneMqpsjttyxOXycRFHAgtwRS5qQ==&ch=Qpd1vYBe3ClbLdngNaDsFmgx5PvldsYg-2sKWUlFX-EHIDilPohtyg==)

clean_body: We’ve got less than 70 days to flip this seat and stop MAGA extremism in its tracks. | | | | | == | | | | Team, If you and I haven't met yet, my name is Josh Weil. I'm a single father, Democrat, and public school teacher running in the Special Election for Florida's 6th Congressional District - the bellwether first election of 2025. As we begin to hit our stride after a whirlwind first few weeks of this campaign, I haven't yet had the chance to sit down and write out the story of who I am & why I'm running so let me tell you about why you should put your belief into this scrappy campaign that stands to topple the GOPs razor thin 1-vote majority. My career has been defined by work with at-risk or post risk populations in public schools. I worked for three years in juvenile detention under the FL Department of Juvenile Justice, then for two years at University Behavioral Center, a residential mental health hospital for teens. In these programs, kids were typically 5 years behind grade level and the programs were extremely underfunded and under-resourced. As a result I had to wear a bunch of different hats - teacher, therapist, parent, and more. It's a helluva a job, and it's not for everybody, but I am proud to have made a tangible impact with these students and this experience was foundational in making me the teacher that I am today. | | | | | == A project I put together at the Department of Juvenile Justice School where the kids built a working wind turbine (Left). Me and my two incredible sons (Right) . | I now work in Florida's Osceola County public schools where I am on the leadership team of Kissimmee Middle School - a title one school (schools which have a high population of low income families and in turn receive lots of extra supplemental funding, all students receive supplemental funding). In my first year where I oversaw Math, scores went down in every category at my school except math which went up one point. In my 2nd year, I oversaw all of STEM where we made major gains in both categories and became the highest gaining school in the whole county/district for that category. I have devoted my life's work to solving challenges that seem insurmountable, and to uplifting students and classrooms that society and our GOP state legislature have written off. So when I learned that a special election would be held in my community for a vacant House seat following a Trump cabinet appointment, I saw an opportunity to tackle a challenge that I am uniquely qualified to take on and conquer. Before our launch, we were warned by Very Smart People that the Democratic base was burnt out, defeated, and apathetic in the aftermath of Kamala Harris's defeat. We were told that we would be hard-pressed to find people who would donate and or volunteer on this race. They told us to give up. My belief then, and ever more so now, is that when the chips are down and we're backed into a corner is when we fight the hardest--and now I am vindicated every day as Democrats from across the US pour in to fight with us. | | | | == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | == | | | | | == | | | | == | | | | Thank you for being a part of this movement to stop Project 2025 and send a teacher--not a book banner--to Congress. This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity, and we cannot afford to miss it. Yours in the fight, Josh Weil Democrat for Florida's 6th | | | | | == | | | | Josh Weil for Congress | 8381 Citrus Chase Drive | Orlando, FL 32836 US | |

**While Trump claimed to be focused on "returning power to the people," his administration immediately signaled an agenda that prioritized corporate interests and political theater over real progress.** Gay Valimont here, reminding you that **April 1st special elections are just around the corner**. I’m running for Congress in Florida’s 1st District because I believe leadership is about serving the people, not staging a show. Our community deserves representatives who focus on creating good-paying jobs, protecting affordable housing, and ensuring every family has a fair shot at the American Dream. **However, if I don’t receive your support, things can’t workout the way we planned.**

name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: the contest we DON’T want to be winning
body:
Peter, People are leaving New Jersey. You know it anecdotally. Maybe your daughter’s best friendnd didn’t come back to school
|
---
| Peter, People are leaving New Jersey. You know it anecdotally. Maybe your daughter’s best friend didn’t come back to school this semester. Her family relocated to Florida over the summer. Or your grandkids have let you know they won’t be coming back after graduation. They are looking at job opportunities elsewhere. It’s just too expensive to establish themselves here. Two houses are for sale on your street. You’re passing more U-Hauls towing cars with Jersey plates. Maybe _you’ve_ even thought about moving. Well, you didn’t imagine it. The data is in, and... New Jersey is one of the**top states** for “outbound migration” (i.e., people leaving). One report put us at [#4](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/7e6994e665556e8fc8a630a879f3e32d/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnC1LrYM3iQjRPESdY9GhltrZZRszE_972weeCrrOPO8zvNMBIwnitIIYbnwPghA8sFhKI5F4oYlF-doGs2gaTj04SzqtrK4NxN3X8AA8x2E0n3jArUGHbDfJIkuL1T5Pi8yRRlh340_PJBg8y3WS5tD3P8WoJC-vzn2BmG2Nz0aVdK14Z8-OPzKbS-z7TdOMSVs-CoVWloLGpVa-kgcrWGoaKWGcTRiDVH1ekWH7dvYPRlNn3g==), another put us in the [top three](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/fc5d2ea7279dfa21d45724a040c9059c/eJyNkl-PmkAUxb8LD30SlQEBTTYbJKKs6BYKaeWFzMLIzPJnxmEAceN3L9s22zRpkz7ee3_33JyT-yYJVMNauJm0kq7iBoAqTSSOUsIIqoVNawHTH1Ow0BRVmUglqYstpy2TVm9_Xf4A3tuqpoOJJAaGRiQMLHvvHreJ5x73I8kgH2_8p878t87mYLmedL__UxhVRGy6UbuRVoK36N1RRkZXIuLlyGMhWLOazfq-nw4QUzpNaTWrUd_MBGVyI6BAjdxjxJEMK8RJCutGrmiHMhkAoICFrmhTLKryMW_TlLa1QPxB-TQWKOHojDgfa7gL5unuoHvDUs3UtI3BsovBtfSqY_fyxfyTThqSP1i-ZVmHdeFnScmC7lUNiPis7tZdFF_PWfvqtIfoa9g1KF_erGuDB1_O7ajS0MaKaHGBBDDyEjklri57A9gptTRzY58zQxnc9klnN9V0n4u8l8vO2can2JzPn-Pw6VSt290Jy4Wve6Vp6EriYKMTeY8NBwODmBdND_yQ3RahbJ5N9xg6p3SovG9j1JAxVGe__mSPhp-B378D_jHIlQ==) alongside New York and Illinois. When it comes to growth, one of those same reports ranked us as #48 – just ahead of California, which ranked dead last. Is it any wonder? With crushing taxes, few job opportunities, woke policies, and the downpour of lunacy coming out of Trenton, our beloved Garden State is no longer the place to build a future that it once was. But before you pack your own U-haul and hit the road for Florida, Texas or Tennessee...I implore you to stay, and _fight_.
---
| | [I’m staying, so I’m going to chip in to turn this state around](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/9585a92ef8417d68bf0d61951bdfa4f8/eJyNkMsKwkAMRf8l62KfPuhOSpFS24UPUDcyTKMOttNhGkUt_XfHB64U3CbnnnDTAqFkkpICQrjQzfN8sEAjF0qgpKiWxPhz6_UD13ctKIU8TnR9UhC2X8Mf4DH2g_7AAroqNMhiNo7SJJ9sp0meGlIxbW786XG8jyfOxskUuu6nGCtB8dm4GwhJn_DRqBCmFS11afgDkWpC2y5qyQh7DWmhsMfryt5tEFcjPl_zYBjsM8c5Gh1TCmXx_kWK15e0uwN13Waa)
---
| Let me explain why. We are on the edge of change. We felt the tectonic plates shifting on November 5, 2024. The policies in place today don’t reflect what the majority of New Jerseyans really want from their leaders and we’re learning the collective impact we can have when we all engage and stop listening to the prevailing media narratives. We’re taking [unprecedented action](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/1d01c54077f6315ac0296003d11b56ba/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0vmRy3ciYQMmouodQz6oKFxZhifkYn_vbHCVUHbd889jzsCoeKKWAMJ3OkRhhF4YLEWRqCiTCvi9SsNN3EQBR5Ioa651b2BZPxaXoD5HMXb2AMaDDrkeEizglX5uWRV4UjDrfvxp2cdLp7dPmUlTNNPMbaCdjfn7iAh2-O8qBFuFZ2sdPyFyCS-rxVK7DqJrVarWreuyY1B1XxmFzi8-9MTZ89gIQ==) to capitalize on this movement and bring changes to Trenton _this_ November. And I believe we’re going to see a political movement that rattles the elite in their ivory towers and starts a policy revolution that will change the face and fortunes of our state. But to accomplish this, as many of us who can must stay. We can’t abandon ship. If you can [chip in today](https://xtz223.keap-link003.com/v2/click/e7a94089a1b9fd9f682f9e98ececfc22/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnCVNzcJbiIRYHvqA6hLLOtWSrss6Rhb-97YPOhV0nXneZ3jnBoSSSUpyCOFCV9f1wAKNXCiBkqJKEuPPrTvw-17fgkLI00RXjYLw9jX8AR5jzw8CC6hVaJDlfBylSTbZTZMsNaRi2tz40-O4H088GydT6LqfYiwFxWfjriEk3eCjUS5MK1rpwvBHIlWHtp1XkhH2atJCYY9Xpb3fIq5HfLHh_tA_zBznZHRMKZT5-xcpti9pdwd2t2ab) to power our work and our voices, please don’t wait. The time is now. On a positive note, we are already seeing the impact of common sense in Washington just days into President Trump’s second term. His growing list of powerful actions in his first week include:
* **Shutting down the Biden-era CBP One app** that was used to allow nearly 1,500 illegal migrants a day into the country
* **Declaring a national emergency** at the U.S. Southern Border
* **Designated criminal cartels as terror** groups
* **Ending birthright citizenship**
* **Ending catch-and-release**
* **Reinstating the “Remain in Mexico”** policy
* **Continue border wall** construction
* Affirming that it is the policy of the United States’ government that there are only **two recognized biological genders:** male and female.
* **Ending taxpayer funding for gender “transition”** services
* **Ending the “electric vehicle mandate”**
* **Return to domestic drilling** and oil and gas production

Wow! Consider common sense unleashed! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader

name: The Democrats
subject: Become a Founding Donor to our 100-Day Fight Fund →
body:
Trump and his allies would love to see Democrats give up. But we won’t — and never will.
---
Derek, Trump is now our president. We know it may seem like there is not a lot to be hopeful about right now, but the truth is that there is nothing he and his allies would love more than to enact their Project 2025 agenda while the rest of us just sit by and watch. They’d love to see Democrats give up. But we won’t — and never will. In fact, we just launched the 100-Day Fight Fund to organize against Trump’s executive orders, resist his Project 2025 agenda, and win back control of Congress. [**You can become a Founding Donor by pitching in now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-100dayfightfund?amount=3&refcode=em_20250123_2637_fr&refcode2=2637_22930333_fjLQcS&akid=2637%2E22930333%2EfjLQcS) [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-100dayfightfund?amount=3&refcode=em_20250123_2637_fr&refcode2=2637_22930333_fjLQcS&akid=2637%2E22930333%2EfjLQcS) **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-100dayfightfund?amount=3&refcode=em_20250123_2637_fr&refcode2=2637_22930333_fjLQcS&akid=2637%2E22930333%2EfjLQcS)** Derek, we already know Trump is going to spend his first 100 days in office pushing harmful legislation that only benefits his wealthy allies like Elon Musk. How we respond will make all the difference. We can’t let their agenda become our new reality — not without a fight. [**So please, chip in $3 today to our 100-Day Fight Fund. We will put your contribution to work immediately, organizing and mobilizing against Trump and his allies’ harmful policies, while working to build the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025-100dayfightfund?amount=3&refcode=em_20250123_2637_fr&refcode2=2637_22930333_fjLQcS&akid=2637%2E22930333%2EfjLQcS) Thank you for your help, today and every day. The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

| | Peter, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. We must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9407294b47eb4141a29f8cae05d33eb9&_e=YY1avSuEOOnTZ_o9RuKIROXKL_bpT2RTv5YBJ41JsTDYo2g2dzNIkCwWQ4IgUSZy2nBNDQJrsFHDnacUS1wVMnr3blPLv5b1C8UopgPva4zo3dHqXwPf9HpzYGOzhD-QYM_uEzKh7dF_9ZxoobKXzcDPiKxK1NT7iSZGiub5JVZzHc5rXS5nGoBK2_0cziagVHCgQw-UgGbQ0_mauocRIIVVmQ9y4BiKsrmN0w3d29mmSi4AYCGjwsrpHG7nCYpHFgIViz1VNgCkA_QHbp9ZDXPLJbZzah8_Uknb4VD1h-qhpb2G-kO4OlpCWj85RkGPPhpEpCsADT3GkcrGCqmiTu6n5qmZh9Vkx1FuUEWEUZKXvbxYPkECTtwITNcibG1DiCpe75ZQuDsiFaUH-IcNZ23NGx1_59RthpOP6E0luWY4YTKszZdbWt-UlKEVtUeo)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9407294b47eb4141a29f8cae05d33eb9&_e=YY1avSuEOOnTZ_o9RuKIROXKL_bpT2RTv5YBJ41JsTDYo2g2dzNIkCwWQ4IgUSZy2nBNDQJrsFHDnacUS1wVMnr3blPLv5b1C8UopgPva4zo3dHqXwPf9HpzYGOzhD-QYM_uEzKh7dF_9ZxoobKXzcDPiKxK1NT7iSZGiub5JVZzHc5rXS5nGoBK2_0cziagVHCgQw-UgGbQ0_mauocRIIVVmQ9y4BiKsrmN0w3d29mmSi4AYCGjwsrpHG7nCYpHFgIViz1VNgCkA_QHbp9ZDacPVVlEDsAYAvBGA7juTLIEbRlJuKdo85rzNRXsF-2er8EFR8WuxkBtDXdPbCidXd_khE26rKVunQgvrS8GBVO9zR2xB_9_WQDhv7CSk1PD9zCFoBOKkraYt-LbMlQKslVFj8rYs4DI0wo3xp9Ux4kx2HtqZQO6Be2D1YFpAj4W) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

name: Dave Reichert
subject: They need our help.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn
body:
Our friends need our help. Will you join me in this? | | https://us5.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id;=f2a24f1a7d&e;=77eef70c61 | Is this email not displaying correctly?
[View it in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b00695b9170e/they-need-our-help?e=77eef70c61).
---|---
| [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=eba267d781&e=77eef70c61)
---
| | Friends,

Years ago, when I first ran for Sheriff in King County, I did it because I knew that the residents of King County needed my help. They needed a Sheriff who would put their safety before politics, defend them from dangerous repeat offenders, and put responsible leadership before the fads of radical activists.

Although a lot has changed since then, the Puget Sound region is once again facing challenges similar to those when I first ran for Sheriff. Extreme activists in Seattle seem intent on implementing their agenda of disparaging, disarming, and defunding law enforcement, regardless of how much chaos and harm it causes our communities.

Thankfully for our region, my friend Reagan Dunn is running for reelection to the King County Council. Let me assure you, Reagan is our last line of defense against the radical politics of downtown Seattle. [](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=67767e520a&e=77eef70c61) __(Sign up for updates on his work[HERE](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=3861eefa91&e=77eef70c61))__
**I am proud to announce to you today that I am endorsing his candidacy for the King County Council! **[**Would you join me and endorse Reagan today?**](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=cf44300d8a&e=77eef70c61) I'm endorsing Reagan because, to be frank, our friends and neighbors need our help.
* **Victims of crime,** harmed by activist-driven efforts to defund the police, desperately need our support.
* **Homeowners,** burdened by ever-increasing taxes, need relief.
* **Transit riders and operators,** plagued by rampant crime and unsafe conditions, need a safe and reliable transit system.
* **Small business owners,** struggling with inflation and skyrocketing costs of living, need a champion to protect their livelihoods.
* **And every member of our community,** longing for responsible leadership to stand firm against extreme activist agendas, needs us to step up.

The good news is that there's something simple you can do to help your neighbors. _Join me, and all 9 mayors in Reagan 's district, by endorsing Reagan TODAY!_
[**ENDORSE REAGAN HERE!**](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=6f405af833&e=77eef70c61) Friends, let's do our part to ensure King County's last line of defense, Reagan Dunn, can continue to fight against extremism and give our communities hope for a better future. Dave Reichert P.S. With so many politicians always asking for money, it can be hard to know which races are worth supporting. If you're looking for a candidate that can make a real positive impact on our communities, then I would urge you to make a small donation of $25, $50, or even $100 to Reagan Dunn today! **[DONATE HERE](https://reagandunn.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0220f14f6bfeefc23687abe64&id=884dd47d4b&e=77eef70c61)**

clean_body: Our friends need our help. Will you join me in this? | | | Is this email not displaying correctly? . ---|--- | | | Friends, Years ago, when I first ran for Sheriff in King County, I did it because I knew that the residents of King County needed my help. They needed a Sheriff who would put their safety before politics, defend them from dangerous repeat offenders, and put responsible leadership before the fads of radical activists. Although a lot has changed since then, the Puget Sound region is once again facing challenges similar to those when I first ran for Sheriff. Extreme activists in Seattle seem intent on implementing their agenda of disparaging, disarming, and defunding law enforcement, regardless of how much chaos and harm it causes our communities. Thankfully for our region, my friend Reagan Dunn is running for reelection to the King County Council. Let me assure you, Reagan is our last line of defense against the radical politics of downtown Seattle. (Sign up for updates on his work) I am proud to announce to you today that I am endorsing his candidacy for the King County Council! I'm endorsing Reagan because, to be frank, our friends and neighbors need our help. Victims of crime, harmed by activist-driven efforts to defund the police, desperately need our support. Homeowners, burdened by ever-increasing taxes, need relief. Transit riders and operators, plagued by rampant crime and unsafe conditions, need a safe and reliable transit system. Small business owners, struggling with inflation and skyrocketing costs of living, need a champion to protect their livelihoods. And every member of our community, longing for responsible leadership to stand firm against extreme activist agendas, needs us to step up. The good news is that there's something simple you can do to help your neighbors. Join me, and all 9 mayors in Reagan 's district, by endorsing Reagan TODAY! Friends, let's do our part to ensure King County's last line of defense, Reagan Dunn, can continue to fight against extremism and give our communities hope for a better future. Dave Reichert P.S. With so many politicians always asking for money, it can be hard to know which races are worth supporting. If you're looking for a candidate that can make a real positive impact on our communities, then I would urge you to make a small donation of $25, $50, or even $100 to Reagan Dunn today! ** | | | | Paid for by Friends of Reagan Dunn P.O. Box 40417 Bellevue, WA 98015 Email: mailto:info@reagandunn.com | |

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Non-citizens are Voting in U.S. Elections!
body:
Did you know that non-citizens voted in the 2024 elections? Just a few weeks ago, in response to a District of Columbia Freedom of Information Act request by Judicial Watch, the Washington D.C. Board of Elections provided information that

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**Did you know that non-citizens voted in the 2024 elections?**
Just a few weeks ago, in response to a District of Columbia Freedom of Information Act request by Judicial Watch, the Washington D.C. Board of Elections provided information that shows 388 _non-citizens_ voted in D.C. in the November 5th, 2024 general election... _even though federal law_ _prohibits non-citizens from voting in federal elections_!
**But what happened in D.C. is _just the tip of the iceberg_ , since across the country liberal cities, counties and states are also moving to allow non-citizens to vote! When the Left loses an election, they will always look for a way to create new voters...citizens or not.**
We believe citizenship should be the Number One priority for voting in U.S. elections, but in many states and cities it is not.
That's why we need to ramp up our work exposing states and cities that are attempting to undermine honest elections by permitting non-citizen voting.
**[And to ramp up this important election law work, I am asking you to support Judicial Watch with a special contribution today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72027&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72027&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Because of your interest in our work, you know that since 2012 we've fought successful legal actions across the country to keep our elections honest...helping states defend voter I.D. laws, and forcing states to follow federal election law and keep their voter rolls "clean."

Because of your interest in our work
Our lawsuits and settlements have led to the removal of **more than****4 million** ineligible voters from voter lists across the country.

And we are currently suing **California, Illinois and****Oregon** over their sloppy voter maintenance practices, as well as also suing **Illinois** over its law that allows the counting of mail-in ballots up to 14 days after Election Day (we won a huge victory in **Mississippi** last October in our lawsuit against that state's similarly reckless "extend Election Day" law).

**Now, I believe that Judicial Watch must tackle the growing scandal of liberal jurisdictions enabling non-citizens to vote in our elections.**

This may be the most insidious attempt yet by the Left to corrupt our elections and violate the U.S. Constitution!

As America's largest and most effective private election laws litigator, Judicial Watch is uniquely suited to take on the Left to stop non-citizen voting.

[But to support new investigations and, potentially, new lawsuits we need you and other patriots to join with us!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72027&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72027&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

We're currently pursuing _countless_ open Freedom of Information Act requests and a record number of lawsuits against several branches of the federal government, which is why your contribution is so important.

Believe me, 2025 will be just as challenging as 2024!

Please know that all of us at Judicial Watch will be deeply grateful to you for your support, and if you will help us now, I pledge to honor your trust in us every day_.

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72027&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

name: Chuck Rocha
subject: URGENT: Join RootsCamp to Resist Trump’s Dangerous Agenda
body:
WE NEED TO FIGHT BACK | | | |
---
| | |
# WE NEED TO FIGHT BACK
---
|
---
| [ ](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=e50ea25abe&e=b8f90417f9)
---
| **Dear Progressive Leaders and Activists** , The stakes have never been higher. Trump’s [dangerous agenda](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=7616f38abb&e=b8f90417f9) is dismantling the progress we’ve made as a nation. His return to power would usher in policies that roll back civil rights, suppress vulnerable communities, and put our democracy at risk. Here’s what we’re already facing:
### Federal Workforce & Government Weaponization
* **Purging Civil Servants:** Restoring “Schedule F,” a classification that strips job protections from federal workers, allowing them to be fired for political reasons.
* **Weaponizing Power:** Reviewing Biden-era investigations to “correct misconduct,” a veiled attempt to undermine accountability and rule of law.

### Immigration & Human Rights
* **Ending Birthright Citizenship:** A direct attack on the Constitution that would deny citizenship to children born in the U.S. to undocumented immigrants.
* **Shutting the Door on Refugees:** Suspending the Refugee Admissions Program, barring people fleeing violence and persecution from seeking safety in the U.S.

### Climate Crisis Rollbacks
* **Exiting the Paris Agreement:** Abandoning global efforts to fight climate change.
* **Drilling in Protected Areas:** Opening Alaska’s wilderness to oil and gas exploration while eliminating environmental justice programs that protect vulnerable communities.

### Attacks on Diversity & Inclusion
* **Terminating D.E.I. Programs:** Halting federal efforts to promote diversity, equity, and inclusion.

We can’t just sit back and watch. [RootsCamp 2025](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=b065ca7ca0&e=b8f90417f9), happening **February 6–8 in Maryland**(Maritime Conference Center, 692 Maritime Blvd, Linthicum Heights, MD), is our opportunity to come together, plan, and take action against harmful policies.

Let’s work together to build the strength we need to take back the House and fight for the future we believe in. **Why You Should Consider Joining:**
* **Strategize:** Learn from progressive leaders and organizations about effective resistance tactics.
* **Collaborate:** Build networks to counter Trump’s policies and protect vulnerable communities.
* **Mobilize:** Strengthen our efforts to take back Congress and secure our democracy.

This is a pivotal moment for our movement. **[Register now](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=d6c96840e3&e=b8f90417f9)****** and be part of the fight to resist Trump’s agenda and protect the progress we’ve made. **[Click here to register](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=6f9ab1666e&e=b8f90417f9) ** Please consider attending, sponsoring (helping others to attend), and partnering with or promoting RootsCamp. Let’s take action together—because the future of our country depends on it.

\- Chuck Rocha
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=11001c4ba4&e=b8f90417f9)
---
| | [](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=a0c0c1af6a&e=b8f90417f9)
---

clean_body: WE NEED TO FIGHT BACK | | | | | | | WE NEED TO FIGHT BACK | | | Dear Progressive Leaders and Activists , The stakes have never been higher. Trump’s is dismantling the progress we’ve made as a nation. His return to power would usher in policies that roll back civil rights, suppress vulnerable communities, and put our democracy at risk. Here’s what we’re already facing: Federal Workforce & Government Weaponization Purging Civil Servants: Restoring “Schedule F,” a classification that strips job protections from federal workers, allowing them to be fired for political reasons. Weaponizing Power: Reviewing Biden-era investigations to “correct misconduct,” a veiled attempt to undermine accountability and rule of law. Immigration & Human Rights Ending Birthright Citizenship: A direct attack on the Constitution that would deny citizenship to children born in the U.S. to undocumented immigrants. Shutting the Door on Refugees: Suspending the Refugee Admissions Program, barring people fleeing violence and persecution from seeking safety in the U.S. Climate Crisis Rollbacks Exiting the Paris Agreement: Abandoning global efforts to fight climate change. Drilling in Protected Areas: Opening Alaska’s wilderness to oil and gas exploration while eliminating environmental justice programs that protect vulnerable communities. Attacks on Diversity & Inclusion Terminating D.E.I. Programs: Halting federal efforts to promote diversity, equity, and inclusion. We can’t just sit back and watch. , happening February 6–8 in Maryland(Maritime Conference Center, 692 Maritime Blvd, Linthicum Heights, MD), is our opportunity to come together, plan, and take action against harmful policies. Let’s work together to build the strength we need to take back the House and fight for the future we believe in. Why You Should Consider Joining: Strategize: Learn from progressive leaders and organizations about effective resistance tactics. Collaborate: Build networks to counter Trump’s policies and protect vulnerable communities. Mobilize: Strengthen our efforts to take back Congress and secure our democracy. This is a pivotal moment for our movement. ** and be part of the fight to resist Trump’s agenda and protect the progress we’ve made. Please consider attending, sponsoring (helping others to attend), and partnering with or promoting RootsCamp. Let’s take action together—because the future of our country depends on it. \- Chuck Rocha | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Solidarity Strategies, All rights reserved.

name: Electoral College Team [VAP]
subject: By whatever means necessary
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012325_1&amount=25]
The movement to end the Electoral College is making progress, friend: Minnesota joined the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact and Maine's state legislature is working to join as well.
If you don't remember -- The National Popular Vote Interstate Compact (NPVIC) is an agreement among a group of U.S. states and the District of Columbia to award all their electoral votes to whichever presidential candidate wins the overall popular vote in the 50 states and the District of Columbia. 17 states plus DC have now joined.
Minnesota brought 10 electoral votes, and Maine 4, now accounting for 209 Electoral College votes of the 270 needed to win the election and totaling 78% of what is needed to make the popular vote the law of the land. Minnesota passed a slate of voting rights protections alongside joining the compact as well, which represents huge progress.
Whether it's through the NPVIC or one of the other legal alternatives, ending the Electoral College forever is a big priority.
We are going to make this happen! Keep the momentum going and put us over the top so we can end the Electoral College forever with $25 or more today! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=012325_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=012325_1&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=012325_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=012325_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=012325_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?express_lane=true&refcode=012325_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=012325_1&amount=35]
Defenders of voting rights like Cory Booker, AOC, Robert Reich, and Stacey Abrams recognize that the Electoral College is harming our democracy and needs to go. State legislatures in Nevada, Michigan, and more are heeding the call and also considering bills to join the National Popular Vote Interstate Compact.
The Electoral College is the biggest tool that opponents of voting rights have to swing national elections and suppress the will of the people. We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection by any means necessary.
Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-end-electoral-college?refcode=012325_1&amount=25]
Thank you for your commitment,
Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012325_1&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012325_1&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012325_1&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012325_1&amount=25]

A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

We have to take away this dangerous mechanism that enabled the January 6th insurrection by any means necessary. Vote suppressors have proven there’s no length they won’t go to in order to win. RUSH $25 or more to help us end the Electoral College once and for all >> [] Thank you for your commitment, Voter Action Project's Electoral College Team [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

After putting this on the back burner for DECADES, we finally have leadership ready to take on China. Leadership from both sides has been too scared to stand up to China for too long, and we can finally make that change.

If we’re going to make a difference, though, we need to know your opinions on China. Without your help, we won’t know where to focus our energy. **[**Will you do me a favor and take our Defend Against China Survey?**](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTI5JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MDEyM19OVi1aTi4xMTAxMTdfdDE1OTY5MjktMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTAxMjNfTlYtWk4uMTEwMTE3X3QxNTk2OTI5LTI4OTkifQ/yPaUfZds9r_sHfVHbPrJng)**

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Theology 101
body:
_**A message from our sponsor...**_ The study of God [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3afe8165ba74416ba4d6763c309e145b&_e=1jHeESyjt1koY5lHANBbcVe_ZpWz-_irZeSOhMLXvlgmdlT9s67UFq-EeXFilab1xFvtGppksx7dfFObUjOw4hmPUup8kbKByh1I5jyM1Uzg2-I6o7pizyzuVOwYmnJ8MxIjn9WL1LoiybOgpTw4gWFIjhIkr3dFm87h3jkbDIzAXXYv7dY6DIElIBuz7IfZ2NBLdn1fGLWk62Ax8_HRGt-lBYDqbqrNAAFHg9K0uPAtv9MyXLFGxx9hE70BiJsNg9XLT1DAi1oPcxUdM_4lEmijXRI4B7acKb-2SnL72xv6BgyMkH-AetKTmNTKNwYagKRG4kOdaqDre3PuByHaVzE_HV61lNROndUz9A3K-dfG6cO5AWIEfWsphgnxHjTol1zQVNj67eacofUjZz20v-i1z9-gNE4hUXbxmaMP2NS563PXaVjtDCetG7zK4vlr40YK5E-tJfs4uc9LKDI9UA%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3afe8165ba74416ba4d6763c309e145b&_e=1jHeESyjt1koY5lHANBbcVe_ZpWz-_irZeSOhMLXvlgmdlT9s67UFq-EeXFilab1xFvtGppksx7dfFObUjOw4hmPUup8kbKByh1I5jyM1Uzg2-I6o7pizyzuVOwYmnJ8MxIjn9WL1LoiybOgpTw4gWFIjhIkr3dFm87h3jkbDIzAXXYv7dY6DIElIBuz7IfZ2NBLdn1fGLWk62Ax8_HRGt-lBYDqbqrNAAFHg9K0uPAtv9MyXLFGxx9hE70BiJsNg9XLT1DAi1oPcxUdM_4lEmijXRI4B7acKb-2SnL72xsJEmJBSU41nIGownv0jJ69fZTFSWgAYAYLDfSkqjie819A4Ehe7vVayfjXPku7R1wwdDwBTfeRJobVb3lW2rOqo8Nq3F4jiT1JVwGqTr5wlyEwklf2GG7Q_Sx8M5IY_aI7omF5raU0j1w6Cg8LvZsfM8Ev1YSpPHVwbtd_C9NYUw%3D%3D) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3afe8165ba74416ba4d6763c309e145b&_e=1jHeESyjt1koY5lHANBbcVe_ZpWz-_irZeSOhMLXvlgmdlT9s67UFq-EeXFilab1xFvtGppksx7dfFObUjOw4hmPUup8kbKByh1I5jyM1Uzg2-I6o7pizyzuVOwYmnJ8MxIjn9WL1LoiybOgpTw4gWFIjhIkr3dFm87h3jkbDIzAXXYv7dY6DIElIBuz7IfZ2NBLdn1fGLWk62Ax8_HRGt-lBYDqbqrNAAFHg9K0uPAtv9MyXLFGxx9hE70BiJsNg9XLT1DAi1oPcxUdM_4lEmijXRI4B7acKb-2SnL72xuvsaPADPYSAHJcJFHgheXZkA-gQ5kPeFhtBb7u_EB5DqpfbujCBzshF2U9uismS-FaVN9cp7lN4KEf7CL9idHbDWYu4byu1LrqpMJ0HmnFjLJupCUJclWYDDmnL-a_efOnzaCgdKMcwTZJJrCd1rS7znT7gQYy87dsqifuZsmjpw%3D%3D). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3afe8165ba74416ba4d6763c309e145b&_e=1jHeESyjt1koY5lHANBbcVe_ZpWz-_irZeSOhMLXvlgmdlT9s67UFq-EeXFilab1xFvtGppksx7dfFObUjOw4hmPUup8kbKByh1I5jyM1Uzg2-I6o7pizyzuVOwYmnJ8MxIjn9WL1LoiybOgpTw4gWFIjhIkr3dFm87h3jkbDIzAXXYv7dY6DIElIBuz7IfZ2NBLdn1fGLWk62Ax8_HRGt-lBYDqbqrNAAFHg9K0uPAtv9MyXLFGxx9hE70BiJsNg9XLT1DAi1oPcxUdM_4lEmijXRI4B7acKb-2SnL72xvsePDsAsXooPvdkg2vsNQ9BEvN6fXZVSo-48bmEdNQwJi0nXgS74bhGDLql6ytDiIV5i-d8wgM88HQkzErLwh6C_R_rWo8TGgC7O7jIkKejqR6_57Otk_3D4Wvvx_TMVrqo1YR4fi0ryzZ3O8YPV3HK73prxX6L5iDI6d_4sgH-A%3D%3D)** Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_s=3afe8165ba74416ba4d6763c309e145b&_t=JPYJPlLB71r9nldPvgszsQfQj2IaG4lHLoa-BGj1iayArURGAbX1iw2PjDxjXKqr9qmqsw7RueeNcs-BUDsNGZ21jRlR_fU8hc1Ve_nwfwsNObx75LY98P0KRt-Qr3Wg)

# NH Democrats Want to Pick Your Pockets - Fight Back with the NH GOP!
---
| The Democrats in New Hampshire are at it again, this time with HB 503-FN, a direct assault on your hard-earned money:
* **Reviving the Interest and Dividends Tax** \- Because they think you aren't paying enough!
* **Jacking Up Business Profits Tax** \- Killing jobs and growth to feed their tax-hungry agenda.
* **Raising Meals and Rooms Tax** \- Making even your daily coffee more expensive.
* This isn't just policy; it's a full-blown attack on your wallet to the tune of hundreds of millions of your dollars, an attack on your business, and an attack our state's economic freedom.

**The Consequences:**
* Strangling businesses with higher taxes, leading to job cuts.
* Slowing down New Hampshire's economic engine.

**Why Your Support is Vital:**
* Push Back: Your donation is our ammunition. We need to fight this bill with all we've got - education, advocacy, and action.
* Protect Our Values: We stand for liberty, not for letting Democrats tax us into submission.

**What You Can Do:**
* Donate: [Every dollar counts. $10, $50, or more - your support funds our counterattack.](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=d0703e05e1&e=f3aa6419cd)
* Spread the Word: Tell everyone. Let's make sure the Democrats know we won't take this lying down.

[Donate Now!](https://gop.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6abc8216f2c93cdbede56dda3&id=f3d09b6288&e=f3aa6419cd)
We're at a crossroads. Will New Hampshire remain a beacon of freedom, or will we become a tax haven for Democrat policies? Your donation can tip the scales. Join us now to stop this outrageous tax grab.
_**Live FREE or Die!**_

That’s **EIGHT days** to raise the funds that will help... 📣 Elevate our messaging
🗳️ Mobilize voters
📋 Train volunteers
💰 Invest in competitive races
..._and so much more._ We can’t afford to fall short. With state Democrats facing over a dozen special elections in the coming months, we need to be ready to not just compete but win in every race. **Since gaining a federal trifecta, MAGA Republicans are itching to do a full sweep in the states – and missing our fundraising goal would play right into their hands.** That’s why a generous coalition of donors has agreed to match every donation to our grassroots movement _three times_ until midnight on January 31st. Don’t miss this opportunity to optimize your gift to the DLCC. [Will you rush a 3X-matched $7 gift right now to help hit our January fundraising goal to elect state Dems and show MAGA Republicans that we’re NOT backing down?
