MESSAGE FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP
I LOVE YOU!
Being back in the White House is incredible, and I’m only here for one reason: YOU AND THE INCREDIBLE SUPPORTERS WHO NEVER LEFT MY SIDE!
When Biden had my home raided, YOU HAD MY BACK!
When I was arrested and convicted by a crooked court, YOUR SUPPORT GREW EVEN STRONGER!
And when assassins tried to take my life, it was YOU who gave me the strength to FIGHT FIGHT FIGHT!
I’ll never forget what you did for me. I owe you more than you can ever imagine.
**[At this great moment in our nation’s history, I want to tell you what we will accomplish in our first week:](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02P2yAQhn8NvmHBQCA5-LBt6n6sumqPPVUEJg1bMARwrPTXV7aiHOedR_O8Y2IO_nwfiP5AAC7eVQJAxAsBuP5aYpnf4-tn-u17kvSq3uJu3cLHB3qDJzxZ86bT1z3_4WP9d_355fX-6eXGn3i7Z3zCD2mP0fiwpvrYuUGcHZMdDlwLreRBMd1dhoND7thOKoZndrB2b_dOSC25UHpnmen8AAx2jIPgCpRUvdqj01qdlGJSnRQSyTZPbyIWbw2vbTGlpBR7m2IXhktruW7FRgJjRTsX7Bc_FXQrQWBsZY6ZTqb5NJlAbYrRt4ZI38-WwBgyzaVmumnogviXclrnnFNpWGg9rZfFOLf4u6a5WCTiONlAQK1RROfnSMTxVB5Jw7LOS-FdGVxefAi-Kk0k-7M9sta-DfA_AAD__0d6imE)**
|

|
* We will rein in the bloated regulatory regime that has smothered our economy. AMERICA IS OPEN FOR BUSINESS AGAIN!
* We will END the open borders and STOP THE INVASION!
* We will ELIMINATE the politicization of our military. Our military will have one job: WINNING WARS AND KEEPING AMERICA SAFE!
* But most importantly, we will no longer be a nation in decline. EVERY DAY WE WILL WIN!

---
|
---

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: Will you take my focus group?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi friend, it's Senator Kirsten Gillibrand. **I am excited and honored to serve as your new Chair of the DSCC.**

My entire career, I've believed in **the power of grassroots activism.** I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. _And that last piece is why I want to hear from you._

**[Today, I'm pleased to launch my first official DSCC Focus Group. Flipping the Senate depends on knowing what issues and messages matter most to this team, so it's important that I personally hear from top supporters like you. Your feedback will enable me to work alongside Senator Schumer to build our strategy to take back the majority -- so please, will you take my survey before midnight?](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250123-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250123-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19349%2E9716520%2ENMSoSk)**

| | [ENTER FOCUS GROUP](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250123-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250123-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19349%2E9716520%2ENMSoSk)
---

Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue.

The Senate is our _best chance_ at stopping the MAGA agenda and putting forth a positive Democratic vision. Together, we can flip the Senate and pursue that bold path, but we'll only be effective if we incorporate _your_ invaluable knowledge of the landscape we face.

**[So please, will you take a few moments to join my DSCC Focus Group by completing a brief survey before midnight? Democrats are at our strongest when we hear from supporters like you, so I'm humbly asking you to take a few moments to share your thoughts on how we can win.](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250123-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250123-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19349%2E9716520%2ENMSoSk)**

The path forward starts today. It's a privilege to be your DSCC Chair, and **[with your input](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250123-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250123-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19349%2E9716520%2ENMSoSk)** , we'll build our strongest majority yet.

With gratitude,

Kirsten

Kirsten Gillibrand
DSCC Chair

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/20975?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250123-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250123-KirstenGillibrand-NewChairFocusGroup-Pros-sl1&akid=19349%2E9716520%2ENMSoSk)
| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q1-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=1&refcode2=19349_9716520_NMSoSk&akid=19349%2E9716520%2ENMSoSk)
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q1?refcode=DPE-footer&t=2&refcode2=19349_9716520_NMSoSk&akid=19349%2E9716520%2ENMSoSk)**.

I know that campaigns -- and Senate majorities -- are won by the people who put in the work, from volunteers knocking on doors and stuffing envelopes to supporters sharing their priorities. And that last piece is why I want to hear from you. | | Donald Trump has spent years attacking your personal freedoms, and now that he's back in office, that will only continue. The Senate is our best chance at stopping the MAGA agenda and putting forth a positive Democratic vision. Together, we can flip the Senate and pursue that bold path, but we'll only be effective if we incorporate your invaluable knowledge of the landscape we face. The path forward starts today. It's a privilege to be your DSCC Chair, and , we'll build our strongest majority yet. With gratitude, Kirsten Kirsten Gillibrand DSCC Chair | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. name: A.G. Holder
subject: 2025 is not an “off year”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Key state-level fights we’re watching →
|
---

Hi Peter,
I’ve said it before and I’ll say it again: **There is no “off year” in the fight for fair electoral maps.**
With the consequential 2024 presidential election in our rearview, 2025 is a crucial year to put in the work that will advance the fight for our democracy in 2026, 2028, and beyond.
**In fact, we’ve already got our eyes on a handful of key advocacy efforts coming up this year in multiple states across the country.** Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, is currently litigating in five states to dismantle illegal gerrymanders and protect fair maps. Meanwhile, we’re preparing to stop potential efforts by Republicans to steal more congressional seats through extreme gerrymandering — including in Ohio, where new congressional maps will be drawn this year. And we must stay ready to protect the 2030 Census from efforts to tamper with it, to ensure an accurate count and fair representation.
**There’s plenty of work lying ahead — and I know that with your help, we’ll be able to do whatever it takes in 2025 to ensure fair electoral maps for years to come.[Chip in now to fund our work to stop gerrymandering and defend fair elections.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100846590/524102369/358328389?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGAheadNOR_email_20250123-AOTL-Tier1-AGAheadNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250123-AOTL-Tier1-AGAheadNOR_&utm_campaign=AGAheadNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjYzA4NDQ2LWE3ZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jVq8RBwxmp25qEbB8EHZLHUkLXp0hZeKQ1ymc1WTEcc=)**

Here are some of the key fights we’re eyeing this year — including court cases that our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), is actively involved in that _**could affect the makeup of up to eight or even nine districts**_ and where we must make sure voters are fairly represented:
* **In Alabama, Georgia, and Louisiana,** plaintiffs supported by the NRF will be fighting to protect Black opportunity districts that came about as a result of our landmark victory before the U.S. Supreme Court in _Allen v. Milligan_.
* **In Texas,** the NRF continues to support a case involving Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, challenging the state’s congressional and legislative maps.
* **In Florida,** we are awaiting a decision from the state supreme court that could restore a Black opportunity district in Jacksonville.

In addition to our affiliate, NRF’s, court cases, we are gearing up for new maps in key states, including:
* **In Ohio,** we’re gearing up for a new congressional map to be drawn this year — the latest step in a years-long battle for fair maps in the state that has seen far-right partisans continue to mislead Ohioans about the redistricting process and manipulate maps despite the redistricting reforms passed by voters in 2015 and 2018.
* **And in New Hampshire,** with a Republican majority in the state legislature, we need to be vigilant about any attempts to alter the maps and steal more congressional seats — like Republicans did in North Carolina.

**We must stay ready to mobilize against power grabs in these states and across the country.** The work we put in during the weeks and months ahead could make a massive difference in fair representation. We must not wait, we must not waver — the stakes are simply too high.
[**Please, Peter, make a contribution to power the movement for fair maps throughout 2025 and the years ahead.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100846631/524102463/358328389?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGAheadNOR_email_20250123-AOTL-Tier1-AGAheadNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250123-AOTL-Tier1-AGAheadNOR_&utm_campaign=AGAheadNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJjYzA4NDQ2LWE3ZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jVq8RBwxmp25qEbB8EHZLHUkLXp0hZeKQ1ymc1WTEcc=)
Thanks for everything you do. We’ll be in touch soon with further updates about these state-level battles and many more.
Sincerely,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Houston halfway through winter storm as concern shifts to frozen roads,** " Houston Landing's**Hanna Holthaus** -- "Houston is halfway through the worst effects of Winter Storm Enzo and has so far avoided severe damages, said Mayor **John Whitmire** Tuesday evening.

Whitmire urged residents to keep sheltered in place for the next 24 hours.

"It's halftime, we've got third and fourth quarters to go," Whitmire said at a press conference.

The predominant risk will be the snow that melted Tuesday that will freeze on the roads overnight, Whitmire said. The city saw 22 nonlethal vehicular accidents Tuesday, and Whitmire thanked employers for closing their businesses which allowed workers to stay home.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/93655777-ea4f-4bcb-a7ac-788c0aef241c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The Houston Fire and Rescue Department has started transporting residents to warming systems for the first time. Almost 1,100 people have used the 10 city sponsored warming centers so far, with no reported deaths in Houston.

The Harris County Sheriff's Department [reported at least one death](https://substack.com/redirect/29215a43-ae86-4ee5-a2b1-d7fedb4f7f6d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) potentially due to cold exposure earlier in the day.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/93655777-ea4f-4bcb-a7ac-788c0aef241c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Other concerns, such as widespread power outages and water pressure loss, have not had the impact of previous storms. Centerpoint reported 73 outages affecting 1,385 customers as of 5:30 p.m., and Houston Public Works said the water system remained strong.

City offices and HISD schools will stay closed Wednesday, but the airports will open. TSA will start accepting passengers at 9 a.m., arrivals at 10 a.m. and departures will begin at 11 a.m.

"We've got to be very safe and smart from here on out," Whitmire said. "If we follow precautions and the common sense we've used up to this point, we're going to look back at this storm as a challenging experience where Houston met its challenge."" name: Weston D. Imer - RNC Youth Council
subject: 2025 RNC Winter Meeting Report
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Weston D
body:
I just returned from Washington, DC and I am proud to again provide my post meeting report to you all...
| | | | | [](https://ghwh6lbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001P7wpeJJO1crFpyv7o7XlO_5FG2bOwZ09EJk0Mlzh-AZST91USwKXSdNuTdwhmT7pNSg6u2vkmmDMbU_o6Osx5tf3cYkPaqt2g3uvBYgj6WxOAhv-M3NbXFPNQRNZug0tTeMgkg9Ex-tfuTBIVZ9HynMH6ejaxEzCV30TqPAWgNeCTpQ2sPEcZzmhuzXaS0q8oFo717HJy20=&c=hJa5Whb80fwn3g0L8mWWaNxcqgffU3c29PcYwoNuinar20mZT8YHwQ==&ch=hOsPkP6z27vIn_Xtz1MKqWiA07rmwDAGNPTH3QiAlKYfFZY8ibeO1Q==)
---
Friend, I just departed Washington Dulles International Airport in DC following the RNC Winter Meeting and the 60th Presidential Inauguration.
It has been the honor of my lifetime to serve as a member of the RNC Youth Advisory Council, and I hope to continue to serve in a role that impacts my generation over the next four years.
Meeting Report: The 2025 Winter Meeting was largely ceremonial in nature. The only official business conducted at the meeting were the elections for Chairman, Co-Chairman, Treasurer, and Secretary of the RNC.
I am pleased to report that Chairman Whatley was unanimously re-elected as Chairman of the Republican National Committee.
Under his leadership, we saw tremendous increases in Fundraising, voter turnout, early voting, and Gen Z involvement. As he continues his work as Chairman, I am sure we will continue to see our gains increase over the next two years under his stewardship.
Lara Trump has officially left her role as Co-Chair of the RNC as of the general session on 1/17/2025. Her time at the RNC helped lead us to the tremendous victory we saw in November, and she has helped reshape the RNC to be a lean and mean operation whose sole intention is to elect Republicans up and down the ballot.
Now that she has departed, the RNC members elected KC Crosbie as Co-Chair. KC has been the RNC's treasurer for the last two years, and I have gotten to know her during my time on the Youth Advisory Council. She will be a fantastic co-chair, and she was President Trump's choice for this role.
Following those elections, the 168 elected Joe Gruters as treasurer to replace KC. Our secretary, Vicki Drummond, has also been re-elected to another two-year term.
All of the proposed Resolutions at the Winter Meeting were tabled until the upcoming Spring Training Meeting.
In other news, following the reorganizational meeting, the RNC promoted Mike Ambrosini, who previously directed State Party Strategies, to Chief of Staff, replacing Trump Co-Campaign Manager Chris LaCavita.
Mike has become a dear friend, and I am excited to see him take on this new role with the exceptionalism he has shown over the past two years.
The RNC Winter Meeting concluded the official business at around 2:00 PM EST on 1/17/2025.
Throughout the meeting, we attended several receptions at the Omni Shoreham in DC with the membership and guests, including a Victory Reception with Speaker of the House Mike Johnson.
The Inauguration: Several unforeseen changes were made to the plans for President Trump's Inauguration, mainly the change of venue from the West Steps to the Rotunda of the Capitol.
It was bitterly cold in DC this week--ask anyone who attended, and they will tell you! According to President Trump and his team, there were no security threats related to the change of venue, so please rest easy that no significant threat to the Inauguration contributed to the decision to move the ceremony indoors.
I had the honor of attending the Swearing-In ceremony inside Emancipation Hall at the Capitol with Governors from across the country, Danica Patrick, Jake & Logan Paul, Conner McGregor, and many other VIP attendees of the inauguration.
It was a bittersweet experience to be at the Capitol, knowing that my fellow Coloradans and attendees worldwide were excluded from the festivities, except for the lucky few thousand who were at Capitol One Arena in Chinatown.
Following the Inaugural Ceremony, I attended the Liberty Presidential Inaugural Ball at the convention center in DC. With 13,000 of my closest friends, we watched with tearful eyes as President Trump, Vice President Vance, Melania, and Usha Vance danced to the American Trilogy by Elvis Presley to commemorate their return to the White House for the second time.
This was my second time attending a Presidential Inauguration, and I cannot say how touching it was to see the end of my 8 years of work and dedication to President Trump and his movement to Make America Great Again come to an end.
This event was the culmination of the endless hours of work done by myself, every staffer, volunteer, and activist from across the country, and it was the most beautiful ending to the story we could have had.
I had tears in my eyes from the moment I stepped into the Capitol until I left the convention center that night. This movement has meant so much to me, and I genuinely have dedicated almost half of my life to it, and I could not be more grateful for the trust that my supporters have placed in me, and for the opportunity to have been part of this historic movement.
---

---
| In Closing: I hope that the closing of this chapter of my story in this political movement marks the start of a new chapter for not only our country but for the millions of people who, like me, have placed their faith in President Trump and given their all to Making America Great Again.
I am looking forward to whatever comes next. Until then, I will continue to advocate for my generation to continue to have a seat at the table in Republican Politics.
This is not the end, but just the beginning because, as Frank Sinatra put it, The Best Is Yet To Come!
Until I am told otherwise, I will continue to work on behalf of the RNC Youth Advisory Council to engage Gen Z, recruit more Gen Z voters, and train, empower, and energize the Trump base as we ramp up for the 2026 midterms.
Thank you again for your support, and I hope you have appreciated my report on the 2025 RNC Winter Meeting and the Inauguration of President Trump and Vice President Vance.
Best,

clean_body: I just returned from Washington, DC and I am proud to again provide my post meeting report to you all... | | | | | == Friend, I just departed Washington Dulles International Airport in DC following the RNC Winter Meeting and the 60th Presidential Inauguration. It has been the honor of my lifetime to serve as a member of the RNC Youth Advisory Council, and I hope to continue to serve in a role that impacts my generation over the next four years. Meeting Report: The 2025 Winter Meeting was largely ceremonial in nature. The only official business conducted at the meeting were the elections for Chairman, Co-Chairman, Treasurer, and Secretary of the RNC. I am pleased to report that Chairman Whatley was unanimously re-elected as Chairman of the Republican National Committee. Under his leadership, we saw tremendous increases in Fundraising, voter turnout, early voting, and Gen Z involvement. As he continues his work as Chairman, I am sure we will continue to see our gains increase over the next two years under his stewardship. Lara Trump has officially left her role as Co-Chair of the RNC as of the general session on 1/17/2025. Her time at the RNC helped lead us to the tremendous victory we saw in November, and she has helped reshape the RNC to be a lean and mean operation whose sole intention is to elect Republicans up and down the ballot. Now that she has departed, the RNC members elected KC Crosbie as Co-Chair. KC has been the RNC's treasurer for the last two years, and I have gotten to know her during my time on the Youth Advisory Council. She will be a fantastic co-chair, and she was President Trump's choice for this role. Following those elections, the 168 elected Joe Gruters as treasurer to replace KC. Our secretary, Vicki Drummond, has also been re-elected to another two-year term. All of the proposed Resolutions at the Winter Meeting were tabled until the upcoming Spring Training Meeting. In other news, following the reorganizational meeting, the RNC promoted Mike Ambrosini, who previously directed State Party Strategies, to Chief of Staff, replacing Trump Co-Campaign Manager Chris LaCavita. Mike has become a dear friend, and I am excited to see him take on this new role with the exceptionalism he has shown over the past two years. The RNC Winter Meeting concluded the official business at around 2:00 PM EST on 1/17/2025. Throughout the meeting, we attended several receptions at the Omni Shoreham in DC with the membership and guests, including a Victory Reception with Speaker of the House Mike Johnson. The Inauguration: Several unforeseen changes were made to the plans for President Trump's Inauguration, mainly the change of venue from the West Steps to the Rotunda of the Capitol. It was bitterly cold in DC this week--ask anyone who attended, and they will tell you! According to President Trump and his team, there were no security threats related to the change of venue, so please rest easy that no significant threat to the Inauguration contributed to the decision to move the ceremony indoors. I had the honor of attending the Swearing-In ceremony inside Emancipation Hall at the Capitol with Governors from across the country, Danica Patrick, Jake & Logan Paul, Conner McGregor, and many other VIP attendees of the inauguration. It was a bittersweet experience to be at the Capitol, knowing that my fellow Coloradans and attendees worldwide were excluded from the festivities, except for the lucky few thousand who were at Capitol One Arena in Chinatown. Following the Inaugural Ceremony, I attended the Liberty Presidential Inaugural Ball at the convention center in DC. With 13,000 of my closest friends, we watched with tearful eyes as President Trump, Vice President Vance, Melania, and Usha Vance danced to the American Trilogy by Elvis Presley to commemorate their return to the White House for the second time. This was my second time attending a Presidential Inauguration, and I cannot say how touching it was to see the end of my 8 years of work and dedication to President Trump and his movement to Make America Great Again come to an end. This event was the culmination of the endless hours of work done by myself, every staffer, volunteer, and activist from across the country, and it was the most beautiful ending to the story we could have had. I had tears in my eyes from the moment I stepped into the Capitol until I left the convention center that night. This movement has meant so much to me, and I genuinely have dedicated almost half of my life to it, and I could not be more grateful for the trust that my supporters have placed in me, and for the opportunity to have been part of this historic movement. | | At the Liberty Ball. | | At the Swearing in Ceremony in Emancipation Hall. | | President Trump and VP Vance Speaking to supporters in Emancipation Hall. | | My mom Laurel and I dancing to Jason Aldean at the Liberty Ball, overcome with emotions. | | My mom Laurel and I attending the RNC Victory Reception. | | My mom Laurel and I at the Liberty Ball. | | Attending the National Tea Party Patriots Reception with Laurel Imer and RNC Committeeman Randy Corporon. | | Cigars with Steve and Mark Barlock, two of the biggest Trump Supporters I know! | | Laurel and I with our guests to the Inauguration, Mr. Jonathan Leddy (right) , and Mr. Mikhal Hetherington (left of Laurel). Mr. Matt McCullough also in attendance! | | With Jake and Logan Paul in Emancipation Hall at the Capitol. | | Laurel and I with Speaker Mike Johnson! | | Myself & my guest Mikhal with Laurel & her guest Jonathan on Pennsylvania Ave! | In Closing: I hope that the closing of this chapter of my story in this political movement marks the start of a new chapter for not only our country but for the millions of people who, like me, have placed their faith in President Trump and given their all to Making America Great Again. I am looking forward to whatever comes next. Until then, I will continue to advocate for my generation to continue to have a seat at the table in Republican Politics. This is not the end, but just the beginning because, as Frank Sinatra put it, The Best Is Yet To Come! Until I am told otherwise, I will continue to work on behalf of the RNC Youth Advisory Council to engage Gen Z, recruit more Gen Z voters, and train, empower, and energize the Trump base as we ramp up for the 2026 midterms. Thank you again for your support, and I hope you have appreciated my report on the 2025 RNC Winter Meeting and the Inauguration of President Trump and Vice President Vance. Best, | | == | | == | Weston D. * **TOP NEWS**

"**7 police officers wounded in San Antonio shooting,** " via AP**** -- "Seven San Antonio police officers were shot while responding to a "suicide in progress" call and the suspect was later found dead inside an apartment after a standoff, the city's police chief said.

The officers were shot Wednesday night and a SWAT team was called to the Stone Oak neighborhood, San Antonio Police Chief **Bill McManus** said early Thursday. After several hours, the suspect was dead but it wasn't immediately known how he died, McManus said.

He described the suspect as a man in his 40s and said the original call to police came from a family member.

Earlier, McManus had said four officers were wounded and none of those officers' injuries were believed to be life-threatening. In his later remarks, he didn't address the specific conditions of the officers." TOP NEWS "7 police officers wounded in San Antonio shooting, " via AP** -- "Seven San Antonio police officers were shot while responding to a "suicide in progress" call and the suspect was later found dead inside an apartment after a standoff, the city's police chief said. The officers were shot Wednesday night and a SWAT team was called to the Stone Oak neighborhood, San Antonio Police Chief Bill McManus said early Thursday. After several hours, the suspect was dead but it wasn't immediately known how he died, McManus said. He described the suspect as a man in his 40s and said the original call to police came from a family member. Earlier, McManus had said four officers were wounded and none of those officers' injuries were believed to be life-threatening. In his later remarks, he didn't address the specific conditions of the officers." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. * **TOP NEWS**

“**7 police officers wounded in San Antonio shooting,** ” via AP**** — “Seven San Antonio police officers were shot while responding to a “suicide in progress” call and the suspect was later found dead inside an apartment after a standoff, the city’s police chief said.

The officers were shot Wednesday night and a SWAT team was called to the Stone Oak neighborhood, San Antonio Police Chief **Bill McManus** said early Thursday. After several hours, the suspect was dead but it wasn’t immediately known how he died, McManus said.

name: Water Filtration System
subject: China Attacks US Water Supply
body:
Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown...
| | | [](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19974/6374453/a6c45e1eaa58e99083f5e10dec2dbb8af46efdcc/a977c46818dc57379ed81ddb47801924a9b9b9a5)
---
| | |
---
_January 23rd, 2025_
---
| | |
---
**SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. WATER SUPPLY**
---
---
**_FBI's Urgent Warning Has Been All Over The News_** Chinese hackers are coming for the water supply in your hometown. Attacking city water systems, biding their time and waiting for China's signal to strike. Experts warn that Russia and Iran are also targeting attacks on our city water systems. Overflowing, damaging and poisoning the lifegiving systems that we trust to keep us safe. Like it or not, your local tap water may be our country's weakest link. Deteriorating infrastructure. Systems years beyond their expiration dates. Negligent corporations. And God-knows-what in the water we drink. We're up against arsenic, plastics, chlorine, forever chemicals, hormone-altering drug residue and a host of other contaminants. Listen, I'm not trying to be the messenger of doom... **But protecting the water supply in your home is more important than ever.** If you don't take steps to be prepared, you and your family could end up vulnerable. Forced to choose between drinking poisoned, toxic or dirty water, or going without water altogether. It sounds harsh... But the truth is that even good people with good intentions can make serious mistakes. Mistakes like... **Getting filters that claim to purify your water, but don't prove it.** If a company doesn't have certifications from a third-party lab, show lab tests or reveal how many gallons were tested... that's a bad sign. After a couple gallons, most water filters on the market stop working for scary contaminants and start passing them into your water. **Getting bottled water with a 2-year shelf life and risking plastic leaching into your supply.** Not to mention all the money you'll waste, and the work required to carry cases of water. Plus with bottled water, you never really know what's been filtered out. **Or simply using a pitcher in the fridge... with slapshot filtration power and limited capacity.** Most pitchers hold a couple cups of water at a time. Not nearly enough to drink, cook and clean in an emergency. You'll run out in no time, just when your life depends on it. Well we have great news to share... Folks have been calling... Folks have been emailing... Folks have been leaving Facebook messages asking about our just-released... **NEW AND IMPROVED...** [**The Ultimate Water Filtration System!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19974/6374453/a6c45e1eaa58e99083f5e10dec2dbb8af46efdcc/a977c46818dc57379ed81ddb47801924a9b9b9a5)
---
[](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19974/6374453/a6c45e1eaa58e99083f5e10dec2dbb8af46efdcc/a977c46818dc57379ed81ddb47801924a9b9b9a5)
---
**But hurry – we have limited stock, and these Ultimate Water Filtration Systems are first-come first-served. We only have a small number of units to go around.** [**Get Your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19974/6374453/a6c45e1eaa58e99083f5e10dec2dbb8af46efdcc/a977c46818dc57379ed81ddb47801924a9b9b9a5) The best part is... **_This advanced filtration technology filters the nastiest, filthiest, bacteria-riddled and parasite infested water using no chemicals, no electricity and no moving parts!_** It's powered by the same technology that the U.S. Military and NASA trust to filter their water. But now available for you in your home. You're among the first to get access to these advanced, carbon-block water filters designed to filter water on your countertop at a sub-micron level without power or water hookup. **So you can reduce...** Harmful Bacteria – up to 99.9999%
Life-Threatening Viruses – up to 99.99%
Disease-Carrying Cysts – up to 99.9% Plus, this table-top unit targets 140+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more. All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. **The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same...** But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. **But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while.** In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. [**Now we've just got a fresh batch in.**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19974/6374453/a6c45e1eaa58e99083f5e10dec2dbb8af46efdcc/a977c46818dc57379ed81ddb47801924a9b9b9a5) And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. **And YES there's a payment plan!** Yes, right now, you can get your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems on a convenient, no-credit-check payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the **peace of mind** knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. [**Get Your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19974/6374453/a6c45e1eaa58e99083f5e10dec2dbb8af46efdcc/a977c46818dc57379ed81ddb47801924a9b9b9a5) To your survival, Frank Bates
Patriot Headquarters P.S. Derrick loves the convenience of his Ultimate Water Filtration System: _"It was so easy to install. Within minutes we had water that tasted so good, we couldn't believe it. We don't like the chlorine in tap water and we got tired of lugging around cases of bottled water."_ **Customers Love Their Ultimate Water Filtration System!**
---
---
**Cyndi L.**
"No question... beats the competition. After reviewing several other companies and seeing that I was not the only one thinking this way, as everyone was sold out of products, I decided to go with 4Patriots. They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products seemed above average to others." **Michael B.**
"Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time." **Faith P.**
"Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water." **Carol B.**
"Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and delicious." **Rick O.**
"Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you." **Thomas P.**
"Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very happy with my water filter. Not only does our water now taste good (it tasted dirty from the tap) but the large capacity tank means I'm not refilling small pitchers repeatedly during the day." [**Get Your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems Rushed To You At This Special Pricing Plus All Your FREE Bonuses While Supplies Last!**](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/19974/6374453/a6c45e1eaa58e99083f5e10dec2dbb8af46efdcc/a977c46818dc57379ed81ddb47801924a9b9b9a5)

Harmful Bacteria – up to 99.9999% Life-Threatening Viruses – up to 99.99% Disease-Carrying Cysts – up to 99.9% Plus, this table-top unit targets 140+ dangerous contaminants from your tap water, including bacteria, viruses, toxic chemicals, arsenic, heavy metals, pharmaceuticals, VOCs and more. All in the same, best-selling system thousands of Americans trust in their homes. The NEW & improved Filtration System may look the same... But on the inside, these proprietary filters pack an even bigger punch than before. They're MORE reliable and easier to replace, too. So you get safer, cleaner water for you and your family. But we have very limited stock, and we've been sold out of this filtration powerhouse for a while. In fact, it's been a very long while. Months and months, actually. And if you need to take it with you? No problem. You're not tied to it like a whole-house filtration system. That kind of thing won't do you any good if you need to bug out. And YES there's a payment plan! Yes, right now, you can get your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems on a convenient, no-credit-check payment plan. We know you're good for it. You'll have the peace of mind knowing that you're doing everything you can to keep your family safer, by securing your Ultimate Water Filtration Systems today for fresher, cleaner water for years to come. To your survival, Frank Bates Patriot Headquarters P.S. Derrick loves the convenience of his Ultimate Water Filtration System: "It was so easy to install. Within minutes we had water that tasted so good, we couldn't believe it. We don't like the chlorine in tap water and we got tired of lugging around cases of bottled water." Customers Love Their Ultimate Water Filtration System! Cyndi L. "No question... beats the competition. After reviewing several other companies and seeing that I was not the only one thinking this way, as everyone was sold out of products, I decided to go with 4Patriots. They seem to be good people who are very helpful and their products seemed above average to others." Michael B. "Saves me a ton of money and grocery-store headaches. During the pandemic, water wasn't always available. Not so with the Purifier. We love it and I have 5 gallons of water on hand all the time." Faith P. "Water you can actually trust. This is so much better than storing gallons and gallons of bottled water. This enables us to make existing, natural water sources drinkable. I feel really good knowing that in an emergency situation, we'd be able to filter our water." Carol B. "Stop worrying about what's in the water! We use our system for drinking and cooking but you can use it almost anywhere. It's easy to use and it doesn't take long to filter. The water tastes pure and delicious." Rick O. "Easiest way to upgrade your drinking water. We chose this one because it handles everything and it's affordable. You never know when things will go out on you." Thomas P. "Finally, I don't have to keep refilling my pitcher all day. I'm very happy with my water filter. Not only does our water now taste good (it tasted dirty from the tap) but the large capacity tank means I'm not refilling small pitchers repeatedly during the day." | | | | | MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the person or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Email%20Logo.png] [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Sam%20Headshot.png]
ACROSS THE COMMONWEALTH
VOTE TODAY! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Make%20A%20Plan%20To%20Vote.png]
You can vote for November's elections NOW! Vote at your Registrar's office during business hours. Saturday early voting is available October 28th and November 4th. Learn More [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
Find your local Registrar's office here: https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup [https://vote.elections.virginia.gov/VoterInformation/PublicContactLookup]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/VWCC.jpeg] 15 years of the Community College Access Program at VWCC
Learn More [https://www.wdbj7.com/2023/09/26/virginia-western-celebrates-15th-anniversary-ccap-program/] CCAP is a successful public/private partnership that pays the cost of tuition for three years at Virginia Western Community College if a qualified student does not have sufficient financial aid to pay tuition costs.
This program has helped over 4,200 students achieve higher education!
CANDIDATE SPOTLIGHT
https://karenforvirginia.com/ [https://karenforvirginia.com/] Karen Jenkins for HB-89
Donate Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/karenforvirginia] Karen Jenkins is a life-long resident of the City of Suffolk. Throughout her lifetime she has passionately advocated for others and currently serves on the Suffolk School Board with a proven track record and history of accomplishments. She is running for the House of Delegates for the 89th District to continue delivering results for the people of Virginia.
She is a champion for education, public safety and mental health. As your next Delegate for the 89th District, she will continue to fight and vote for meaningful policies and legislation to support the needs of the district. At the state level, she will be positioned to write and sponsor bills and laws to benefit the schools and communities in the 89th District and throughout the commonwealth.
LOCAL CANDIDATE EVENTS
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/lily%20canvass.png]
Canvass for Lily Franklin!
On Sundays, join Team Lily at the South County Library Parking Lot from 12 - 12:30 pm for a Roanoke canvassing event!
Bring your walking shoes, a charged cell phone, and water. When you arrive to their launch location you will receive a brief training and literature before being sent out to turf. Questions? Email Beth at egunter3@gmail.com [egunter3@gmail.com] or call 540-353-3645.
South County Library Parking Lot, 6303 Merriman Rd, Roanoke, VA 24018
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/sam%20and%20trish.jpg]
Canvass for Sam and Trish!
*this is a place holder until the new facebook event is created*
Join us Sunday to canvass for Sam and Trish! Meet our Field Coordinator, Dom, on September 3rd at the Williamson Road Library, 12:00pm.
Located at 3837 Williamson Rd, Roanoke, VA 24012.
IN THE COMMUNITY
https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424 [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke River Contamination Settlement Reached Roanoke Young Democrats Canvass Tailgate
Without current regulations, the water contamination caused by these companies could have been so much worse. Come out to support Roanoke Valley Democratic candidates!
Read More [https://roanoke.com/news/local/source-of-forever-chemical-in-roanoke-river-to-pay-1-billion-settlement/article_da6f7bca-598f-11ee-881b-8bac139e59c4.html?fbclid=IwAR1qjW8zAjGrPndXAdQUujaypWNYnxc5JZCyD7FVTO7RJLbp9BBceVPyfq4#tracking-source=home-top-story] The Roanoke Young Democrats will be enjoying pizza, coffee, donuts and more before canvassing to knock for Trish White-Boyd, Sam Rasoul, Lily Franklin, Samantha Newell, Jade Harris, & Nancy Horn. Door knocking will begin about 12:30 pm!
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/275519338709424]
Roanoke EnVision Center Kids Movie Night - Sept. 28 Fall Harvest Festival
The movie is free and there will be snacks and much more! Fall into wellness at the Harvest Festival!
Read More Celebrate the end of farm season with fun experiences for the whole family. Try new activities to support your well-being. Connect with others in a beautiful outdoor space. Free meals available with registration. This event is free and open to everyone!
Read More [https://web.cvent.com/event/19422342-be4f-417d-9fc3-6a6bf883e794/summary]
https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992 [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/ [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game - Oct. 1 Henrietta Lacks Statue Unveiling - Oct. 4
Join us for the 6th Annual Carilion Clinic vs. Lewis Gale Charity Softball Game, being held at the Home of the Salem Red Sox - Carilion Clinic Field. A dignified sculpture will commemorate the ongoing and long unrecognized contributions of Roanoke native Henrietta Lacks, who unknowingly provided the world with the HeLa cell, fueling decades of life-saving and life changing research.
Physicians, nurses and administrators will suit up for each hospital during the nine-inning contest. Proceeds will benefit the American Heart Association. Unveiling is October 4th at 11 am at Henrietta Lacks Plaza.
Admission is $5 at the gate, kids under 10 free. Gates open at 1pm and the game starts at 2pm. 410 3rd St SW, Roanoke, VA 24011
Read More [https://www.facebook.com/events/3583390115210992] Read More [https://roanokehiddenhistories.org/]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RCDC.jpeg] Join the Roanoke City Democrats!
Roanoke City Democratic Committee meetings are now in-person and open to non-members. We meet the 3rd Thursday of each month. This month we are meeting at 6 pm at the Main Library (706 S Jefferson St, Roanoke, VA 24016). Sign up for meeting reminders and other information here [https://www.roanokedemocrats.com/subscribe] .
Join us for a social hour every first Thursday of the month at Leonore Restaurant, 128 Campbell St. SW, 5-7 pm.
Join Roanoke Young Dems! [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/RYD.png]
Meetings occur on the first Monday and third Sunday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies.
Contact: YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com [YoungDemocratsRoanoke@gmail.com] to get involved!
Donate Today! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/samrasoul]
Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime.
My very best,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93159/images/Screen%20Shot%202022-07-29%20at%203.44.06%20PM%20%281%29.png]
Del. Sam Rasoul

name: Team WFP
subject: Shock and awe
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | Peter, Donald Trump’s second — and final — term as president is now underway, and so far, it’s every bit as chaotic and disorienting as we feared. And that’s because the goal of ANY tyrannical regime is to start so many political fires that the opposition can’t react fast enough. It’s the playbook they used in 2017, and they’re using it again now. Some of the key actions from Trump so far include:
* Pardoning and commuting the sentences of over 1,500 participants in the January 6th insurrection, including far-right extremists from the Proud Boys and Oath Keepers who were convicted on charges of violent offenses and seditious conspiracy.
* Preparing to increase deportations of immigrants as soon as this week, and giving ICE the explicit authority to stage raids on churches and schools.
* Reversing Biden’s Executive Order that would have lowered prescription drug prices for millions of people on Medicare.
* Withdrawing the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement AND the World Health Organization.
* Quickly ingratiating himself with the tech billionaires in charge of virtually every major social media platform in the country — giving them seats of honor at the inauguration and even within his administration.
* And much, much more.

It’s all a lot to take in. But we can’t allow ourselves to be swept away in the media frenzy, or to tune out entirely. **Instead, we are going to remain laser focused on our own strategy: of building a strong, multiracial, working class movement.** One that is sharing vital resources with our neighbors. One that affirms that the status quo has NOT been working for working people — and keeps the spotlight on the billionaire class and their attempts to divide us. And one that is aggressively applying pressure on state and federal officials to utilize all the tools in their arsenal to combat Trump, legislatively and in the courts. **If you agree with this strategy, please consider making WFP your political home in 2025.** Here are a few ways you can get involved:
1. [Join our first post-inauguration Mass Call TONIGHT, January 23rd, from 8-9pm ET. We’ll be breaking down the first week of Trump’s administration, and laying the groundwork for how to combat him.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbGj-ca0TYSsYMZBvIweYdJxZAP5xLg1YZaKIinIFmIxwneR9YUH85oX6XyKoEwATL_hbR3LKU0fNB3u-IwAuIw6eoJf95_6OrWTgrsK2klIHz2ev-YR0cLIhi2gtH9vRgQUC_KZNc89H9TVxcqD0nYaur_xbF7Yg0M2JvA0FMBKpaMLFKBQIpC5SleFwykNtRjcqy1CVwgtNYE1f4YbXeLeETxwHWhIEj584CER1BK0Iaycfx9Dpj9QKiKjuCrIMA/4de/B090dN2uSli00_wJPvTr2g/h0/h001.lj6TxK0A1SnnkdtDJuFab-d0VIhGlpaD9p9I-4Dj5qg)

2. [Sign up for our next candidate recruitment training — Working Folks Win! — on February 5th. We can’t rely on the Democratic establishment to right the ship. clean_body: | | | Peter, Donald Trump’s second — and final — term as president is now underway, and so far, it’s every bit as chaotic and disorienting as we feared. And that’s because the goal of ANY tyrannical regime is to start so many political fires that the opposition can’t react fast enough. It’s the playbook they used in 2017, and they’re using it again now. Some of the key actions from Trump so far include: Pardoning and commuting the sentences of over 1,500 participants in the January 6th insurrection, including far-right extremists from the Proud Boys and Oath Keepers who were convicted on charges of violent offenses and seditious conspiracy. Preparing to increase deportations of immigrants as soon as this week, and giving ICE the explicit authority to stage raids on churches and schools. Reversing Biden’s Executive Order that would have lowered prescription drug prices for millions of people on Medicare. Withdrawing the U.S. from the Paris Climate Agreement AND the World Health Organization. Quickly ingratiating himself with the tech billionaires in charge of virtually every major social media platform in the country — giving them seats of honor at the inauguration and even within his administration. And much, much more. It’s all a lot to take in. But we can’t allow ourselves to be swept away in the media frenzy, or to tune out entirely. Instead, we are going to remain laser focused on our own strategy: of building a strong, multiracial, working class movement. One that is sharing vital resources with our neighbors. One that affirms that the status quo has NOT been working for working people — and keeps the spotlight on the billionaire class and their attempts to divide us. And one that is aggressively applying pressure on state and federal officials to utilize all the tools in their arsenal to combat Trump, legislatively and in the courts. If you agree with this strategy, please consider making WFP your political home in 2025. Here are a few ways you can get involved: 1. 2. 3. Most importantly, don’t give into despair. Trump and his team promised they would “rain shock and awe” down on all of us at the start of his presidency. That’s exactly what they’ve been trying to do this week. But how we respond, and what we do next, is entirely in our hands. When we come together, we have the power. And if we continue to stick together, we can and will see this through. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. body:
It’s what the Federal Government owes EVERY American

|
---
| | | **UNITED STATES GOVERNMENT AUDIT:[ACTIVE](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2c0924a237a4ad5bd9db5523664bf93&_e=ubp8GqfeikGKxic8gildkxU7ZANh-GuP5wUbwqxhgYNXOPhf4FixTiDaoo7WHkvlgo6vroAmustZzoOqkqVASGT-CCFrWcSsokAsxWkDulfnVI_JhXJGErBCXyV5HaXRa1LTqVOaYKYJqOKdizTvm2NZ0ogqcppdrgwNsjiDWJf4KJxUP8o0-wrCfOArWQRDki0RPWPjOoVdje46pu7141qwLoDWJC3AD6AHty-CFubI75EIIdF0huTwkKWLlRBrSTSBgmmJtuzmb2kdXl9tLBUfzGWFXrMDCQzLOlIPmxvRuTPfyVQW8PEwIGw3ojANOzZo_YHefnmF5Z31km7BAUN5ufVFnwHyVzPa3VzJwHhR4to6FMeU_A-MiU1KO5k2iXLbuq-x50Q3ZOq9JcLUL2t_jYedv3mveZXlqUL9t_fnYmTlEImO4rHfZbPc5vRgBK484ac4LFeyNi9FypsGAQ%3D%3D "ACTIVE")

Friend's Assessment: [INCOMPLETE](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2c0924a237a4ad5bd9db5523664bf93&_e=ubp8GqfeikGKxic8gildkxU7ZANh-GuP5wUbwqxhgYNXOPhf4FixTiDaoo7WHkvlgo6vroAmustZzoOqkqVASGT-CCFrWcSsokAsxWkDulfnVI_JhXJGErBCXyV5HaXRa1LTqVOaYKYJqOKdizTvm2NZ0ogqcppdrgwNsjiDWJf4KJxUP8o0-wrCfOArWQRDki0RPWPjOoVdje46pu7141qwLoDWJC3AD6AHty-CFubI75EIIdF0huTwkKWLlRBrSTSBgmmJtuzmb2kdXl9tLBUfzGWFXrMDCQzLOlIPmxvRuTPfyVQW8PEwIGw3ojANu8kvJxlO8H4chtivOq2uCylCGjG3FOdnH6vWm4mzC34URz-BWdFlKyd4xrqhYzKvlEBinenJEJztjU6QXnfbqCCjrIvtH1Oxhgkf9GplaweBzNu-4bBI656GDozI8CwK5iDrdyUlY0pjYqpQQaj9Rg%3D%3D "INCOMPLETE")**
---

Friend,

**We have a 24-hour window to demand transparency from the federal government._The clock is ticking._**

As we stand at the crossroads of a new era of conservative leadership in Washington, one thing is clear: _**it's high time we shine a light on the federal government's reckless spending habits.**_

Think about it: _the same bureaucrats who were supposed to serve the American people have been squandering billions on wasteful programs and projects._ It's nothing short of a betrayal of the public trust.

That's why **we're launching a comprehensive audit of the federal government - to uncover the truth about where your tax dollars are really going.** But we need your input, and we need it NOW.

---
| | [TAKE THE GOVERNMENT AUDIT NOW](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2c0924a237a4ad5bd9db5523664bf93&_e=ubp8GqfeikGKxic8gildkxU7ZANh-GuP5wUbwqxhgYNXOPhf4FixTiDaoo7WHkvlgo6vroAmustZzoOqkqVASGT-CCFrWcSsokAsxWkDulfnVI_JhXJGErBCXyV5HaXRa1LTqVOaYKYJqOKdizTvm2NZ0ogqcppdrgwNsjiDWJf4KJxUP8o0-wrCfOArWQRDki0RPWPjOoVdje46pu7141qwLoDWJC3AD6AHty-CFubI75EIIdF0huTwkKWLlRBrSTSBgmmJtuzmb2kdXl9tLBUfzGWFXrMDCQzLOlIPmxvRuTPfyVQW8PEwIGw3ojAND9n1aLua9X46AIknxgjeGpkOanKKuPINO4hNu470BKCZJqu58OHLUYcPVswzhYZ9jRnhuLMK0QRMqYDt7Ia1wGSwXnXzVtevphgY3YikKdMJs4PhX5Fol-kE7kPupSKlciaJ9TliPg4DFynd1fmppg%3D%3D "TAKE THE GOVERNMENT AUDIT NOW")
---

_**You have just 24 hours to take our Government Audit.**_ If we don't get enough support, the bureaucrats will continue to get away with their wasteful spending.

We want to know: which areas of government do you think need the most scrutiny? Where do you think we can cut wasteful spending and restore fiscal responsibility?

Please make this a priority, Friend. **It 's critical to ensure transparency at _every level of our government. _**

---
| | [TAKE THE GOVERNMENT AUDIT NOW](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e2c0924a237a4ad5bd9db5523664bf93&_e=ubp8GqfeikGKxic8gildkxU7ZANh-GuP5wUbwqxhgYNXOPhf4FixTiDaoo7WHkvlgo6vroAmustZzoOqkqVASGT-CCFrWcSsokAsxWkDulfnVI_JhXJGErBCXyV5HaXRa1LTqVOaYKYJqOKdizTvm2NZ0ogqcppdrgwNsjiDWJf4KJxUP8o0-wrCfOArWQRDki0RPWPjOoVdje46pu7141qwLoDWJC3AD6AHty-CFubI75EIIdF0huTwkKWLlRBrSTSBgmmJtuzmb2kdXl9tLBUfzGWFXrMDCQzLOlIPmxvRuTPfyVQW8PEwIGw3ojANzSwPLcdlnvIzD0FgGxhG_3_7usV2jRlh8K0iEy-sdu184hXvdjEgL-hkNpaD2yDq4mWjlq7wppZdpx5-yWOJFVg3XoHI5GLyAWHaYMgCiwMMX2dKLBNWqzeuWCgbR2jZrsG4vXdn1omLlcmm7Alp1A%3D%3D "TAKE THE GOVERNMENT AUDIT NOW")

In my nearly 15 years as an attorney I've made connections through formal projects, legal cases, and personal friendships with federal employees across the federal government. This spans the Department of Labor, Department of Justice, the White House, and more. These experiences have given me access to insights not generally available to the public on the inner workings of government.
This week my phone buzzed with more concerned private messages than at any point over the last decade plus. And each message related the same confidential memo from the Acting Attorney General. A memo that bans all DEIA initiatives in the federal government and threatens "adverse consequences" for federal employees who don't snitch on their colleagues. Fascism has come to America, and we must take it seriously. I produce the text of the memo below, and my analysis. **Let 's Address This.**
**Quick Ask!** I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe and join more than 98,000 fellow activists.**

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4e3a063a-d0ba-419f-83f8-15ed65caed6e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
For starters, we knew this fascist policy was coming as Project 2025 laid it out in detail. I wrote about this last July in an article titled, [Project 2025 Attacks Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion](https://substack.com/redirect/c8a6dfd2-191f-4525-92ec-8b7d4669737c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), stating and warning:
> Project 2025 views DEI as the source of all ills in America. It is dead set on returning our government and business hiring practices to the Jim Crow era, a time when Black people, Asians, Latinos, and women had no meaningful opportunity for an equal shot at admission, a job, a loan, or a promotion. A Project 2025 administration will absolutely further normalize discrimination against people of color and women, not to mention LGBTQ+ Americans.
The 1-page fascist memo begins with a heading of who it is from, who it is for, and what is the subject matter. I am using a letter sent by a colleague at the DOJ, however I received similar letters from colleagues across multiples federal departments.

Office of the Attorney General

Washington, D.C. 20530

January 22, 2025

MEMORANDUM FOR ALL DEPARTMENT EMPLOYEES

FROM: THE ACTING ATTORNEY GENERAL

SUBJECT: Closure of Diversity, Equity, Inclusion & Accessibility (DEIA)

Programs at the Department of Justice (DOJ)
The memo starts by citing Donald Trump's executive order as the reason behind the move to end all DEIA initiatives and contracts at the Department of Justice.

We are taking steps to close all DOJ DEIA offices and end all DEIA-related contracts in accordance with President Trump's executive orders titled "Ending Radical and Wasteful Government DEI Programs and Preferencing and Initial Rescissions of Harmful Executive Orders and Actions."
Then the memo takes an even more sinister turn with it first set of fabrications, stating:

These programs divided Americans by race, wasted taxpayer dollars, and resulted in shameful discrimination.
Let's address each of these allegations one by one, because they are all patently false.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-D-D4-EcFpZtO1tEMTziWHQhPh7K0-eL0nlXjuxvz2Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155507023)
### DEIA and Race
DEIA programs have not "divided Americans by race." The purpose of DEIA programs is to ensure a given organization builds strategy and leadership that meaningfully represents the needs of the people it is serving. In this case, a Federal Government that is supposed to serve all Americans regardless of cast, color, or creed. MAGAs understand this concept, even if they refuse to admit this concept. Who can forget President Donald Trump's January 20, 2025 inauguration speech when he said:
> We will move with purpose and speed to bring back hope, prosperity, safety and peace **for citizens of every race, religion, color and creed**.
I hate to break it to MAGAs, but what Donald Trump is talking about only happens with a focus on diversity, equity, inclusion, and accessibility. You cannot bring prosperity to "every race, religion, color, and creed" without first ensuring you are including them in an equitable way in our society. What Trump declared as his inaugural mission is literally what DEIA accomplishes.
### DEIA and Taxpayer Dollars
Moreover, far from "wasting taxpayer dollars," study after study shows that DEIA initiatives save organizations money and increase profitability. Forbes cites numerous studies to report [that](https://substack.com/redirect/789950d8-179b-4c80-afe1-53a48a7163ff?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg),
> Numerous prior studies have proven that diverse workforces perform better than companies without diverse talent and an inclusive culture. According to the Claremont Graduate University's Drucker Institute as [reported](https://substack.com/redirect/fa701273-aa37-4ed5-9fe7-8acbe85228be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the _Wall Street Journal_ , "the 512 firms with a leader in an explicit DEI role scored, on average, significantly higher in nearly all of the elements of its rankings than the 190 companies lacking such a position."**** Companies were evaluated on "customer satisfaction, employee engagement and development, innovation, social responsibility and financial strength." Research from**** Great Place to Work found that diverse and inclusive companies have employee retention rates [5.4 times higher](https://substack.com/redirect/7be3338c-581d-489f-b7b9-04ff272957cc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) than non-inclusive companies.
And, as this [detailed analysis](https://substack.com/redirect/2ee0579c-b038-4924-8c5a-ff6ebd127bd5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from McKinsey and Company demonstrates, gender and ethnic diversity in leadership demonstrably results in major increases in financial outperformance. Far from "wasting taxpayer dollars," as the fascist memo claims, DEIA initiatives maximize the impact of taxpayer dollars.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/64e12f01-6c2a-4cf0-bd5b-3134328960de?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
### DEIA and Discrimination
Finally, the fascist memo's claim that DEIA initiatives "resulted in shameful discrimination" is a not-so-veiled claim of the made up "anti-white" discrimination that MAGAs insist exists. It is of no surprise that the fascist memo, nor any Trump document, can provide examples or evidence of this alleged discrimination caused by DEIA. First, because the entire purpose of DEIA is to work against racial discrimination by ensuring everyone has the opportunity to contribute and be included in an equitable and accessible way. And second, because discrimination on the basis of nationality is already banned--so if someone is discriminated against because they are Italian, or Jewish, or Black, or Asian, or any ethnicity--federal law already protects them for their immutable characteristics.
In reality, MAGAs are upset that women, people with disabilities, people of color, Indigenous, and Black people are now _also_ included in the conversation of who gets to represent and lead our country. It reminds me of that old saying, "_When you 've had privilege your whole life, equality feels like oppression_."
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..-D-D4-EcFpZtO1tEMTziWHQhPh7K0-eL0nlXjuxvz2Y?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155507023)
### Fascist Surveillance and Fascist Orders
The memo then continues with a sinister statement about how the government is "aware" of people committing apparently secret DEIA. This suggests that the Trump administration is secretly surveilling its employees without their knowledge. Who really knows, as this administration could just as easily be lying to strike fear and chill free speech and expression. The memo then issues an order -- report anyone engaging in secret DEIA to DEIAtruth@opm.gov.

We are aware of efforts by some in government to disguise these programs by using coded or imprecise language. If you are aware of a change in any contract description or personnel position description since November 5, 2024 to obscure the connection between the contract and DEIA or similar ideologies, please report all facts and circumstances to DEIAtruth@opm.gov within 10 days.
This is a good time to remind you [that in 1933](https://substack.com/redirect/de4f29b2-0e12-4cd6-bff0-8f3c002f03ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), the Nazis issued a decree called the "For the Defense against Malicious Attacks against the Government," that required Germans to snitch on anyone who spoke against the party, its leaders, or the government. More recently in 2015, North Korea's dictator [issued a rule](https://substack.com/redirect/4907e631-b0c4-47f4-be78-3c360ea47f69?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that rewards citizens for snitching on other citizens speaking out against the government. And now in 2025, the United States government under MAGA fascism has issued a memo forcing its federal employees to snitch on other federal employees who support Diversity, Equity, Inclusion, and Accessibility. This is fascism, and it is expanding.
But you know, maybe we should all email our DEIA concerns to DEIAtruth@opm.gov?
Perhaps you know of someone in the Vice President's office who is Scottish-Irish American and married to an Indian American, and they have mixed race children. That is **Diversity** and clearly a crime per this fascist memo.
Or maybe you know someone at the Department of Labor who is requiring accessibility ramps in front of all buildings for people who use wheelchairs--like for Texas Governor Greg Abbott. That form of **Accessibility** is clearly a threat per this fascist memo and the person requiring that accessibility should be reported.
I, for one, will be reporting a White House employee who insists, "_We will move with purpose and speed to bring back hope, prosperity, safety and peace for citizens of every race, religion, color and creed_." That type of **Equity and Inclusion** has no place in modern America, per this fascist memo, and we need to ensure he is fired from his job immediately. Who agrees?
If so, please email DEIAtruth@opm.gov and report him immediately.
### Fascist Threats
Finally, the fascist memo concludes with a written threat. I warned of this threat in my article last July when I wrote:
> Project 2025 absolutely will fine, punish, and arguably imprison for alleged racial discrimination anyone who even mentions the concepts of DEI. It is imperative, therefore, that we do not allow this fascist manifesto to become American policy.
The fascist memo concludes as follows:

There will be no adverse consequences for timely reporting this information. However, failure to report this information within 10 days may result in adverse consequences. Thank you for your attention to this important matter.
The daunting contrast of "comply and you'll be fine, refuse to snitch and you suffer" is simply horrifying. And that is likely the point of this cruelty.
While Trump claims he is a victim of weaponized government, this fascist memo is the actual and blatant weaponization of government power to silence and harm those who are already vulnerable. While Trump claims he will restore free speech, this fascist memo does the opposite and actively undermines free speech. While Trump claims January 20th was "Liberation Day" for "citizens of every race, religion, color, and creed," this fascist memo makes clear that only straight white evangelical Christian men are allowed. It serves as a stark reminder that while Trump's rhetoric may be riddled with lies, his actions speak volumes--and they are deeply dangerous to the principles of justice that should guide our government.

## Conclusion
I have said this before and it bears repeating--the MAGA claims that "DEI" stands for "Didn't Earn It" is truly remarkable because in reality, generating historic wealth through 2 billion acres of stolen land from Native Americans, enslaving Black people for 300 years, banning Asian immigration until 1965, and banning women from financial access til 1974--all without paying a single red cent in reparations or restitution--is the living breathing example of not earning it.
Indeed, every MAGA accusation is a confession.
I close instead with the wisdom of the late, great, Toni Morrison, whose books have been banned by many of these same right wing MAGA extremists. Morrison beautifully reminds us that:
> The function, the very serious function of racism is distraction. It keeps you from doing your work. It keeps you explaining, over and over again, your reason for being. Somebody says you have no language and you spend twenty years proving that you do. Somebody says your head isn't shaped properly so you have scientists working on the fact that it is. Somebody says you have no art, so you dredge that up. Somebody says you have no kingdoms, so you dredge that up. None of this is necessary. There will always be one more thing.
The MAGA agenda's elimination of DEIA programs serves this purpose precisely--advance white supremacy while distracting from the actual issues plaguing the American people. Issues like unaffordable housing, criminally low wages, the increasing climate crisis, and oh, apparently the high price of eggs--none of which are resolved by these sinister and fascist McCarthyism tactics.
I cannot tell federal employees what to do with their careers and livelihoods. I am hopeful, however, that they band together against these injustices and refuse to undermine each other's safety and security. I am hopeful they stand united as American citizens and neighbors, and reject this hateful injustice at its core. And in the meantime, I encourage all Americans to activate and organize locally and nationally to stop this fascism. That is how we form a more perfect Union.
**Before you go. I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement.**

That is Diversity and clearly a crime per this fascist memo. Or maybe you know someone at the Department of Labor who is requiring accessibility ramps in front of all buildings for people who use wheelchairs--like for Texas Governor Greg Abbott. That form of Accessibility is clearly a threat per this fascist memo and the person requiring that accessibility should be reported. I, for one, will be reporting a White House employee who insists, "We will move with purpose and speed to bring back hope, prosperity, safety and peace for citizens of every race, religion, color and creed." That type of Equity and Inclusion has no place in modern America, per this fascist memo, and we need to ensure he is fired from his job immediately. Who agrees? If so, please email DEIAtruth@opm.gov and report him immediately. Fascist Threats Finally, the fascist memo concludes with a written threat. I warned of this threat in my article last July when I wrote: Project 2025 absolutely will fine, punish, and arguably imprison for alleged racial discrimination anyone who even mentions the concepts of DEI. It is imperative, therefore, that we do not allow this fascist manifesto to become American policy. The fascist memo concludes as follows: There will be no adverse consequences for timely reporting this information. However, failure to report this information within 10 days may result in adverse consequences. Thank you for your attention to this important matter. The daunting contrast of "comply and you'll be fine, refuse to snitch and you suffer" is simply horrifying. And that is likely the point of this cruelty. While Trump claims he is a victim of weaponized government, this fascist memo is the actual and blatant weaponization of government power to silence and harm those who are already vulnerable. While Trump claims he will restore free speech, this fascist memo does the opposite and actively undermines free speech. While Trump claims January 20th was "Liberation Day" for "citizens of every race, religion, color, and creed," this fascist memo makes clear that only straight white evangelical Christian men are allowed. It serves as a stark reminder that while Trump's rhetoric may be riddled with lies, his actions speak volumes--and they are deeply dangerous to the principles of justice that should guide our government. Conclusion I have said this before and it bears repeating--the MAGA claims that "DEI" stands for "Didn't Earn It" is truly remarkable because in reality, generating historic wealth through 2 billion acres of stolen land from Native Americans, enslaving Black people for 300 years, banning Asian immigration until 1965, and banning women from financial access til 1974--all without paying a single red cent in reparations or restitution--is the living breathing example of not earning it. Indeed, every MAGA accusation is a confession. I close instead with the wisdom of the late, great, Toni Morrison, whose books have been banned by many of these same right wing MAGA extremists. Morrison beautifully reminds us that: The function, the very serious function of racism is distraction. It keeps you from doing your work. It keeps you explaining, over and over again, your reason for being. Somebody says you have no language and you spend twenty years proving that you do. Somebody says your head isn't shaped properly so you have scientists working on the fact that it is. Somebody says you have no art, so you dredge that up. Somebody says you have no kingdoms, so you dredge that up. None of this is necessary. There will always be one more thing. The MAGA agenda's elimination of DEIA programs serves this purpose precisely--advance white supremacy while distracting from the actual issues plaguing the American people. Issues like unaffordable housing, criminally low wages, the increasing climate crisis, and oh, apparently the high price of eggs--none of which are resolved by these sinister and fascist McCarthyism tactics. I cannot tell federal employees what to do with their careers and livelihoods. I am hopeful, however, that they band together against these injustices and refuse to undermine each other's safety and security. I am hopeful they stand united as American citizens and neighbors, and reject this hateful injustice at its core. And in the meantime, I encourage all Americans to activate and organize locally and nationally to stop this fascism. That is how we form a more perfect Union. Before you go. I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement.** | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Trump’s Second Term Off to a Flying Start
body:
Don’t Miss This Episode!

| | | | | |
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=4f2a5bd759&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | The No Doubt About It Podcast is back with an in-depth [look at the first week of President Trump’s second administration](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a39289b707&e=567664f14c)—and it’s already off to a blazing start!
---
[](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=a49baa84cf&e=567664f14c)
|
# What You’ll Hear in This Episode:
---
| **Trump 2.0: Lessons Learned**
We discuss how Trump’s first tour in the Oval Office has shaped his approach this time around. Krysty even draws a hilarious parallel to re-doing high school with all the knowledge you wish you had back then!
**Smart Strategy & Early Executive Orders **
Trump has targeted “low-hanging fruit”—issues that resonate with the majority of Americans. Mark breaks down why this is a brilliant move that sets a strong tone for the new administration.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=aa3c41e027&e=567664f14c)
---
| **New Mexico Legislative Session**
We shift gears to explore the upcoming New Mexico legislative session and the key issues that could have a significant impact on our local communities. Will our leaders finally address crime? They have a huge opportunity if they are willing to take it.
**Record-Breaking Cold Snap**
Lastly, we cover the jaw-dropping cold air mass that has delivered historically low temperatures across parts of New Mexico. Even the southern states weren’t spared, experiencing unbelievable snowfall in areas that rarely see a flake!
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=defc9927b9&e=567664f14c)
---
| This episode is brimming with insights, laughter, and real talk about what’s happening right now in our nation. Don’t miss this deep dive into Trump’s second term, New Mexico politics, and the winter weather chaos hitting the South.
---
|
---
| **Help Us Grow & Stay Informed **

[**Like, Rate & Subscribe:**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=daeae10c94&e=567664f14c) If you enjoy our show, please subscribe to the No Doubt About It Podcast on your favorite podcast platform and on YouTube. This simple action helps us reach more listeners eager for thoughtful discussions.
[**Consider Donating:**](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=bb867ee14c&e=567664f14c) Love our content? Support us by donating through our website. Every contribution helps us continue delivering engaging, up-to-the-minute topics that matter to you. Thank you for your continued support, and we can’t wait to hear your take on these hot-button issues!
Stay Warm & Informed,
Mark and Krysty Ronchetti _Hosts of the No Doubt About It Podcast_
