name: Hoover Institution
subject: Discover the Facts: Socialism and Capitalism Explained
body:
Peter Berkowitz on Socialism and Capitalism

| | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff9f425a7f4f4569af5ef522c98e963f&_e=Q-Sjr0ScsvyOHC_hHaFpfbssb6rgBC7p-YvVRoIeZ8jhDUeQszimjsCq0Xld0Lb0gnpqKUn0pclRWWn7UmVe245WCfxCk_zi3zsr1QdbNrKXWmSRn6A8JuFoMAdZOyd89Sdb9Ecca1ATVv-UI0gZW2ltzI8iO4blWwoiCDl_MInYOkzmLEYEs3Oo-t3JlBTpGDivkE4zZTnxSmbQ_vxypPZnHtY62L3XfxlT2Aljh2hMLgelBpLTnJgIRWAIOXV2SaK4GVPVV5aQKzRhE0NykxhrURbwqA27uCyjnopdBfqdj9ncwjXmlmUrSyhuS6wVq7h06KKXFOQhEiHeDyZ_jpe7txR4meNv8FFV6zUBPpUHi36q-2lgbk5q10FWOaRQp71zn6Ykg51rd_oqjbzfZFTt_VLj1_13XjVH-gIs1_U%3D)
---
| | Peter, In recent years, there has been a noticeable shift among young Americans who increasingly favor socialism over capitalism. This trend raises a critical question: do they fully understand these two systems' historical contexts and real-world outcomes?
---
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff9f425a7f4f4569af5ef522c98e963f&_e=Q-Sjr0ScsvyOHC_hHaFpfbssb6rgBC7p-YvVRoIeZ8jhDUeQszimjsCq0Xld0Lb0gnpqKUn0pclRWWn7UmVe245WCfxCk_zi3zsr1QdbNrKXWmSRn6A8JuFoMAdZOyd89Sdb9Ecca1ATVv-UI0gZW2ltzI8iO4blWwoiCDl_MInYOkzmLEYEs3Oo-t3JlBTpGDivkE4zZTnxSmbQ_vxypPZnHtY62L3XfxlT2Aljh2hMLgelBpLTnJgIRWAIOXV2apxXVRdZRdlqbUQXp6r6HvhF8j0eC4nKadfLCs-gW88z3SDDfYJMf7aEbjeO6jqFfdoRXUpUu9n31N4S5eHkRtZ4l7MRrP4XTN9HFkC0OnxG7IffnNoFB6ksoF6cV1oUqZ27QCc1P8NowO2o_CLeEt0_lkL-EtRC6nq9fbXWgu8%3D)
---
| | To address this, we have created a new eBook, _**The History of Socialism and Capitalism**_ , authored by two of the most prominent voices in today's political discourse, Hoover Institution senior fellows Niall Ferguson and Victor Davis Hanson.

This new eBook offers a deep dive into the origins, development, and impacts of socialism and capitalism. Each scholar presents an in-depth analysis through two different lenses. It's hard to overstate the relevance of this eBook in today's policy debates, where radical proposals are gaining traction.

Understanding the historical and practical implications of socialism and capitalism is crucial for making informed decisions about our economic and political future. The insights provided by Ferguson and Hanson will equip you with the knowledge to critically evaluate these competing ideologies and their potential impact on society.

Don't miss this opportunity to enhance your understanding of these pivotal economic systems. [Click here to request your free copy of **The History of Socialism and Capitalism** today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ff9f425a7f4f4569af5ef522c98e963f&_e=Q-Sjr0ScsvyOHC_hHaFpfbssb6rgBC7p-YvVRoIeZ8jhDUeQszimjsCq0Xld0Lb0gnpqKUn0pclRWWn7UmVe245WCfxCk_zi3zsr1QdbNrKXWmSRn6A8JuFoMAdZOyd89Sdb9Ecca1ATVv-UI0gZW2ltzI8iO4blWwoiCDl_MInYOkzmLEYEs3Oo-t3JlBTpGDivkE4zZTnxSmbQ_vxypPZnHtY62L3XfxlT2Aljh2hMLgelBpLTnJgIRWAIOXV2SplqU_d05qv6teiP23vm4UOjBSBQBzzJnC539cv-DltstGwb41Z_NTkiO08nLto0yC8jBoy82O0UKZ1AsEBVeiUIOZTy1W2E0vf537oc8iE86987Uco_1w8tHW839qdbu23GtM6Ii05BT-A3Z_n44jrzyJj8cF2SlZbOtayanN0%3D)
Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: Dan Kovats
subject: It’s a dark week in America
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100851668/524119228/820488664?refcode=IDCCA_EMAIL_230125_FR_Inauguration&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU1NzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGI0ODk2YTgtYWZkOS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ZyC040B8A-VpLw05bXMXTCkh6cD5qQePaAKWojACoTk=)
Team,

Monday marked the beginning of a dark week in America.

On Monday, Trump was inaugurated for his second term with a bleak speech. Yesterday and today, he signed 26 executive orders including ending birthright citizenship, rescinding a Biden EO that lowered the price of prescriptions, pardoning the vast majority of January 6th rioters, and suspending refugee resettlement programs.

I’ll be honest: over the next four years, there will be a lot of pain, hurt, and fear at the federal level – and that means we just need to work harder at the local level.

Candidates for school board, village board, and county board are often the last line of defense for enforcement of these orders in their communities.

There’s a lot at stake for these next four years, and we’re committed to doing everything we can to protect our immigrant and refugee neighbors, fight for the LGBTQ community, and ensure that our children get equal access to quality education.

If you’re with us, we have local candidates in our state preparing for April municipal elections, and they need your help. clean_body: = Team, Monday marked the beginning of a dark week in America. On Monday, Trump was inaugurated for his second term with a bleak speech. Yesterday and today, he signed 26 executive orders including ending birthright citizenship, rescinding a Biden EO that lowered the price of prescriptions, pardoning the vast majority of January 6th rioters, and suspending refugee resettlement programs. I’ll be honest: over the next four years, there will be a lot of pain, hurt, and fear at the federal level – and that means we just need to work harder at the local level. Candidates for school board, village board, and county board are often the last line of defense for enforcement of these orders in their communities. There’s a lot at stake for these next four years, and we’re committed to doing everything we can to protect our immigrant and refugee neighbors, fight for the LGBTQ community, and ensure that our children get equal access to quality education. If you’re with us, we have local candidates in our state preparing for April municipal elections, and they need your help. = = Thanks for everything, Dan Kovats Executive Director | | | | GET TEXT UPDATES FROM THE IDCCA! | | | | | | = = | | | | Contributions or gifts to the Illinois Democratic County Chairs' Association are not tax deductible. subject: The Wealthy Are Preparing—Here’s How You Can Too
body:
---

## The Greatest Wealth Shift in History Has Begun
---
The storm is here. Trump's return has jolted the global financial system, igniting a chain reaction that could shake the very foundation of the economy. Russia, China, and the BRICS+ alliance are already moving to dethrone the U.S. dollar. As the world pivots away from the dollar, your hard-earned retirement savings could be at risk of vanishing overnight.

It's time for smart investors to start investigating how to diversify and prepare themselves for the coming storm. Those who stand still now may not be ready when it finally hits.

**The Warning Investors Shouldn 't Ignore**
President Trump has sounded the alarm: "Our currency is crashing." This isn't conspiracy talk--this is a billionaire who's seen behind the curtain. In recent months, global de-dollarization has accelerated, with BRICS nations unveiling plans to trade in alternative currencies. If the dollar crumbles, what happens for the average American saver? What can hard-working Americans preparing for retirement do to protect their nest eggs?

**Gold: A Shield for the Coming Storm**
Under Trump's first term, gold prices surged by over 35% (2016-2020), proving its value as a haven during economic uncertainty. Central banks worldwide have accelerated their gold reserves, reflecting global concern over the dollar's future. In 2023 alone, central bank gold purchases hit record highs--a clear signal of the shifting financial landscape. Now, Trump has raised a red flag amid the countless global challenges we all face. The BRICS+ alliance--led by Russia and China--has already initiated steps to weaken the dollar's dominance, sparking a rush amongst institutional investors toward tangible assets like gold. This is a tremendous chance to align with a strategy that the wealthiest institutions and investors are already acting on.

**The Clock Is Ticking**
There's a little-known IRS rule that lets retirement savers hold real, physical gold in their IRAs. Americans with over $50,000 saved for their retirement have a fantastic opportunity to explore the benefits of gold. The time to safeguard your savings is now, before the masses wake up and scramble for safety.

**Download Your FREE Gold IRA Info Kit NOW**
This isn't just a guide--it's a powerful educational tool. Turn fear into opportunity, and stand firm while others panic.

**TAKE ACTION AND ADD A LAYER OF PROTECTION TO SAVINGS**
If the dollar's downfall accelerates, don't be left in the cold.

The future is barreling toward us--and it's time to get prepared to face it head-on.?

**Request Your FREE Info Kit TODAY**

subject: Re: Drum roll… The 2025 legislative priorities are here!
body:

Hi Peter, Oregon’s 2025 legislative session begins on Tuesday, January 21st, but I’ve already started meeting with legislators and partners to ensure we’re doing all we can to pass strong pro-climate and pro-environment legislation this year. As promised, here is a summary of OLCV’s and Oregon Conservation Network’s (OCN) priorities for this session! We anticipate that we’ll have to do a fair amount of defense this session on progress we’ve already made, but there’s still a lot we can accomplish. As always, **passing strong pro-climate and pro-conservation budgets remain one of our top priorities**. Under Trump’s leadership it will be up to Oregon’s state government to ensure funding for our state’s programs that protect our climate, air, water, forests and wildlife. On top of that, OLCV and OCN have selected three priority packages for this session:
* **A transportation package that prioritizes climate, equity, and wildlife:** This package would build on the historic gains on HB 2017 (which included investments in public transit, Safe Routes to School, and vehicle electrification), to shift the focus to multimodal, safety, and climate-forward investments. This will create a system that saves money over time and builds a more resilient, equitable, and healthy future for all Oregonians.
* **Energy Affordability and Utility Accountability** **(**[**HB 3081**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100853341/524124508/-1636620635?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ODYwMTkxLWIzZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GqdwAn75v8MDRWbKad-ebdykr5oxqUhfKoef02Gh1Ks=&emci=2c226035-09d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=e7860191-b3d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=2107230)**,**[**SB 88**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100853342/524124509/-1804391104?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ODYwMTkxLWIzZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GqdwAn75v8MDRWbKad-ebdykr5oxqUhfKoef02Gh1Ks=&emci=2c226035-09d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=e7860191-b3d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=2107230)**, LC 1547):** Oregonians are struggling to keep up with skyrocketing utility bills in the face of ever-worsening climate impacts. [**HB 3081**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100853343/524124510/-1636620635?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ODYwMTkxLWIzZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GqdwAn75v8MDRWbKad-ebdykr5oxqUhfKoef02Gh1Ks=&emci=2c226035-09d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=e7860191-b3d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=2107230) would create an active navigator to help Oregonians access energy efficiency incentives all in one place. [**SB 88**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100853344/524124511/-1804391104?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ODYwMTkxLWIzZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GqdwAn75v8MDRWbKad-ebdykr5oxqUhfKoef02Gh1Ks=&emci=2c226035-09d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=e7860191-b3d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=2107230) limits the ability of utility companies from charging ratepayers for lobbying, litigation costs, fines, marketing, industry fees, and political spending. **LC 1547** ensures that large energy users (i.e. data centers) do not unfairly burden Oregon households.
* **Safeguarding Streamflows to Protect Oregon's Water (**[**SB 427**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100853345/524124512/-1616786958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ODYwMTkxLWIzZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GqdwAn75v8MDRWbKad-ebdykr5oxqUhfKoef02Gh1Ks=&emci=2c226035-09d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=e7860191-b3d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=2107230)**):** OCN members have introduced [**SB 427**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100853346/524124513/-1616786958?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ODYwMTkxLWIzZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GqdwAn75v8MDRWbKad-ebdykr5oxqUhfKoef02Gh1Ks=&emci=2c226035-09d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=e7860191-b3d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=2107230), which tackles an outdated regulatory loophole in our water right transfer laws that effectively nullifies Oregon’s ability to protect streamflows on the vast majority of streams across the state. OCN members are also actively shaping the 2025 House water package to make it more environmentally friendly.

It’s worth mentioning that we have also included a special focus area for this session with the **Wildlife Stewardship Program** ([**HB 2980**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100853347/524124514/-879906294?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ODYwMTkxLWIzZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GqdwAn75v8MDRWbKad-ebdykr5oxqUhfKoef02Gh1Ks=&emci=2c226035-09d9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=e7860191-b3d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=2107230)) to honor Bob Sallinger’s legacy.

clean_body: Oregon has a great opportunity to continue to be a leader on climate action this year. Take action now!| | | Hi Peter, Session has started and we're hitting the ground running! To kick things into high gear, we need your support to remind our lawmakers of the importance of following through on their mandate to take action for our climate. Your message helps set the tone for what we expect from them during this long session. Together, let's do this. Together, Lindsey Scholten (she/her) OLCV Executive Director | Hi Peter, Oregon’s 2025 legislative session begins on Tuesday, January 21st, but I’ve already started meeting with legislators and partners to ensure we’re doing all we can to pass strong pro-climate and pro-environment legislation this year. As promised, here is a summary of OLCV’s and Oregon Conservation Network’s (OCN) priorities for this session! We anticipate that we’ll have to do a fair amount of defense this session on progress we’ve already made, but there’s still a lot we can accomplish. As always, passing strong pro-climate and pro-conservation budgets remain one of our top priorities. Under Trump’s leadership it will be up to Oregon’s state government to ensure funding for our state’s programs that protect our climate, air, water, forests and wildlife. On top of that, OLCV and OCN have selected three priority packages for this session: A transportation package that prioritizes climate, equity, and wildlife: This package would build on the historic gains on HB 2017 (which included investments in public transit, Safe Routes to School, and vehicle electrification), to shift the focus to multimodal, safety, and climate-forward investments. This will create a system that saves money over time and builds a more resilient, equitable, and healthy future for all Oregonians. Energy Affordability and Utility Accountability (, LC 1547): Oregonians are struggling to keep up with skyrocketing utility bills in the face of ever-worsening climate impacts. would create an active navigator to help Oregonians access energy efficiency incentives all in one place. limits the ability of utility companies from charging ratepayers for lobbying, litigation costs, fines, marketing, industry fees, and political spending. LC 1547 ensures that large energy users (i.e. data centers) do not unfairly burden Oregon households. Safeguarding Streamflows to Protect Oregon's Water (): OCN members have introduced , which tackles an outdated regulatory loophole in our water right transfer laws that effectively nullifies Oregon’s ability to protect streamflows on the vast majority of streams across the state. OCN members are also actively shaping the 2025 House water package to make it more environmentally friendly. It’s worth mentioning that we have also included a special focus area for this session with the Wildlife Stewardship Program** () to honor Bob Sallinger’s legacy. | | These priorities will soon be posted on our website, including more information, so be sure to keep your eye out! I’m grateful to know I can count on you during this legislative session; the support of our members is critical during times like these. Together, Eliza Walton (she/they) OLCV Coalition Director | | | | | ---|---|--- Oregon League of Conservation Voters 1110 SE Alder Suite 220 Portland, OR 97214 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: The road ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC**
body:
|
#
---
Team — Every year, the Detroit Auto Show is an incredible time to showcase the innovation of the Motor City. No one works harder than our union brothers and sisters, and the show is their time to shine. Last week, I was lucky enough to attend the show to check out the new models, hear from autoworkers, and even get to test drive some fantastic new cars.**I also delivered the Road Ahead Address, sharing our upcoming plans for 2025 and beyond.** In my address, I presented our plan to lower costs, support Michigan’s auto industry, grow the economy, and build on the successes of the last six years. From a long-term funding solution to fix the damn roads to making more investments in housing and redevelopment, we are using all the tools at our disposal to build on our economic momentum. I’m proud that our administration has signed a record 1,431 bipartisan bills into law to make Michigan the ideal place to live, work, and invest. Now as we get ready for 2025, I’m ready to work with anybody to tackle the challenges facing our state and deliver for Michiganders. name: Sarah McBride
subject: Donald Trump’s pardons of these extremists are despicable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
Donald Trump pardoned unrepentant insurrectionists who violently beat a police officer in the face, tasered an officer to the point where he had a heart attack, and beat an officer with a flagpole and stomped on his face.
#
Donald Trump pardoned unrepentant insurrectionists who violently beat a police officer in the face, tasered an officer to the point where he had a heart attack, and beat an officer with a flagpole and stomped on his face. _Despicable._
He did all of that while revoking policies that lowered the cost of prescription drugs this week.
So much for lowering the cost of goods.
**Trump is not interested in us, our families, or our communities. He’s not interested in helping workers or retirees. He’s interested in his own grievances and his billionaire friends.**
While Donald Trump and his administration work to fleece Americans, I’m working in Congress to _actually_ make life more affordable for neighbors in Delaware and workers across the country.
[**Can you pitch in $5 to fuel this fight? Unlike Trump, our movement isn’t powered by right-wing billionaires, and I’m counting on your support to sustain our movement for the long haul.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250123-1?refcode=em20250123-1710&amount=5&refcode2=1710_21716_cihn-T&akid=1710%2E21716%2Ecihn-T)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250123-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250123-1710&refcode2=1710_21716_cihn-T&akid=1710%2E21716%2Ecihn-T)**
In solidarity,
Sarah McBride

name: Rushern Baker III
subject: Join Us in Building a Brighter Future for Prince George’s County
body:

https://rushernbaker.com/announcement/ [https://rushernbaker.com/announcement/]
Friends and Neighbors,
Prince George's County deserves bold, compassionate leadership that puts people first. That's why Rushern Baker III is running for County Executive—to build a future where opportunity and prosperity reach every resident.
From expanding access to quality education to fostering economic growth and ensuring safer, more vibrant communities, Rushern has the vision and experience to deliver real results. But we can’t do it without you.
Every campaign milestone depends on supporters like you stepping up to fuel our movement. Your donation helps us:
* Spread the word about Rushern's vision for Prince George's County.
* Organize and empower voters to make their voices heard.
* Bring communities together to tackle the challenges we face head-on.
Your Voice Matters
This campaign is about the people of Prince George's County—about families striving for better schools, neighborhoods seeking safer streets, and small businesses that are the backbone of our economy. Together, we can ensure that everyone, no matter where they live, has a seat at the table.
Will you join us by making a contribution today? Every dollar brings us closer to a stronger, more equitable county. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rushern-baker-iii-2]
Thank you for believing in a brighter future for Prince George’s County. Together, we can make it a reality.
With gratitude,
Rushern L. Baker III
Candidate for County Executive

name: JD Vance
subject: I wrote this for you after my Inauguration
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=57b0f6ec64a1481db6bacc8947ace774&_e=exs9Wi5e6JIybtYfIhTS7zqVw6NvSyNU-WP0YNQF9372EzzH72joEiUUoMtzV6yJmD0AM3v755Pf7H0M_L0yMDWZlqWJAjFJnKa1oQC9TrsGxPpwi0KOZzvPPp5Vyz0Ubrw3PC3fDvh7Hu6Bdks_48j0_7Rvd31k7DG2EGvQKkcf4IQLAu5uOnWkuF3tCzhxG4gc0Y5gh38m5g9u-7MFSG8-TpLyRPCJoVvSpZ1saaosE0D8RD1DeRoEl2VPyNKQ8Jl8HtWteC2nJFrvVTzChw6vF7DTiE3TkdojOdaxE7sqO4lfsu6wjOGdAnP1H15qHdPEYsIlOdAIvaSd5viwmzvjM885JdLdDG9-lqSSdOB2UMoTz1xYt-5ETpFlG72cyzNvZ-EL6K_jduZyjZzo2A%3D%3D)

Peter,

My mind is still going a million miles an hour, and with everything racing through my head right now, I'm overwhelmed with gratitude.

So I wanted to take a minute to reflect on the incredible journey that led me here.

**[SECURE VP MEMO](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=57b0f6ec64a1481db6bacc8947ace774&_e=exs9Wi5e6JIybtYfIhTS7zqVw6NvSyNU-WP0YNQF9372EzzH72joEiUUoMtzV6yJmD0AM3v755Pf7H0M_L0yMDWZlqWJAjFJnKa1oQC9TrsGxPpwi0KOZzvPPp5Vyz0Ubrw3PC3fDvh7Hu6Bdks_48j0_7Rvd31k7DG2EGvQKkcf4IQLAu5uOnWkuF3tCzhxG4gc0Y5gh38m5g9u-7MFSG8-TpLyRPCJoVvSpZ1saaosE0D8RD1DeRoEl2VPyNKQ-8RGQy07CdTQGqob7s0o5FzzU-dabKc35xKIRzR6kbGX61Iz_m1jAzsA13SAB1CCxJ9qnTNm5_Z5tpLBwPuq8GhUcnyYVMWfpm3htFFTyzhksx4h4x6VLSwEgQMf2haifo_CKHsHF7wQFmg4B9KNOg%3D%3D)**

Hillbilly, author, Marine, Senator -- and now, VICE PRESIDENT OF THE UNITED STATES.

Who would've thought a kid from Middletown could one day make it to the White House?

Not me, never in my wildest dreams.

As you probably know already, I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth like so many of the career politicians I've had the misfortune of working within the D.C. swamp.

I grew up poor, in the Rust Belt, in a small Ohio town that had been losing jobs and hope for generations.

My Mamaw -- God rest her soul -- would go into medical debt just to put food on the table. Some nights, she didn't even have enough money to turn on the heat in the dead of winter.

In Middletown, hard-working families that gave everything they had to achieve the American Dream watched helplessly as their jobs were shipped overseas.

The statistics tell you that kids like me face a grim future - that if they're lucky, they'll manage to avoid welfare

I was one of those kids with a grim future, but through hard work, grit, determination, and the love of my grandparents, I made it out.

First to the Marines where I was deployed to Iraq, then to Yale where I met my incredible wife, and eventually all the way to the U.S. Senate where I faithfully served the great people of Ohio.

But the real honor of my lifetime came from President Trump, when he gave me the privilege of joining his ticket.

He called me and said, look, I think we've gotta go save this country, I think you're the guy who could help me in the best way. You can help me govern, you could help me win.

And after a whirlwind campaign - one that featured a second failed assassination attempt, a political coup of the sitting president, and a landslide victory - we stand at the precious of the four greatest years in American history.

President Trump and I are ready to keep the American Dream alive for future generations and restore this country's great promise, but we can't do it alone.

**[So today, I'm humbly asking you to step up one more time and contribute any amount - even just $5 - to support our new administration. >>](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=57b0f6ec64a1481db6bacc8947ace774&_e=exs9Wi5e6JIybtYfIhTS7zqVw6NvSyNU-WP0YNQF9372EzzH72joEiUUoMtzV6yJmD0AM3v755Pf7H0M_L0yMDWZlqWJAjFJnKa1oQC9TrsGxPpwi0KOZzvPPp5Vyz0Ubrw3PC3fDvh7Hu6Bdks_48j0_7Rvd31k7DG2EGvQKkcf4IQLAu5uOnWkuF3tCzhxG4gc0Y5gh38m5g9u-7MFSG8-TpLyRPCJoVvSpZ1saaosE0D8RD1DeRoEl2VPyNKQuRjuZHHkEvXUXyy3nfXZJF7mVnj6J9lUBSXObnCe0k5tWpsJI1abofXG71ztJkJMCrLAfKtPUVXybHbtXUi2yFSwrNTHOxBy2G_GYNWcM8j_7OLeM6vjXBJVJOITkb1DruQdRwBuYzXoKkMjlSSi1A%3D%3D)
**
**[DONATE](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=57b0f6ec64a1481db6bacc8947ace774&_e=exs9Wi5e6JIybtYfIhTS7zqVw6NvSyNU-WP0YNQF9372EzzH72joEiUUoMtzV6yJmD0AM3v755Pf7H0M_L0yMDWZlqWJAjFJnKa1oQC9TrsGxPpwi0KOZzvPPp5Vyz0Ubrw3PC3fDvh7Hu6Bdks_48j0_7Rvd31k7DG2EGvQKkcf4IQLAu5uOnWkuF3tCzhxG4gc0Y5gh38m5g9u-7MFSG8-TpLyRPCJoVvSpZ1saaosE0D8RD1DeRoEl2VPyNKQJMDoxwPHX_clEoVAjnAFPnsFlg4NdLZKKx4MfbVgQCKuicKehYwVaEw91pZkNsQBmEx5PLj5CTqYqNJ8SWQ_tri5jf9lhmepKQdIWQ49u9qg6nUy2oviCfj8Ua2zKshQbeHXSxTCxxX8fRfgH1BCEw%3D%3D)**

Peter, together we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!

Thank you and may God bless you,

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=57b0f6ec64a1481db6bacc8947ace774&_e=exs9Wi5e6JIybtYfIhTS7zqVw6NvSyNU-WP0YNQF9372EzzH72joEiUUoMtzV6yJmD0AM3v755Pf7H0M_L0yMDWZlqWJAjFJnKa1oQC9TrsGxPpwi0KOZzvPPp5Vyz0Ubrw3PC3fDvh7Hu6Bdks_48j0_7Rvd31k7DG2EGvQKkcf4IQLAu5uOnWkuF3tCzhxG4gc0Y5gh38m5g9u-7MFSG8-TpLyRPCJoVvSpZ1saaosE0D8RD1DeRoEl2VPyNKQAbvGk9lX39pYZNiO8bOEnq4J2DB5vFQ7-UFOvdUbrwIaJzmSGI7_AllRkcn_IzycduV6CPygp7pupTEGFLt3khwWymCD9X13R8fBOpDDjvX85_K-_6MEY6qi25J4PSq4jUoDFyp-IhyVgGd41H9kSg%3D%3D)

clean_body: Here’s how we stop them... | | | | | SABOTAGE! Democrats are pulling every dirty trick in the book to SABOTAGE my entire cabinet and derail the America First Movement! I’ve had enough of their games, and I know you feel the same way. Every one of my cabinet nominees must be confirmed if we’re going to bring in the Golden Age for America! I need true patriots who are fed up with the lies and obstruction to step up and join my Official Grassroots Cabinet before the day ends. Joining my cabinet is how we send a clear message to the radical left: We will NEVER SURRENDER! You’ll play a direct role in our mission to MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. As soon as you confirm your membership, I’ll have your official membership card shipped straight to your door. Thank you for your support! Donald J. name: Indiana GOP
subject: Statement from the Indiana GOP Regarding the 2025 Annual Indianapolis March for Life
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** January 23, 2025

**Contact:** Gage Hoekstra, Press Secretary, **[ghoekstra@indiana.gop](mailto:greid@indiana.gop "greid@indiana.gop")**

**Statement from the Indiana GOP Regarding the 2025 Annual Indianapolis March for Life** **INDIANAPOLIS (January 23, 2025)** – The Indiana Republican Party released the following statement regarding the annual Indianapolis March for Life on January 22, 2025.

**"On January 22, 2025, Hoosiers from across our state came together in Indianapolis to march in support of protections for the unborn, joining Governor Mike Braun, Lt. Governor Micah Beckwith, Secretary of State Diego Morales, Attorney General Todd Rokita, and State Treasurer Daniel Elliott.** **From the steps of the Statehouse, our Republican leaders voiced their support for life and celebrated the legislation our state has enacted to defend the most vulnerable among us.** **Our party is proud to be the party of life and deeply thankful for the stalwart leadership Governor Braun and his administration have provided in the defense of families and the unborn."** - Josh Waddell, Indiana GOP Executive Director ###

clean_body: Ashley Moody and Jon Husted Friend, This week, Republicans in the United States Senate gained two new members -- Both of these conservative warriors are going to be amazing America First champions for their states, but that also means they're going to be the Left's BIGGEST TARGETS come 2026... ... and now, we have to defend BOTH of their seats in two of the historically biggest swing states. PATRIOT: CONTRIBUTION STATUS: DEADLINE: AS SOON AS ****************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** **************************************************************************************************** Make no mistake, friend: They know this could be their only opportunity to thwart the shared agenda of President Trump and Senate Republicans. Your support has never been more important than at this very moment, friend. Will you step up today? ** Thank you, NRSC HQ | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

body:
You’re invited to fill out our 2025 Congressional Priorities Survey!

While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/dAfRehWDrkq5GdVTndjWgA2?unsubscribedata=HSIhxEOrlC6wB1bVHa%2BcFeLQexuf6Y%2BdW103%2BBu6ee%2BA9bu9SE4Q9kfS8CzmXUnAA3epXbzdPQSwKDrtS8yjTgUfFw86qzx0UACoMYuc2sn%2FJSgBCHdeTWEg%2FiQqSmziVZ8v5w7ObqK05h4YQwB3rnS0gSR27C8ZtbOjFAKpyaF%2BapyVAEJ8fYAqHJZd7QxuvGjcaC9QO3PIkzzo7Cn9Rp0MPEXsO2iOB0bJh3iFnR6AVgT5evQVC7GB9NfjAFulriZg45LUYbTSRFYUtCMr4wN4IAH%2Fufy1EUvV8fAVHYLDmVdJEd1%2BI4rVmuWl18OSsJc4dWBVlmFx8fULpWZspoDCMIrUAjJkEFs%2B%2B4QWSgKNPArOCQxcf%2FwqPsimsNCEP2L8GDiaSRdbXitxJ7OxdopobeZub3f70Bp%2Bx7uKiZPmoDpPvrJQDkFbs8BWcdmG)

Now that the Republican trifecta has officially taken control in Washington, it’s more important than ever that we’re united in our shared goals to push forward an agenda of progress — but to do that, Dr. Ruiz needs to hear from you. [We’ve bumped Dr. Ruiz’s original message for you to read, but before that: Will you take a second to fill out our brief survey and share your thoughts?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100856634/524135073/579544997?source=SBD_EM_EN_30DO_012325_1_2_Issues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RhOTliMjEtYmFkOS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0j2wNFctgVB5BEiE1WeYP0Ben2ZMqTr5Mw8pwKNCDsY=&emci=15dc5fa8-dad8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3da99b21-bad9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=4131986) | | **[TAKE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100856637/524135076/579544997?source=SBD_EM_EN_30DO_012325_1_2_Issues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RhOTliMjEtYmFkOS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0j2wNFctgVB5BEiE1WeYP0Ben2ZMqTr5Mw8pwKNCDsY=&emci=15dc5fa8-dad8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3da99b21-bad9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=4131986)**

\---Forwarded Message from Dr. Raul Ruiz---
Did you hear what Democratic Strategist James Carville recently said?
He gave his two cents on what he thinks Democrats in Congress should focus on this time around. Take a look for yourself:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100856640/524135078/579544997?source=SBD_EM_EN_30DO_012325_1_2_Issues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RhOTliMjEtYmFkOS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0j2wNFctgVB5BEiE1WeYP0Ben2ZMqTr5Mw8pwKNCDsY=&emci=15dc5fa8-dad8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3da99b21-bad9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=4131986)

But before that, I want to hear from you. [You’re invited to fill out my 2025 Congressional Priorities Survey and share what issues you would like to see Congress address in the coming months. Will you take a moment of your time to share your thoughts today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100856642/524135081/579544997?source=SBD_EM_EN_30DO_012325_1_2_Issues&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2RhOTliMjEtYmFkOS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=0j2wNFctgVB5BEiE1WeYP0Ben2ZMqTr5Mw8pwKNCDsY=&emci=15dc5fa8-dad8-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=3da99b21-bad9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=4131986)

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.**

Take a look for yourself: As we kick off 2025 and the 119th Congress gets underway, I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get back to work for the people of California’s 25th like never before. But before that, I want to hear from you. | I can promise you it won’t take long, but it will give us here at Ruiz HQ a better understanding of what you’re hoping to see accomplished during this session of Congress. Thank you! — Raul | | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress and to flip the House blue this November.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: 14th Amendment: VoteVets members are moving to the front
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
VoteVets endorsed Attorneys General in North Carolina, Maryland, and Washington State are leading the charge against Trump’s assault on the Constitution.
#
Peter, here at VoteVets we know all too well that elections have consequences.
It’s why we worked so hard to stop Trump in 2016, 2020, and 2024.
It’s why we’re in this situation now — forced to anticipate and counter Trump as he works to destroy everything we’ve built.
But it’s also why, despite everything, we are well-positioned to fight back. Across the country, VoteVets members are moving to the front.
VoteVets-endorsed Attorneys General in North Carolina, Maryland, and Washington State are leading the charge against Trump’s assault on the Constitution. Jeff Jackson, Anthony Brown, and Bob Ferguson have each challenged the administration in court to defend birthright citizenship against Trump’s unconstitutional order to end it.
Elections DO have consequences, and we’d be a lot worse off today if not for the VoteVets-endorsed candidates who have won tough races in every corner of this country — thanks to you.
And even now, we are looking ahead to the next elections. We are organizing, we are recruiting, and we are supporting the candidates who will win races all over the country, take back the House and Senate, and turn the tide against Trump.
It’s critical work. It matters. And we can’t do it without you.
[**To continue that work, please make a donation to VoteVets. We know you can’t donate every time we ask, but we’re hoping you understand how important this is to the cause — especially today.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-c4-em-jan25.34Pqeh&refcode=em250123-1-90&t=1&akid=34111%2E3013755%2EhGj_bq)**

| | [](https://substack..6pPYUkpJimtBcGzssf-siTptXuLSiLyzz-lp0_xRGyo?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/kathybarnette/p/recap-of-trumps-presser-with-tech?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Four quick thoughts came to mind after listening to Trump's presser yesterday with tech CEOs: OpenAI's [Sam Altman](https://substack.com/redirect/3c2be80c-9dc4-4faa-b1cd-13319beda7bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Oracle's Larry Ellison, and Softbank's Masayoshi Son:
1\. These people have found Trump's Achilles Heel. That is, compliment, compliment, smile, compliment some more.
2\. AI is the future.
3\. Those controlling this massive intrusion of AI into our lives (with an initial investment of over $500 BILLION) are the same people who [admitted to being captured by obvious groupthink,](https://substack.com/redirect/975f0c59-1ef3-42d0-9107-9afb9fff38c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) didn't know enough to NOT take the jab, and programmed AI to give us [revisionist history when DEI ](https://substack.com/redirect/bbd5eaff-e7cc-4279-8e2f-260545aea3c1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)was en vogue.
4\. Now, we are supposed to trust and fund these same people to create an entity that will soon function without the need for human existence at all?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7f9d3def-a4ed-4c30-82b9-2f1b9cda05fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Listen](https://substack.com/redirect/7f9d3def-a4ed-4c30-82b9-2f1b9cda05fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to my show, _[The Kathy Barnette Show](https://substack.com/redirect/7f9d3def-a4ed-4c30-82b9-2f1b9cda05fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , on the #1 talk radio station in Philadelphia, covering most of the mid-Atlantic states, including PA, NJ, MD and DE.

clean_body: 4 quick thoughts...you should be thinking about... | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more 4 quick thoughts...you should be thinking about... | | | Jan 23 | | | | | | | | | | | | Four quick thoughts came to mind after listening to Trump's presser yesterday with tech CEOs: OpenAI's , Oracle's Larry Ellison, and Softbank's Masayoshi Son: 1\. These people have found Trump's Achilles Heel. That is, compliment, compliment, smile, compliment some more. 2\. AI is the future. 3\. Those controlling this massive intrusion of AI into our lives (with an initial investment of over $500 BILLION) are the same people who didn't know enough to NOT take the jab, and programmed AI to give us en vogue. 4\. Now, we are supposed to trust and fund these same people to create an entity that will soon function without the need for human existence at all? | | ---|---|--- to my show, , on the #1 talk radio station in Philadelphia, covering most of the mid-Atlantic states, including PA, NJ, MD and DE. body:
President Biden is a HERO
| We were disappointed to see that you didn’t sign our letter thanking President Biden for his incredible leadership...

But after we saw this STUNNING headline, we’re giving you [**one more chance to sign:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86373?t=6&akid=18651%2E878179%2Ee8fKzM) | **Biden Pardons Dr. Fauci and Members of January 6th Committee in Final Hours of Presidency**
---
**This is the LAST day we’ll reopen our letter for your signature.** [**Please sign by MIDNIGHT to thank President Biden »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86373?t=7&akid=18651%2E878179%2Ee8fKzM)
President Biden needs to know you still have his back!

The Voter Protection Project
**–BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE–**
Folks, as President Biden’s historic presidency comes to a close, we’re sending him a card to thank him for his service over the past 4 years...

---
Dear President Biden,

I have one thing to say to you: **Thank you.**

You have accomplished so much, and saved our country from the nightmare that Donald Trump left behind.

I remember how excited I was when you won in 2020.

I have had your back since you became President, and I am so proud of everything you've done for working families in our country.

✅ You capped prices on prescription drugs.

✅ You protected good-paying union jobs.

✅ You passed historic legislation addressing climate change.

✅ You have done everything in your power to strengthen our Democracy.

I have zero doubt in my mind: **You will go down as a truly GREAT American President.**

**I truly thank you for putting the country and our Democracy first — _that is something that Trump and the Republicans will NEVER do._**

[**I'm signing this letter and sending a small donation of $3 with VPP now to show that I'm still fighting — for our country and for your legacy, Mr. President. With a MAGA trifecta, it's more important than ever that Democrats stand united together. I’m chipping in $3 to do my part. »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86373?t=11&akid=18651%2E878179%2Ee8fKzM) | [142 SPOTS LEFT: PLEASE GIVE $3 TO INSTANTLY SIGN THIS LETTER BEFORE WE CLOSE IT AT NOON TODAY »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/86373?t=12&akid=18651%2E878179%2Ee8fKzM)

# **[Brennan Responds To Trump Executive Order](http://trk.libertyledger._jYiy9szGAgnW4BpHoKQ)**

subject: Congress is facilitating the pipeline for Trump’smass deportation agenda

body:
Let’s be clear about what this bill does: | | | Peter, earlier this week, H.R. 29/S.5 — a devastatingly harmful bill that will further criminalize Black and brown people of various immigration statuses across the country — passed the House and the Senate and is now heading to Donald Trump’s desk to be signed into law. A number of Democrats shamefully caved to MAGA fear-mongering and ceded such an important opportunity to block the violent and devastating consequences by voting with Republicans to pass this bill. Let’s be clear about what this bill does: **It will roll back vital due process protections, grant state attorneys general overreaching authority to target and detain immigrants indefinitely, and create the pipeline for Trump’s mass detention and deportation agenda.** In the past week alone, a 5th Circuit court ruled against DACA, and Trump signed a flurry of anti-immigrant Executive Orders. But we are resilient and have a plan to fight back. To do that, our movement needs even more support than ever before. **[As this cruel bill heads to Trump’s desk to be signed into law, we need you with us, Peter. Will you make a contribution right now to help us step up and protect immigrant communities across the country?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrPQtKgNRxJ4NxE8B81MzWIuSnA8P6J65-0mULYyLDWDVgqhayPdb6YmoX94DPXh5oYRv9UmLu5fr1_IkkLouCocqaJnX5mcBFFh7xwuLCBj4ggNMyKOxNvaJcj9t9xtiwkfJGvVpuvXg9M-iERvlff78302o95fvqspSukds4XQp0dAoHfpXocxh-mEpwlkvacXLb7U6QIhsqcRLk08Z01T-7q87TmoORRZCZ9y7xr3z0aoGJ0rwTLKqgYCXYSQ6kPeizCM1S6oDHUat3Oc_DCT4TNY6o6AJvvd42Ao5_uLBKBGWCVV-7akQ4YvKyic4WMEobQpMYOTTbpXKfAKs8SDLShuRwowwl8HnTnYdr7T64oFHUHut389l2OWx1YKTV63z8moJVWX611xta0RVzbmQ_ka2ttTegF9EE4_r_r4fUmBhPY3bOOuuqW20tQpZ8/4de/e1xlbFTGRw6Tv3okEIsWcA/h0/h001.IWqj5cnSivO7xTqGGoUfdmzrz6lMNM5x7-UC-VmjRpg)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6GKGRKiD2A9cpAeztYplrPQtKgNRxJ4NxE8B81MzWIuSnA8P6J65-0mULYyLDWDVgqhayPdb6YmoX94DPXh5oiz-ZldhUa5mxrEtaPw9XuqLmM9UImvCKmYM36pK7e1RJxdeOOy6UiVesXIXClenuKwjxQKTAbjFqxWCvOvJIjXmA2VHU56yp_2JkDGXUHaSASA7lPfVI5_DwNwIfm75eXmb16M8di1ARgXTfPlGKxJXBYPPRSr6o3popaBf4MU1qHoQM1DRwXwFng8W51MN5dKWqr2abdCN3QeQgezPBqBTwBpq8H16PmoQ23pHUUOphZq8g1fkOe3rljZUFDYpZf7kUCvJDXQJpALDM-FC_svspyDHZ13s303E1T99Xe1LFoB9DeMEPsMXBCodA91xhVcCRVbfWSfIAFC-05a4mr2xj0dlR_B-f8y1nd-oKJWLwsjDbKpOB8ntXLDS5EbhV6_r90HnVk2VWbQJtlDzH-crS6-DhS_OZg1e6PuqW3vg/4de/e1xlbFTGRw6Tv3okEIsWcA/h1/h001.Auj9Zvh_Nt5lf4-9QDFoAxExc74Zdc0Msz0FN0EsMC0)

clean_body: Let’s be clear about what this bill does: | | | Peter, earlier this week, H.R. 29/S.5 — a devastatingly harmful bill that will further criminalize Black and brown people of various immigration statuses across the country — passed the House and the Senate and is now heading to Donald Trump’s desk to be signed into law. A number of Democrats shamefully caved to MAGA fear-mongering and ceded such an important opportunity to block the violent and devastating consequences by voting with Republicans to pass this bill. Let’s be clear about what this bill does: It will roll back vital due process protections, grant state attorneys general overreaching authority to target and detain immigrants indefinitely, and create the pipeline for Trump’s mass detention and deportation agenda. In the past week alone, a 5th Circuit court ruled against DACA, and Trump signed a flurry of anti-immigrant Executive Orders. But we are resilient and have a plan to fight back. To do that, our movement needs even more support than ever before. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to United We Dream Action are not tax deductible. The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Action are ActBlue Civics Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. Thank you for stepping up today, Juliana, United We Dream Action Follow us on: | | | | | Paid for by United We Dream Action; UnitedWeDreamAction.org; Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: Senate GOP Caucus
subject: Republicans just got two new America First senators…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Ashley Moody and Jon Husted

Friend,

This week, Republicans in the United States Senate gained two new members -- **[Ashley Moody from Florida, and Jon Husted from Ohio.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=5eeb19aa3aba443b8211e1f0b5672212&_e=Xb517tP7S9TGcieNZW7cdXvzQ5qqZ50xloGUDxd91qs2XQCAKTBh1rVBghEf_dvVpJ3VF5H1OrJ_iXsIb8pQ6jae1UoXeyZRVdglXjcJlEA3-DkjEaxXdDJqw69eScxljoffJ4pXCfBDna3Tq3-4EfUTZIlRRQOR65zXRh7rBbGjDdjb-erOMFfLdjjY3bAAcKUHQpAmQLsbOCnUNNH1NY1T_zq9Ao-plzcNI99KMJNxVpKAs3VcGjCblTWwF8kI_A4MrFpt79tErkARN8M5yK1-d31v0KbFBORqydwrqwmJcQk7bSWV-KaAgrB6XaHgt-QNcEeVIAQnCPc4ynGLg97v6qS3GLJldXLVtNv1Osb48SJiREFHdEXcZ0ujvRjQL4MucK1PF-VbF0eyerGGj5nsyKOZjjmi-v0aZxZUXqBu9ei4iwwAA3q2Threq-Jibf38q-R7u6PHqTRh1e5zUhUMWfuKkRiTldDQikS0lc_mr7XbFcDJ0uI_O1RGvDKO)**

name: Autism Health Inc.
subject: Join Us for the Autism Health Summit in San Diego!
body:
|
---
| |
---
| | **Join Us for the Autism Health Summit in San Diego!**
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=24bda51523&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| Mark your calendars for April 11-13, 2025, as we gather at the beautiful Town & Country Resort in San Diego, CA, for the highly anticipated **Autism Health Summit**. This life-changing event brings together the nation’s leading voices in health, science, and advocacy, including Del Bigtree, Dr. Brian Hooker, Dr. Sabine Hazan, Dr. Peter McCullough, and many more. Our mission is clear: to empower families and professionals with cutting-edge knowledge about addressing the underlying conditions associated with autism and other neurological disorders. This is your opportunity to join a movement that’s on the perfect track to **Make America Healthy Again (MAHA)**. Explore a weekend packed with impactful keynote presentations, expert panels, and networking opportunities with professionals and families dedicated to creating better outcomes for those impacted by neurological challenges. Dive into transformative discussions on innovative therapies, scientific breakthroughs, and actionable solutions to improve the health of our communities. As a special offer, use promo code **MAHA25** at checkout to receive **25% off any ticket**. Don’t miss this chance to deepen your understanding, build connections, and be inspired to take meaningful action.
---
| [Buy Now](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=bbf6dba579&e=3a42edfdc4 "Buy Now")
---
|
---
| [ ](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=78cf9a9219&e=3a42edfdc4)
---
| Autism Health Inc., a **501(c)(3) nonprofit organization** , is proud to host this event, furthering our commitment to supporting families and spreading awareness of effective strategies for managing autism and other complex conditions. Your participation not only empowers you with knowledge but also helps fund vital initiatives and research aimed at improving lives. Let’s come together in San Diego this April and be the change that paves the way for healthier futures. **Register now and take the first step toward a healthier tomorrow!**
---
| [Donate Here](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=dc739d3874&e=3a42edfdc4 "Donate Here")
---
|
---
| **Scholarships Available!**
---
| Don’t miss this chance to be part of a powerful community dedicated to making a difference. Mark your calendars and reserve your tickets now! [Scholarships](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=af8d8b4c5e&e=3a42edfdc4) are limited, so apply soon if needed! Together, we’re making a difference!
With gratitude,
The Autism Health Inc. Team
---
| [Apply Now](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=afe983716b&e=3a42edfdc4 "Apply Now")
---
|
---
| **YOUR DONATIONS MAKE A DIFFERENCE!**
---
| Autism Health Inc. depends on generous donations from our community. Large or small, every donation gets us closer to achieving our goals. We are grateful for your assistance!
---
| [Donate Now](https://autismhealth.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=f6324071c6&e=3a42edfdc4 "Donate Now")
---
| Autism Health is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization dedicated to educating individuals, families, and communities about autism spectrum disorder (ASD). Autism Health provides educational programs, workshops, events and resources tailored to meet the diverse needs of those impacted by autism and other neurological disorders.

San Diego, CA**

| | | **Why the Trump Knife Collection Stands Apart:****8 Distinctive Knives, Each Telling a Story** This collection is thoughtfully[ designed to commemorate pivotal moments from Trump’s presidency](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jj2P4jAYhH-N0xHZ7-vYoXABx-WKkzjdNqutkOOPjSEmxklA7K9fhUWUM_NI8-iY-uDvisgtAeiCHQkAwQ0BuHzcYp6P8e-f1e_9v8vqIvaxWlb49USv8ILPRm-2fZNOdD6OX_9xPqV6e2UvfLon94Kfp6WLOvRLK3eFVegt5YVTTKIUgnJaFZ2qoMK6ldpQz7hrfess1pKtjTOMSyGKoIBCRRkgW4NALJEDeo52zSpDfW0Ip4-fUkeXg9FsnG4652GIpRli0atumtL4EGsINNnmctJmCkb3Yzek5HJ5dhOBRnt_MASbwXuXD8ES3DGgSEAsy0-mWD_zOLcEd-86vw1DZABFVjbdQt-HUUjC6efDaTG4KvgOAAD__zyAdSQ). Each month, a new knife arrives at your door, featuring a full-color image of President Trump paired with one of his defining messages—from “Keep America Great” to “Save America Again.” Each piece is more than a knife; it’s a statement of American pride.
* **Premium Pakkawood Handles** : Hand-polished with a rich cherry stain, each knife handle is crafted to reflect both strength and elegance, offering a balanced, luxurious feel in your hand.

* **Razor-Sharp Stainless Steel Blades** : Each blade is forged with precision, ensuring durability and a sharp edge, reflecting the steadfast spirit of American craftsmanship.

* **American Craftsmanship** : Designed and forged in the USA, each knife is a testament to American quality, pride, and tradition.

The addition of **eight built-in LED lights** enhances the beauty of each knife, casting a soft glow that captures the essence of this elegant tribute.
* **Protective and Elegant** : The hinged cover provides easy access to your knives while ensuring they remain protected from dust and wear.

* **Showcase Presidential Pride** : The display case is adorned with a raised golden medallion, inspired by the American presidential seal, making it a stunning centerpiece for any home or office.

body:
Republicans only control the House Majority by a hair. And if we lose these Special Elections, we could be looking at a TOTAL COLLAPSE of our House Majority.
If we lose even one of these Special Elections we could be looking at a TOTAL COLLAPSE of our House Majority!

It's official, Friend:

**Early voting is about to begin in the all-important Special Elections in FL-06 and FL-01!**

The Democrats aren't playing with kid gloves in these Special Elections. As of right now, this is their LAST CHANCE to take power and they won't waste a second to start banking votes.

**_[That's why we need your help right now.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=e43a2e0e48cf44369af8584699f04594&_e=Inq6Jvyw58aLXeph7h6dO98rAqtUIVxzNEGIqeILCaYuohXNuMos0jqDZ4TwyjLC9g7pJ5n35xccorQ22BFUQzNqmSC25f9hZLmAPZ7xeKOOyAzblhCk0vSh3icswV44X8Ow1QHEK9NFHpw7NygCIkXGYHDlYhPZRmaev7WAOB3-VfQ_6aF_rNBB_1S2U4zgKQdkIHA7EHa4kuOhPOjjGF5BiFBV7U_xHviOa_UpVoRVWNB5wf_dgC7J6byslD1LFNBCwG1PnJWCphSeYrZk6XXbK6gXzolGy9ywEp43PESWjQGlTQW4rmLYWvrQpsLCcxpRzNscO6Sp9CBiB8fdv0obDErIBK7eaaxZTyfkv15_XVOMqJfpuTpM8j1RE2aaqAVwZah76hy1mqv8jt7gLw%3D%3D "That’s why we need your help right now. ")_**

name: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
subject: 52 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marie for Congress
body:
| | Peter,

Fifty-two years after _Roe v. Wade_ , women’s health is still endangered.

A patchwork of varying abortion restrictions isn’t enough to keep women safe, Peter. In neighboring Idaho, doctors are still in the dark as to what care they can provide pregnant patients in crisis as the state’s abortion ban faces ongoing legal challenges, leaving countless women with no choice but to travel to neighboring states.

Without access to safe reproductive care, patients face risk of serious complications and even death. And when it comes down to it, Peter, this is a personal decision that should be made between a woman, her doctor, and her family.

Abortion is a matter of healthcare and privacy, and I won’t stop fighting for the freedom to make the best choice for ourselves and our families.

The ultra-conservative super majority on the Supreme Court and anti-choice extremists in Congress are hell-bent on dismantling reproductive freedom. Medication abortion, contraceptives, and more are on the chopping block – but we can still stop them.

[If you’re with me, add your name here to tell anti-choice extremists that we aren’t backing down from this fight:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100859610/524145104/391602508?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_250122_1_1&refcode2=f5afa38f-c0d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWFmYTM4Zi1jMGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0bvcUdVsahuU6HaBrOvlUP6KEW01SMlIn4FI7fAQyo=&emci=ecafa38f-c0d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=f5afa38f-c0d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=31138575) | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100859612/524145106/391602508?refcode=MGP_EM_PT_180DO_250122_1_1&refcode2=f5afa38f-c0d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWFmYTM4Zi1jMGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i0bvcUdVsahuU6HaBrOvlUP6KEW01SMlIn4FI7fAQyo=&emci=ecafa38f-c0d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=f5afa38f-c0d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=31138575)**

name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12722043?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

At the beginning of this week, we celebrated a momentous occasion for our country as Donald Trump was sworn in as the 47th President of the United States. We have entered into a new era of freedom, prosperity, and greatness here in America, and I feel so blessed to have the opportunity to be an ally to President Trump in the Florida House. Let’s Make America Great Again!

January has been a very busy month for me as the legislative session approaches, but it has been great to be back in Tallahassee with my fellow House members to get things done for Florida. As always, my team and I are here for you, so if there is something you need assistance with, [please do not hesitate to contact me](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=30f1830c2c&e=d1c1b9864f). We would be more than happy to learn more about the issues important to you and the rest of our community.
---
| | **Inauguration of President Donald Trump**
---
|
---
| I had the incredible opportunity to attend the inauguration of President Donald Trump! President Trump is committed to bringing American greatness back, and he has already accomplished so much for our country within his first few days in office. It is a privilege to support him in our state legislature.
---
| | **FDOT District 5 Legislative Workshop**
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| My staff and I attended FDOT’s first-ever District 5 Legislative Workshop at their Regional Transportation Management Center in Sanford. We were able to tour the entire facility, see where they monitor all state highways across Florida, and meet with road rangers to see how they monitor unique traffic incidents with state-of-the-art drones. We also gained valuable insight on how to better help and answer questions from our constituents.
---
| | **Marion County Legislative Delegation Meeting**
---
|
---
|
---
---
| The Marion County Legislative Delegation Meeting was packed! So many great ideas were presented, and it was the longest agenda we have had in several years. As a delegation, we are here to listen and take our constituents’ voices to Tallahassee. Citizens don’t often realize that many bills start with ideas that come from everyday Floridians. We are here to listen!
---
| | **Committee Week #2 - Tuesday, January 14**
---
| I began our second week of committee meetings on the Economic Infrastructure Subcommittee. Chair Mike Caruso also took us to visit Tallahassee Electric Utility. With this subcommittee, we are looking for ways to improve transportation infrastructure, energy, and utilities throughout our state.
---
|
---
| I also had the pleasure of meeting with Meredyth Morrow and others to discuss their concerns about election interference and election integrity.
---
|
---
| It was great to meet with Director Taylor Hatch with the Agency for Persons with Disabilities. We spoke on important policy issues for this upcoming legislative session.

I closed out the day on the Human Services Subcommittee, which considers policies focusing on vulnerable populations who rely on publicly organized and funded programs and services for their safety and welfare. This includes mental health and substance abuse services and services for frail elders, people with developmental disabilities, and abused and neglected children.
---
| | **Committee Week #2 - Wednesday, January 15**
---
| I started the day sitting on the Justice Budget Subcommittee, which writes the state budget for the Department of Corrections, Department of Juvenile Justice, Department of Law Enforcement, Department of Legal Affairs (Attorney General), State Court System, Justice Administration, and Commission on Offender Review.
---
|
---
| It was great to meet with John Labriola from the Christian Family Coalition Florida to discuss important legislation for this upcoming session.
---
|
---
| I also had the honor of meeting with Suncoast New Options, an intermediate care facility that provides residential services, during the Florida Association of Rehabilitation Facilities Advocacy Day at the Capitol. We discussed their facilities within the central and north APD regions.

I ended the day sitting on the Intergovernmental Affairs Subcommittee, which considers matters related to Florida’s local governments, veterans, the Florida National Guard, and the military.
---
| | **90th Anniversary of the Shootout at the Ma Barker House**
---
|
---
| While I was in Tallahassee, my staff back in the district attended the 90th anniversary of the shootout at the Ma Barker House in Carney Island. This house plays a major part in Marion County’s history. The longest shootout in FBI history took place here. This event was to celebrate the courage and efforts taken by law enforcement.
---
| | **Rep. Chamberlin’s 2025 Legislative Session Committee Assignments**
---
| I have the honor of serving on several important committees during this upcoming legislative session. Please click the links below to learn more about who sits on the committees and when they will meet.

* [Ways & Means Committee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=4a529f9841&e=d1c1b9864f "Ways & Means Committee")
* [Economic Infrastructure Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=ded9566e2c&e=d1c1b9864f "Economic Infrastructure Subcommittee")
* [Human Services Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=1eda6b1f56&e=d1c1b9864f "Human Services Subcommittee")
* [Intergovernmental Affairs Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=4f3c4c5936&e=d1c1b9864f "Intergovernmental Affairs Subcommittee")
* [Justice Budget Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=07e76964d6&e=d1c1b9864f "Justice Budget Subcommittee")

---
|
---
| | Thank you for reading, and I look forward to sharing with you again soon.

Have a great rest of your week!

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2024 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=9aab1ac2cb) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=9aab1ac2cb).

---

name: Rosen, Jacky
subject: Exclusive invitation to weigh in (re: reproductive rights)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
Will you please answer a few quick questions about our fight for reproductive freedom?
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100859885/524145997/1985443554?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&amounts=100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5437-su-nd&code=jtk5437-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmNmOGFkMS1jMWQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zrxk61t-3L5MIZftMKH-M8m5y_B197yuC7_WVYoSLtU=&emci=2be2be23-0ed9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2bcf8ad1-c1d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=3800590)
---
It’s been two and a half years since millions of Americans lost their constitutional right to an abortion, friend, but that hasn’t stopped the GOP from doing everything in their power to further roll back reproductive rights in every corner of the country.

Pregnant women are _dying_ in emergency rooms because doctors are unable to provide lifesaving care for fear of repercussions from anti-abortion conservatives.

**The fight for reproductive choice has already become a fight for women’s lives, but we know the GOP is prepared to go even further in limiting our rights.**

With Donald Trump back in the White House and Republicans in total control of Congress, we’ve reached a pivotal moment in our fight for reproductive choice and women’s rights, and I want to hear from the most dedicated members of this team about where we should focus our efforts next. **That’s why I'm personally inviting you to take my Reproductive Rights Survey toda****y.**

**Right now, I'm still looking for another 23 people in****TN to share their input before midnight – and I'm counting on you to be one of them. **

**[Friend, will you please accept my invitation to my focus group and weigh in on our fight for reproductive freedom and women’s rights in America? There are only a few questions, and hearing from people like you is essential to our grassroots movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100859886/524145998/1985443554?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&amounts=100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5437-su-nd&code=jtk5437-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmNmOGFkMS1jMWQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zrxk61t-3L5MIZftMKH-M8m5y_B197yuC7_WVYoSLtU=&emci=2be2be23-0ed9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2bcf8ad1-c1d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=3800590)**
| | [Join Focus Group →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100859887/524145999/1985443554?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=37087&ask=5&amounts=100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5437-su-nd&code=jtk5437-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmNmOGFkMS1jMWQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Zrxk61t-3L5MIZftMKH-M8m5y_B197yuC7_WVYoSLtU=&emci=2be2be23-0ed9-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=2bcf8ad1-c1d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=3800590)

Jacky Rosen (D-NV)

clean_body: Will you please answer a few quick questions about our fight for reproductive freedom? | | | It’s been two and a half years since millions of Americans lost their constitutional right to an abortion, friend, but that hasn’t stopped the GOP from doing everything in their power to further roll back reproductive rights in every corner of the country. Pregnant women are dying in emergency rooms because doctors are unable to provide lifesaving care for fear of repercussions from anti-abortion conservatives. The fight for reproductive choice has already become a fight for women’s lives, but we know the GOP is prepared to go even further in limiting our rights. With Donald Trump back in the White House and Republicans in total control of Congress, we’ve reached a pivotal moment in our fight for reproductive choice and women’s rights, and I want to hear from the most dedicated members of this team about where we should focus our efforts next. That’s why I'm personally inviting you to take my Reproductive Rights Survey today. Right now, I'm still looking for another 23 people inTN to share their input before midnight – and I'm counting on you to be one of them. | | Thank you for doing your part today, Jacky Rosen (D-NV) | * By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible. | | My children will be stateless under Trump's US Birthright citizenship Executive Order. "Any child born in the United States to a parent who is lawfully present on a non-immigrant visa or to a parent who is unauthorized to be in this country shall not be rendered stateless as several Democrat AGs, States and several Lawsuits have claimed. Such a child will acquire the citizenship of their parent(s) according to the nationality laws of the country or countries from which the parent(s) are citizens. They were never intended to be subject to the jurisdiction of the United States to begin with. It's that simple." Austin Chenge, US Army Veteran and Former Republican Governor Candidate for Michigan.

| | For Immediate ReleaseJanuary 23, 2025 – Grand Rapids, Michigan Children born after the New US Birthright Citizenship Order. "Any child born in the United States to a parent who is lawfully present on a non-immigrant visa or to a parent who is unauthorized to be in this country shall not be rendered stateless. Such a child will acquire the citizenship of their parent(s) according to the nationality laws of the country or countries from which the parent(s) are citizens. They were never intended to be subject to the jurisdiction of the United States to begin with. It's that simple." To be classified as "...subject to the jurisdiction thereof", a person who is born here in the United States must meet all and not just one of the following: 1. Be present in the territory of the United States (thereby subjecting you to our legal and procedural jurisdiction) and 2. owe allegiance to the sovereign power of the United States. To be present in the United States, one must be here or at a place so designated. Their presence must not just be lawful but permanent and intended not just to be temporary. It's not enough to argue that they are subject to our legal and procedural jurisdiction but that they owe allegiance to the sovereign power of the United States. No one on a Temporary Visa, Work Visa, Visa free/waiver Program and Diplomatic Visa can meet this threshold and certainly not an Illegal Alien. In this category, only Children born to US Citizens and Permanent residents should meet this threshold and I remain confident that the Supreme Court will find this executive order legal. Austin Chengewww.austinchenge.comVeteran and Former Republican Gov Candidate for Michigan.Alma Mater: The School of Law, The University of Birmingham, England) Note: This press release was issued by The Office of Austin Chenge to reflect on the anticipated legal battle over the Trump Administration's Executive Order on Birthright Citizenship.
---

With Trump starting to implement Project 2025, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**There are _15 special elections_** **over the next three months**. With Trump starting to implement Project 2025, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. **_9 states_** **are holding elections that require our immediate attention.** The MAGA movement could easily pour _millions of dollars_ into our Republican counterparts' campaigns, and the only way we can keep up with them is if we have the resources to compete. **_$7 from you_****is all we’re asking for to help fund state Democrats in our fight to secure VICTORY in upcoming elections in states like Minnesota and Pennsylvania.** [Can we count on you to chip in $7 to help state Dems defeat extreme Republicans in the states? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPf8W_B0xptJi6SYPCTnYZrCvOaktUc6Spy4S_i-yK0HuGKku2BDNEAF64KCaTjA8F47B77SYYmXFYtLvCEhxAvRLYhNxoo7ksQRjA7sy36-kO1VziJT7JN9h3gYM15ps73043Vam0Jycbw2hqtLOaW8KKCVSnn5ZFgFIJyHAFsFRwRoBB7APeSB3IKau3C-u10NNezM0_OxWClsn-LfrAVOEb08G4y2MKbYGcaRtuaKjyL-q0szUtE6shEALyEj8a8RC4IHdJlalFU-sWsuT8Gzc4cc3s3c3YlkYVJoV4PNavpJ0LkcSlxFGoxBg5LaScqV7ygthbp4cGOYJ2L0BI9zoTrRdL4jBz9JokuXGavA9Y/4de/VaK1XpvQTuexOr_vw-pI3w/h0/h001.bju-jOdpn7VdVddnHbdT-mDPQScken7CVez_EN1ctfQ) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Dan Carr
subject: Apostate Age Is Here
body:
Bishop Budde is WRONG

| |
---|---|---
|
# Apostate Age Is Here
### Bishop Budde is WRONG
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Jan 23
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
The message delivered by Mariann Edgar Budde at yesterday's National Cathedral was not rooted in the Word of God, nor does he represent true biblical preaching. Instead of proclaiming the unchanging truth of Scripture, his message reflected the troubling reality of woke, apostate churches that have strayed far from the foundational doctrines of the faith. These churches have abandoned the clear teachings of the Bible--sin, judgment, atonement, repentance, and salvation through Christ alone--and have instead embraced a watered-down, feel-good gospel that offers no real hope, no true transformation, and no eternal salvation.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/6756a4e4-ac5f-4d62-9aa1-f3882264e2ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
This is why it is more critical than ever for true believers to stand firm and boldly proclaim the truth of God's Word. We must lift our voices like a trumpet, warning the people that the enemy is here, seeking to deceive, distort, and destroy. The time for silence is over; the time for compromise has passed. Now is the hour to declare, without hesitation, that salvation is found only in Jesus Christ, and that without Him, there is no hope for mankind. Let us remain vigilant, unwavering, and faithful to the calling to preach the gospel in and out of season, no matter the cost.
