# [Stay informed. Run for something. Support whistleblowers.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=155540833&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1NTQwODMzLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc2NjIxNzMsImV4cCI6MTc0MDI1NDE3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.ITCu6UWHJTz6TSvEV-hl2LtCE4oDkKHhqrEtZgujRfc)
### Three important asks for what's ahead.
Jan 23
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=155540833&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1NTQwODMzLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczNzY2MjE3MywiZXhwIjoxNzQwMjU0MTczLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjgzNDQ5Iiwic3ViIjoicmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.pTe30PiyiRtcYYSUYmbtMguqO3llqMkqx4CYOXA1viM&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=155540833&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1NTQwODMzLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc2NjIxNzMsImV4cCI6MTc0MDI1NDE3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.ITCu6UWHJTz6TSvEV-hl2LtCE4oDkKHhqrEtZgujRfc&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=283449&post_id=155540833&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1NTQwODMzLCJpYXQiOjE3Mzc2NjIxNzMsImV4cCI6MTc0MDI1NDE3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI4MzQ0OSIsInN1YiI6InBvc3QtcmVhY3Rpb24ifQ.ITCu6UWHJTz6TSvEV-hl2LtCE4oDkKHhqrEtZgujRfc)
---
| | [](https://substack..lXZ3xVRanjyv4VP9SNz27TnTHDw4uYctk8L74SOPl1E?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/rebekahjones/p/stay-informed-run-for-something-support?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Reading over the executive orders signed by Trump in his first three days -- many in [flagrant violation of the United States Constitutio](https://substack.com/redirect/9a93511d-ee37-4e35-b54b-3cbf54cf368c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)n -- it's hard to not feel like our country is in a philosophical war with itself.
The "sickness of America's soul" that I've [spoken about in the past](https://substack.com/redirect/33736584-78f0-454f-8678-154097e1c732?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) appears to be winning the battle for our future.
Which is why all of us - you, me, _everyone_ \- need to start planning now if we want to take meaningful action and stop this infection before we rot from the inside out.
* * *
#### Stay informed.
I've been shocked by how misinformed many Democrats have been about current affairs -- from Israeli war crimes to TikTok bans, we can't afford to be misinformed.
We have fallen into many of the same traps that have mislead republican voters -- we siloed ourselves off, only listening to those who largely take their orders from the Democratic party. I don't say that to shit on Democrats -- I'm a lifelong Democrat. But, no, they're not always right.
If you're getting your news from people who condemned the TikTok ban as censorship under Trump, then supported it under Biden, then again blamed Trump when he un-banned it, then you're not following someone with integrity.
If you're following people who attacked those who expressed concerns over Biden's age years ago, then went full-tilt toward Harris, then you're not listening to someone capable of independent thought.
If you're following people who can't name a single democratic policy they disagree with or even think can be improved, you're not following someone who is honest nor smart.
Don't just get your information through pundits and Democratic mouthpieces. Let's try to live up to our reputations by listening to the experts.
_Here are some of the most valuable subscriptions/follows I recommend:_
[Marc Elias,](https://substack.com/redirect/f3c249aa-2f3c-462c-9036-baa8ead97170?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) contributor at [Democracy Docket](https://substack.com/redirect/32e40591-7286-45ef-ae2e-d74a1c87ef3a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and one of (if not _the)_ leading attorneys challenging Trump's unconstitutional laws, provides invaluable insight into the legal challenges making their way through the courts.
[Austin Kocher](https://open.substack.com/users/20912231-austin-kocher?utm_source=mentions) is a professor at Syracuse University and provides expert commentary and resources related to immigration and refugee laws [through his substack](https://substack.com/redirect/661edaf8-f2c3-42a2-a076-c4af3f1f11b8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Jim Stewartson](https://substack.com/@jimstewartson) unmasked the real QAnon years ago (yes, it's Mike Flynn), and has since then been tracking disinformation campaigns and propaganda on his substack, [MindWar: The Psychological War on Democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/3b37f12d-3866-4a9e-9d96-12981a079dbb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). He's an important person to follow if you want to be ahead of the curve on what Russia and other countries are trying to force down America's throats.
[Mehdi Hasan](https://substack.com/@mehdirhasan) was one of the best and brightest at MSNBC. He and his team will keep you current on domestic and international affairs, and his new, independent news agency,[ Zeteo](https://substack.com/redirect/77ff9810-5798-4e9d-8364-fdfd113dd5c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), provides deep investigative reporting about critical issues. He's brought in some of the brightest people in media -- former Washington Post reporter [Taylor Lorenz](https://open.substack.com/users/1153079-taylor-lorenz?utm_source=mentions), Pakistani writer Fatima Bhutto, and geographer [Naomi Klein](https://open.substack.com/users/223941003-naomi-klein?utm_source=mentions).
Read the works of thought leaders like [Ta-Nehisi Coates](https://substack.com/redirect/f6e7f33d-b73d-49bf-b3d3-fb0af1c3f0be?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), provocateurs like [Jack Hopkins](https://open.substack.com/users/142752758-jack-hopkins?utm_source=mentions), and leaders like AOC.
For more traditional news, follow [Judd Legum](https://open.substack.com/users/364398-judd-legum?utm_source=mentions), [Joy-Ann Reid](https://open.substack.com/users/122253935-joy-ann-reid?utm_source=mentions), and [Brian Tyler Cohen](https://open.substack.com/users/110233861-brian-tyler-cohen?utm_source=mentions).
Be critical of what you read or see in the news. Ask questions. Don't ignore that voice in your head saying "this doesn't make sense." Learn to challenge your own assumptions. Our world is complicated.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..BrECWi1P_OqdtV6vq4X0Krf8asv5AFXeFBQq1dysXxw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155540833)
* * *
#### Run for something.
Running for office can be an amazing experience. That's not to say it's not without its ups and downs, but running for Congress was one of the most fun and rewarding experiences I've ever had.
Not everyone wants to be a public figure and I'll be the first to tell you that it is[ not an easy path](https://substack.com/redirect/a9b6ffcd-e1e1-463c-b76e-b25b6dcc7a7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
I'll also be the first to tell you that I never thought of myself as someone capable of doing the things I've done, to survive the things I've survived, and to be someone others admire and look to for strength and hope.
Not everyone who runs for office becomes a national or even statewide figure.
Planning to run for something big like Congress can take time -- maybe you're not ready this cycle, but you can run for something lower and work your way to it.
[Run For Something](https://substack.com/redirect/37508a08-1b2c-4c38-8765-bec7f638bd08?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)'s "[Where Can I Run In](https://substack.com/redirect/a24bf47a-b203-4140-b207-8c7d67c523c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)?" tool will tell you every office you're eligible to run for based on your address.
I am not running for Congress this term or any term in the near future. My representative -- Jamie Raskin -- is among the fiercest leaders in Congress and even if I wanted to challenge him (I don't), I wouldn't win.
I am, however, considering other races at the urging of advisors and party members here in Maryland.
If you want advice or help, you can reach out to me directly. I can also help direct you to organizations and groups who will help you.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..BrECWi1P_OqdtV6vq4X0Krf8asv5AFXeFBQq1dysXxw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155540833)
* * *
#### And for the love of God and this nation, **support whistleblowers**.
* [Whistleblowers of America](https://substack.com/redirect/02d75b22-6c5c-4793-b277-6c1ed7a9c033?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [National Whistleblower Center](https://substack.com/redirect/f9312d87-4e73-450a-8212-834b32843703?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [The Signals Network](https://substack.com/redirect/929aaeef-cee4-4e21-9df6-769251960e87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Psst](https://substack.com/redirect/a0b3e8e3-8d56-47ff-ac9c-90bed752f20a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Empower Oversight](https://substack.com/redirect/d3be9dff-40c1-44cd-97ef-e451f5123d46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Government Accountability Project (GAP)](https://substack.com/redirect/373b6976-a393-425f-9d3c-4baffd62e143?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Project on Government Oversight (POGO)](https://substack.com/redirect/4c778bb0-25f1-4528-9895-6f074fd6d6d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* [Public Employees for Environmental Responsibility (PEER)](https://substack.com/redirect/35289717-661b-492a-95b2-f47f1e96d298?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)\
* [Whistleblower Aid](https://substack.com/redirect/30a60fc7-87de-4324-8dd6-10846798eacf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

Contact me or any of the organizations listed above if you think you might want to come forward to report wrongdoing. I've worked directly with nearly every organization on this list. _Psst_ is a brand-new organization, but is headed by good people.
All previous advice -- document everything, find a lawyer, protect yourself -- still stands.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..BrECWi1P_OqdtV6vq4X0Krf8asv5AFXeFBQq1dysXxw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155540833)

Don't just get your information through pundits and Democratic mouthpieces. Let's try to live up to our reputations by listening to the experts. Here are some of the most valuable subscriptions/follows I recommend: contributor at and one of (if not the) leading attorneys challenging Trump's unconstitutional laws, provides invaluable insight into the legal challenges making their way through the courts. is a professor at Syracuse University and provides expert commentary and resources related to immigration and refugee laws . unmasked the real QAnon years ago (yes, it's Mike Flynn), and has since then been tracking disinformation campaigns and propaganda on his substack, . He's an important person to follow if you want to be ahead of the curve on what Russia and other countries are trying to force down America's throats. was one of the best and brightest at MSNBC. He and his team will keep you current on domestic and international affairs, and his new, independent news agency,, provides deep investigative reporting about critical issues. He's brought in some of the brightest people in media -- former Washington Post reporter , Pakistani writer Fatima Bhutto, and geographer . Read the works of thought leaders like , provocateurs like , and leaders like AOC. For more traditional news, follow , , and . Be critical of what you read or see in the news. Ask questions. Don't ignore that voice in your head saying "this doesn't make sense." Learn to challenge your own assumptions. Our world is complicated. Run for something. Running for office can be an amazing experience. That's not to say it's not without its ups and downs, but running for Congress was one of the most fun and rewarding experiences I've ever had. Not everyone wants to be a public figure and I'll be the first to tell you that it is. I'll also be the first to tell you that I never thought of myself as someone capable of doing the things I've done, to survive the things I've survived, and to be someone others admire and look to for strength and hope. Not everyone who runs for office becomes a national or even statewide figure. Planning to run for something big like Congress can take time -- maybe you're not ready this cycle, but you can run for something lower and work your way to it. "?" tool will tell you every office you're eligible to run for based on your address. I am not running for Congress this term or any term in the near future. My representative -- Jamie Raskin -- is among the fiercest leaders in Congress and even if I wanted to challenge him (I don't), I wouldn't win. I am, however, considering other races at the urging of advisors and party members here in Maryland. If you want advice or help, you can reach out to me directly. I can also help direct you to organizations and groups who will help you. And for the love of God and this nation, support whistleblowers. \ Contact me or any of the organizations listed above if you think you might want to come forward to report wrongdoing. I've worked directly with nearly every organization on this list. Psst is a brand-new organization, but is headed by good people. All previous advice -- document everything, find a lawyer, protect yourself -- still stands. You 're currently a free subscriber to Mesoscale.News with Rebekah Jones. For the full experience, upgrade your subscription. You can continue supporting my work by donating at one of the options below: Make checks payable and send to:** Rebekah Jones PO BOX 3371 Silver Spring, MD 20918 -30- | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Rebekah Jones PO BOX 3371, Silver Spring, MD 20918 ? ?

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100860882/524149440/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjI2OGFiMS1jNGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38wyZnZjUMqmxVA6Xj5tevz1yKuAeH5jdSNu5vg4mFY=&emci=3c268ab1-c4d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=3f268ab1-c4d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=15529135) | Friend, **I just introduced my first bill of the 119th Congress — the _Department of Education Protection Act_ — to shield the federal agency from efforts to dismantle it and ensure every student receives the free and appropriate public education they deserve.** In 1979, President Jimmy Carter oversaw the creation of the modern U.S. Department of Education, an accomplishment hailed as a hallmark of his legacy after his death. **The Department is vital for providing equal educational opportunity for all and protecting the rights of students.** As a teacher, I have seen how the Department of Education makes public education possible & supports students every day. During the 2024 campaign, the incoming Administration repeatedly vowed to “close” the agency if they regained power. Several members of Congress have also led legislation to abolish and defund the Dept of Education. As an educator, I know the Department of Education ensures consistent protections for the rights of all students. Given this troubling rhetoric, it felt necessary to show my unequivocal support for public education. [**Add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of my legislation to protect the Department of Education. Together, we will fend off attempts to abolish the agency and make sure public education is secured nationwide.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100860886/524149443/1289838999?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjI2OGFiMS1jNGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38wyZnZjUMqmxVA6Xj5tevz1yKuAeH5jdSNu5vg4mFY=&emci=3c268ab1-c4d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=3f268ab1-c4d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=15529135) | [ADD MY NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100860888/524149447/1289838999?contactdata=doIow4P/1WmdUPR3U9i4mQpEka4vVMLQsg8GpdU6bqoXZelJiHpnP7lretAlTneep8Glz5cH2yMXq4Y5GGhcEreJ92epfBmo/l+isv7ca613wDP2WW1K97oGq9AHEf4lUkVPo6cBK81QtPK5Vup9bA==&refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjI2OGFiMS1jNGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38wyZnZjUMqmxVA6Xj5tevz1yKuAeH5jdSNu5vg4mFY=&emci=3c268ab1-c4d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=3f268ab1-c4d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=15529135)

Public education is important because it provides young people with the skills and knowledge they need to participate in society and the economy and helps to develop informed and engaged citizens.
The Department of Education is a vital part of that work. Instead of depleting the agency of its resources, we must invest in its ability to promote student achievement, foster education excellence, and ensure equal access.
This begins with investing more — not less — into our children.
**[Add your name to become a citizen co-sponsor of the _Department of Education Protection Act_ today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100860893/524149478/1289838999?refcode=AU_JH_EG_GEN_PET_AC90_20250123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjI2OGFiMS1jNGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=38wyZnZjUMqmxVA6Xj5tevz1yKuAeH5jdSNu5vg4mFY=&emci=3c268ab1-c4d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=3f268ab1-c4d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=15529135)**

clean_body: | | Friend, I just introduced my first bill of the 119th Congress — the Department of Education Protection Act — to shield the federal agency from efforts to dismantle it and ensure every student receives the free and appropriate public education they deserve. In 1979, President Jimmy Carter oversaw the creation of the modern U.S. Department of Education, an accomplishment hailed as a hallmark of his legacy after his death. The Department is vital for providing equal educational opportunity for all and protecting the rights of students. As a teacher, I have seen how the Department of Education makes public education possible & supports students every day. During the 2024 campaign, the incoming Administration repeatedly vowed to “close” the agency if they regained power. Several members of Congress have also led legislation to abolish and defund the Dept of Education. As an educator, I know the Department of Education ensures consistent protections for the rights of all students. Given this troubling rhetoric, it felt necessary to show my unequivocal support for public education. | Public education is important because it provides young people with the skills and knowledge they need to participate in society and the economy and helps to develop informed and engaged citizens. The Department of Education is a vital part of that work. Instead of depleting the agency of its resources, we must invest in its ability to promote student achievement, foster education excellence, and ensure equal access. This begins with investing more — not less — into our children. Ever grateful, Jahana | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: Mark Takano
subject: Republicans lied to us about cutting Social Security. Who saw that coming?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
(Me. I saw this coming.)

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100860880/524149438/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjJmOGM5Yy1jNGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LpJ_DBH2Ps3DkVeJ_6Z9ZjrTfM98J8TvgYQMakEJCVc=)
---
MAGA Republicans spent the entire election cycle saying they had no intentions to cut Social Security, Medicare, or any other critical safety nets... **but now:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100860883/524149441/-1812100472?refcode=MTFC_20250123_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjJmOGM5Yy1jNGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LpJ_DBH2Ps3DkVeJ_6Z9ZjrTfM98J8TvgYQMakEJCVc=&emci=96526409-1ed5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=df2f8c9c-c4d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=18839602) They’re doing _all of this_ just to pay for another round of tax breaks for the top .01% of Americans. Billionaires like Elon Musk, with more wealth than they can possibly spend in a lifetime – several lifetimes, even.

**Look, I won’t BS you here:** Democrats are standing on a tough side of a federal trifecta. And until we start flipping House seats in special elections, our best tool to fight MAGA Republicans attempts to rollback Social Security is making our voices heard.

[**So I’m hoping I can count on you as an engaged supporter, just willing to add your name to this petition of folks willing to defend Social Security. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100860885/524149444/-1812100472?refcode=MTFC_20250123_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjJmOGM5Yy1jNGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LpJ_DBH2Ps3DkVeJ_6Z9ZjrTfM98J8TvgYQMakEJCVc=&emci=96526409-1ed5-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=df2f8c9c-c4d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=18839602)

Look, I know your signature won’t make MAGA members of Congress have epiphanies of decency, but it will show us that we’re not standing alone.

So with Trump's 2nd term officially underway, and an all out political brawl about to take place over defending Social Security, I’m hoping I can count on you as a loyal defender of Social Security. I saw this coming.) | = MAGA Republicans spent the entire election cycle saying they had no intentions to cut Social Security, Medicare, or any other critical safety nets... but now: They’re doing all of this just to pay for another round of tax breaks for the top .01% of Americans. Billionaires like Elon Musk, with more wealth than they can possibly spend in a lifetime – several lifetimes, even. Look, I won’t BS you here: Democrats are standing on a tough side of a federal trifecta. And until we start flipping House seats in special elections, our best tool to fight MAGA Republicans attempts to rollback Social Security is making our voices heard. Look, I know your signature won’t make MAGA members of Congress have epiphanies of decency, but it will show us that we’re not standing alone. Do you agree?| | | President Trump has a powerful message on the deportation of the millions of illegal immigrants who entered the U.S. under Joe Biden’s reign: **_[“We have no choice.”](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1473744e59534366abd4f99888bacc3c&_e=lSnJP57Yzl6ZiSRm9JLec3sVypWPCnOyIPU5nQ-CvwFu75KYlAAL6bVlcsI6L5CFh6Cd3qFgoX1EKLiyM_Xc3j1juyg0pnOs8TnRXNCa3964QZ8ZC0e7QdCNllfLQP3bBHv2enwIbsQ8ZyJEG7T5ItEaNEYrTq7b58_wtPpyFF5QnPCE7xgXYI8w5sDwVr7s65QTCG3iL6aAV917lw1lxfMTIF9HUlbzsi7Z-SmoFlNhwL2LxbdPRGjDmStVUrmcSCFk2noOSka47ACpp10LIXBn002h_w1NOClcKv1uXAdvSanyc_5R8bs5L9lunUABUYRAVyDSvY-ow4cZeZXcUmUe6LelXTB2-2di2oSGYi1hkwokqQEiNSHh21Cw5cvKblrMiapf60NQz-83Vfuuft_khSBhqVVFXRQSD1zTDRWSobQpEhms4hjYjdLvR1dgVcrwZ-Z9q2xrSwvVrV5mF90vesNcpw_JskpdwPQAKz_u3dPn7RZfB9zCNfPqQcM6)_** And he’s right. Under Joe Biden, millions of illegal immigrants poured into our country with no consequences. and American families have paid the price. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Birthright citizenship, ICE raids, and the Laken Riley Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, the Trump
administration and his GOP majority in the House and Senate have wasted no
time attacking our immigrant communities.

First, on Day 1 in the Oval Office, Trump signed an executive order
attempting to end birthright citizenship, which is a constitutional right
guaranteed by the 14th Amendment. It’s a massive legal overreach and would
have devastating impacts on millions of children born to undocumented
immigrants in the United States.

Then, he authorized ICE to conduct arrests in sensitive areas that were
previously off-limits like schools, courthouses, and places of worship. He
also threatened mass deportations and raids in cities across the country,
including sanctuary cities, sending immigrant communities into fear and
hiding.

Now, Trump is about to sign the Laken Riley Act into law after 12 Senate
Democrats and 46 House Democrats joined Republicans in passing it. As
Rashida Tlaib stated, “This bill puts a target on the back of millions of
our neighbors and increases the militarization of our neighborhoods,”
opening the door to detain and deport immigrants merely accused of a crime
without due process.

AOC rightly pointed out how this is a huge handout to private prison
companies, tweeting, “GEO Group is the nation’s largest private prison
company. Look for the members of Congress who either buy their stock or
take their money and vote YES on this bill. They are not voting for you -
they’re voting to enrich themselves.”

Not a single Justice Democrat voted for this bill. For our incumbents,
this is deeply personal—Delia Ramirez, a vocal immigration advocate, has
shared her own husband’s vulnerability to deportation, while Rashida
passionately opposed the bill, condemning its fearmongering and warning
how such policies could even target citizens. She spoke of her fear that
people like her mother could be stopped and profiled.

Far too many establishment and corporate Democrats are turning their backs
on immigrants for the sake of bipartisanship with MAGA Republicans or
their own personal gain.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250123?refcode=em20250123-36356&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36356_1203867_lidgyV&akid=36356%2E1203867%2ElidgyV ]We need more principled progressives like AOC, Delia, and Rashida in
Congress who will stand up for immigrants instead of throwing them under
the bus: will you help us recruit and elect the next Justice Democrats
candidates by pitching in to our 2026 Candidate Recruitment Fund now?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250123?refcode=em20250123-36356&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36356_1203867_lidgyV&akid=36356%2E1203867%2ElidgyV ]Contribute $5

With Trump in office for the next four years and more attacks on
immigrants to come, we need to elect as many progressives as we can to
help take back the House in 2026 and re-center human rights in the
Democratic Party.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250123-36356-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36356_1203867_lidgyV&akid=36356%2E1203867%2ElidgyV

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36356%2E1203867%2ElidgyV

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

name: With Honor Action
subject: Strengthening U.S.-Taiwan Economic Ties
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WITH HONOR ACTION, INC
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fab72bdc0928/2-acts-and-a-vp-nominee-14051232?e=33f53a5b1a)
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Friends, With Honor Action is proud to announce our endorsement of the United States-Taiwan Expedited Double-Tax Relief Act. This bipartisan legislation, supported by principled veteran leaders in the For Country Caucus, strengthens U.S.-Taiwan economic ties and ensures fair and equitable treatment for cross-border investments. The United States-Taiwan Expedited Double-Tax Relief Act bolsters the U.S. economic alliance with Taiwan and enhances America’s competitive position globally. By providing targeted and expedited relief from double taxation on cross-border investments between America and Taiwan, this bill enacts critical tax code changes and authorizes the President to broker and enter into a tax agreement specific to Taiwan. This impactful legislation is supported by For Country Caucus co-chair Rep. Jake Ellzey and members Rep. Steve Womack, Rep. Seth Moulton, Rep. Mikie Sherrill, Rep. Zach Nunn, and founding co-chair Rep. Jimmy Panetta. Their leadership demonstrates the power of veterans in Congress to advance meaningful global solutions through bipartisan cooperation.
---
|
---
| The U.S.-Taiwan Expedited Double-Tax Relief Act is a prime example of principled leadership to foster economic growth and strengthen international relationships. To learn more about this legislation and the veterans championing it, click [here](https://withhonor.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=80940e6d1b1e08928d721cf8d&id=55bbc8875c&e=33f53a5b1a).

name: COURIER
subject: When Bishop Budde asked for mercy, the far-right attacked
body:
Bishop Budde’s words were a courageous and honest call for compassion, rooted in the deepest values of the Christian faith: mercy, dignity, and justice for the marginalized.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100861462/524151162/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM5NGE1YjEtYzZkOS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zOgmhjp0hNkR5cLb9gT-Lv4K46FhGM8j-cVj05RBFA0=&emci=dd61f3ce-b8d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=6394a5b1-c6d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=14016711)

**Stand up to far right hate — stand with COURIER**
[**We need your help to fight for the truth. Help us hit our $50,000 January goal to fund fearless, factual reporting that holds the far-right accountable.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100861463/524151163/-1581427288?refcode=20250123-EM-Bishop-Budde&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM5NGE1YjEtYzZkOS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zOgmhjp0hNkR5cLb9gT-Lv4K46FhGM8j-cVj05RBFA0=) **[Chip in $25 Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100861465/524151165/-1581427288?refcode=20250123-EM-Bishop-Budde&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM5NGE1YjEtYzZkOS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zOgmhjp0hNkR5cLb9gT-Lv4K46FhGM8j-cVj05RBFA0=)**
---
Peter,
At Tuesday’s National Cathedral inaugural prayer service, Episcopal Bishop Mariann Budde stood before Donald Trump, J.D. Vance, and their families and made a plea for mercy.
**She asked Donald Trump to show compassion for LGBTQ kids and immigrant families—many of whom are terrified about what his second term could mean for their lives:**
_"In the name of our God, I ask you to have mercy upon the people in our country who are scared now."_
Bishop Budde’s words were a courageous and honest call for compassion, rooted in the deepest values of the Christian faith: mercy, dignity, and justice for the marginalized. But what happened next showed just how coordinated and effective the far-right media machine has become in silencing dissent and distorting truth.
**[We’ll explain more in a moment, but can you chip in $25 to support the progressive media alternative America desperately needs? Together, we can lift up voices of truth and stand strong against the far right.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100861467/524151167/2081197767?refcode=20250123-EM-Bishop-Budde&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM5NGE1YjEtYzZkOS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zOgmhjp0hNkR5cLb9gT-Lv4K46FhGM8j-cVj05RBFA0=)**
**In the right-wing media, the response to Budde’s plea for compassion was swift, brutal, and orchestrated.**
Donald Trump started the attacks on Truth Social, calling her a “so-called bishop” and accusing her of spreading lies. _Fox News_ and far-right influencers followed his lead, smearing Budde’s character and twisting her words:
* **Sean Hannity** called her sermon “a disgraceful prayer full of fearmongering and division.”
* Far-right influencer **Matt Walsh** claimed she was “blasphemous” and said, “Hell exists for people like Mariann.”
* _Fox’s_ **Greg Gutfeld** went so far as to call her “Satan,” saying she represents “compassion exploited for terrible beliefs."

These attacks are part of a larger strategy by Trump and his allies: intimidate dissenters, and create fear to silence those who dare speak the truth and challenge their agenda.
**And right now, their strategy is working.**
That’s why your support for COURIER is so urgent right now. We’re building a progressive media alternative to counter their lies and lift up the voices they want to silence.
**Where they distort, we tell the truth. Where they bully, we empower.**
But we can’t do any of this without your help.
**We’ve set an urgent goal to raise $50,000 by the end of January to expand our reach and stand up to the far-right’s influence. Your support will help us:**
* Deliver factual, fearless reporting that holds power accountable.
* Push back against right-wing intimidation and propaganda.
* Bring truth directly to the people who need it most.

[**Please, chip in $25 today to support the fight for truth >>>>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100861469/524151168/2081197767?refcode=20250123-EM-Bishop-Budde&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM5NGE1YjEtYzZkOS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zOgmhjp0hNkR5cLb9gT-Lv4K46FhGM8j-cVj05RBFA0=)
**[Chip in $25 now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100861470/524151171/-1581427288?refcode=20250123-EM-Bishop-Budde&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjM5NGE1YjEtYzZkOS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=zOgmhjp0hNkR5cLb9gT-Lv4K46FhGM8j-cVj05RBFA0=)**

clean_body: Bishop Budde’s words were a courageous and honest call for compassion, rooted in the deepest values of the Christian faith: mercy, dignity, and justice for the marginalized. Stand up to far right hate — stand with COURIER = = Peter, At Tuesday’s National Cathedral inaugural prayer service, Episcopal Bishop Mariann Budde stood before Donald Trump, J.D. Vance, and their families and made a plea for mercy. She asked Donald Trump to show compassion for LGBTQ kids and immigrant families—many of whom are terrified about what his second term could mean for their lives: "In the name of our God, I ask you to have mercy upon the people in our country who are scared now." Bishop Budde’s words were a courageous and honest call for compassion, rooted in the deepest values of the Christian faith: mercy, dignity, and justice for the marginalized. But what happened next showed just how coordinated and effective the far-right media machine has become in silencing dissent and distorting truth. = In the right-wing media, the response to Budde’s plea for compassion was swift, brutal, and orchestrated. Donald Trump started the attacks on Truth Social, calling her a “so-called bishop” and accusing her of spreading lies. Fox News and far-right influencers followed his lead, smearing Budde’s character and twisting her words: Sean Hannity called her sermon “a disgraceful prayer full of fearmongering and division.” Far-right influencer Matt Walsh claimed she was “blasphemous” and said, “Hell exists for people like Mariann.” Fox’s Greg Gutfeld went so far as to call her “Satan,” saying she represents “compassion exploited for terrible beliefs." These attacks are part of a larger strategy by Trump and his allies: intimidate dissenters, and create fear to silence those who dare speak the truth and challenge their agenda. And right now, their strategy is working. That’s why your support for COURIER is so urgent right now. We’re building a progressive media alternative to counter their lies and lift up the voices they want to silence. Where they distort, we tell the truth. Where they bully, we empower. But we can’t do any of this without your help. We’ve set an urgent goal to raise $50,000 by the end of January to expand our reach and stand up to the far-right’s influence. Your support will help us: Deliver factual, fearless reporting that holds power accountable. Push back against right-wing intimidation and propaganda. Bring truth directly to the people who need it most. = = Thank you for standing with us in the fight for truth. In solidarity, The COURIER Team Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

name: Jane Fonda
subject: We need to talk about this.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
(The pipeline that poisoned California’s waters might restart.)

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100861637/524151867/1328794144?refcode=ea.4684f7a6-c7d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.4684f7a6-c7d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2ODRmN2E2LWM3ZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=137HPBYCg5oj2KK3qQmdFyqYQLXCWfDbd-aeak2zcxw=&emci=fab40d6b-bcd1-ef11-88d0-0022482a9d92&emdi=4684f7a6-c7d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=4823105)
---
Santa Barbara, California has long been a battleground for environmental progress. It’s where, in response to the devastating 1969 oil spill, activists launched an environmental movement that changed this country forever. Communities came together to demand protections for our coastlines and oceans, leading to the creation of the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency and Earth Day. Now, Santa Barbara is at the center of another environmental fight. An old, defunct pipeline — **_one that ruptured in 2015 and spilled more than 120,000 gallons of crude oil into the Pacific Ocean_** — is set to restart operations. A Houston-based oil and gas company, Sable Offshore Corp., plans to restart drilling from three offshore platforms and pump oil through that same pipeline, running for miles along California’s Gaviota Coast. This stretch of coastline is one of the last undeveloped treasures of Southern California, a sanctuary for wildlife and natural beauty. You might be wondering how this can happen when President Biden banned new offshore drilling. The answer is simple but infuriating — this isn’t considered _new_ drilling. Because the pipeline is being “restarted,” it falls outside the scope of Biden’s executive action. That’s how Big Oil and its enablers are working around climate protections to keep their dangerous operations alive. When the pipeline failed in 2015, it poisoned the waters, killed sea lions, dolphins, and birds, and spread oil to beaches and waters as far as 100 miles south. The damage rippled outward — fisheries closed, tourism suffered, and residents felt the heartbreak of watching their homes and ecosystems destroyed. Now, Sable Offshore claims they’ve “fixed” the pipeline. They’ve repaired corroded sections and added new safety measures. They argue that restarting this operation will bring jobs and boost the local economy. But here’s the truth: the risk of another spill isn’t gone. Environmental experts warn that resuming operations could lead to spills every year, with a major rupture expected every four years. If that happens, the damage could surpass the 2015 disaster. Santa Barbara County has ambitious goals to cut greenhouse gas emissions by 2030, but this project would make those goals nearly impossible to achieve. Environmentalists are speaking out because they know what’s at stake — not just for Santa Barbara, but for the planet. This is bigger than one pipeline. It’s about the fossil fuel industry clinging to a destructive status quo. It’s about politicians who enable environmental recklessness, including Donald Trump, who has pledged to "drill, baby, drill." It’s about whether we continue to extract and burn every last ounce of oil or choose a different path — one where we protect our coasts, invest in renewable energy, and secure a livable future for our children and grandchildren. Our mission at JanePAC is to elect leaders who won’t bow to Big Oil. Leaders who will fight for our climate, our communities, and all of us. This fight is why we exist. Santa Barbara taught us what’s possible when people come together to demand change. We need that spirit now more than ever. If you’re as outraged as I am, share this story. Tell your friends and family what’s happening on California’s coast. Remind them that the fossil fuel industry’s greed doesn’t stop, and neither can we. **[And if you’re able to, chip in any amount you can to power our mission at JanePAC and elect climate champions who will never stop to defeat the fossil fuel industry.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100861638/524151868/2105508926?refcode=ea.4684f7a6-c7d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.4684f7a6-c7d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2ODRmN2E2LWM3ZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=137HPBYCg5oj2KK3qQmdFyqYQLXCWfDbd-aeak2zcxw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100861639/524151869/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.4684f7a6-c7d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.4684f7a6-c7d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2ODRmN2E2LWM3ZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=137HPBYCg5oj2KK3qQmdFyqYQLXCWfDbd-aeak2zcxw=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100861640/524151870/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.4684f7a6-c7d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.4684f7a6-c7d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ2ODRmN2E2LWM3ZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=137HPBYCg5oj2KK3qQmdFyqYQLXCWfDbd-aeak2zcxw=)

clean_body: (The pipeline that poisoned California’s waters might restart.) | Santa Barbara, California has long been a battleground for environmental progress. It’s where, in response to the devastating 1969 oil spill, activists launched an environmental movement that changed this country forever. Communities came together to demand protections for our coastlines and oceans, leading to the creation of the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency and Earth Day. Now, Santa Barbara is at the center of another environmental fight. An old, defunct pipeline — one that ruptured in 2015 and spilled more than 120,000 gallons of crude oil into the Pacific Ocean — is set to restart operations. A Houston-based oil and gas company, Sable Offshore Corp., plans to restart drilling from three offshore platforms and pump oil through that same pipeline, running for miles along California’s Gaviota Coast. This stretch of coastline is one of the last undeveloped treasures of Southern California, a sanctuary for wildlife and natural beauty. You might be wondering how this can happen when President Biden banned new offshore drilling. The answer is simple but infuriating — this isn’t considered new drilling. Because the pipeline is being “restarted,” it falls outside the scope of Biden’s executive action. That’s how Big Oil and its enablers are working around climate protections to keep their dangerous operations alive. When the pipeline failed in 2015, it poisoned the waters, killed sea lions, dolphins, and birds, and spread oil to beaches and waters as far as 100 miles south. The damage rippled outward — fisheries closed, tourism suffered, and residents felt the heartbreak of watching their homes and ecosystems destroyed. Now, Sable Offshore claims they’ve “fixed” the pipeline. They’ve repaired corroded sections and added new safety measures. They argue that restarting this operation will bring jobs and boost the local economy. But here’s the truth: the risk of another spill isn’t gone. Environmental experts warn that resuming operations could lead to spills every year, with a major rupture expected every four years. If that happens, the damage could surpass the 2015 disaster. Santa Barbara County has ambitious goals to cut greenhouse gas emissions by 2030, but this project would make those goals nearly impossible to achieve. Environmentalists are speaking out because they know what’s at stake — not just for Santa Barbara, but for the planet. This is bigger than one pipeline. It’s about the fossil fuel industry clinging to a destructive status quo. It’s about politicians who enable environmental recklessness, including Donald Trump, who has pledged to "drill, baby, drill." It’s about whether we continue to extract and burn every last ounce of oil or choose a different path — one where we protect our coasts, invest in renewable energy, and secure a livable future for our children and grandchildren. Our mission at JanePAC is to elect leaders who won’t bow to Big Oil. Leaders who will fight for our climate, our communities, and all of us. This fight is why we exist. Santa Barbara taught us what’s possible when people come together to demand change. We need that spirit now more than ever. If you’re as outraged as I am, share this story. Tell your friends and family what’s happening on California’s coast. Remind them that the fossil fuel industry’s greed doesn’t stop, and neither can we. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, \- Jane Fonda = P.S. If you’ve been impacted by the fires in Southern California and need a break from our emails, Take care of what matters most, and we’ll be here when you're ready. | = | = = Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

And if we lose these Special Elections, we could be looking at a TOTAL COLLAPSE of our House Majority. This means we have no choice but to mobilize our entire Conservative grassroots network. Friend, we need your support right now. This could be the make-or-break for saving our Republican Trifecta. "So please consider contributing what you can today. " | "PLEASE DONATE NOW" Every single dollar makes a difference. We mean that. Thank you, House GOP | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. # AMANDA CHASE
---
|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
|
# SESSION BEGINS AT 11AM
---
| Dear Hello The schedule for tomorrow, Friday, January 24 has changed from the one printed in the calendar above.
More subcommittees and committee meetings have been added to include: The Senate Finance subcommittee on Capital Outlay and Transportation is now meeting at 8am in Senate Room 1300 and the General Laws Committee, 15 minutes after session in Senate Room B in the General Assembly Building.
Also, please note that the full Senate gavels in for session at 11am instead of noon. The Senate usually gavels in earlier on Fridays.
Now that that's behind us, let's get to bills that have passed the Senate yesterday and which ones are coming up tomorrow.
As I've stated before, the Senate of Virginia is controlled by Democrats. That means all of the committees and subcommittees are stacked so that most if not all of the Democrat sponsored bills will pass subcommittee, committee and then the Senate floor.
If you're trying to figure out if a particular Senate bill has passed, if it was sponsored by a Democrat, chances are that it passed.
Today in Senate Health and Education, the makeup of the committee is 10 Democrats to 4 Republicans.
As a result, bills passed 10-4 out of Senate Health and Education. As an example, Democrat Senator Locke's SB740, passed. This bill directs the Board of Medicine to require unconscious and cultural bias and cultural and competency training as part of the continuing educational requirements for renewal of license. All 4 Republicans voted against the bill, but it was not enough to stop the bill, which is now heading to the Senate floor.
Speaking of the Senate floor, the Senate only debates bills on their third Constitutional read.
The good news is that Governor Glenn Youngkin has the final say on all of the bills, with the exception of Constitutional Amendments.
If you'd like to see which bills passed on the list that I emailed out to you yesterday, please refer to that email and click on the bill number to find the bill history and votes.
If you have questions, please feel free to reply to this email and I'll do my best to answer your questions.

clean_body: The 2025 General Assembly Session | | | | 2025 THE HONEY BADGER REPORT | | | | | | | 2025 SESSION Friday What can you expect? | ATTEND IN PERSON OR CALL IN TO THE MEETING LIVE | Friday Senate Committee Meetings (note 2 additional meetings have been added) | | | BILLS COMING UP FRIDAY BY COMMITTEE | == | == | == | == == \- Public school libraries; removal of certain books, report. | == | == | == | AMANDA CHASE | VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER | SESSION BEGINS AT 11AM | Dear Hello The schedule for tomorrow, Friday, January 24 has changed from the one printed in the calendar above. More subcommittees and committee meetings have been added to include: The Senate Finance subcommittee on Capital Outlay and Transportation is now meeting at 8am in Senate Room 1300 and the General Laws Committee, 15 minutes after session in Senate Room B in the General Assembly Building. Also, please note that the full Senate gavels in for session at 11am instead of noon. The Senate usually gavels in earlier on Fridays. Now that that's behind us, let's get to bills that have passed the Senate yesterday and which ones are coming up tomorrow. As I've stated before, the Senate of Virginia is controlled by Democrats. That means all of the committees and subcommittees are stacked so that most if not all of the Democrat sponsored bills will pass subcommittee, committee and then the Senate floor. If you're trying to figure out if a particular Senate bill has passed, if it was sponsored by a Democrat, chances are that it passed. Today in Senate Health and Education, the makeup of the committee is 10 Democrats to 4 Republicans. As a result, bills passed 10-4 out of Senate Health and Education. As an example, Democrat Senator Locke's SB740, passed. This bill directs the Board of Medicine to require unconscious and cultural bias and cultural and competency training as part of the continuing educational requirements for renewal of license. All 4 Republicans voted against the bill, but it was not enough to stop the bill, which is now heading to the Senate floor. Speaking of the Senate floor, the Senate only debates bills on their third Constitutional read. The good news is that Governor Glenn Youngkin has the final say on all of the bills, with the exception of Constitutional Amendments. If you'd like to see which bills passed on the list that I emailed out to you yesterday, please refer to that email and click on the bill number to find the bill history and votes. If you have questions, please feel free to reply to this email and I'll do my best to answer your questions. | | | | | | | | | | | IMPORTANT DATES | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION IMPORTANT DATES Begins: Wednesday, January 8 at noon Crossover: Tuesday, February 4 Ends: Saturday, February 22 Last Day for Governor's Actions: Monday, March 24 Reconvene: Wednesday, April 2 | IMPORTANT LINKS | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | | == | SUPPORT AMANDA HERE | While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated. As long as my costs are covered, I can continue to provide this service to you. For starters, my email service costs about $300 per month. So please help out financially if you can. name: Team GIFFORDS
subject: [ADD YOUR NAME] Say no to Kash Patel →
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We can’t trust Donald Trump’s pick for FBI Director to keep us safe
#

Friends -
The FBI is our nation’s top law enforcement agency, and one of its main objectives should be to protect the public from gun violence. But if Kash Patel—President Trump’s nominee for FBI Director—were to be confirmed, there’s no question that his loyalties would lie with the corporate gun lobby and Donald Trump instead of the American people.
[**Kash Patel is a deeply unqualified and dangerous pick to serve as the FBI Director. Will you add your name to our petition today to call on the Senate to vote “no” on confirming him to this very important position?**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_patel_pet/?source=em250123-1-b&refcode2=9877.3935704.0yyLmQ&akid=9877%2E3935704%2E0yyLmQ)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_patel_pet/?source=em250123-1-b&refcode2=9877.3935704.0yyLmQ&akid=9877%2E3935704%2E0yyLmQ)**
Kash Patel’s track record should concern us all. To start, Patel is a known conspiracy theorist with ties to QAnon.
Patel has said that if he were to be confirmed, he would shut down the FBI headquarters on day one and make it a “museum of the deep state.” Instead of denouncing the rioters who desecrated our nation’s Capitol on January 6, 2021, Patel has spread the completely baseless claim that the FBI helped instigate the attack on our Capitol.
Kash Patel has also shown that he would much rather cozy up to the gun lobby than prioritize commonsense gun safety policies that would make our country safer. He has criticized former ATF director Steve Dettelbach for supporting a ban on bump stocks—even though this ban was enacted during Trump’s first administration after the deadly shooting at the Route 91 Harvest Music Festival in Las Vegas.
Patel is also backed by the extreme pro-gun group Gun Owners for America. One of the top executives of GOA even went so far as to say that under Patel’s leadership, a “reckoning is coming.”
[**Let us be clear: a right-wing conspiracy theorist should not be confirmed to serve as the director of the FBI. If you agree, please add your name to our petition and tell the Senate to vote “no” on confirming Kash Patel.**](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_patel_pet/?source=em250123-1-b&refcode2=9877.3935704.0yyLmQ&akid=9877%2E3935704%2E0yyLmQ)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.giffords.org/signup/giffords_em_patel_pet/?source=em250123-1-b&refcode2=9877.3935704.0yyLmQ&akid=9877%2E3935704%2E0yyLmQ)**
Thank you for using your voice today to help us hold Trump accountable for his dangerous cabinet picks.
\- Team GIFFORDS

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1&akid=9877%2E3935704%2E0yyLmQ) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Jeff Younger
subject: A California court ruled that my son can be chemically castrated...
body:
| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
| | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8f6057bfabde45558ee0440358813d4e&_e=N3SRqr8fpOGfUUZBNcbywcL2mWsaA2lHnhXeF5Wtl0Wgw-TM1D0ZSnnDMsQpAH_ATpTRvW0e1zsKGYNZCrWA8jTSlu-hPGvmF9dSN2xG_DNecIVstX0HzKnxB_hLdbK9an5zl_FJtzTidWt03tAll2oL0wEgO0mT6HiEIZlmx6GHcCJjpUL1BrQWD7mBLSMqsEZUdDJvxKtDsVfKtYxd2y0I7Cjm6dvvHmma-MarFJmw8wGsa2CA-RGm-cLGA60H4ed7xvv7FJIdH4Un1Fify4hdyg4a7Dnsutza4hhyQ_ZcN3W6qQImpxSNiTkK2TREkXWet97lj_jIDw9_Xa_r4bHWuIfOTbciG3rNzXSrzF2glUxtEdgKVBqu62k6LCyenf8oyJtxsWaT7pC8vEIm0g%3D%3D)
---
My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. **[I need your help.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8f6057bfabde45558ee0440358813d4e&_e=N3SRqr8fpOGfUUZBNcbywcL2mWsaA2lHnhXeF5Wtl0Wgw-TM1D0ZSnnDMsQpAH_ATpTRvW0e1zsKGYNZCrWA8jTSlu-hPGvmF9dSN2xG_DNecIVstX0HzKnxB_hLdbK9an5zl_FJtzTidWt03tAll2oL0wEgO0mT6HiEIZlmx6GHcCJjpUL1BrQWD7mBLSMqsEZUdDJvxKtDsVfKtYxd2y0I7Cjm6dvvHmma-MarFJnysz4A7O0uWgR6mLtdrv2TcZwUhMEJfkLlfZ3RaqeQk-q-3PGn0dI69vu_iv_cOTlLet9WWZSeY19ohcPWPFNmlu7HbzrI7h2GfpFcnqnShGYFlwYpGKA3mBvcyA2mz2geE2ZLUIM6MpfGCRuOvpKJA8Og-4XZIf05ssSYVK20dw%3D%3D)** I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to **Save James** , **[would you consider making a generous $25 contribution to my Legal Defense Fund today?](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8f6057bfabde45558ee0440358813d4e&_e=N3SRqr8fpOGfUUZBNcbywcL2mWsaA2lHnhXeF5Wtl0Wgw-TM1D0ZSnnDMsQpAH_ATpTRvW0e1zsKGYNZCrWA8jTSlu-hPGvmF9dSN2xG_DNecIVstX0HzKnxB_hLdbK9an5zl_FJtzTidWt03tAll2oL0wEgO0mT6HiEIZlmx6GHcCJjpUL1BrQWD7mBLSMqsEZUdDJvxKtDsVfKtYxd2y0I7Cjm6dvvHmma-MarFJmzzijGtPuk9fXzM8Pwii54WjNtvGOIK9uM6qvz-5T8M3ne1bvgOHsx0ROwbFPgEoU2orygyiPRtS1aYcuxavJMzXbvqLGFEDyoQ1oTqTaaMWTHMvCODpZ6XlrLnX7pJeWJiJBtBZGyhsXIPi0BsIp2Pa0ER9b5mRO_qcG8lLNiig%3D%3D)** But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because **he is a boy**. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.**Do you see what we’re up against?** I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And **James** needs to be **saved** from their butchery.**[THAT’S why I need your help.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=8f6057bfabde45558ee0440358813d4e&_e=N3SRqr8fpOGfUUZBNcbywcL2mWsaA2lHnhXeF5Wtl0Wgw-TM1D0ZSnnDMsQpAH_ATpTRvW0e1zsKGYNZCrWA8jTSlu-hPGvmF9dSN2xG_DNecIVstX0HzKnxB_hLdbK9an5zl_FJtzTidWt03tAll2oL0wEgO0mT6HiEIZlmx6GHcCJjpUL1BrQWD7mBLSMqsEZUdDJvxKtDsVfKtYxd2y0I7Cjm6dvvHmma-MarFJnRQFHwLoXtC3luDlFT4cDcXhyCkoSAykTt7H7NmjhV5dbzLWspFAvKvuktXn95XRoG6_gCzq_J1adEvqG7lnE1TVSrd-Ccd6zz2n8b0rDFrMx9LEoqWjps14YbmqEzfR-SBBboPEUCX7goc2N05K0hyJ9L3_s57klXzGwib7MQrQ%3D%3D)** I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on **James**.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:**If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere.** Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...**Do you see what we’re up against?** But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. clean_body: | | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to Save James , But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because he is a boy. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.Do you see what we’re up against? I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And James needs to be saved from their butchery. I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on James.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere. Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...Do you see what we’re up against? But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. | | | | | | | The fact is, if you care about keeping your children or grandchildren safe...If you want to save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again...And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come...Then you’ll need someone who knows how these kangaroo courts ACTUALLY operate, and someone who’s willing to do WHATEVER it takes to save his son and every other kid like him.I humbly submit to you that I am that man. Your Warrior on the Frontlines,Jeff Younger P.S. I need your help to save my son. I have fought for a decade to keep radical activists and judges from transitioning my son against my will and against all reason. I have lobbied politicians, wiped out my life’s savings, and spent thousands of hours in court trying to save my son. Would you please rush me your I need your help, and I need to know that I’m not alone in this fight. Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

name: Team Jayapal
subject: We know what we saw.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Now is the time to stand up and fight for our values, our democracy, and our rights.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250123-4695-footer&t=1&akid=4695%2E420207%2EX96ezU)
Peter, it's been three days since Donald Trump took office, and his top donor — and seemingly co-president — is already making gestures behind the presidential seal that can only be described as a Nazi salute:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250123?refcode=em20250123-4695&amount=3&refcode2=4695_420207_X96ezU&akid=4695%2E420207%2EX96ezU)
[**Will you rush an immediate donation of $3 or more to help Pramila do everything she can to check this administration in Congress and build a movement that can defeat them in the next election?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250123?refcode=em20250123-4695&amount=3&refcode2=4695_420207_X96ezU&akid=4695%2E420207%2EX96ezU)
We know what we saw, and we won’t be gaslit into believing otherwise. But as appalling as this gesture is, it’s not the only thing about the new administration that has us deeply worried:
* Trump just issued a flurry of executive orders with the obvious goal of eventually **making every immigrant deportable**

* He rescinded longstanding executive orders on **equal opportunity employment** , including some dating all the way back to LBJ in the 1960s

* And they’re going after **LGBTQ+ rights** in every way possible

It’s just as bad as Pramila warned, Peter, and we’re only three days in.
**Now is not the time to check out or cower in fear. Now is the time to stand up and fight for our values, our democracy, and our rights.[Will you pitch in $3 to Pramila’s people-powered campaign today and help her keep fighting?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250123?refcode=em20250123-4695&amount=3&refcode2=4695_420207_X96ezU&akid=4695%2E420207%2EX96ezU)**
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250123?amount=3&refcode=em20250123-4695&refcode2=4695_420207_X96ezU&akid=4695%2E420207%2EX96ezU)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250123-4695-footer&t=2&refcode2=4695_420207_X96ezU&akid=4695%2E420207%2EX96ezU)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=4695%2E420207%2EX96ezU)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=4695%2E420207%2EX96ezU)

| | | [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=346b01423ecb45d7aadfef0de64ebee2&_e=NrJtNX3_EdwkyhAgBx_64E5ZjLhJXqSvWUMwyzDfzx8XuvcxrcpCMrAZX-YD9j0z-aGAqHD0oDt3IgaHJRBGRG0Cennhx3qWQ9CoGL_SWCFa66qXLxAiz-RltLytmWHVRF5fQMNZZ_16dBYL7iLvmDbvOJNrNcM_ITttLrN9Hpy2QnaxYZLUaQpppKpXQdCo9YNiQjFHX2SvY70zkJansN3aNgCSIGIhHJOXWk6jvB25N5XeRsh6e1Yl-Lh3NLMMmTQiYZCk48BL6fnqx3U33zuy_Ag2Drf8OpiZxH1obC9_JdZv5WznpJ7WzN4w7G8LxWSCRT7bd-8T95pqwS0WSw%3D%3D)

Dear Friend,
---
The scandal surrounding the National Cathedral service keeps getting worse. Not only is the woman who delivered the twisted, disrespectful “sermon” refusing to apologize, but she is also doubling down and playing the victim! I joined my friend David Harris on Newsmax to discuss what I witnessed at the service. I was sitting just a few rows behind President Trump, and the atmosphere was tense. But as _BELIEVERS,_ we wouldn’t let the enemy win—the devil overplayed his hand! _**WATCH MY NEWSMAX INTERVIEW ⬇️⬇️⬇️**_
---

Sean

name: Congresswoman Laura Gillen
subject: 52nd anniversary of Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
A woman’s right to control her own body is on the line in every state, and in Congress, I will do my part to stop increasingly restrictive and dangerous laws from passing by working across the aisle.

| Peter,

This week, we should be marking the 52nd anniversary of _Roe v. Wade_ , the landmark Supreme Court case that protected abortion access as a constitutional right for decades. However, the Supreme Court overturned this landmark decision that protected abortion access as a constitutional right for decades, permitting states to strip away women's autonomy over their bodies and health care.

A woman’s right to control her own body is on the line in every state, and in Congress, I will do my part to stop increasingly restrictive and dangerous laws from passing by working across the aisle. _**Our district is already shaping up to be the most competitive race in 2026 and we are on the frontlines to keep this seat blue.**_

clean_body: A woman’s right to control her own body is on the line in every state, and in Congress, I will do my part to stop increasingly restrictive and dangerous laws from passing by working across the aisle. | Peter, This week, we should be marking the 52nd anniversary of Roe v. Wade , the landmark Supreme Court case that protected abortion access as a constitutional right for decades. However, the Supreme Court overturned this landmark decision that protected abortion access as a constitutional right for decades, permitting states to strip away women's autonomy over their bodies and health care. A woman’s right to control her own body is on the line in every state, and in Congress, I will do my part to stop increasingly restrictive and dangerous laws from passing by working across the aisle. Our district is already shaping up to be the most competitive race in 2026 and we are on the frontlines to keep this seat blue. = | = Sincerely, Congresswoman Laura Gillen * | | = Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY. Gillen for NY PO Box 774 Rockville Centre, NY 11571 United States | = If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above.

name: Team Mazie
subject: Day 4
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, We’re officially on _Day Four_ of Donald Trump’s second term as president. In the first 24 hours of his second term alone, Donald Trump signed executive orders to:
* Withdraw the United States from the Paris climate accord and undo several of President Biden’s executive orders meant to combat the impacts of climate change
* Send the military to the our southern border and revoke the fundamental, constitutionally guaranteed right to birthright citizenship
* Eliminate federal diversity, equity and inclusion programs
* And pardon the 1,600 insurrectionists who were convicted for being the worst of the offenders who attacked the capitol on January 6, 2021. This includes people who severely harmed our Capitol Police officers.

There is sure to be more as the first week of the Trump presidency unfolds, but it will not stop Mazie from standing up for women, for our environment, for the rule of law, and for our democracy. [**Mazie needs your help to keep fighting back in the Senate. If you’re in this fight with her, please chip in $5 or more now to help send the message that we will not give in to Trump’s efforts to drag us backward.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100862861/524157106/296162993?amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDJiZDgwMi1jZGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=csoYFswTmsV5GiP59J70RhcCi8awU3rSocXGFZPMONQ=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100862864/524157140/296162993?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250123_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZDJiZDgwMi1jZGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=csoYFswTmsV5GiP59J70RhcCi8awU3rSocXGFZPMONQ=)

| Peter,

While we look ahead and prepare for the midterms, we can’t afford to overlook critical special election and Governor races on the horizon this year.

Trump’s decision to appoint Representatives Mike Waltz, Elise Stefanik, and Matt Gaetz to Cabinet positions means their seats may soon be up for grabs. **Flipping these seats is key to cutting into Mike Johnson’s slim majority and taking back the House– _and we must prepare!_**

We will also have the chance to flip the Virginia Governor’s Mansion and establish a strong line of defense against Trump's extreme policies. In New Jersey, we must work to keep the Governor’s Mansion blue and defend our progress.

The 2025 elections will be the first test of our grassroots strength! This is our chance to build up power and fight back against Trump's MAGA agenda, which puts the demands of the rich and powerful over the needs of hard-working Americans.
