name: Indiana GOP
subject: ICYMI: Gov. Braun Signs 9 Healthcare-Related Executive Orders
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
# IN CASE YOU MISSED IT
---
[](Fox 59 David Gay January 22, 2025 https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/gov-braun-signs-9-healthcare-related-executive-orders/)
---
# Gov. Mike Braun Signs 9 Healthcare-Related Executive Orders
---
| | Fox 59
David Gay
January 22, 2025
[https://fox59.com/indianapolitics/gov-braun-signs-9-healthcare-related-executive-orders/](http://links.email.in-gop.com/u/click?_t=9a0b7d408bc44ce9bb6828c91a267dbf&_m=d147ce9b5b0448a59c0e9d5784b7a19a&_e=T0oFZmbiPuNMgGifKuZc_NrxOy_RocYvZIlkIniTYkApINxQGZaIWC1JknFsjaDKX4QOsdkCybGwzivrN7QacwWslOose6M8WaVJ8twrt7kiaGAw0HgV8-8ObWQNHh-qEOB6lRuq3kdqDq993HKNFtcFG6tqTiBe2eD7dvCmN4J-VpqdVszAI0Bwgtk5d9UHep8pq5x7NT6NrsxnKeUx3BZY3zwtuzNhNUAnVEcyIeS-qWypA29VRI9p2g8Q0KzIoK4hmHaoxD55-WEZUtr3Iuy_G_ALHfhZwnRCHyoQOlg%3D) Indiana Gov. Mike Braun signed nine executive orders on Wednesday centered around the state’s healthcare system, one of the priorities Braun spoke about at length during his gubernatorial campaign. According to a news release from Braun’s office, the nine executive orders are aimed at improving healthcare for all Indiana residents. The office said that the orders will help drive down healthcare costs, increase access and increase transparency. This comes after issued a series of executive orders earlier this years, including eliminating diversity, equity and inclusion initiatives from the state government and ending remote work for state employees.

“Today, I signed nine executive orders that will make Indiana healthier by driving down healthcare costs, increasing access and increasing transparency,” Braun said in a post on social media on Wednesday. “We are committed to ensuring Hoosiers have the best healthcare available and that the costs don’t break the bank.” The executive orders that Braun signed on Wednesday include: **25-20:** Faithful execution of pro-life laws Directs the Indiana Department of Health to ensure compliance with state pro-life laws, including reporting on terminated pregnancies, to make sure certain state laws are followed and enforced.
**25-21:** Improve price transparency Directs state agencies to enhance price transparency across healthcare services, empowering Hoosiers with clear, upfront pricing to make informed decisions.
**25-22:** Hospital charity care Calls for an evaluation of the value of nonprofit hospital charity care compared to the tax savings these hospitals receive, ensuring these institutions fulfill their commitment to public service.
**25-23:** Healthcare affordability measures Directs state agencies to prioritize tackling surprise billing, pharmacy benefit managers and high drug prices to make healthcare more affordable for Hoosiers.
**25-24:** Assessing waste, fraud and abuse Directs the Indiana Family and Social Services Administration and the State Personnel Department to conduct independent audits of healthcare expenditures in Medicaid and the State Employee Health Plan respectively, and report findings in order to root out inefficiencies and misuse of taxpayer dollars.
**25-25:** Health and family services dashboard Directs the Indiana Family and Social Services Administration to develop an interactive dashboard to streamline healthcare programs, reduce redundancy and improve the quality and cost of care for Hoosiers.
**25-26:** Agency data sharing Encourages state agencies to collaborate and share data to improve efficiency and ensure better outcomes for Hoosiers.
**25-27:** 340B program Directs state agencies to examine the use of the 340B program by hospitals in order to make sure participating facilities are eligible for the program and serving needy populations, and to ensure the system is not exploited for profit.
**25-28:** Split risk pools Directs the Department of Insurance to take steps necessary to allow health insurers to offer split risk pools for insurance, providing Hoosiers with more tailored and cost-effective insurance plans.
---

---

name: Keith
subject: A blatant violation of the Constitution
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

When Donald Trump was sworn in as President, he vowed to uphold the Constitution. But just hours later, he issued an executive order that aims to end birthright citizenship—a blatant violation of the Constitution he swore to uphold.

The Fourteenth Amendment, adopted in 1868, couldn’t be clearer: If you are born in the U.S., you are a U.S. citizen. Birthright citizenship has been the law of the land for over 125 years, and it has been upheld twice by the U.S. Supreme Court.

No one—not even the President—gets to trample on the Constitution. That’s why I, along with over 20 of my fellow Attorneys General, am filing a lawsuit to strike down this unconstitutional executive order.

If you’re willing to stand with us as we seek to block the executive order purporting to end birthright citizenship, please add your name to show support for our lawsuit:

ADD YOUR NAME: https://secure.ngpvan.com/_EJz-eN_NEm0Y0l5rhmhIQ2

I didn’t run for office so I could sue President Trump. But when he violates the Constitution and tries to take away the fundamental rights and freedoms of Minnesotans, it’s my job to have your back.

If this executive order is allowed to stand, individuals will be stripped of their rightful U.S. citizenship and forced to live under the constant threat of deportation, despite having no clear citizenship in any other nation. At least 150,000 children born right here in the United States each year would be denied critical rights and protections.

To make it clear that we’re committed to protecting the Fourteenth Amendment and Minnesotans’ ability to live with dignity, safety, and respect, we’re hoping to gather 10,000 signatures before the weekend. Will you add your name right now to be counted?

ADD YOUR NAME: https://secure.ngpvan.com/_EJz-eN_NEm0Y0l5rhmhIQ2

Thank you,

Keith

Attorney General Keith Ellison is the People’s Lawyer, fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em241214ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

name: John Fetterman
subject: It’s time to bring this PA initiative to the national stage.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
I’ve just reintroduced the bipartisan Whole-Home Repairs Act in the Senate, and I’ll proudly continue pushing to make it happen.
#
Derek, it's John Fetterman.
Coming from a small town like Braddock, I know firsthand that millions of families are living in unsafe, unhealthy, or unlivable homes because they can’t afford repairs.
That’s why I’ve just reintroduced the bipartisan _**Whole-Home Repairs Act**_ in the Senate, and I’ll proudly continue pushing to make it happen. 💪
When we first introduced it last year, we took an idea that was born and bred in PA and brought it to the national stage. Now we’re back to finish the job.
This program has already helped thousands of Pennsylvanians stay in their homes. Just imagine what it could do for families across the country.
**I came to the Senate to get sh*t done, and I’ll work with anyone who has good ideas to address the housing crisis and bring costs down.**
[**But Derek, I can’t do it without you. Will you kick in $5 to my campaign and help me keep fighting for working folks across PA + the country?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250123?refcode=em20250123-9822&refcode2=9822_434096_Bdgo44&akid=9822%2E434096%2EBdgo44)

John ❤️
John Fetterman
U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

clean_body: I’ve just reintroduced the bipartisan Whole-Home Repairs Act in the Senate, and I’ll proudly continue pushing to make it happen. Derek, it's John Fetterman. Coming from a small town like Braddock, I know firsthand that millions of families are living in unsafe, unhealthy, or unlivable homes because they can’t afford repairs. That’s why I’ve just reintroduced the bipartisan Whole-Home Repairs Act in the Senate, and I’ll proudly continue pushing to make it happen. 💪 When we first introduced it last year, we took an idea that was born and bred in PA and brought it to the national stage. Now we’re back to finish the job. This program has already helped thousands of Pennsylvanians stay in their homes. Just imagine what it could do for families across the country. I came to the Senate to get sht done, and I’ll work with anyone who has good ideas to address the housing crisis and bring costs down. John ❤️ John Fetterman U.S. Senator from Pennsylvania | | Email us: info@johnfetterman.com

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Re: the Senate Judiciary Committee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8268%2E5257348%2EkSl52C ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

I am honored to serve on the Senate Judiciary Committee, following in the
footsteps of a mentor and giant, my predecessor and friend, Sen. Dianne
Feinstein, who served as the top Democrat on the committee for years
during the previous Trump Administration.

Just as Sen. Feinstein did before, I will use my position on the Judiciary
Committee to oversee the Department of Justice, conduct rigorous
oversight, and get things done.

Trump is back in office, and he's already announced his Cabinet
appointments. I will certainly have my work cut out for me,
Derek. The Judiciary Committee
will play a critical role in the coming weeks as we review these nominees.

From Pam Bondi for Attorney General to Kash Patel for Director of the FBI,
Trump selected MAGA loyalists with alarming positions on the rule of law,
the role of the Justice Department, and much more.

I’ve always sought the truth and justice in my work, whether as a member
of the House Intelligence Committee, the Judiciary Committee, the January
6th Select Committee, or as an impeachment manager.

And nothing — not even attacks from the President — will deter me from
defending the Constitution and rule of law.

I’ll need your support to keep up this important work.

MAGA World has come after me repeatedly for my efforts to hold Trump
accountable to the rule of law, and they’ll certainly attack me as I
question and conduct oversight on Trump’s nominees.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=jan2025_abs_em.8h8utV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250123_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8268%2E5257348%2EkSl52C ]If you are able, please chip in to help me stand up for our
Constitution. Any amount you give goes a long way toward defending my name
and my work from Trump’s attacks.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Derek — I am honored to serve on the Senate Judiciary Committee, following in the footsteps of a mentor and giant, my predecessor and friend, Sen. Dianne Feinstein, who served as the top Democrat on the committee for years during the previous Trump Administration. Just as Sen. Feinstein did before, I will use my position on the Judiciary Committee to oversee the Department of Justice, conduct rigorous oversight, and get things done. Trump is back in office, and he's already announced his Cabinet appointments. I will certainly have my work cut out for me, Derek. The Judiciary Committee will play a critical role in the coming weeks as we review these nominees. From Pam Bondi for Attorney General to Kash Patel for Director of the FBI, Trump selected MAGA loyalists with alarming positions on the rule of law, the role of the Justice Department, and much more. I’ve always sought the truth and justice in my work, whether as a member of the House Intelligence Committee, the Judiciary Committee, the January 6th Select Committee, or as an impeachment manager. And nothing — not even attacks from the President — will deter me from defending the Constitution and rule of law. I’ll need your support to keep up this important work. MAGA World has come after me repeatedly for my efforts to hold Trump accountable to the rule of law, and they’ll certainly attack me as I question and conduct oversight on Trump’s nominees. [ ]If you are able, please chip in to help me stand up for our Constitution. Any amount you give goes a long way toward defending my name and my work from Trump’s attacks. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $10 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $25 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $50 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $100 [ ]EXPRESS DONATE $250 [ ]ANOTHER AMOUNT Thank you for standing by me. I’m ready to use my position on the Judiciary Committee to defend our Constitution. — Adam [ ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433 [ ]DONATE MONTHLY 135 E. name: Mark Warner
subject: I questioned Trump’s OMB nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Here’s how it went.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100863776/524160364/-317235110?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Nominees_250123_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWQyYjk5MS1kMGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKRx8FiCUFQiuk-9ox4jLIlIaZhhB_249teBpq_IYfI=) Derek,

Yesterday in the Senate Budget Committee, I questioned Russell Vought — President Trump’s nominee for the Office of Management and Budget (OMB).

Before I tell you about some of the concerning conversations we had, [_**I’m asking if you can pitch in to support my re-election campaign so we can flip the Senate blue in 2026 >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100863777/524160365/-317235110?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Nominees_250123_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWQyYjk5MS1kMGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKRx8FiCUFQiuk-9ox4jLIlIaZhhB_249teBpq_IYfI=)

When it comes to leading OMB, here are the two questions Vought seems to be asking himself: How many federal workers can I get to quit? How many federal offices can I relocate?

Don't believe me? Just look at his dangerous track record of demonizing federal employees (which, by the way, makes the government less effective for EVERYONE.) Or look at when I pressed him on his history of calling for government workers to be "traumatized” — his actual words were _“we want the bureaucrats to be traumatically affected... we want to put them in trauma”_ or his chaotic plans to dismantle the civil service and government programs for all.

**No one who oversees a workforce should “put them in trauma.” That’s management malpractice at its finest.**

And of course, as an architect of Project 2025, Vought put forward the idea that breaking up the Intelligence Community and moving it around the country would make our nation more safe. When I asked for _any_ evidence that this was the case? I got another disappointing response.

**The reality is, Vought wants to use this position as his political litmus test for party politics.**

Look, I said before that every single one of Trump’s nominees deserves the opportunity for a fair hearing. Vought got exactly that. But this is a job that requires someone with a background of reliable experience and the temperament that allows them to manage appropriately and get things done.

Vought can argue all he wants that he’s that person, but yesterday’s hearing showed us otherwise.

[_**You deserve nominees who will make our country safer and stronger. I pledge to have your back in the Senate and do everything I can to make that happen. Will you chip in today to support this crucial work?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100863778/524160366/-317235110?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Nominees_250123_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWQyYjk5MS1kMGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKRx8FiCUFQiuk-9ox4jLIlIaZhhB_249teBpq_IYfI=)

Thank you,

Mark Warner ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100863779/524160367/-317235110?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Nominees_250123_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZWQyYjk5MS1kMGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mKRx8FiCUFQiuk-9ox4jLIlIaZhhB_249teBpq_IYfI=)****

Folks, Donald Trump and a GOP majority are in office, but I remain focused on the work that truly matters. I am committed to being a workhorse, not a showhorse, in Congress. That means fighting every day to support good-paying jobs and equip workers and families in Central and Southern Illinois with the resources they need to thrive. The right-wing is eyeing key seats like ours, eager to flip them to expand their narrow majority. **I need your support to ensure that doesn’t happen.** Your grassroots contributions can help keep this seat blue, power our work to champion the middle class, push for sensible policies, and navigate the political landscape with resolve and integrity. Your donation will strengthen our cause and send a message that this team stands firm in its belief in progress, opportunity, and justice. name: Ritchie Torres
subject: Now what?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100864021/524161325/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YThhNDkyZi1kMWQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cs7Y4i_0OxJ0wnVwWdgIUROQjsSYGuDuIOsK1AL-P8E=)
---
Peter, it’s Ritchie. With the MAGA trifecta in the House, Senate, and now White House, I think a lot of us are wondering: _Now what?_

Here’s my answer:

**We’re not going to stop fighting for affordable housing and lifesaving social safety nets like Social Security and Medicare,** despite Trump's executive orders to roll back the Biden administration's efforts to lower prescription costs.

**We’re not going to stop fighting for LGBTQ+ rights,** especially as efforts to undermine our progress (and outright pretend that we don't exist) are increasing in the White House and Congress.

**We’re not going to stop fighting for each other.** New Yorkers pride ourselves on looking after one another, and that doesn’t end or start with a new administration in the White House — _but it does become more crucial._

**And I am not going to stop fighting for you in Congress,** even if the odds are stacked against us.

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: I’m running for Governor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Peter,

“We have a responsibility to ensure that everyone gets a fair shot in life.”

That’s what my parents taught me growing up, and I’ve carried that lesson every step of my life — from my time as a voting rights lawyer, to leading Wayne State Law School, to serving as Secretary of State.

**I’m running for Governor of Michigan to continue that work and make sure that every Michigan family has that fair shot.**

[If you’re with me, will you make a founding contribution of any amount today split between my campaign and UNITEDemocrats? »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100864051/524161386/1007872016?amount=3&refcode=UD_20250123_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5OGE0OTJmLWQxZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yLEfSTxniEJp1dTHhoWN-aVILsysDldPHEkjf2-Vkzw=)

I’m ready for this work. I’ve investigated radical extremist groups, taught civil rights and voting rights law, and I ran for Secretary of State to make sure government is efficient and transparent, that every voice is heard, and that every legitimate vote is counted.

Some people didn’t like that very much — but I’ve never backed down from a tough fight. I’ve spent my life standing up to powerful interests, and I’ll keep standing up to any bullies or billionaires who try to deceive us, divide us, take away our rights, or deprive us of our opportunities.

**I’m running for Governor to truly make government work for everyone.** We need transparent leadership, safe schools and neighborhoods, and good education and childcare. Every Michigander should be able to pay their bills, put food on the table, and take care of their families.

[That’s what I’m ready to fight for as Michigan’s next Governor. Please, will you chip in $3 today between my campaign and UNITEDemocrats to become a founding donor and help us launch this campaign? »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100864052/524161387/1007872016?amount=3&refcode=UD_20250123_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5OGE0OTJmLWQxZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yLEfSTxniEJp1dTHhoWN-aVILsysDldPHEkjf2-Vkzw=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jocelyn Benson and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: **** | **[CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100864058/524161393/1007872016?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20250123_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5OGE0OTJmLWQxZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yLEfSTxniEJp1dTHhoWN-aVILsysDldPHEkjf2-Vkzw=)**

**[Or CONTRIBUTE a custom donation »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100864060/524161395/1007872016?amount=10&amounts=3,7,10&refcode=UD_20250123_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc5OGE0OTJmLWQxZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yLEfSTxniEJp1dTHhoWN-aVILsysDldPHEkjf2-Vkzw=)**
****
I love Michigan and I believe in our future. We’re tough, we work hard, and we never back down from a fight. Let’s make Michigan the best place to be a kid, raise a kid, stay, and call home.

I can’t do this without you. Working together, I know we can do all of this, and more.

Let’s go.

— Jocelyn Benson

name: Great American Digest

name: NDRC
subject: URGENT: Trump attacks the Census
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
This latest executive order will have devastating impacts on the 2030 Census and our democracy.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100864106/524161498/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5MGJjNDM2LWQxZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QLjHk3zDTOquYq0iL0ivVI9H_6KrFAsjg_eePF--_d0=&emci=91ea8a6a-cbd9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=690bc436-d1d9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter — Only hours into his presidency, Trump undid President Biden’s order that affirmed how everyone in the country should be counted in the U.S. Census. And **NPR says that Trump’s move “clear[s] a path for reshaping election maps” by undercounting communities of color. ** Let’s be clear: This is a gift to the extremist, anti-democracy groups behind Project 2025, who are that much closer to distorting the U.S. Census for political ends. They aim to add a citizenship question to the decennial census questionnaire, which they tried in 2020 until they were blocked by the fair maps movement. **Trump is back and emboldened, but here is the good news: We were prepared for these attacks. And we’re ready to fight back. We’ve done it before and won, and we have a strategy to beat Trump’s extremism and defend our democracy again. ** [**Fuel our fight as we work to stop Trump’s blatant attacks on our democracy and attempts to rig the system in his favor. Help ensure we have the resources to mount our state-by-state defense to push back against anti-democracy extremists.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100864107/524161499/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusRR_email_20250123-NDRC-Tier1-CensusRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250123-NDRC-Tier1-CensusRR_&utm_campaign=CensusRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5MGJjNDM2LWQxZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QLjHk3zDTOquYq0iL0ivVI9H_6KrFAsjg_eePF--_d0=) | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100864108/524161500/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusRR_email_20250123-NDRC-Tier1-CensusRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250123-NDRC-Tier1-CensusRR_&utm_campaign=CensusRR&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5MGJjNDM2LWQxZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QLjHk3zDTOquYq0iL0ivVI9H_6KrFAsjg_eePF--_d0=)
---
Trump’s action on the census could lead to a blatant attempt to undercount communities with higher populations of immigrants and undocumented people. The impacts would be far-reaching: The decennial census is the basis of our electoral maps, meaning that representation could be more heavily weighted to certain communities. Federal funding to states for programs like Medicaid and Medicare are also determined on the basis of census population counts, meaning communities with non-citizen residents could get less federal aid than they deserve if we don’t get an accurate count.
On top of Trump’s executive order, last week, Republican state attorneys general sued to try to stop the 2030 Census from counting all U.S. residents. The federal judge presiding over this case, David Joseph, is a Trump appointee with a track record for upholding gerrymandered maps.
[**These attacks represent real, acute threats to our democracy, but we’ve beaten them back before, and we can do it again. Donate today and fund our work to help ensure every voice is heard in our democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/100864109/524161501/1531424108?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CensusRR_email_20250123-NDRC-Tier1-CensusRR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250123-NDRC-Tier1-CensusRR_&utm_campaign=CensusRR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5MGJjNDM2LWQxZDktZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QLjHk3zDTOquYq0iL0ivVI9H_6KrFAsjg_eePF--_d0=)

clean_body: This latest executive order will have devastating impacts on the 2030 Census and our democracy. | Peter — Only hours into his presidency, Trump undid President Biden’s order that affirmed how everyone in the country should be counted in the U.S. Census. And NPR says that Trump’s move “clear[s] a path for reshaping election maps” by undercounting communities of color. Let’s be clear: This is a gift to the extremist, anti-democracy groups behind Project 2025, who are that much closer to distorting the U.S. Census for political ends. They aim to add a citizenship question to the decennial census questionnaire, which they tried in 2020 until they were blocked by the fair maps movement. Trump is back and emboldened, but here is the good news: We were prepared for these attacks. And we’re ready to fight back. We’ve done it before and won, and we have a strategy to beat Trump’s extremism and defend our democracy again. = | = Trump’s action on the census could lead to a blatant attempt to undercount communities with higher populations of immigrants and undocumented people. The impacts would be far-reaching: The decennial census is the basis of our electoral maps, meaning that representation could be more heavily weighted to certain communities. Federal funding to states for programs like Medicaid and Medicare are also determined on the basis of census population counts, meaning communities with non-citizen residents could get less federal aid than they deserve if we don’t get an accurate count. On top of Trump’s executive order, last week, Republican state attorneys general sued to try to stop the 2030 Census from counting all U.S. residents. The federal judge presiding over this case, David Joseph, is a Trump appointee with a track record for upholding gerrymandered maps. = = Thank you so much for stepping up in this critical moment for our democracy. The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

subject: We have never seen numbers like this before
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Early Vote Action PAC](https://go
body:
It’s Scott Presler with another great update from Pennsylvania.

| | | | |
---
Friend, it’s Scott Presler with another great update from Pennsylvania.
**Republicans are only 191,304 voters away from having a plurality of registered voters in Pennsylvania!**
We haven’t been this close to flipping the registration advantage in decades.
Thanks to donors like you, my team is registering new Republican voters every single day, and it’s working!
**If we keep up this pace until the 2026 midterm elections, Republicans will have a registration advantage of over 100,000 voters. **
**_[Even though we’re winning non-stop with President Trump back in the White House, we cannot let up for even a day](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Soq/?__vbtrk=MjcxMzQwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMzQwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
I’m humbly asking you to invest in our voter registration efforts today, they are making the critical difference between victory and defeat.

[KEEP PA RED](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9Soq/?__vbtrk=MjcxMzQwOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcxMzQwOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

_Your fellow patriot,_

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Here’s what I told MSNBC last night: Pete Hegseth is uniquely unqualified to serve as Secretary of Defense.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Beyond his lack of qualifications, Hegseth’s personal and professional track record would be unbefitting of someone tasked to serve in a role this important to our national security.
#

Team, I joined MSNBC last night to talk about Pete Hegseth’s nomination.
Here’s what I told Lawrence O’Donnell on air: Pete Hegseth is uniquely unqualified for this job.
Hegseth’s personal and professional track record — riddled with allegations of mismanagement and substance abuse — are alarming for someone tasked to serve in a role this important to our national security.
I asked him about those allegations at the hearing. Point blank, I asked Pete Hegseth if any of the denials he has made about the numerous allegations against him would be different if he gave them under oath. **He refused to answer that question.**
Beyond his lack of transparency, nothing I’ve seen from Pete Hegseth indicates that he is qualified.
It is my responsibility to make sure that whoever fills this position has the experience and judgment to walk into a room of anyone from cadets to foreign military leaders and earn their respect and trust.
The United States military is the largest federal agency, bar none — with 3.4 million people serving in the Army, Navy, Marines, Air Force, Space Force, or National Guard, or working as civilian contractors or employees at the Department of Defense. The Secretary of Defense directs a budget of more than $800 billion. They have to manage a massive bureaucracy. Above all, they’re tasked with keeping 334 million Americans safe.
This is the most important national security job there is. So now, I’m asking for your input:
[**Add your name here if you think that Pete Hegseth is unqualified to serve as Secretary of Defense. I’d appreciate hearing from you on this.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/hegseth_em_jan25/?source=em250123-1-LE&akid=5949%2E6688874%2EEDiI7f)
**[SIGN ON HERE](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/hegseth_em_jan25/?source=em250123-1-LE&akid=5949%2E6688874%2EEDiI7f)**
This is important. Thanks for sounding off.
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5949%2E6688874%2EEDiI7f).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

**That’s the three richest people on the planet with a front-row seat for Donald Trump’s most recent swearing-in - sitting in front of his own Cabinet!**
Make no mistake, this was not an accident. It’s a clear statement about Trump’s priorities. When push comes to shove he’ll put billionaires and his backers ahead of you.
**In fact, he did just that in the first hours after his swearing-in.**
Within hours of stepping back into the White House, Trump pardoned his January 6 insurrectionists, debilitated the federal government **and** cut a deal to raise drug prices on consumers, padding the profits of big pharma. _And the list goes on from there._
[We can stop Trump, but we need to organize in our communities to get it done. name: Wes Moore
subject: The anniversary of Roe v. Wade
body:
Friend,

52 years ago on January 22, 1973, Roe v. Wade was decided by the Supreme Court to provide the right to choose — enshrining reproductive rights for decades to come.

This landmark decision turned the page on American history, a huge step in the right direction for healthcare access. Since then we have still had to fight to protect the right, as anti-abortion groups fought to overturn the decision.

Unfortunately, in 2021, with Dobbs v. Jackson Women's Health Organization, we faced a major setback. It overturned Roe, meaning that the right to safe, legal abortion access is no longer guaranteed in this country. It’s left up to the states to regulate, meaning that anti-abortion politicians can take the wheels to pass legislation to strip away reproductive rights. The government should not have this type of control.

Not only did the Supreme Court’s decision endanger the lives of millions of women, but we’ve also seen women facing criminal punishments for traumatic miscarriages or stillbirths since 2022. When I ran for Governor, I promised to make Maryland a safe haven for abortion access — and I am keeping good on that promise.

In 2023, I signed historic legislation to protect reproductive rights in Maryland.

In 2024, I supported the initiative to codify abortion rights in the Maryland State Constitution, with the Yes on One Campaign. I’m happy to say that this campaign succeeded, and abortion is now a constitutionally protected right in Maryland.

Abortion care is health care. Our responsibility to fiercely protect these rights begins in Maryland, as we continue to lead the country in the fight for progress.

Elevate,

Wes

---

name: Diane Sare
subject: Urgent Action Required: Shut Down the DC Liars’Bureau!
body:
| | [](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HPeLIFflw7WCajMEVGvmb9S&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250123_liars_bureau_2&n=1)
---
| Friend – Today a group of patriotic LaRouche activists hit the offices of the entire U.S. Senate with the LaRouche Organization’s dossier [“The Liars’ Bureau, Who wants to block the confirmations of Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel, and what are they trying to hide?”](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=6U-bS5myFB-qaXONaTKygW8Bw5o4M8XoHC3TxaP90HMeGy_uGspnCd41OAzRQnsXYvEBvw1V4YzP41gFotuQMtXvxK6p2WV5A7S3POuthfc&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250123_liars_bureau_2&n=2) They also held a highly visible rally outside the Hart Senate Office Building where they distributed the dossier to passers-by. President Trump wasted no time in taking the first steps to dismantle the weaponized intelligence agencies, stripping over 50 people of their security clearances within hours of his inauguration. The list included the 51 “former intelligence officials” who signed the lying letter about the Hunter Biden laptop, which claimed that it was “typical Russian disinformation” in an effort to ensure the election of the unqualified Joe Biden in 2020. It also included former National Security Advisor John Bolton who made sure that Trump was unable to finally end the Korean War during his first term in office, and that American troops were kept in Syria, despite President Trump’s expressed intention to remove them. _**Today, Trump further ordered the declassification of the files on the assassinations of President John F. Kennedy and his brother Robert F. Kennedy, as well as the files on the assassination of Rev. Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr.**_ This is HUGE! President Trump needs a team that shares his commitment to dismantling the apparatus which has made a mockery of our justice system, and lied us into war after war, while suppressing the rights of American citizens, including the outrageous targeting of America’s leading statesman, Lyndon LaRouche. This is why I am asking you to mobilize with everything you’ve got over the next few weeks until we see Tulsi Gabbard and Kash Patel confirmed. Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is also a crucial voice against the mega corporations that send so much money to the Congress that our so-called representatives seem to have forgotten whom they represent. I am including last week's action report video to give you an idea of what you can do.

[](https://laroucheorganization.nationbuilder.com/r?u=HkE0xGp7YYebEsjqkUB2UpkSOrIcbg8mCp1VjHJ-IOY&e=8fa7b86c85d8b09f0015ebe544605791&utm_source=laroucheorganization&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20250123_liars_bureau_2&n=3) Starting on January 27, your U.S. Senator will be in his or her home district. Visit their offices. Bring 20 friends, or 3 friends, or none, and demand that they stop listening to the people who are proven liars, and confirm Gabbard for Director of National Intelligence, and Patel for Director of the Federal Bureau of Investigation. Take hotos!
* * *
Diane Sare President, The LaRouche Organization

A mob, incited by lies about the 2020 election, stormed the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to reverse an election outcome that its members didn’t like. The perpetrators sought to strangle our democracy, and now, disgracefully, President Trump has granted clemency to over 1,000 people convicted of crimes that day—including leaders of far-right extremist groups like the Proud Boys and Oath Keepers. Let’s be clear: these are not “political prisoners,” as Trump claims. These are, in many cases, domestic terrorists. We can’t sit still. body:
As your congresswoman, I’m committed to upholding our democracy and fighting back against flagrant abuses of power.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100864908/524164667/-1146661722?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWJmNzk1NWYtZDVkOS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jxhS0BBLJ3WpwamPL_IXDkr6ZJYdaY1sJHqfolEaGcI=)
---
| Peter,

Four years ago, on January 6th, 2021, police officers were brutally beaten and tased by rioters at the Capitol, leading to more than 150 injured and the deaths of 5 officers. It was one of the most shocking days in American history–one that deserves nothing less than the utmost condemnation.

**And yet, this week, President Trump pardoned and _released more than 1,500 criminals convicted of perpetuating this horrific attack._ These pardons are an insult to the first responders who risked their lives in the line of duty.**

Our communities here in Maryland and across the country deserve to feel safe in the place they call home. Releasing these dangerous criminals back into our communities does the opposite. As your congresswoman, I’m committed to upholding our democracy and fighting back against flagrant abuses of power.

I just can’t do it alone. Extreme Republicans are betting on us getting distracted by the Trump administration’s harmful policies, but we have to keep our focus. This year, I’ll be working tirelessly to ensure our communities are protected. [_**The less time I spend fundraising, the more time I can spend fighting back in Congress. Can I count on your support with a $10 contribution so that we can get extreme Republicans out of office?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100864911/524164669/-1146661722?refcode=BLU_EM_AMDC_2025-01-23_1&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWJmNzk1NWYtZDVkOS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jxhS0BBLJ3WpwamPL_IXDkr6ZJYdaY1sJHqfolEaGcI=)

body:
Thank you!
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=52%2E181023%2E3cuy04)
Team,
I want to wish a big THANK YOU to everyone who has supported us in the first 24 hours of this campaign.
Together, we’re building a team that can accomplish anything if we do it together. I’m so grateful to have so many of you in this fight for a better Michigan alongside me.
Now, the work continues -- and there’s a long road ahead.
**[If you’re ready to keep up this hard work and fight for a government that works for everyone, will you chip in any amount to my campaign for Governor today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jbmi-em-20250123-1?refcode=em20250123-1&refcode2=52_181023_3cuy04&akid=52%2E181023%2E3cuy04)**

Thank you again!
-- Jocelyn

Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene **[EXPLODED at a smug reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/3b00994d-1de7-45b2-969d-9e2f07ba4854?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for asking her if she would be giving tours of the Capitol to the released January 6 prisoners.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/faaf1c1b-cfd7-4996-8ff9-edd036a154c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Is that all you people talk about?"Greene asked the reporter, who answered "yeah."
Greene appeared exhausted by the reporter's question **[and couldn't help but snap at her. ](https://substack.com/redirect/3b00994d-1de7-45b2-969d-9e2f07ba4854?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
"Okay, are you going to talk about the Biden family that got pardoned?" Greene fired back. "Okay, I'm not going to do this! All of yall's obsession with January 6 is absurd!"
Watch the tense exchange below:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/faaf1c1b-cfd7-4996-8ff9-edd036a154c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **This is the best Elon Musk defense you will ever see ...**
A TikToker **[defended Elon Musk from democrats](https://substack.com/redirect/b525f8e0-a5b1-41a9-9045-fd7a3413b56a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** accusing him of doing a Nazi salute during President Donald Trump's inauguration ceremony, cutting through the online hysteria with basic common sense.
"If you are someone who truly believed what Elon Musk did was a Nazi salute, then you are not intelligent enough to be in politics nor should you be sharing your opinion online," she began.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b525f8e0-a5b1-41a9-9045-fd7a3413b56a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**[Watch her EPIC TAKEDOWN](https://substack.com/redirect/b525f8e0-a5b1-41a9-9045-fd7a3413b56a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of the left's phony outrage over Musk's gesture:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b525f8e0-a5b1-41a9-9045-fd7a3413b56a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

# _**" Has the left gone too far?":**_**Asking anti-Trump protesters a simple question goes VERY wrong ...**
PolitiBrawl's Matt Miller asked anti-Trump protesters "Has the left gone too far and gotten too woke?"
"No, they haven't gone far enough!!" one protesters answered. "The solution is to get rid of the GOP!"
Another protester THREATENED Miller with a knife during their interview!
**[Watch what happens next:](https://substack.com/redirect/65270358-505d-449e-be92-6d4e636474c2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

* * *
# Thanking my longtime friend, President Donald J. Trump
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0c390d25-b3fa-4217-8bcd-43dd2a1c9392?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**By Rudy W. Giuliani**
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a568d1b3-87a7-41cf-aadf-f950a7713799?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump posted a message of support for Giuliani, Sunday on Truth Social.
In these tumultuous times, when so many in the political press and within the Democrat Party seem to be teaming up against me, it's comforting to know that I have friends who stand by me, unconditionally. I want to take this moment to express my deepest gratitude to Donald J. Trump, a man I've known for decades, and who has recently shown his unwavering support by posting "SAVE RUDY" on Truth Social.
Firstly, let me say, Mr. President, your gesture means more to me than you could possibly know. It's not just about the post; it's about the message it sends...

We are back. _**America is back.**_

Fellow Conservative, earlier this month, I was officially sworn in to serve America once again - this time in the United States Senate.

On Monday, I watched as President Donald J. Trump took the Oath of Office to become our 47th President.

It's been a historic month for hardworking Americans. Under our new GOP leadership, we will rein in spending, restore accountability, and bring common sense back to Washington, D.C..

[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8954977d5a8e4538bd8c77bf4b71a317&_e=AVtFg5w9Qwj_rm-1fkULkTAzVpqkmIYvz85uCMEswItFN6pxV4Z2qIrKBe3ULxUniFV5CmKLM80RqFKmTa46wRBvyk-SIR3paZ1cWJ7E4PYVsySxCiAMNTuz1cFFozWDBomFC0lb_rfdjHHNAn2HEJ-Nc57QlfPeQRu5plmzqQH-94P4FdXBV-ZpPl9b3_HGi3yPxKd56mXn-GbYamocf6fej9HGKPcn0LxA0gUqm0aluf0oqR9R_4ufZS5BxeibFTT2nWc6E1vVJQKLkWroDC7VdDd_37ha77fi4YMsf62ZmBqIpJ9stu2N8H0J5IGEQxRE3wKnTQ4sb_T2ciekzlw6buSnR41o9aIX_fJcENRCF3A5WqNWo-hDrXMEnDwzgpDB6AVW4y1LwOy19DEumCrZbkRHT2U4kxa9kJUxzrwm0Ew_H1U2-ySXgxsOZ8g6Ge01gicDaWb4k4DMEbjWnxDUUHAFhEGjt2PhvOx5EbAtlxtj4c3ZsdE7uqKGPFReh6WcTnb-I_B0eKp9UdIBDlyCH7c9uiKDfRcCdU_SrVNRip2vbcZ3f5cLQJnDP5PH)
It's time to get to work - _**but where to start?**_

I want to hear from you, Fellow Conservative. **[What should be our top priority in the Senate?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=8954977d5a8e4538bd8c77bf4b71a317&_e=AVtFg5w9Qwj_rm-1fkULkTAzVpqkmIYvz85uCMEswItFN6pxV4Z2qIrKBe3ULxUniFV5CmKLM80RqFKmTa46wRBvyk-SIR3paZ1cWJ7E4PYVsySxCiAMNTuz1cFFozWDBomFC0lb_rfdjHHNAn2HEJ-Nc57QlfPeQRu5plmzqQH-94P4FdXBV-ZpPl9b3_HGi3yPxKd56mXn-GbYamocf6fej9HGKPcn0LxA0gUqm0aluf0oqR9R_4ufZS5BxeibFTT2nWc6E1vVJQKLkWroDC7VdDd_37ha77fi4YMsf62ZmBqIpJ9stu2N8H0J5IGEQxRE3wKnTQ4sb_T2ciekzlw6buSnR41o9aIX_fJcENRCF3A5WqNWo-hDrXMEnDwzgpDB6AVW4y1LwOy19DEumJitXb89_oehHuy9PwpFugqb-WWRVY7quEvWhaA6WBMtdRQ13UlEwwSIgNZRimRNaOf2nXQoBIH2jgcCgnSv1Acl3mmcfSQARMKruvCPzKbDYCM07D0af2tPINh0DHn3ExgPbCPLQd5f39f8ojqIdk4WL5-WRq6UMJfnNkWFuPSL)**

* Cutting government fat and reining in wasteful spending
* Securing our border to prevent violent criminals and cartels who have infiltrated our country
* Unleashing American energy to lower costs for all Americans
* Protecting the men and women who serve in our Armed Forces to make sure nothing like the disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal never happens again

clean_body: I am ready to work with President Trump to Make America Great Again. | We are back. America is back. Fellow Conservative, earlier this month, I was officially sworn in to serve America once again - this time in the United States Senate. On Monday, I watched as President Donald J. Trump took the Oath of Office to become our 47th President. It's been a historic month for hardworking Americans. Under our new GOP leadership, we will rein in spending, restore accountability, and bring common sense back to Washington, D.C.. It's time to get to work - but where to start? I want to hear from you, Fellow Conservative. Cutting government fat and reining in wasteful spending Securing our border to prevent violent criminals and cartels who have infiltrated our country Unleashing American energy to lower costs for all Americans Protecting the men and women who serve in our Armed Forces to make sure nothing like the disastrous Afghanistan withdrawal never happens again Or something else My mission in the Senate is simple. I was elected to work for you, your family, and every American. It's time to make your daily lives more affordable, keep your family safe, and return common sense to Washington. I know there's so much work left to undo the last four years, but it's important to me to hear what we should tackle first. Ultimately, your responses make me a better Senator, and help us move America forward. I am honored to serve you and Make America Great Again. For America, Tim Sheehy United States Senator - MT | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. **Last November,** the American people made their top priority clear: Lowering prices for working families.

**But on Trump’s first day in office, he announced nearly 100 Executive Orders,** none of them addressing this key issue.

Instead of focusing on the needs of everyday Americans, he’s using the power of the presidency to attack political opponents, strip away Americans’ rights, and advance his personal agenda.

It has never been more apparent that we have a critical role to play as New Dems in today’s narrowly divided Congress.

We will continue to push past partisan politics to deliver lower prices, more jobs, and a better economy for hardworking Americans. **And we will do it together.**

**[Can you pitch in $10 today to become a New Dem Majority Maker? | | Under this administration, we could very well see Trump’s Department of Justice roll back voting rights. His pick for Attorney General, Pam Bondi, spread disinformation about voter fraud and worked to support his lie that the 2020 election was stolen. Under new leadership loyal to Trump, the department could target voter registration and voter file maintenance across states, leading to more purges of voters from the rolls. And this Trump-aligned DOJ may stop pursuing voting rights cases across the country, including in Georgia. Voting rights may be at its most precarious position since the civil rights gains of the 1960s. How do we fight back? By staying alert and staying ready for the challenges to come. [**Your contribution of $25, or whatever you can give, helps us fight back against voter suppression tactics and serious threats to our rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100867133/524171536/-1147768191?amount=25&refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250123_f_TrumpDOJ_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjgyNjI3ZS1kZGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EthwHJrPm_TlljUMtv6RqnFZI-rLUd0H2BrVzqQ5_24=) | [RUSH YOUR GIFT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100867134/524171537/133794634?refcode=bsc_emm_ff_20250123_f_TrumpDOJ_v1s1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS84ODQ1MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjgyNjI3ZS1kZGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EthwHJrPm_TlljUMtv6RqnFZI-rLUd0H2BrVzqQ5_24=)

We could see the DOJ become an enemy in our mission to protect the right to vote, as it becomes a tool Trump uses to hold on to power and suppress our voices.
That means Fair Fight’s work is more important than ever. We must continue to fight back against anti-voter legislation in order to ensure our elections are fair and reflect the will of the people — and we need the full force of this team behind us.

body:
The PA House could be decided with this one seat... This upcoming special allows Democrats to show the GOP we’re committed to defending our Democratic majorities nationwide. Will you join our team? | | |

| |

**If Democrats lose this seat, Republicans will _flip_ control of the PA House, enact their extreme agenda, and threaten the freedoms of millions of Pennsylvanians. **
We aren’t being dramatic – we’ve already seen how Trump and his Republican allies in Washington are creating dangerous policies.
If the GOP gains power in PA, they will work to pass far-right legislation at the state level. Even worse, they’ll build the momentum they need to flip statehouses red nationwide. **Every moment and every dollar counts as we prepare to compete. So we’re asking:**
[Can you rush a 3X-matched $7 donation right now to help state Democrats defend our majorities in upcoming elections in Pennsylvania and beyond?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPf8W_B0xptJi6SYPCTnYZrCkcP9WA_Pwb5I5hdM2LvkW9h2A_eH6lFvM_z-rRXLmzhTuB_Esz-BY1vOJ9a5FbGieqqjsfVbvg8JffyDnGlm8suQXMMIxCx0eZaZduab6pqjJTW9QuIpOavdiTUGHz4Hbk7QiJRzE-GvK1dUP2Of9Gs6-Xh9DN-MtLV1OjMS41jEpz1Q8HiuP-6sV6V6baDMO8DztQhIS1zqYev_US1Rr_gId7eUP8YMg2t_BLyFDLf6Bv6mutppNVhLPMwn3i2jTFTHG1n6n7QXvwB1pIK3oheiuV3H7iUDPhuhC50ADJiG2FQPxQykPWxK4kZ-72n4nrxuAK53wbgzjRz_sdVqOO1CcQuY7BZ3Lb-9-cQZO_r/4de/b2AtMbEoQuastCejPofjxw/h1/h001.hviREyRWpfBfHnu0aYIIS-sYVOGDymlbFkbkoRs9R90)

name: The No Dem Left Behind Team
subject: Billionaires are Threatening our Democracy - Fight Back
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w6pl6-uay618-kyd76rh6/)
---
# **Billionaires Are Threatening Our Democracy—Fight Back**
---
| | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w6pl6-uay619-kyd76rh7/)
---
Hello friend, On Monday, Donald Trump stood on the inaugural stage, flanked by billionaires like Elon Musk, Jeff Bezos, Mark Zuckerberg, and foreign billionaire Bernard Arnault—** _the symbols of unchecked wealth and power._** These oligarchs have replaced public service with profit margins, ripping democracy out of the hands of everyday Americans. This wasn’t just an inauguration—it was the coronation of an American oligarchy. Trump’s promises of a “golden age” were nothing more than a vision of power and profit for the ultra-rich. His administration is already dismantling worker protections, attacking immigrants, and rolling back progress—all to benefit billionaires like Musk and Bezos. We will be doing a deeper dive into this story and how it relates Davos over the weekend, so be sure to stay engaged and updated with us for more important information. Overall, this is not democracy. It’s oligarchy, and it’s a direct threat to our freedoms. Trump’s purge of federal agencies and his assault on basic rights are nothing less than authoritarianism fueled by greed. History warns us what happens when power is concentrated in the hands of the few. Yet here we are, watching democracy crumble under the weight of billionaires who see the people as a nuisance. [**_We cannot stand by. If you believe in a government for the people—not the few—join us. Together, we can take power back from the oligarchs and protect our democracy. Every dollar builds the movement to stop Trump and the billionaires from destroying our country. The fight is urgent. Act now._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w6pl6-uay61a-kyd76rh7/)
---
| [Chip in $10](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w6pl6-uay61b-kyd76rh8/)
---
| [$26 for 2026](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w6pl6-uay61c-kyd76rh9/)
---

---
| [RUSH $250!](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w6pl6-uay61e-kyd76rh1/)
---
Thank you for your support in this pivotal time.
---
| | | | |
---
**No Dem Left Behind PAC** P.O. Box 15320 Washington, D.C. 20003
---

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Trump reverses efforts to lower prescription drug costs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
While we are fighting for the people, Republicans are prioritizing petty politics.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100867217/524172130/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_250123costs_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FhYTBjNi1kZGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_Sz621OGMfrtxTl7fkAUOuJdGfXcImYCKvN38JMS3k=) Peter,

As part of Trump’s Project 2025, they made their intentions to make prescription drugs more expensive for working families clear, and Trump has followed through.

On his first day in office, Trump signed an executive order that reversed many of the efforts Democrats and former President Biden made to address healthcare, including lowering the costs of prescription drugs for people on Medicare and Medicaid.

In comparison, during my time in Congress, I am proud to have delivered on big bills, including capping the prices of insulin at $35 a month for seniors and being able to cap the price of prescription drugs at $2,000 a year for seniors starting in 2025.

**It’s clear: While Democrats are fighting for the things that impact Americans' everyday lives, Republicans are committed to wreaking havoc in the name of petty politics. It’s shameful.**

[**Americans deserve to have leaders who will address their concerns and fight FOR them, not against. That is what I am committed to, but I can’t do it alone. Will you join me in the fight by donating $5 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100867218/524172131/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_250123costs_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_L1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FhYTBjNi1kZGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_Sz621OGMfrtxTl7fkAUOuJdGfXcImYCKvN38JMS3k=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100867219/524172132/-211760203?refcode=EM_F_250123costs_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_EB1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmN2FhYTBjNi1kZGQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t_Sz621OGMfrtxTl7fkAUOuJdGfXcImYCKvN38JMS3k=)

clean_body: While we are fighting for the people, Republicans are prioritizing petty politics. = Peter, As part of Trump’s Project 2025, they made their intentions to make prescription drugs more expensive for working families clear, and Trump has followed through. On his first day in office, Trump signed an executive order that reversed many of the efforts Democrats and former President Biden made to address healthcare, including lowering the costs of prescription drugs for people on Medicare and Medicaid. In comparison, during my time in Congress, I am proud to have delivered on big bills, including capping the prices of insulin at $35 a month for seniors and being able to cap the price of prescription drugs at $2,000 a year for seniors starting in 2025. It’s clear: While Democrats are fighting for the things that impact Americans' everyday lives, Republicans are committed to wreaking havoc in the name of petty politics. subject: did you see my big announcement?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
---
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100867495/524172882/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250123_FR_PolicySpeech_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2EzZGViYy1kZWQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ZfI7I9eZ7420gtd1OJFVPtvASDelY0_sG-dLO9C1rc=&emci=1fa3debc-ded9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=23a3debc-ded9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=37438246) Team,

Since I announced my candidacy for Governor, I’ve visited with families in diners all across our great State. I’ve heard the same message in booth after booth.

**We must make Jersey more affordable. When I’m Governor, we will. Yesterday, I announced my “Tax Cut Plan” for Jersey. In a moment, I’ll tell you some of the details of my plan to lower taxes and lower costs, but first, [can you chip in $10 now to support my campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100867496/524172889/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250123_FR_PolicySpeech_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2EzZGViYy1kZWQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ZfI7I9eZ7420gtd1OJFVPtvASDelY0_sG-dLO9C1rc=&emci=1fa3debc-ded9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=23a3debc-ded9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=37438246)** | [DONATE NOW >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100867497/524172896/-486314421?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_JG_20250123_FR_PolicySpeech_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2EzZGViYy1kZWQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ZfI7I9eZ7420gtd1OJFVPtvASDelY0_sG-dLO9C1rc=&emci=1fa3debc-ded9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=23a3debc-ded9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=37438246)
---
My “Tax Cut Plan” will lower property and income taxes for middle class families, put money back in the pockets of Jersey families, and attract jobs and families to Jersey — and it’s all fiscally responsible and paid for. As the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs” Governor, I will:
* Cut property taxes across the board by nearly 15%.
* Give renters a new $500-a-year rental rebate.
* Help seniors afford to stay in Jersey with a “Retire in Jersey” tax credit.
* Incentivize families to move to Jersey by matching property tax rates from the states they moved from.
* Create a “Family Tax Credit” to cut taxes for middle class families.
* Work to cut red tape that gets in the way of building more homes and apartments that are affordable — especially those near mass transit and in abandoned office parks.

**In short, when I say I’ll be the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs” Governor, I mean it** — and I’ll make life more affordable.

You can get more details of my “Tax Cut Plan” at [josh4jersey.com.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/100867498/524172902/290028487?source=EM_NBI_JG_20250123_FR_PolicySpeech_0_3MO_JoshGottheimer_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDczNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2EzZGViYy1kZWQ5LWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_ZfI7I9eZ7420gtd1OJFVPtvASDelY0_sG-dLO9C1rc=&emci=1fa3debc-ded9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=23a3debc-ded9-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=37438246)

Thank you,

Josh
|
* * *
Josh is running to be the next Governor of New Jersey in 2025 – the “Lower Taxes, Lower Costs Governor.” Since 2016, his campaign lawn signs have always said the same thing: “Lower Taxes. Jersey Values” – and that’s what he’s done, from expanding the Child Tax Credit to fighting to restore SALT to clawing dollars back to Jersey for first responders. name: Jack Reed
subject: Pete Hegseth cannot run the Pentagon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Derek,
Pete Hegseth, Donald Trump’s pick to lead the Pentagon for the next four years, is the least qualified Defense Secretary nominee in modern history.
I had the opportunity to meet Hegseth during his nomination hearing with the Senate Armed Services Committee last week. I went into it with many concerns about his qualifications. This is a man who has been accused of disregarding the laws of war and abusing women. He has a history of financial mismanagement and public intoxication. Those concerns were not put to rest at the hearing.
So today, I’m asking you to join me in opposing this nomination. Add your name next to mine if you agree: Pete Hegseth is wholly unqualified to serve as Defense Secretary. [https://www.jackreed.com/act/sign-on-to-oppose-the-nomination-of-pete-hegseth-as-defense-secretary?sc=tp_kaine]
SIGN ON → [https://www.jackreed.com/act/sign-on-to-oppose-the-nomination-of-pete-hegseth-as-defense-secretary?sc=tp_kaine]
I have supported every nominee for this position until now, including Donald Trump’s previous Defense Secretaries, Jim Mattis and Mark Esper.
So believe me when I say: This is not a partisan issue. It’s about the safety and security of our country.
Add your name next to mine if you agree: Pete Hegseth cannot run the Pentagon. [https://www.jackreed.com/act/sign-on-to-oppose-the-nomination-of-pete-hegseth-as-defense-secretary?sc=tp_kaine]
I will keep working hard in the Senate to oppose unqualified nominees like Hegseth and keep our country safe and secure. Thank you for adding your voice to mine.
Sincerely,
Jack Reed
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/P5FfEbyeIEejNQSsVSzanQ2?unsubscribedata=vbIkxYwj1aYsYXIkmpvEi4drtfCVkx7IO6vYfUG13kHj5gZJsFJ%2BJORHCadeiQkBMW2YFKu9gzXFd130oZVkMIIURdBW8fVfh3QH4PBq6sTBB1Wzu%2BC%2BtS8RhBywyixkOsT0WWhGczgwhVCUZbjGa3uR5y7RUzceSQV4Kb7OCnZxN%2FFBer9PNGpFKaxfaXLUEMeRh2YVVBX8CLJUbywzeSLP95YKW9BYFSlpvf3aLLZ0EuTdqLrEIpq4nDC6CI1cH4s91y8R0w5jqNR0UkrFUOIigWLfzxF6%2BxEPRMSd0zwWwckjQtFdmhPKdjICOu87iKYxYjV2ULxuanTiqIx7NJA%2F6FRMTgPib4tx%2BCz6MMk%2B4wVXxzh9lvVLcmyjv2TBZ%2BmZux3stZdUaZbshZ6hAFDRVSXii%2BeO48cczdAroiU%3D .

Peter, As much as I would love to just say “sayonara” to the Biden administration and kick the dust off my feet, I simply can’t let this one go... In his last moments as president,**Biden pardoned Anthony Fauci** for any offenses he "_may_ " have committed serving as lead in the White House COVID task force. Fauci maintains his innocence—and here I thought pardons were only for the guilty! Still, Fauci thanked Biden for the pardon since it would protect his family from the stress of unwarranted prosecution... Oh, good! I am so glad his family will not have to endure any stress, unlike the untold number of families who have lost their loved ones, health, jobs, and other freedoms, thanks to his deceit. Law experts have stated that prosecutors could still indict Fauci in state court. Whether or not that will happen remains to be seen. _However, this blanket pardon confirms what we already knew to be true:_ **Fauci is guilty****!** And whether or not he pays for his crimes, we know the truth and will never cease to fight for the rights of those wronged by him and other vaccine TFVC will demand the truth no matter how many pardons are issued. **Will you stand with us?******

| | | [ Stand with Medical Liberty! ](https://xdzgmz.clicks.mlsend.com/tf/cl/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyMDEyNjAsXCJsXCI6MTQ0MzYxNzYzMjYxOTA4ODEwLFwiclwiOjE0NDM2MTc4NzQ1MDQ1OTM4MH0iLCJzIjoiYWMyNmVlNWZjYThlZWFhZSJ9)

clean_body: | | We Know the Truth | | | | | | Peter, As much as I would love to just say “sayonara” to the Biden administration and kick the dust off my feet, I simply can’t let this one go... In his last moments as president,Biden pardoned Anthony Fauci for any offenses he "may " have committed serving as lead in the White House COVID task force. Fauci maintains his innocence—and here I thought pardons were only for the guilty! Still, Fauci thanked Biden for the pardon since it would protect his family from the stress of unwarranted prosecution... Oh, good! I am so glad his family will not have to endure any stress, unlike the untold number of families who have lost their loved ones, health, jobs, and other freedoms, thanks to his deceit. Law experts have stated that prosecutors could still indict Fauci in state court. Whether or not that will happen remains to be seen. However, this blanket pardon confirms what we already knew to be true: Fauci is guilty! And whether or not he pays for his crimes, we know the truth and will never cease to fight for the rights of those wronged by him and other vaccine TFVC will demand the truth no matter how many pardons are issued. Will you stand with us?** | | | | Please donate today and help us protect the innocent victims of COVID corruption. | | | | Gratefully, Rebecca Hardy President, TFVC** ---|---|--- | | | | | Texans for Vaccine Choice 1540 Keller Parkway Ste 108 #166, Keller, TX 76248 United States | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | You received this email because you signed up or made a purchase from us. |

name: AOC
subject: Kind of foundational
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
How about that?
#
This is the United States of America.
I don't care what Elon Musk is doing behind a presidential seal in this country: **we hate Nazis**. Kind of a foundational, defining thing.
In fact, _two_ of the most foundational, defining things about American history is that we beat the Confederates and we beat the Nazis.
And I don't know what side people may be on today, but **I still am not rocking with anyone sympathetic to Nazis** , and I will do that until I am six feet in the ground.
It’s kind of foundational to me as a human being.
So, if you're cool and want to defend the Nazi salutes — that's on you.
I'm on the opposite side of that. I'm not with the Nazis. How about that?
In solidarity,
Alexandria
The Trump trifecta has taken hold, and so too have their billionaire, right-wing donors.
Our movement for real progress will have to **push harder than ever** these next four years.
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250123.sCRmBx&refcode=em20250123-7974-P_FND_RES_GND&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=7974%2E2526796%2Eihcvl0)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Weather extremes are connected by climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Fires and record-breaking cold temperatures across the country are all driven by climate change. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWy3LjgqzCTCordHjLWr-vVqVBOLtcSpJoIxlgz71kd09MoYzwUCywgn6ksV_lKrfa6akZGJXLf51wzVNiKnf82CGD6nIY3-RZ1DBwtDvlQCx3ubA83pGoJk-dxybJNOjG5mfS9m1yZAJ4z28zcbZhaYeh_LZQx5D6A_7H5ykTDe4wq6YIhyH6SL-PWgGz0yC4K17EePhSsZ2AzdgVdnYADw/4de/GTM2oVZaSrurTtDswjr24g/h0/h001.SfCKx-HvluelFj0WAy4pCp9Duff5iJMTYc46z0CLS_4)
---
Friend, Fires in Los Angeles are still burning, while most of the rest of the country is experiencing frigid temperatures, including record-breaking snowstorms in the deep South. My city of Detroit is used to the cold, but temperatures got so extreme that hundreds of schools closed and pipes burst, leading to water main breaks all over the city that flooded and then froze streets. All of these weather extremes are connected: They’re all intensified and caused by climate change. And the largest contributor to climate change is the fossil fuel industry. Instead of addressing this crisis that’s dangerous for all of our communities, Trump’s first actions in the White House included steps to make it worse. **Now more than ever, we need bold policies to help address the root causes of climate change and help our communities better prepare for the climate-fueled disasters to come.** For example, in the last congressional session, I joined Representative Ayanna Pressley to re-introduce the _Fossil Free Finance Act_ in the U.S. House of Representatives, in coordination with Senator Ed Markey in the Senate. This legislation would require major banks to stop financing fossil fuel projects and deforestation. [**Will you sign on today to demand Congress act to address the climate crisis, including by requiring major financial institutions to stop funding fossil fuels?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5uI0h55AeNqJGQhL6CI4WFcvPfiSS1BrbynjNQrU0OyywE4SYMk8ii0LVxdD1apGotdeGP9lsOkUP6HSt7Cp2Ic1kG-kKLLzycDVlsE_H41VcW0v05hNnk5e1pU6kYEbz265GJoOX_42c2Kv2n3YfGs_lR8bgUbJS4UCMpYefLUGt20TKn9ZiN40fdFIvaNwTHbahHVbRCtgwYuriczxK1OJl3kMuDix_WBZtoNoLRZ7bPxjoEmrc1W-9hh55bWFKrAgRTLvYqpiSD0UwnXDDRvqB6ZGoKByhQpwiCew_i-4zVdMEoHYAdy6WOkYwRqzr66vzInrNW73VNRWEidlQOFjYgEuYynmPOi6MxPgIqRZssxjdbCmP1vagpxaIbiMNuqqSC1Ru_0fmFbP59JXYpg/4de/GTM2oVZaSrurTtDswjr24g/h1/h001.8lLAZV6VDwIrzLk_XGfNRVubUs0Bt3IqSdV1Y38UIRw) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5uI0h55AeNqJGQhL6CI4WFcvPfiSS1BrbynjNQrU0OyywE4SYMk8ii0LVxdD1apGotdeGP9lsOkUP6HSt7Cp2Ic1kG-kKLLzycDVlsE_H41XyYKZUwPUMspZbYSjtJZqG24cSS_AdqSdHQ857IA6f-0Kd9M-anA-yno-KoU6NprtucuA-cHETPnq9Co9hn9sGVnqW9Al9PGWRChoqenRxn7MGODqTmWrFa_w28Jdxpk8bYbVGGeY7r9VdxDrAUmjQLrgNglWu75Ppe66vPKNl_D5mW3doMTOL9kGkzratDnxvfud29zP8rCM0pzZfYsTFH3YYIEdYZh01tEA9aKZTK9XA04jE6XASzsHQ4nNOiVoYv_C06N_XJThAdrjg1gxd_KbUpbI1-T5qht_wQjsugw/4de/GTM2oVZaSrurTtDswjr24g/h2/h001.Z6an2PMhSXGQ2K0d-81wFlmZ_V4NG-0REs3BW7sfWfA)
---
On his first day in the White House Trump took steps to: withdraw from the Paris climate accords and other pacts that have aimed to reduce emissions, declare a mostly-symbolic “energy emergency” to try to push for even more fossil fuel extraction (while threatening to block renewable energy), and undo protections for Alaska’s wilderness to encourage more fossil fuel production.
**Our communities don’t have time to wait. With Trump cozying up to fossil fuel executives, it’s time to ramp up our demands rather than back down.**
It’s time for policies like the _Fossil Free Finance Act,_ which directs the Federal Reserve to act on its responsibility to protect financial stability and finally address the financial risks posed by climate change—at the scale this crisis demands. Financial institutions under the Federal Reserve’s supervision provide trillions of dollars in direct fossil fuel financing, so targeting these big players is a critical way to make change happen quickly.
[**Please add your name to demand bold climate action from the U.S. government, including pushing the Federal Reserve to make big banks stop financing fossil fuels and deforestation.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm381rcfdHkIQD_K7aziRYYN5uI0h55AeNqJGQhL6CI4WFcvPfiSS1BrbynjNQrU0OyywE4SYMk8ii0LVxdD1apGotdeGP9lsOkUP6HSt7Cp2Ic1kG-kKLLzycDVlsE_H41XniACY3AXhKleL2WCJTyi-h5hVHGQlybDmuAAUzyyfJr4bjZ_pRHRJlN6yKY28l48chHCytTRtux5x_nCmgbxA0zlyAyqcFSfiKfPsh52W8CvKa7JiMSbbQgd6T32QaogUW3nNpDP47a6HFhzcn2zxjXT6wqkN780srPVQbokfw9HQ-ZRWfCiJ5tSaOM3zw1tJ0hSC9dURURXndP3rrQdNpTxNE3Mu4arOSAHn7ZOzahpLkbZ0POehyH74zkZqGk7ySEUWuHhnAQDDNP05prV-Lyqf_YE3n3Ppuu6yeZv-KA/4de/GTM2oVZaSrurTtDswjr24g/h3/h001.bo2cXFSuBaJO4tz2rCZYIK6rN67OjT4EmGrZgp5KPPI)
Thank you for continuing to push for the changes our communities need and deserve.
I will continue being your voice in Congress, where I will resist the Trump administration’s attacks on our environment, our immigrant neighbors, trans and queer people, programs like Social Security and Medicare, and our rights. I was again appointed to serve on the House Financial Services Committee, where I will keep fighting corporate greed and demanding a government that puts people over profits.
In solidarity,
Rashida
