name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: The only acceptable answer is “everything we could.”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2479%2E4032634%2EpF336h)
---
We lost Cecile Richards this week — former president of Planned Parenthood and a titan in the fight for reproductive rights. Cecile was the best of us. A relentless fighter with a heart bigger than Texas. Her service and her activism — especially during a time when Planned Parenthood and abortion rights were under attack by the far-right — made this movement stronger. Cecile’s courage and commitment helped prevent state laws that were aimed to restrict abortion access and critical reproductive care. She leaves behind a movement of abortion rights activists who are inspired and prepared to fight in this next phase of this work. [**So in Cecile’s honor, I invite you to support a few of the organizations she was inspired by who are working to support people seeking reproductive health care. Your donation today will be split evenly between the Midwest Access Project, the Women’s Emergency Network, the Tampa Bay Abortion Fund, the Lilith Fund, and Planned Parenthood Federation of America.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2919?t=8&akid=2479%2E4032634%2EpF336h)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2919?t=20&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2479%2E4032634%2EpF336h)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2919?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2479%2E4032634%2EpF336h)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2919?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2479%2E4032634%2EpF336h)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2919?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2479%2E4032634%2EpF336h)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2919?t=16&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2479%2E4032634%2EpF336h)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2919?t=18&express_lane=true&akid=2479%2E4032634%2EpF336h)
---

---
As Cecile shared in her speech at the DNC last August: _“One day our children and grandchildren may ask us, ‘When it was all on the line, what did you do?’ And the only acceptable answer is 'everything we could.’”_ I’m going to do everything I can in my position to protect abortion rights in America and help patients access the care that they need — no matter how hard the Trump-Vance administration works to rip away our freedoms. May Cecile’s life and legacy continue to inspire us all to make trouble in the fight for freedom. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |

name: The Democrats
subject: Recognize these names?
body:
---
Recognize these names, Derek? **Elon Musk
Tim Cook
Mark Zuckerberg
Jeff Bezos
Sundar Pichai
Miriam Adelson
John Paulson
Isaac Perlmutter
Shou Chew
Bernard Arnault
Sergey Brin ** These were the billionaires who were given prime seats at Trump’s inauguration earlier this week. Altogether, their total net worth is over _$1 trillion._ Donald Trump is loyal to billionaires, Derek. That means he will do whatever he can to enrich his ultra-wealthy backers while the rest of us foot the bill. It’s already started: On day one, Trump loosened ethical standards for federal appointees, enabling them to accept gifts from lobbyists and lobby directly after working for the federal government. Does that seem fair to you? We know things may seem bleak right now, but the truth is that in the last few months, thousands of Democrats have pitched in to help us build a strong Party with the resources to stand up to Trump and his allies. We can do it again — but only if we all come together. [**Right now, our average online contribution is about $29. If everyone reading this message matched that contribution today, we’d have the resources we need to strengthen our organizing efforts and build the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to check Trump and his billionaire allies’ power at every turn. Please, use these links to pitch in $29, or any amount that feels right to you:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?refcode=em_20250123_2641_fr&amount=29&refcode2=2641_22930333_fiuAwx&akid=2641%2E22930333%2EfiuAwx) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $29](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=29&refcode=em_20250123_2641_fr&refcode2=2641_22930333_fiuAwx&akid=2641%2E22930333%2EfiuAwx)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?refcode=em_20250123_2641_fr&refcode2=2641_22930333_fiuAwx&akid=2641%2E22930333%2EfiuAwx)**
---
****
Derek, we know $29 pales in comparison to $1 trillion. But trust us when we say that any amount goes a long way in helping us fight back — especially right now.
Thank you in advance for your help,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Jeff Younger
subject: I need your help to save my son
body:
| | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
| | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0dd01c1ff9348bfb3c8681c99f032fe&_e=h1VMXw-5ZByCuwR6qoj5yzabLTjqIVfiUIrnvrPwPsYTO0Yc6S_WblgxRdLWV21JZXV_A6FIMQ416oROMhrvfep58mEQTson7t3-DDEMtLKqc26t14X7TtNIe-O_M0kUR8Q47Ogn2jfApxA4HKIW6xdaADFjsyw4MzmkDexhSi1cqhTY1Iv4D7VlLjMtzu7T3ciqyUWc0uggV1hWDY2dM9OaefJUezYyz9EiftVZJ75S-FQpXXiEbF2thKD6ynie8yLGz-heegPa3xYEPJIrAxKtoChSibLWgYtbO35A2CHf2s2X7FjOBBKsW4GxG_hMzGlzxEl2Ci2WhjtvIHhqnbIoud_2pvKQ4r-9YcXT80Ef9ur3UQQHJ7UAG2vdCvwS)
---
My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. **[I need your help.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0dd01c1ff9348bfb3c8681c99f032fe&_e=h1VMXw-5ZByCuwR6qoj5yzabLTjqIVfiUIrnvrPwPsYTO0Yc6S_WblgxRdLWV21JZXV_A6FIMQ416oROMhrvfep58mEQTson7t3-DDEMtLKqc26t14X7TtNIe-O_M0kUR8Q47Ogn2jfApxA4HKIW6xdaADFjsyw4MzmkDexhSi1cqhTY1Iv4D7VlLjMtzu7T3ciqyUWc0uggV1hWDY2dM9OaefJUezYyz9EiftVZJ75JS2tsPlQTF715MWxZxgS_y3nb4w8tZucNpX63e3fl1g70wCK7ZZc8YuWc-cj9mO2PE0bR5FzeqiNocw-3pVyH20aPgvh8-CkeeWI3IpFJRxlUBPcF53lE52npQPrxsTxW29T6vSaddQ9azCFz4HOA)** I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. clean_body: | | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | My Dear Friend, My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’m writing to you because I’ve spent the last eight years fighting tooth and nail to keep school-appointed counselors, and out-of-control judges from transitioning my son James against my will and against all reason.You may have heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or on Fox News.I am James’s father, but because I refused to accept that my 5 YEAR OLD boy should be surgically and chemically castrated......I’ve watched the school system, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.Just recently, an LA Court ruled that my ex-wife is free to proceed with castrating my son James. That’s why I’m writing to you today. I’m up against radical trans-activist judges, the 6 BILLION dollar trans lobby, and coastal elites forcing their LGBTQ+ agenda down our throats. They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees... They’re trying to break my spirit... I want to keep fighting, but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me in the fight to Save James , But I’m getting ahead of myself...Let me start at the beginning. When James was just two years old, my ex-wife began saying our boy James was actually a girl.I told her she was wrong, and I kept dropping my son off at school in boy’s clothes because he is a boy. (I can’t believe I have to say that.) I later found out that the school counselors were changing him into girl’s clothes once he got to school WITHOUT MY KNOWLEDGE to inflame this delusion.Then during the custody battle, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.The court-mandated supervisor would ONLY let me see James if I put him in girl’s clothes. I have never affirmed the lie that my son is a girl, nor will I ever affirm it.So I was forced to stop visiting him.It broke my heart.Do you see what we’re up against? I can confirm that these trans-activist judges are presiding over kangaroo courts where common sense goes right out the window.They need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And James needs to be saved from their butchery. I am under a gag order currently to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Obviously, I’m not abiding by that order because it’s blatantly unconstitutional.But that’s not even the point.If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time. But I’m not just some activist.I’m a Dad.I’m fighting to save my son.And I will never give up on James.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers. I authored the bill in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee that outlawed sex change surgeries for minors.I then spent every dollar I had to make sure cowardly politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair. I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, but then my ex-wife just took James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state.And there was nothing I could do to stop it.And that’s the scary part:If this can happen in Texas, it can happen anywhere. Then in California, the radical judge railroaded me and gave my ex-wife free reign to proceed with the castration.I can’t even appeal the case because he sealed all the court records...I’ll have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process...On top of that, the other side is trying to make ME pay THEIR legal fees...Do you see what we’re up against? But if Conservatives won’t put up a fight, how will we ever win? That’s where Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) comes in. They heard about my case and immediately offered to stand by my side. | | | | | - | | The fact is, if you care about keeping your children or grandchildren safe...If you want to save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again...And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come...Then you’ll need someone who knows how these kangaroo courts ACTUALLY operate, and someone who’s willing to do WHATEVER it takes to save his son and every other kid like him.I humbly submit to you that I am that man. Your Warrior on the Frontlines,Jeff Younger P.S. I need your help to save my son. I have fought for a decade to keep radical activists and judges from transitioning my son against my will and against all reason. I have lobbied politicians, wiped out my life’s savings, and spent thousands of hours in court trying to save my son. Would you please rush me your I need your help, and I need to know that I’m not alone in this fight. Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

name: Fight Trump via Our Revolution
subject: We know folks are overwhelmed — but we have a plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21136?t=1016?refcode=email-20250123&akid=7573%2E5885482%2E5cEJdp ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis, we’ve spent
the last few days listening to our supporters and building out our plan to
fight back in this unprecedented political moment.

The dangers of Trump’s unholy alliance between government and corporate
power are on full display: Big Tech billionaires like Bezos and Musk
cheering next to Trump during his inauguration, Trump unleashing “drill
baby drill,” and plans to gut Medicare and Social Security to pay for
billionaire tax cuts.

It’s downright scary. We know Trump 2.0 feels overwhelming, but we are
crystal clear on what needs to happen to take down the rise of
Authoritarian Capitalism in America. In 2025, Our Revolution’s Grassroots
Army has a plan:

1. Fight Trump & the Oligarchs
Trump, Musk, Big Tech, and Big Oil are all coming together to plunder
our tax dollars, give themselves tax cuts and subsidies, and outright
privatize the government. It’s a corporate takeover. This is what
we’re up against and why our Citizen Army is ready to fight tooth and
nail against Trump 2.0.

Our Grassroots Army is 30,000 strong and growing — ready to mobilize
in the Capitol and in every single congressional district in the
country. Over 75% of our supporters said this week in our Trump 2.0
survey that they’re fired up and ready to support efforts to stop
Trump’s agenda.

We’re planning nationwide protests, direct citizen lobbying aimed at
members of Congress in their home offices and in D.C., drawing media
attention to expose the worst of Trump’s agenda, and organizing a mass
movement that rejects Trump’s Oligarchy. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21236?t=1011&akid=7573%2E5885482%2E5cEJdp ]We need your small dollar
donations to help fund our Citizen Action Team and our plans to fight
Trump’s Oligarchy.
2. Transform the Democratic Party
If the Party prioritized working people over corporate interests and
overpaid consultants, Donald Trump wouldn’t have won the presidency
AGAIN. There needs to be a change — and thousands of you told us you
support this mission in this week’s survey.

Next week, the DNC leadership elections are happening. We’re
pressuring DNC voting members to elect leadership who support getting
corporate money OUT of the Democratic Party. This is the issue that
can stop the Party from knee-capping progressives in primaries,
prioritizing the interests of billionaires and elites, and giving
right-wing groups like AIPAC, crypto PACs, Big Pharma, and others
influence over Democratic Party elections and politics.

We’re organizing ahead of the leadership elections, impacting the
vote, and preparing to create big media moments, so we can remake the
Democratic Party into a true opposition Party to take on Trump and a
real Party for the working class. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21236?t=1012&akid=7573%2E5885482%2E5cEJdp ]Can you chip in to support our
organizing to truly transform the Democratic Party? We must pressure
DNC members to put the grassroots over corporate influence!
3. Elect Progressive Champions
There are thousands of elections in 2025, and our movement is ready to
go all-in to elect progressives to school boards, city councils, state
legislatures, and beyond! Building progressive power at the state and
local level is CRUCIAL to making our communities more resilient under
Trump 2.0.

We’re getting back to our roots and building out the bench — the
pipeline of new progressive leaders who will be the Congress members
and presidential contenders of tomorrow. Our endorsement program is
recruiting and identifying candidates up and down the ballot, and
scheduling trainings to help them grow their grassroots base and
develop slates for progressive takeovers city by city.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21236?t=1013&akid=7573%2E5885482%2E5cEJdp ]Our supporters see down-ballot elections as a top priority — can
you help us fund our 2025 electoral operation by chipping in today?

Our plans involve a lot of organizers, strategy calls, protest action
planning and gear, working to grab hold of the media narrative, and so
much more. All three planks of our plan will take everything we’ve got —
from volunteering, to contacting lawmakers, donating, and more.

Our Citizen Action Team needs your help.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21236?t=1014&akid=7573%2E5885482%2E5cEJdp ]Will you stand with us and our 3 point action plan by sending Our
Revolution a donation today? Every dollar will be used to build out our
Grassroots Army so we have the strength to fight back effectively on every
front.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21236?t=1015&akid=7573%2E5885482%2E5cEJdp ]DONATE NOW

A lot is coming at us, but we are not powerless. We have a concrete plan
to fight back against Trump and the Oligarchs, Transform the Party, and
Elect Progressives who will take a stand.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a

The dangers of Trump’s unholy alliance between government and corporate power are on full display: Big Tech billionaires like Bezos and Musk cheering next to Trump during his inauguration, Trump unleashing “drill baby drill,” and plans to gut Medicare and Social Security to pay for billionaire tax cuts. It’s downright scary. We know Trump 2.0 feels overwhelming, but we are crystal clear on what needs to happen to take down the rise of Authoritarian Capitalism in America. In 2025, Our Revolution’s Grassroots Army has a plan: 1. Fight Trump & the Oligarchs Trump, Musk, Big Tech, and Big Oil are all coming together to plunder our tax dollars, give themselves tax cuts and subsidies, and outright privatize the government. It’s a corporate takeover. This is what we’re up against and why our Citizen Army is ready to fight tooth and nail against Trump 2.0. Our Grassroots Army is 30,000 strong and growing — ready to mobilize in the Capitol and in every single congressional district in the country. Over 75% of our supporters said this week in our Trump 2.0 survey that they’re fired up and ready to support efforts to stop Trump’s agenda. We’re planning nationwide protests, direct citizen lobbying aimed at members of Congress in their home offices and in D.C., drawing media attention to expose the worst of Trump’s agenda, and organizing a mass movement that rejects Trump’s Oligarchy. [ ]We need your small dollar donations to help fund our Citizen Action Team and our plans to fight Trump’s Oligarchy. 2. Transform the Democratic Party If the Party prioritized working people over corporate interests and overpaid consultants, Donald Trump wouldn’t have won the presidency AGAIN. There needs to be a change — and thousands of you told us you support this mission in this week’s survey. Next week, the DNC leadership elections are happening. We’re pressuring DNC voting members to elect leadership who support getting corporate money OUT of the Democratic Party. This is the issue that can stop the Party from knee-capping progressives in primaries, prioritizing the interests of billionaires and elites, and giving right-wing groups like AIPAC, crypto PACs, Big Pharma, and others influence over Democratic Party elections and politics. We’re organizing ahead of the leadership elections, impacting the vote, and preparing to create big media moments, so we can remake the Democratic Party into a true opposition Party to take on Trump and a real Party for the working class. [ ]Can you chip in to support our organizing to truly transform the Democratic Party? We must pressure DNC members to put the grassroots over corporate influence! 3. Elect Progressive Champions There are thousands of elections in 2025, and our movement is ready to go all-in to elect progressives to school boards, city councils, state legislatures, and beyond! Building progressive power at the state and local level is CRUCIAL to making our communities more resilient under Trump 2.0. We’re getting back to our roots and building out the bench — the pipeline of new progressive leaders who will be the Congress members and presidential contenders of tomorrow. Our endorsement program is recruiting and identifying candidates up and down the ballot, and scheduling trainings to help them grow their grassroots base and develop slates for progressive takeovers city by city. [ ]Our supporters see down-ballot elections as a top priority — can you help us fund our 2025 electoral operation by chipping in today? Our plans involve a lot of organizers, strategy calls, protest action planning and gear, working to grab hold of the media narrative, and so much more. All three planks of our plan will take everything we’ve got — from volunteering, to contacting lawmakers, donating, and more. Our Citizen Action Team needs your help. [ ]Will you stand with us and our 3 point action plan by sending Our Revolution a donation today? Every dollar will be used to build out our Grassroots Army so we have the strength to fight back effectively on every front. [ ]DONATE NOW A lot is coming at us, but we are not powerless. We have a concrete plan to fight back against Trump and the Oligarchs, Transform the Party, and Elect Progressives who will take a stand. When we organize, we win. Our Revolution [ ]Facebook | [ ]Twitter | [ ]Instagram | [ ]Youtube | [ ]Website | [ ]Sign Up [ ]Our membership swag Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive group in America. body:

[View in Web Browser](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kEtv4jAUhX-NsyNyrh0bL7wgw3gxoxmpqmgFOz8bF-fRvGj-fQWlbI--e8-no5s-xbBKxCsEUEc3IgBEdghgnsiLPhz-DeumqE6_NxcC_poj-HVHF3jArdXv5-O8YK5OY9V2Y_9x1kvxwKe19w_4Xpr7Rsd0Tfk-c5KCLoLNvCw44YyzciuyWnqjmQEhGAZXGkFD6SizDArhtgZEmUUJGEpcAAFSMszyYHgwjgpKS8y8ZYjiW1EeBu-nOrZnPzgd05rbrsmSrKepH29iCoHqnMnb2SY_j99XtmsQqLsyArUgUNPhLxfH5_99hYi6jUb2f5bdPnyK16dskK6_xJTiyDii-O3nTbZI-AoAAP__ZrZuww)

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kU1vnDAQhn_NcFsEYwy7Bw7ZOhwqVWoPSdRcosEeL-7yVduQ7r-vQJu9WY8fe95XQ8PcO3uroToDYudMAEQQT4C4RPFKLy8__O2Qn9-fD58CeeOA3-7qig951PTn-ntZs6p5D-dxCvPfK635Q4-3mR_yfWjKA7l-o5VKTF0g5VYnXOeVqMqqlMdT0tVHkq1oj-3RFkQGSZ5yZtlKW2RWMrWJqzFDmeUoUMgyK1PbVrY1xakoZFayLqHI9kGp9cyxc-OVvSHX31I9DUlfdzHOYQ_WADaB9eI5pZHNFDcDsInzTHq7aw-ko5tGEM0Sh4_IfgChHkeUQtlocsByY5qGmdxlBKG2gJm884GNW7aHntfQkec7D9PiNYNQof36YRojjxGE6qfLBFh-jL0zINQr009Fz2-62OG-N6G-r0_K_ju9_Up8beZP1_culBUU2WXvv9Vda_wfAAD__2pMnIU)

Friend,

Just when you thought things couldn’t get any weirder in California, we find out that the reason for the catastrophic failure to combat the Los Angeles County fires is due to the state’s insane Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) policies!

That’s right...

The new mission of the Los Angeles Fire Department (LAFD), according to its DEI hire, Chief Kristina Crowley, is “the creation of systemic equity and inclusion across the LAFD.”

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJw8kcGSnCAURb8Gd23hQ7FduJgOcZGqWWQxSaU3UwiPlmlFA-ik8_UprI476nB49wJyWkZrHi2pLwRgsDoQAMJeCMAa2Q_59vbqH6ficv16-mSAiRP48lQ3OGSn5Mf917rRuruGi5vD8vsut-LQ42PBQ36G5jhJOyZai0y3JcjCqAzbomY1r3l1brKh5Q09U1P0hkksGtqYSpmKakolP8u-V5ltgUJFC2DAKk55bvra9LpsyrKiHBUnJd2DcuMR42DdHb2Wdnzkap6ysR1iXMJerCPQBVSrx1w61HNMBoEuLotUaa8_SRXt7Ajr1ji9R_QTYeJYQsWEibogwBNTclqkvTnCRCpIqyefUNs1HfS4hUF6fPIwr14hYSL0_yfMLqKLhAk7yRumwe9utJow8Xp1XenD3_vHDvefY-Lb9iLMn-bn98y3evm042gDr0lJb_sLpAtvLfwLAAD___F_nPE)

This is UNACCEPTABLE.

The only questions that should matter when hiring or promoting within a fire department are:

_“Can you pull a grown man out of a building? Can you FIGHT a wildfire?”_

Friend, this is how California got itself into the devastating mess it’s in now, but there is hope.

And that hope comes in the form of President Donald Trump.

The promise of his return to the White House provides an opportunity for America and, yes, _even California_ to sever all ties with the DEI agenda and return to a system of meritocracy that elevates everyone according to his or her effort and ability.

Until then, we must reflect on and learn from the ongoing disaster, the magnitude of which is hard to comprehend...

27 dead.
22 missing.
150,000 displaced.
13,600 structures destroyed.
Catastrophic loss of pets and wildlife.

Friend, this is what’s at stake for our nation. We must band together to elect more America First candidates who are committed to upholding meritocracy and defending traditional American values over equity.

If we don’t, our very lives could be at stake.

[Donate today to help elect more America First candidates! Chip in your gift of $35, $50, $100, or more today to take a stand against DEI – in all its forms – and send a message to the radical left that we will not let them destroy this great nation like they’ve destroyed California! Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit.
